source: The CIA 's information-gathering efforts with regard to the Chilean military included activity which went beyond the mere collection of information . More generally , those efforts must be viewed in the context of United States opposition , overt and covert , to the Allende government . They put the United States Government in contact with those Chileans who sought a military alternative to the Allende presidency .
domestication: 中情局在智利军队的情报搜集活动中，不仅限于收集信息，还采取了更多行动。总的来说，这些活动得放在美国明里暗里反对阿连德政府的大背景下来看。这些行动让美国政府和那些希望用军事手段推翻阿连德总统的智利人建立了联系。
foreignization: 中情局对智利军队的情报收集活动超出了单纯的信息收集范围。更广泛地说，这些努力必须放在美国对阿连德政府的公开和秘密反对的背景下来看待。它们使美国政府与那些寻求军事替代阿连德总统的智利人建立了联系。

source: Thus far Nike has treated sweatshop allegations as an issue of public relations rather than human rights . The promises made by Phillip Knight in his May 1998 speech were an attempt by the company to switch the media focus to issues it was willing to address while avoiding the key problems of subsistence wages , forced overtime and suppression of workers ' right to freedom of association .
domestication: 截至目前，耐克对待血汗工厂的指控更像是公关问题，而不是人权问题。1998年5月菲利普·奈特的讲话中所作的承诺，无非是公司试图转移媒体关注点的一种手段，目的是回避那些根本性的问题，比如生活费水平的工资、强制加班和压制工人结社自由的权利。
foreignization: 到目前为止，耐克将血汗工厂的指控视为公共关系问题而非人权问题。菲利普·奈特在1998年5月的演讲中所做的承诺是公司试图将媒体关注点转向它愿意解决的问题，而避免了关键问题，如最低生活工资、强制加班和压制工人结社自由的权利。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

source: After all , Jesus commanded us to love everyone -- even our enemies . And love , for Jesus , is not a passive word that lets us sit back and proclaim affection from afar . a verb that requires action . " As I have loved you , so you must love one another , " he said . Then he died for everyone -- his friends , his enemies , gay people , those who protest in front of funerals holding " God hates fags " signs , and everyone else .
domestication: 毕竟，耶稣吩咐我们要爱所有人，甚至是敌人。对耶稣来说，爱不是个让我们坐享其成、隔岸观火的词，而是一个需要付诸行动的动词。“我怎样爱你们，你们也要怎样彼此相爱。”他是这么说的。然后，他为了所有人——朋友、敌人、同性恋者、那些在葬礼前举着“上帝憎恶同性恋”标语抗议的人，以及其他所有人——献出了自己的生命。
foreignization: 毕竟，耶稣命令我们要爱所有人——甚至我们的敌人。对耶稣来说，爱不是一个让我们坐下来从远处宣布爱意的被动词汇。爱是一个需要行动的动词。“我怎样爱你们，你们也要怎样彼此相爱，”他说。然后他为所有人而死——他的朋友、他的敌人、同性恋者、那些在葬礼前举着“上帝憎恨同性恋”标语抗议的人，以及其他所有人。

After all , Jesus commanded us to love everyone -- even our enemies . Then he died for everyone -- his friends , his enemies , gay people , those who protest in front of funerals holding " God hates fags " signs , and everyone else .

source: Foresight enables you to see opportunities , avoid threats , and chart the fastest path to your goals . The key to success is seizing opportunity when it arises . But you need to see the opportunity and be prepared to take action . That 's why foresight gives you power and agility to achieve any goal you want to achieve .

source: So not only was the food cheap and unimaginative , but we had very passive aggressive hosts - and to validate this gripe , just see their responses to the negative review by Tatyana V ( wow , that is not how you handle a negative review ) . source: When I first heard this song , I thought the lyrics were metaphorical , rather than literal . I thought it was a veiled diatribe against the generation of the ' 60 's who turned their back on their own idealism and embraced Yuppie materialism , to the consternation of succeeding generations of idealists .
domestication: 我头一次听到这首歌时，觉得歌词里的意思都是隐喻，不是字面的意思。我当时觉得这是在暗讽60年代的那一代人，他们背弃了自己的理想，一头扎进了雅皮士的物质生活里，让后来的理想主义者们大失所望。
foreignization: 当我第一次听到这首歌时，我认为歌词是隐喻的，而不是字面意义上的。我以为这是一篇针对60年代那一代人的隐蔽的抨击，他们背弃了自己的理想主义，拥抱了雅皮士的物质主义，令后来的理想主义者感到震惊。

When I first heard this song , I thought the lyrics were metaphorical , rather than literal . I thought it was a veiled diatribe against the generation of the ' 60 's who turned their back on their own idealism and embraced Yuppie materialism , to the consternation of succeeding generations of idealists .

source: The proliferation of internet based tools has expanded what it means to " be together " with others for learning , work and pleasure . How do we decide when to focus on the individual , the group or the wider network ? What are the strengths and weaknesses of each ? How does our choice inform our selection of tools and methods ? And what about all the gray area " in between " each of these ?
domestication: 互联网工具的普及，让“在一起”有了新的含义，无论是学习、工作还是娱乐。我们该怎么决定是关注个人、群体还是更广泛的社会网络呢？每种选择各有利弊。我们的选择又如何影响着工具和方法的选用呢？还有那些介于其间、模棱两可的部分又该怎么处理？

source: And to make sure our societies reach their potential , we must allow our citizens to reach theirs . No country can afford the corruption that plagues the world like a cancer . Together , we must harness the power of open societies and open economies . That 's why we 've partnered with countries from across the globe to launch a new partnership on open government that helps ensure accountability and helps to empower citizens . No country should deny people their rights to freedom of speech and freedom of religion , but also no country should deny people their rights because of who they love , which is why we must stand up for the rights of gays and lesbians everywhere .
domestication: 要让我们的社会发挥出最大的潜力，就必须让我们的公民也能发挥出他们的潜力。没有哪个国家能承受腐败这种像癌症一样侵蚀世界的祸害。我们必须共同努力，利用开放社会和开放经济的力量。因此，我们与全球各国合作，发起了一项新的政府开放伙伴关系，以确保问责制，增强民众的力量。任何国家都不应剥夺人民言论自由和宗教信仰自由的权利，同样，也不应因为人们所爱的人而剥夺他们的权利，所以我们必须为世界各地的同性恋者挺身而出，维护他们的权益。
foreignization: 为了确保我们的社会达到其潜力，我们必须让我们的公民达到他们的潜力。没有一个国家能够承受像癌症一样困扰世界的腐败。我们必须共同努力，利用开放社会和开放经济的力量。这就是为什么我们与来自世界各地的国家合作，发起了一项新的开放政府伙伴关系，以帮助确保问责制并帮助赋权公民。没有任何一个国家应该剥夺人们言论自由和宗教自由的权利，但也没有任何一个国家应该因为人们所爱的人而剥夺他们的权利，这就是为什么我们必须为世界各地的同性恋和女同性恋的权利挺身而出。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

And to make sure our societies reach their potential , we must allow our citizens to reach theirs . No country can afford the corruption that plagues the world like a cancer . Together , we must harness the power of open societies and open economies . That 's why we 've partnered with countries from across the globe to launch a new partnership on open government that helps ensure accountability and helps to empower citizens . No country should deny people their rights to freedom of speech and freedom of religion , but also no country should deny people their rights because of who they love , which is why we must stand up for the rights of gays and lesbians everywhere .

source: Damon took a swig of his favourite drink from The Grill ; bourbon whiskey . He turned to his left and rolled his eyes at Alaric who was stood by the darts board . Damon had brought Alaric here for a ' guys night ' , but he 'd just gone off with Jenna Sommers , the hot , ginger , Gilbert aunt . His lips curved into a smirk as he turned to face the bartender , Matt Donovan .
domestication: 达蒙从杯子里喝了一口他最爱的烤肉店的波旁威士忌。他往左边瞥了一眼，看到阿拉里克站在飞镖盘前，忍不住翻了个白眼。达蒙带阿拉里克来这儿是想好好放松一下，结果这家伙一转眼就去搭讪吉尔伯特家那位火辣的红发阿姨，珍娜·萨默斯了。达蒙嘴角扬起一丝坏笑，扭头对吧台里的马特·多诺万说道。

source: The Belcher name is sometimes described as meaning " beautiful dear or beloved , " because in modern French , the word cher refers to " dear " or " beloved . " However , a meaning more consistent with the name 's Old French origins is " good cheer . " Thus , according to William Arthur , An Etymological Dictionary of Family and Christian Names ( 1857 ) , the surname of Belcher means " good cheer " .
domestication: 贝尔彻这个名字有时被解释为“美丽亲爱的”或“心爱的”，因为现代法语中的“cher”有“亲爱的”或“心爱的”之意。不过，跟这个名字古法语起源更贴切的意思应该是“好心情”。所以，根据威廉·亚瑟在《家族名和教名的词源词典》（1857年）中的说法，贝尔彻这个姓氏的意思就是“好心情”。

source: In East Texas , heat and drought have had a startling effect on the clay-rich soils under highways , which " just shrink like crazy , " leading to " horrendous cracking , " said Tom Scullion , senior research engineer with the Texas Transportation Institute at Texas A &M; University . In Northeastern and Midwestern states , he said , unusually high heat is causing highway sections to expand beyond their design limits , press against each other and " pop up , " creating jarring and even hazardous speed bumps .
domestication: 在东得克萨斯，热浪和干旱对公路下的富含黏土的土壤产生了惊人的影响，这些土壤“就像缩水了一样”，导致路面出现“可怕的裂缝”。得克萨斯A&M大学交通研究院的资深研究工程师汤姆·斯库利翁说。而在东北部和中西部各州，异常高温使得公路路段超出设计极限膨胀，相互挤压，甚至“翘起来”，形成了让人颠簸不已、甚至危险的“高速路拱”。
foreignization: 在东德克萨斯，炎热和干旱对高速公路下的富含粘土的土壤产生了惊人的影响，这些土壤“就像疯狂收缩一样”，导致“可怕的裂缝”，得克萨斯农工大学的得克萨斯交通研究所的高级研究工程师汤姆·斯库利翁说。在东北部和中西部各州，他说，异常高温正导致高速公路路段超出其设计极限膨胀，相互挤压并“弹起”，形成令人不快甚至危险的减速带。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

In East Texas , heat and drought have had a startling effect on the clay-rich soils under highways , which " just shrink like crazy , " leading to " horrendous cracking , " said Tom Scullion , senior research engineer with the Texas Transportation Institute at Texas A &M; University . In Northeastern and Midwestern states , he said , unusually high heat is causing highway sections to expand beyond their design limits , press against each other and " pop up , " creating jarring and even hazardous speed bumps .

source: And ask yourselves this , theocrats : what is he likely to do if elected ? Certainly not impose the theocracy of your dreams , or that of your nightmares ( besides the islamic one ) . More likely , he 'll go the Bain Capital strategy . Load the nation up even more with debt , engineer a financial crisis , take the country bankrupt , and privatize the US government and the US military ( to the Chinese and other creditor nations ) .

source: Told through Mannie 's point of view , the novel is written in a clipped , abbreviated style that represents the Loonie version of English : many pronouns and articles are dropped , leading to sentences like : " Stomach was supposed to be empty . But I filled helmet with sourest , nastiest fluid you would ever go a long way to avoid . " This takes a few pages to get accustomed to , but soon you wo n't notice the odd style at all and accept it as part of the book 's revolutionary spirit .
domestication: 小说从曼尼的角度讲述，文风简洁，省略了很多词，就像是月球人的英语：代词和冠词常常被省去，句子变成了这样：“胃本该是空的，可我头盔里却装满了你避之唯恐不及的酸水。”刚开始读几页可能不太习惯，但很快你就不会在意这种奇怪的风格了，反而会觉得这是书里革命精神的一部分。
foreignization: 通过曼尼的视角讲述的小说，以一种简洁、缩略的风格书写，代表了月球英语：许多代词和冠词都被省略，导致出现这样的句子：“胃本该是空的。但我把头盔填满了你宁愿走很远的路也要避免的最酸最臭的液体。”这需要几页才能适应，但很快你就不会注意到这种奇特的风格，并将其视为书中革命精神的一部分。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Told through Mannie 's point of view , the novel is written in a clipped , abbreviated style that represents the Loonie version of English : many pronouns and articles are dropped , leading to sentences like : " Stomach was supposed to be empty . But I filled helmet with sourest , nastiest fluid you would ever go a long way to avoid . " This takes a few pages to get accustomed to , but soon you wo n't notice the odd style at all and accept it as part of the book 's revolutionary spirit .
小说从曼尼的角度讲述，文风简洁，省略了很多词，就像是月球人的英语：代词和冠词常常被省去，句子变成了这样：“胃本该是空的，可我头盔里却装满了你避之唯恐不及的酸水。”刚开始读几页可能不太习惯，但很快你就不会在意这种奇怪的风格了，反而会觉得这是书里革命精神的一部分。

Told through Mannie 's point of view , the novel is written in a clipped , abbreviated style that represents the Loonie version of English : many pronouns and articles are dropped , leading to sentences like : " Stomach was supposed to be empty . But I filled helmet with sourest , nastiest fluid you would ever go a long way to avoid . " This takes a few pages to get accustomed to , but soon you wo n't notice the odd style at all and accept it as part of the book 's revolutionary spirit .
通过曼尼的视角讲述的小说，以一种简洁、缩略的风格书写，代表了月球英语：许多代词和冠词都被省略，导致出现这样的句子：“胃本该是空的。但我把头盔填满了你宁愿走很远的路也要避免的最酸最臭的液体。”这需要几页才能适应，但很快你就不会注意到这种奇特的风格，并将其视为书中革命精神的一部分。

source: Like many others who have commented , I disagree pretty strongly about Melancholia , but not , I think , for the same reason . I would only object to Von Trier 's misanthrophy and nihilism if he did n't communicate them effectively , and in fact he communicated them superbly . I would credit the film with nearly all of the strengths its champions admire it for : superb visuals , terrific performances , an often sharp script .
domestication: 和许多评论者一样，我对《忧郁症》的看法也大相径庭，不过原因可能不同。如果冯·特里尔的厌世和虚无主义传达得不给力，我才会反对，但事实上他传达得非常到位。这部电影几乎具备了支持者们所欣赏的所有优点：绝美的画面、出色的表演、尖锐的剧本。
foreignization: 像许多其他发表评论的人一样，我对《忧郁症》的看法也相当不赞同，但我认为原因不同。我只会反对冯·特里尔的厌世和虚无主义，如果他没有有效地传达这些思想的话，而事实上，他传达得非常出色。我会认同影片几乎拥有其支持者赞赏的所有优点：出色的视觉效果，精彩的表演，经常犀利的剧本。

source: Translation : This thing coming from the party I support sounds really bad and makes me feel really uncomfortable , so I 'm going to wear a tin foil hat and insist all these reporters are committing a mass conspiracy , and somehow suggest all of this is a reason to vote for the party I do n't like . All of that makes me feel so much better . Yay , cognitive dissonance !
domestication: 我支持的政党搞出这么一档子事，听起来真糟糕，让人心里堵得慌。为了让自己好受点，我就戴上锡箔帽，坚持认为这些记者都在搞大阴谋，还暗示这一切都是要我投票给那个我不喜欢的政党。这样一想，心情反而舒畅多了。嘿，认知失调万岁！
foreignization: 这个来自我支持的政党的事情听起来真的很糟糕，让我感到非常不舒服，所以我打算戴上锡箔帽，坚持认为所有这些记者都在进行大规模阴谋，并且以某种方式暗示这一切都是投票给我不喜欢的政党的理由。所有这些都让我感觉好多了。耶，认知失调！

source: These achievements in workforce quality , however , mask a weakness in Virginia 's labor market . In 2011 , 12.2 percent of Virginia adults lacked a high school diploma -- the 24th highest among the 50 states . Montana had the lowest at 7.7 percent . The percentage of Virginia 's population without a diploma was lower than North Carolina ( 15.3% ) and Tennessee ( 15.8% ) , but higher than Maryland ( 11.1% ) . The national average was 14.1 percent .

source: What the kink community is very good at is having an open , accepting attitude toward one 's own desires , no matter how weird they may be . An attitude that says that as long as your desires are n't hurting anyone , including you , they 're fine . Where did they come from ? Why do you have them ? Does n't matter . They are what they are , and there 's no cause to beat yourself up over them . You might as well hate yourself for liking cream in your coffee or boxers over briefs .

source: We 've partnered with the American Institute of Ultrasound Medicine ( AIUM ) , Johns Hopkins , and the March of Dimes to create this unique peak into Baby 's development inside the womb . These images reveal all the intricate details of your baby 's growth -- from a collection of cells to a full-term newborn . While most women may only receive one or two ultrasounds during pregnancy , which is normal , this slideshow of the 1st trimester of pregnancy gives you a look at each week of development .
domestication: 我们与美国超声医学学会（AIUM）、约翰霍普金斯大学和生命最初的三个月基金会合作，共同打造了这一独特的视角，让你能够一窥宝宝在母体内的发育过程。这些图像展示了宝宝从一个细胞团成长为足月新生儿的每一个精细细节。大多数孕妇在孕期可能只做一到两次超声检查，这很正常，但通过这个怀孕初期的幻灯片，你可以每周都看到宝宝的成长变化。
foreignization: 我们与美国超声医学学会（AIUM）、约翰斯·霍普金斯大学和莫奇基金会合作，创建了这一独特的胎儿在子宫内发育的观察视角。这些图像揭示了您宝宝成长的所有复杂细节——从细胞集合到足月新生儿。虽然大多数女性在整个怀孕期间可能只接受一到两次超声波检查，这是正常的，但这个关于怀孕头三个月的幻灯片让您可以看到每周的发育情况。

source: For anyone who has traveled through Japan , one of the greatest cultural experiences is discovering a modern Japanese toilet . These toilets , known as " washlets " , have many amazing features - the most notable of which is they render toilet paper obsolete . After using one of these washlets for a while , you ca n't help but wonder why the American toilet experience is so primitive . Why has technological progress not eviscerated the need for toilet paper in America like it has in Japan ?  What is a Japanese Toilet ?
domestication: 谁要是去过日本，都会觉得现代日本马桶是一大文化体验。这些被称为“温水洗净便座”的马桶，功能多样，最让人印象深刻的就是它们让厕纸变得多余了。用过一段时间后，你不禁会想，为什么美国的如厕体验还这么原始？为什么技术进步没有像在日本那样消灭对厕纸的需求呢？日本的马桶到底是怎么回事？
foreignization: 对于任何去过日本的人，最伟大的文化体验之一就是发现现代日本马桶。这些马桶被称为“洗浄便座”，有许多令人惊叹的功能——其中最著名的是它们使厕纸变得多余。在使用了一段时间的这些洗浄便座之后，你不禁会想为什么美国的如厕体验如此原始。为什么技术进步没有像在日本那样消除美国对厕纸的需求？什么是日本马桶？

For anyone who has traveled through Japan , one of the greatest cultural experiences is discovering a modern Japanese toilet . These toilets , known as " washlets " , have many amazing features - the most notable of which is they render toilet paper obsolete . After using one of these washlets for a while , you ca n't help but wonder why the American toilet experience is so primitive . Why has technological progress not eviscerated the need for toilet paper in America like it has in Japan ?  What is a Japanese Toilet ?

source: Atrocities in the Rwandan genocide were not limited to those described above . Many murders were much more mundane ( simply instrumental ) or drew from other metaphors and sources ( from Nazi theories to Hollywood movies ) . Some showed influences of the Christianity of the colonizers ( e.g. , crucifixion ) . The point is that the flow/obstruction metaphors were not the only sources upon which Hutus drew to carry out acts of genocide . They were , however , key sources for the form of atrocities common in the Rwandan genocide .
domestication: 卢旺达种族屠杀中的暴行不仅限于上述描述。很多谋杀案更为普通（纯粹是工具性的），或是从其他比喻和来源中汲取灵感（从纳粹理论到好莱坞电影）。有些还受到了殖民者带来的基督教影响（比如十字架钉死人）。总之，流动/阻塞的比喻并非胡图人实施种族灭绝行为的唯一源泉，但却是卢旺达种族屠杀中最常见的暴行形式的关键来源。
foreignization: 卢旺达种族屠杀中的暴行不仅限于上述描述。许多谋杀更为平凡（仅仅是工具性的）或借鉴了其他隐喻和来源（从纳粹理论到好莱坞电影）。有些显示了殖民者基督教的影响（例如，钉十字架）。重点是，流动/阻塞的隐喻并不是胡图人实施种族灭绝行为的唯一来源。然而，它们是卢旺达种族屠杀中常见暴行形式的关键来源。

Atrocities in the Rwandan genocide were not limited to those described above . Many murders were much more mundane ( simply instrumental ) or drew from other metaphors and sources ( from Nazi theories to Hollywood movies ) . Some showed influences of the Christianity of the colonizers ( e.g. , crucifixion ) . The point is that the flow/obstruction metaphors were not the only sources upon which Hutus drew to carry out acts of genocide . They were , however , key sources for the form of atrocities common in the Rwandan genocide .

The point is that the flow/obstruction metaphors were not the only sources upon which Hutus drew to carry out acts of genocide . They were , however , key sources for the form of atrocities common in the Rwandan genocide .
卢旺达种族屠杀中的暴行不仅限于上述描述。许多谋杀更为平凡（仅仅是工具性的）或借鉴了其他隐喻和来源（从纳粹理论到好莱坞电影）。有些显示了殖民者基督教的影响（例如，钉十字架）。重点是，流动/阻塞的隐喻并不是胡图人实施种族灭绝行为的唯一来源。然而，它们是卢旺达种族屠杀中常见暴行形式的关键来源。

source: A bankruptcy discharge releases the debtor from personal liability for certain specified types of debts . In other words , the debtor is no longer legally required to pay any debts that are discharged . The discharge is a permanent order prohibiting the creditors of the debtor from taking any form of collection action on discharged debts , including legal action and communications with the debtor , such as telephone calls , letters , and personal contacts .

source: Submission of certification applications began June 21 , 2010 , and applications had to be postmarked no later than July 21 , 2010 , to be considered for the program . Applications that were postmarked by July 21 , 2010 , were reviewed by both the Department of Health and Human Services ( HHS ) and the IRS . All applicants were notified by letter dated October 29 , 2010 , advising whether or not the application for certification was approved . For those applications that were approved , the letter also provided the amount of the grant to be awarded or the tax credit the applicant was eligible to take .
domestication: 认证申请从2010年6月21日开始接受，邮戳最晚得是2010年7月21日，这样才能纳入项目考虑。7月21日之前寄出的申请，都会由卫生和公共服务部（HHS）和国税局（IRS）共同审核。所有申请者都收到了2010年10月29日发出的通知信，告知他们的认证申请是否通过。对于那些获批的申请，信中还说明了将获得的资助金额或有资格享受的税收抵免额度。

source: Infants born to non-allergic parents ( n = 23 ) were significantly more often colonized by the Lactobacilli at one week than infants born to allergic parents ( n = 35 ) ( Fig. 1A ) . This pattern was similar at the other investigated occasions during the first two months of life , although not statistically significant ( Fig. 1A ) . The number of occasions , having Lactobacilli during the first two months , was significantly higher among infants with non-allergic parents ( Fig. 1B ) . Furthermore , the relative amounts of the Lactobacilli were significantly higher or tended to be higher in infants with non-allergic parents at one and two weeks as well as at one and two months of age ( p = 0.013 , p = 0.065 , p = 0.036 and p = 0.058 respectively ) ( data not shown ) .
domestication: 父母无过敏史的婴儿（共23名）在出生一周后，乳酸菌定植的比例明显高于父母有过敏史的婴儿（共35名）（图1A）。这种趋势在头两个月的其他检查时间点上也存在，虽然不具统计学意义（图1A）。在头两个月内，乳酸菌定植次数明显更多的是那些父母无过敏史的婴儿（图1B）。此外，在出生一周和两周，以及一个月和两个月时，父母无过敏史的婴儿体内乳酸菌的相对数量显著更高或有更高的趋势（分别为p=0.013，p=0.065，p=0.036，p=0.058）（数据未显示）。
foreignization: 非过敏性父母所生的婴儿（n = 23）在出生一周时被乳杆菌定植的比例显著高于过敏性父母所生的婴儿（n = 35）（图1A）。在生命最初的两个月内其他调查时间点，这一模式相似，尽管没有统计学意义（图1A）。在最初两个月内有乳杆菌定植的时间点数量在非过敏性父母的婴儿中显著更高（图1B）。此外，非过敏性父母的婴儿在出生后一周、两周以及一个月和两个月时乳杆菌的相对数量显著更高或倾向于更高（p = 0.013，p = 0.065，p = 0.036 和 p = 0.058 分别）（数据未显示）。

source: Related to that little nugget of trivia , businesses that deal with small consumption tax-exempt operators are legally allowed to deduct the transactions from their overall consumption tax bill ( it 's apparently a little more complicated than that but that is the basic idea ) . I do n't know if they 're going to change that but it 's a weird little quirk of the system ( called ? ? ? ? for people who wish to google it )
domestication: 说到这个小趣闻，与小规模免税商家交易的企业，可以依法从自己的消费税账单中扣除这部分交易额（实际上这事儿要复杂一些，但大致就是这么个意思）。不知道以后会不会改，但这确实是现行制度里一个挺奇怪的小特点（想查的话，这制度叫“小额消费税抵扣”）。
foreignization: 与那条小知识相关的是，与小型消费税免税经营者交易的企业在计算其整体消费税时被法律允许扣除这些交易（这显然比这更复杂一点，但这是基本的想法）。我不知道他们是否会改变这一点，但这确实是系统中的一个奇怪的小特点（对于想要谷歌搜索的人来说，这个制度被称为????）。

source: By ( wisely ) unexplained means , each midnight he finds himself magically transported back in time to the legendary salon presided over by Gertrude Stein . He meets Scott and Zelda , Ernest , Picasso , Dali , Cole Porter , Luis Bunuel and , yes , " Tom Eliot . " He even gives Bunuel the idea for his film " The Exterminating Angel . " Kathy Bates makes an authoritative Miss Stein , and Marion Cotillard plays Adriana , who has already been the mistress of Braque and Modigliani , is now Picasso 's lover , and may soon -- be still , my heart ! -- fall in love with Gil .
domestication: 不知怎的，每到午夜，他发现自己就像中了魔法一般，被送回到了格特鲁德·斯坦因主持的那个传奇沙龙。在那里，他遇到了斯科特和泽尔达、海明威、毕加索、达利、科尔·波特、路易斯·布努埃尔，还有“汤姆·艾略特”。他甚至还给了布努埃尔电影《泯灭天使》的灵感。凯西·贝茨出演的斯坦因女士颇有权威感，玛丽昂·歌迪亚饰演的阿德里安娜，已经当过布拉克和莫迪利亚尼的情人，现在是毕加索的爱人，而且说不定——老天保佑！——还会爱上吉尔。
foreignization: 通过（明智地）未解释的手段，每个午夜他发现自己神奇地被传送回时间，来到由格特鲁德·斯坦主持的传奇沙龙。他遇到了斯科特和泽尔达、欧内斯特、毕加索、达利、科尔·波特、路易斯·布努埃尔，还有，是的，“汤姆·艾略特。”他甚至给了布努埃尔他的电影《灭绝的天使》的创意。凯西·贝茨扮演权威的斯坦小姐，玛丽昂·歌迪亚饰演阿德里亚娜，她已经先后成为布拉克和莫迪利亚尼的情人，现在是毕加索的恋人，并且可能很快——我的心静下来吧！——爱上吉尔。

He meets Scott and Zelda , Ernest , Picasso , Dali , Cole Porter , Luis Bunuel and , yes , " Tom Eliot . " He even gives Bunuel the idea for his film " The Exterminating Angel . " Kathy Bates makes an authoritative Miss Stein , and Marion Cotillard plays Adriana , who has already been the mistress of Braque and Modigliani , is now Picasso 's lover , and may soon -- be still , my heart ! -- fall in love with Gil .

source: You may have read in some books about a phenomenon that happens to people who lose everything , make a massive change or are in some tragedy ? they are introduced to their other selves who know all the answers . They come into contact with their spiritual side and become aware of the exact things they should do to get themselves out of the poverty and misery into the abundance , health and success .
domestication: 你可能在书上读到过，有些人一无所有、遭遇巨变或大难之后，会遇见另一个自己，那个自己似乎什么都知道。他们开始接触自己的精神世界，清楚地知道该做些什么，才能从贫困和痛苦中走出来，迈向富足、健康和成功。
foreignization: 你可能在一些书中读到过这样一种现象，发生在失去一切、做出巨大改变或遭遇某些悲剧的人身上？他们会遇到自己的另一个自我，这个自我知道所有的答案。他们接触到了自己的精神层面，意识到应该做些什么来让自己从贫困和苦难中走出，进入富足、健康和成功之中。

source: My argument is that there is something we can do , and should do , to get the economy rolling . I view the current problem in America as high wages &; benefits . These are fueling a lot of the problems with Exports from China to Federal &; State defeciets . High wages spread across the economy and lead to inefficiencies when these folks began to spend this money .
domestication: 我认为我们可以做点什么，也应该做点什么，来让经济运转起来。现在美国的问题在于工资和福利太高了。这成了从中国进口商品到联邦和州赤字的一大推手。高工资在经济中蔓延，当这些人开始花钱时，就导致了效率低下。
foreignization: 我的论点是，我们可以而且应该采取一些措施来促进经济增长。我认为当前美国的问题在于高工资和福利。这些因素加剧了中国出口到美国以及联邦和州赤字的问题。高工资在经济中广泛传播，并导致当这些人开始花费这笔钱时产生效率低下。

High wages spread across the economy and lead to inefficiencies when these folks began to spend this money .

source: If you are going to have large farms , you might as well ensure that you have the right equipment to work those farms , and in that spirit Iowa produced the first gasoline-powered tractor in 1892 ( John Froelich , Clayton County ) . Today , the state claims the largest tractor manufacturing plant in the U.S.

如果你打算拥有大型农场，你最好确保你有合适的设备来经营这些农场，本着这种精神，艾奥瓦州在1892年生产了第一台汽油动力拖拉机（约翰·弗罗利希，克莱顿县）。今天，该州拥有美国最大的拖拉机制造厂。

source: I do n't mind fusion . I do n't get food hangovers unless there 's a lack of balance with too much food . source: In our new book , NurtureShock , we argue that many modern strategies for nurturing children are backfiring -- because key twists in the science have been overlooked . Small corrections in our thinking today could alter the character of society long term , one future citizen at a time . The way white families introduce the concept of race to their children is a prime example .

foreignization: 在我们新书《NurtureShock》中，我们论证了许多现代养育儿童的策略适得其反——因为科学中的关键转折点被忽视了。今天在我们的思维上做出小小的修正，可以从长远的角度改变社会的性质，一次改变一个未来的公民。白人家庭向孩子介绍种族概念的方式就是一个典型的例子。

source: Only gravity ca n't exist soley in a specific brane , but wanders where it will , leaking off our brane into what physicists call " the bulk " -- the rest of space-time . Brane theory offer an fascinating and plausable explanation for why gravity is such a weakling : Maybe it 's not any weaker than the other forces , but just concentrated somewhere else in the bulk , or on another brane , providing the key to understanding the dark matter that makes up 90 % of our universe .
domestication: 只有引力不能单独存在于某个膜上，而是四处游荡，从我们的膜泄漏到物理学家所说的“体”中——也就是时空的其他部分。膜理论提供了一个既吸引人又合理的解释，说明为什么引力如此微弱：也许它并不比其他力弱，只是在“体”的某个地方或者另一个膜上集中了而已，这可能是理解构成我们宇宙90%的暗物质的关键。

source: The impact of the weather on the nation 's farmers has put new pressure on Congress to move ahead on the farm bill . But House Republican leaders have been reluctant to act because of divisions within the party 's rank-and-file about the cost of the nearly $1 trillion bill . The legislation includes several federal agriculture programs that farmers have come to expect , though it does not include any specific drought assistance . Several important disaster relief programs expired at the end of 2011 , leaving farmers and ranchers who have lost cattle or grazing land with few options without Congressional action .
domestication: 天气对全国农民的影响，给国会推进农业法案带来了新的压力。但众议院的共和党领导层因为党内基层对近万亿美元法案成本的分歧，迟迟不愿采取行动。虽然这项立法包括了农民们习以为常的几个联邦农业项目，但并没有特别的干旱援助。几个重要的灾难救助项目在2011年底就到期了，没有国会的行动，失去牲畜或牧场的农民和牧场主几乎没有什么选择。
foreignization: 天气对全国农民的影响给国会带来了新的压力，要求加快农业法案的进展。但众议院共和党领导层由于党内基层对近1万亿美元法案成本的分歧而不愿采取行动。该立法包括了几项农民已经习以为常的联邦农业计划，但不包括任何具体的干旱援助。几个重要的灾难救济项目在2011年底到期，如果没有国会的行动，失去牲畜或放牧地的农民和牧场主将几乎没有选择。

The impact of the weather on the nation 's farmers has put new pressure on Congress to move ahead on the farm bill . But House Republican leaders have been reluctant to act because of divisions within the party 's rank-and-file about the cost of the nearly $1 trillion bill . The legislation includes several federal agriculture programs that farmers have come to expect , though it does not include any specific drought assistance . Several important disaster relief programs expired at the end of 2011 , leaving farmers and ranchers who have lost cattle or grazing land with few options without Congressional action .

But House Republican leaders have been reluctant to act because of divisions within the party 's rank-and-file about the cost of the nearly $1 trillion bill . The legislation includes several federal agriculture programs that farmers have come to expect , though it does not include any specific drought assistance . Several important disaster relief programs expired at the end of 2011 , leaving farmers and ranchers who have lost cattle or grazing land with few options without Congressional action .
天气对全国农民的影响给国会带来了新的压力，要求加快农业法案的进展。但众议院共和党领导层由于党内基层对近1万亿美元法案成本的分歧而不愿采取行动。该立法包括了几项农民已经习以为常的联邦农业计划，但不包括任何具体的干旱援助。几个重要的灾难救济项目在2011年底到期，如果没有国会的行动，失去牲畜或放牧地的农民和牧场主将几乎没有选择。

source: Every Remembrance Day ceremony I 've attend here in Canada has included some discussion of praying for peace and finding a way to bring about peace without war . It is interesting to me to see the contrast between American Veteran 's Day . I never thought of Nov. 11 being anything but remembering those who lost their lives in war , those who are currently serving , and acknowledging war is not the way to achieve peace and hoping for a future without it . posted by kanata at 12:40 PM on November 11
domestication: 每次在加拿大参加的阵亡将士纪念日活动，都会提到祈求和平，寻找不通过战争就能实现和平的方法。这让我感到有趣的是，和美国的退伍军人节相比，真是大相径庭。我一直以为11月11日就是为了缅怀那些在战争中牺牲的人，感谢现在仍在服役的军人，同时认识到战争并不是实现和平的途径，真心希望未来没有战争。kanata 发表于 11月11日下午12点40分

source: That was the wackest and most boring reunion show ever . Why is John Salley hosting ? He 's lame , boring , and displays a lot of bitchassness up their gossiping and instigating a bunch of foolish women . They need to bring Wendy Williams back to host . I was thoroughly embarrassed for all of them , especially Jackie . She has mental problems and is trying too hard to be the standout " Nene " of the show .
domestication: 这简直是史上最没劲的重聚秀了。约翰·萨利来主持是什么鬼？他不仅无聊透顶，还一脸欠揍的样子，在那儿煽风点火，挑拨几个糊涂的女人互相撕扯。节目组应该让温迪·威廉姆斯回来主持才对。我看这节目都替他们尴尬，尤其是杰基。她明显有心理问题，还硬要装成节目里的“妮妮”，抢风头。

source: This is how the international community is supposed to work -- nations standing together for the sake of peace and security , and individuals claiming their rights . Now , all of us have a responsibility to support the new Libya -- the new Libyan government as they confront the challenge of turning this moment of promise into a just and lasting peace for all Libyans .
domestication: 国际社会就该这样运作——各国为了和平与安全携手并肩，个人也争取自己的权利。现在，我们都得支持新生的利比亚——支持新政府，帮他们应对挑战，把这充满希望的时刻转化为全体利比亚人民的公正和持久和平。
foreignization: 这就是国际社会应该运作的方式——国家为了和平与安全站在一起，个人争取他们的权利。现在，我们所有人都有责任支持新的利比亚——新的利比亚政府，因为他们面临着将这一充满希望的时刻转变为所有利比亚人的公正和持久和平的挑战。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

This is how the international community is supposed to work -- nations standing together for the sake of peace and security , and individuals claiming their rights . source: " I like books . " This is one answer to the introductory question I ask when meeting a class for the first time : " What brings you to librarianship ? " The answers vary just as LIS students do , whether they 're recent college graduates or those returning to school for a second career in libraries . The " books " answer begs the question , " Do you mean the content or the container ? " Students starting graduate school who want to work in libraries with stacks filled with books may be aiming for the wrong -profession .
domestication: 我喜欢书。这是我第一次见到一个班级时问的开场问题：“是什么让你选择了图书馆工作？”答案千差万别，就像这些信息和图书馆学的学生一样，无论是刚从大学毕业的，还是半路出家来读第二学位的。说喜欢“书”的人，我得追问一句，你是喜欢书的内容呢，还是书的形式？那些满怀热情想在藏书丰富的图书馆工作的研究生，可能找错了职业方向。
foreignization: “我喜欢书。”这是我第一次与一个班级见面时问的介绍性问题的一个答案：“是什么让你选择了图书馆学？”答案各不相同，就像图书馆和信息科学（LIS）专业的学生一样多样化，无论是最近的大学毕业生还是那些为了在图书馆开始第二职业生涯而重返学校的人。“书”这个答案引出了一个问题：“你是指内容还是容器？”那些想要在藏书丰富的图书馆工作的研究生可能瞄准了错误的职业方向。

source: In domestic policy the President pursued a middle course , continuing most of the New Deal and Fair Deal programs , emphasizing a balanced budget . As desegregation of schools began , he sent troops into Little Rock , Arkansas , to assure compliance with the orders of a Federal court ; he also ordered the complete desegregation of the Armed Forces . " There must be no second class citizens in this country , " he wrote .
domestication: 在内政上，总统采取了中间路线，继续实施大部分新政和公平交易政策，强调预算平衡。学校开始废除种族隔离时，他派兵进入阿肯色州的小石城，确保遵守联邦法院的命令；他还下令彻底废除军队中的种族隔离。“这个国家不能有二等公民”，他写道。
foreignization: 在内政政策上，总统采取了中间路线，继续实施大多数新政和公平交易计划项目，强调预算平衡。随着学校开始取消种族隔离，他向阿肯色州小石城派遣了军队，以确保遵守联邦法院的命令；他还下令彻底取消武装部队中的种族隔离。“这个国家不能有二等公民，”他写道。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In domestic policy the President pursued a middle course , continuing most of the New Deal and Fair Deal programs , emphasizing a balanced budget . As desegregation of schools began , he sent troops into Little Rock , Arkansas , to assure compliance with the orders of a Federal court ; he also ordered the complete desegregation of the Armed Forces . " There must be no second class citizens in this country , " he wrote .
在内政上，总统采取了中间路线，继续实施大部分新政和公平交易政策，强调预算平衡。学校开始废除种族隔离时，他派兵进入阿肯色州的小石城，确保遵守联邦法院的命令；他还下令彻底废除军队中的种族隔离。“这个国家不能有二等公民”，他写道。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In domestic policy the President pursued a middle course , continuing most of the New Deal and Fair Deal programs , emphasizing a balanced budget . As desegregation of schools began , he sent troops into Little Rock , Arkansas , to assure compliance with the orders of a Federal court ; he also ordered the complete desegregation of the Armed Forces . " There must be no second class citizens in this country , " he wrote .
在内政政策上，总统采取了中间路线，继续实施大多数新政和公平交易计划项目，强调预算平衡。随着学校开始取消种族隔离，他向阿肯色州小石城派遣了军队，以确保遵守联邦法院的命令；他还下令彻底取消武装部队中的种族隔离。“这个国家不能有二等公民，”他写道。

source: Civility and compromise are at a pretty low ebb in the political world . That 's partly because of the Republican flight to the right , but also because we live in a time when every political sneeze is analyzed ad nauseum in cyberspace , and on talk radio and TV , before anyone can say " God Bless You . " Gridlock will leave voters even more disgusted with both parties in 2016 than it did this year .
domestication: 如今政坛的文明与妥协达到了相当低的水平。这固然有共和党右倾的原因，但也是因为我们生活在一个凡事都要在网络、电台和电视上反复咀嚼的时代，还没等谁说声“上帝保佑你”呢，政治上的风吹草动就已经被分析得底朝天了。僵局会让选民在2016年对两党更加失望，比今年还要甚。
foreignization: 文明和妥协在政治世界中处于相当低的水平。这部分是由于共和党向右翼的转移，但也因为我们生活在一个每个政治动向都会在网路、谈话电台和电视上被分析得令人厌烦的时代，在任何人能说“上帝保佑你”之前。僵局将使选民在2016年对两党更加失望，比今年更为严重。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Civility and compromise are at a pretty low ebb in the political world . That 's partly because of the Republican flight to the right , but also because we live in a time when every political sneeze is analyzed ad nauseum in cyberspace , and on talk radio and TV , before anyone can say " God Bless You . " Gridlock will leave voters even more disgusted with both parties in 2016 than it did this year .
如今政坛的文明与妥协达到了相当低的水平。这固然有共和党右倾的原因，但也是因为我们生活在一个凡事都要在网络、电台和电视上反复咀嚼的时代，还没等谁说声“上帝保佑你”呢，政治上的风吹草动就已经被分析得底朝天了。僵局会让选民在2016年对两党更加失望，比今年还要甚。

source: The report by the International Atomic Energy Agency indicated that for the first time Iran had begun producing fuel inside the new facility in a mountain near the holy city of Qum . source: " A.K. source: Actions speak louder than words . When the actions of these candidates do n't match their rhetoric , there 's a serious issue . WAKE UP PEOPLE . Flying drones into civilian areas is an act of war . The ridiculous topics and lack of detail in debates prove it IS more entertainment than seriousness ( especially considering neither one of them do what they say ) . Providing " humanitarian aid " to countries while arming the rebels , is not spreading democracy . Interveining in the lives of innocent civilians in these countries are not justified . Keeping bases in these countries loaded with US military is NOT withdrawing . Regardless of what comes out of both Obama 's and Romney 's mouths , they can not be taken as fact . They 've proven time and time again that they simply SAY what sounds nice and then do what they like .
domestication: 事实胜于雄辩。当这些候选人的行动与他们的言论不符时，问题就严重了。醒醒吧，人们！向平民区派遣无人机就是战争行为。辩论中的荒谬话题和缺乏细节证明这更像是娱乐，而不是严肃的政治活动（尤其是他们两个都不会按自己说的去做）。一边提供“人道援助”，一边武装反叛者，并不是在传播民主。干预这些国家无辜平民的生活是没有正当理由的。在美国军事基地仍驻扎在这些国家的情况下，说什么撤军完全是骗人的。无论奥巴马和罗姆尼怎么说，都不能当真。他们已经一次又一次地证明，他们只会说些好听的话，然后按自己的意愿行事。
foreignization: 行动胜于言语。当这些候选人的行动与其言论不一致时，就有一个严重的问题了。人们醒醒吧。无人机飞入平民区是一种战争行为。辩论中荒谬的话题和缺乏细节证明了这更多的是娱乐而不是严肃（尤其是考虑到他们两个都说一套做一套）。在向其他国家提供“人道主义援助”的同时武装叛军，并不是在传播民主。干涉这些国家无辜平民的生活是无法正当化的。在美国军事基地依然驻扎在这些国家的情况下，说撤军是不成立的。无论奥巴马和罗姆尼嘴里说什么，都不能当作事实。他们一次又一次地证明了他们只是说些听起来不错的话，然后做他们想做的事。

Keeping bases in these countries loaded with US military is NOT withdrawing . Regardless of what comes out of both Obama 's and Romney 's mouths , they can not be taken as fact . They 've proven time and time again that they simply SAY what sounds nice and then do what they like .

source: After winning a city grant last summer the shelter will be able to open its doors two Saturdays per month to those in need of pet food and supplies , such as cat litter and food bowls . In addition , The Drake Center for Veterinary Care will be providing free medical care , such as exams and vaccines , once a quarter .

source: PageRank is what Google uses to determine the importance of a web page . It 's one of many factors used to determine which pages appear in search results.PageRank measure 's a web page 's importance . Page and Brin 's theory is that the most important pages on the Internet are the pages with the most links leading to them . PageRank thinks of links as votes , where a page linking to another page is casting a vote . This makes sense , because people do tend to link to relevant content , and pages with more links to them are usually better resources than pages that nobody links .
domestication: PageRank 是谷歌用来判断网页重要性的工具。它只是决定哪些页面能在搜索结果中出现的众多因素之一。PageRank 评估的是网页的重要性。佩奇和布林的理论是，互联网上最重要的页面就是那些链接最多的页面。PageRank 把链接看作是投票，一个页面链接到另一个页面，就相当于投了一票。这很有道理，因为人们确实倾向于链接到相关内容，而链接多的页面通常比没有人链接的页面更有价值。
foreignization: PageRank 是谷歌用来确定网页重要性的工具。它是决定哪些页面出现在搜索结果中的许多因素之一。PageRank 测量的是网页的重要性。Page 和 Brin 的理论是，互联网上最重要的页面是那些拥有最多链接指向的页面。PageRank 将链接视为投票，一个页面链接到另一个页面就等于投了一票。这是合理的，因为人们确实倾向于链接到相关的内容，而有更多的链接指向的页面通常比没有人链接的页面是更好的资源。

source: AFL-CIO leaders are holding out hope that Crane will eventually drop the suit , which is awaiting a court date . Next year the labor movement plans once again to push Congress to take up comprehensive immigration reform -- and they 'd much rather have a brawler like Crane as an ally than an adversary in that fight . " It 's something we can work past , " says the AFL-CIO 's DiBitetto . " I 'm sure they want to see the broken system repaired . "

source: To be at our most efficient , we need to be able to switch backwards and forward between the two modes . But -- here 's the problem -- we too often get stuck in the closed mode . Under the pressures which are all too familiar to us , we tend to maintain tunnel vision at times when we really need to step back and contemplate the wider view .

source: An end to government charity . It is the role of our churches and the individual to supply charity to the poor , not the state . If the individual and churches can not supply the charity , government could only do worse . Having government provide charity absolved the conscience and duty of the people from their proper role to love their neighbor .
domestication: 政府的慈善该结束了。帮助穷人应该是教会和个人的事，而不是政府的责任。如果个人和教会都做不到，政府只会做得更糟。政府提供慈善，反而让民众推卸了本来应该承担的邻里相亲、互帮互助的责任。
foreignization: 结束政府的慈善。我们的教会和个人应该向穷人提供慈善，而不是国家。如果个人和教会不能提供慈善，政府只会做得更糟。政府提供慈善会使人民从其应有的角色中解脱出来，即爱人如邻。

source: Though I dislike everything else pink , I loved my aunt 's pink bath , with it 's faux pink tile linoleum around the tub . I absolutely adored the black wall paper with lily pads , white flowers and pink flamingos above the burnt pine wainscoting ( and which I 've searched for in vain for years- does n't ANYONE have a pink flamingo pattern with a BLACK background ? ? ? ) . I loved the pink fixtures and the white lace curtains . I loved the pink shower curtain with pink flamingos and green lily pads . If I can EVER find wallpaper that matches that description , my bath will pay homage to that most glorious Mamie Pink .
domestication: 虽然我平时对粉色没啥好感，但我特别喜欢我阿姨家的粉色浴室，尤其是浴缸周围那仿粉色瓷砖的塑料地板。我简直太爱墙上的黑色壁纸了，上面有荷叶、白花和粉红火烈鸟，底下是烤松木护墙板。这些年来我一直想找这种壁纸，可就是找不到——难道就没人生产黑色底的粉红火烈鸟图案吗？我还喜欢那些粉色的洁具和白色的蕾丝窗帘，还有那粉色浴帘，上面有粉红火烈鸟和绿色的荷叶。要是我能找到跟这描述一样的壁纸，我家的浴室一定要向那最辉煌的“曼米粉”致敬。
foreignization: 虽然我讨厌所有其他粉红色的东西，但我喜欢我阿姨的粉红色浴室，浴缸周围有仿粉红色瓷砖的乙烯基地板。我绝对喜欢黑色墙纸上的荷叶、白花和粉红火烈鸟，这些图案位于烧焦的松木护墙板上方（而且我多年来一直在徒劳地寻找——难道没有人有黑色背景的粉红火烈鸟图案吗？？？）。我喜欢粉红色的洁具和白色的蕾丝窗帘。我喜欢带有粉红火烈鸟和绿色荷叶的粉红色淋浴帘。如果我能够找到符合这一描述的墙纸，我的浴室将向那最辉煌的玛米粉致敬。

source: But if the weather does not improve , the situation could get much worse , said David R. Busse , the chief of the engineering and construction division for the St. Louis district of the corps . If the rains do not come , the river will continue to drop . There will be a precipitous fall of about two feet at St. Louis toward the end of 2012 , when the reservoirs up the Missouri River , as scheduled every year , stop releasing water into the Mississippi .
domestication: 但是天气要是再不转好，情况可能会变得更糟，圣路易斯区工程兵部队的工程和建设部门负责人戴维·R·布斯说。要是不下雨，河水就会继续下降。到了2012年底，密苏里河上游的水库像往年一样停止向密西西比河放水时，圣路易斯段的水位会猛降两英尺。

source: And make no mistake : This book came out of nowhere . It started as Twilight fanfiction , then was released as an e-book and POD paperback by Writers ' Coffee Shop in Australia . From there it managed to attract so much word-of-mouth attention and sales it was acquired for a rumored near-million dollars by Vintage Books , part of Random House , and has gone on to aforementioned further massive success .
domestication: 你可别小看了这本书，它原本是个无名小卒。起先是《暮光之城》的同人小说，后来在澳大利亚的一家叫“作家咖啡馆”的出版社出了电子书和按需印刷的平装本。结果呢，靠着口口相传的推荐和销量，它居然火了，据说被兰登书屋旗下的万古图书以近百万美元的价格买下，从此一发不可收拾，成就了如今的大红大紫。
foreignization: 而且不要误会：这本书是横空出世的。它最初是《暮光之城》的同人小说，然后由澳大利亚的Writers' Coffee Shop作为电子书和按需印刷平装本发行。从那里，它设法吸引了如此多的口口相传的关注和销量，以至于被兰登书屋旗下的Vintage Books以传闻中的接近百万美元的价格收购，并且此后取得了上述进一步的巨大成功。

source: Heroin Content 's characteristics vary by type of site -- but you 'll know it when you see it . One global characteristic , though , is frequently updated content . source: The CT-RI Public Health Training Center at the Yale School of Public Health is placing priority on cross cultural communications training for all sectors of the public health workforce and will soon announce a new initiative to be lead by Elaine O'Keefe and Dr. Rafael Perez-Escamilla of the Office of Community Health where the PHTC is based .
domestication: 耶鲁公共卫生学院的CT-RI公共卫生培训中心正着力加强跨文化沟通培训，惠及公共卫生领域的各个层面。不久后，培训中心将启动一项新计划，由社区健康办公室的伊莱恩·奥基夫和拉斐尔·佩雷斯-埃斯卡米利亚博士共同领导。这个办公室正是培训中心的所在地。

source: AMENA : My creative process starts with music , preferably John Coltrane or Miles Davis . I almost always do a free write before I write anything else . The combination of the free write and the jazz gives me a chance to write unedited and with no end goal in mind except to get my words and thoughts flowing . One of my obstacles is the constant fear that something I 'm writing is n't good enough . This thought often keeps me from just sitting down to write versus coming up with all sorts of errands to run and items to clean ! source: The key to the oral exam is practicing conveying your ideas out loud . So I would send Miles to the basement , where there is a computer and a TV and a comfortable couch , and I would talk to myself . Read a question , answer it out loud , check the answer . The kids always want to pretend -- tigers , Star Wars , mice , dinosaurs , so the pretending was natural . I sat at my kitchen counter for half an hour and pretended that white men in suits were asking me questions and that I was answering each question perfectly . I even laughed . At times I challenged them .
domestication: 口语考试的关键在于多练习当众表达自己的想法。所以我让迈尔斯去地下室，那儿有电脑、电视和舒适的沙发，我自己就开始练习了。读一个问题，大声回答，再核对答案。孩子们总是喜欢扮演角色——老虎、《星球大战》的角色、老鼠、恐龙什么的，所以假装起来很自然。我坐在厨房的台子上半小时，假装穿着白西装的白人在问我问题，而我则完美地回答每一个问题，甚至还笑了。有时候我还反驳他们。

source: Easy one , since they have absolutely no new ideas , and the ideas they do have are universally unpopular , they have no choice but to focus like lasers on classic pseudo-scandals like the Lincoln Bedroom . Of course the press corps never told you 2/3 of the visitors gave no money at all ! , or the fact 72 of the visitors were sleepovers with Chelsea . Nor is it acceptable to detail visitors in the Bush White House . That 's a waste of taxpayer money , and really none of our business .

source: I am writing you with much concern after having read of your hearing to decide whether the alternative theory of Intelligent Design should be taught along with the theory of Evolution . I think we can all agree that it is important for students to hear multiple viewpoints so they can choose for themselves the theory that makes the most sense to them . I am concerned , however , that students will only hear one theory of Intelligent Design .
domestication: 我看了你那边关于是否要在课堂上同时讲授智能设计论和进化论的听证会消息，心里挺着急的。咱们都明白，让学生听到不同的观点很重要，这样他们才能自己选择最合心意的说法。但我就担心啊，学生可能只会听到一种智能设计论。
foreignization: 我在读到关于是否应该将智能设计理论与进化论一起教授的听证会后，怀着极大的关切给您写信。我认为我们都可以说，让学生听到多种观点是很重要的，这样他们可以自己选择最符合他们逻辑的理论。然而，我担心的是，学生只会听到一种智能设计理论。

source: My wife and I are renovating our house and we want to have the aame colors as the bathroom did in my parents ' first house . It was a ranch style house built in 1955 . And while the wall tiles and floor tiles were pink , the tub , toilet and lavatory sink were blue . Unfortunately my parents sold the house when I was only 2 years old so I have no recollection of that bathroom , but my mom took some old home movie footage of me taking a bath when I was a year old or so and the blue tub and pink tiles on the wall really looked good .

source: Many of the students were there for teaching degrees . Most of the boys were studying for divinity degrees , but all of my girlfriends were working for their " Mrs. " degrees . I finally went home without finishing and felt bad about it . I thought I had wasted my scholarship , as well as the money my parents had contributed . But I just did not know what I wanted to be . My conscience prevented me from spending good money without knowing God 's direction for me . Back at home , I went to work as a secretary , which I did for fourteen years .

source: We bought a 1956 ranch house in Las Vegas two years ago with a wonderful pink and chocolate brown bathroom . When the pink toilet in it passed away we searched until we found a new pink toilet ( from Kohler ) so we could keep it pink ! Our plan is to put in pink VCT flooring if we can find it . We still have a long way to go in our restoration project but we are so happy to have our lovely pink and brown bathroom .
domestication: 两年前，我们在拉斯维加斯买了一栋1956年的牧场风格房子，里面有一个特别漂亮的粉色和巧克力棕色的浴室。那里面的粉色马桶“寿终正寝”后，我们费了好大劲才找到一个新的粉色马桶（还是科勒的），就是为了保持这个颜色！我们打算要是能找到的话，再铺上粉色的PVC地板。我们的翻新工程还有很长的路要走，但能拥有这样一个美丽又复古的粉棕浴室，我们真是高兴坏了。

source: KANSAS CITY , Mo . ( PRWEB ) November 14 , 2012 - Qualified buyers will have the opportunity to purchase cropland with long-term CRP contracts in Colorado . These 976 acres of land are located near Vona , Colo. , and will be offered to the public in three separate tracts and in its entirety during a live and online multi-tract auction .

source: Every girl , virgin or not , bears God 's image in her soul . God created his daughters and his sons to be his image bearers . His vision from creation was for his daughters to be his representatives in this world -- to speak and act on his behalf . This gives significance to every aspect of a girl 's life and means , of course , that God wants every one of his daughters to know him in deep ways , to love what he loves , and to invest her life to advance his kingdom wherever she may find herself .
domestication: 每个女孩，不论是否还是处女，灵魂中都承载着上帝的形象。上帝创造了女儿和儿子，就是要他们成为他的形象代表。从创世之初，上帝的愿景就是让他的女儿们成为他在世上的使者，代他发言，代他行事。这赋予了女孩生命中每一个方面的意义，当然也意味着上帝希望他的每一个女儿都能深刻地认识他，热爱他所爱的一切，并在自己所处的任何地方，为推进他的国度而投入自己的生命。
foreignization: 每个女孩，无论是否是处女，都在她的灵魂中承载着上帝的形象。上帝创造了他的女儿和儿子，使他们成为他的形象的承载者。他从创造之初的愿景就是让他的女儿们成为他在世上的代表——代表他说话和行动。这赋予了女孩生活的每一个方面以意义，并且当然意味着上帝希望他的每一个女儿都能以深刻的方式认识他，爱他所爱，并在她所处的任何地方投入自己的生活来推进他的国度。

source: The answer to deficits is higher taxation . When the Federal government spends , it issues money . To avoid inflation , it reabsorbs most of that through either taxation or borrowing . Either way , the same amount of money is withdrawn from circulation . It is not that case , as Posner claims , that taxation withdraws spending power but borrowing does not . It is government spending that commands a share of resources , not government financing of its spending .
domestication: 解决赤字的办法就是提高税收。联邦政府花钱时，其实就是在发行货币。为了避免通货膨胀，它必须通过征税或借款的方式将大部分资金收回。不管用哪种方法，从流通中抽走的钱是一样的。不像波斯纳说的那样，认为征税会减少消费能力而借款不会。真正关键的是政府支出占用了资源份额，而不是政府如何为其支出融资。
foreignization: 赤字的解决办法是提高税收。当联邦政府支出时，它发行货币。为了避免通货膨胀，它通过征税或借款的方式重新吸收大部分货币。无论是哪种方式，都有相同数量的货币从流通中被撤回。并非如波斯纳所声称的那样，征税会撤回购买力而借款则不会。是政府支出决定了资源的分配份额，而不是政府为其支出融资的方式。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The answer to deficits is higher taxation . When the Federal government spends , it issues money . To avoid inflation , it reabsorbs most of that through either taxation or borrowing . Either way , the same amount of money is withdrawn from circulation . It is not that case , as Posner claims , that taxation withdraws spending power but borrowing does not . It is government spending that commands a share of resources , not government financing of its spending .

source: Selecting a superficial mixture of " nice-feeling " items from Yoga to a slice of Zen and a moment of Tao is hardly progressive as far as options for humanity is concerned . 从瑜伽中挑选一些“感觉良好”的东西，再到一点点禅宗和片刻的道家思想，这在人类的选择方面几乎没有什么进步。他们抛弃了有组织宗教的辛勤工作、勤奋和观察，转而追求一种以自我为中心、随心所欲的生活方式。

source: There are things that we 're good at , like visualisation , which can help clients bring to life that which is otherwise unseen . nSeeing how well their product is supporting the needs of the business and of its customers , is just one of these opportunities . nUnsurprisingly , clients struggle to capture and hold this view. nnEnter the Experience Maps , which help : nSee the process of the service through the eye of the customernDescribe the customer experience over timenMark positive and negative points in the experiencenLay the grounds for cross channel analysisnIdentify opportunities for service improvements and service innovationnnWe build the user layer , based on research , then together with the client , you build the business layer. nThe key is to do this collaboratively with the client . nThis engaging their imagination in a technique that they used to thinking about , but probably have n't found a way to visualise. nnnn
domestication:
有些事情我们擅长，比如可视化，能帮客户把那些看不见的东西变得生动起来。看到他们的产品如何出色地满足业务和客户的需求，这只是其中一个机会。不出所料，客户在捕捉和保持这种视角上会有困难。

这时候，体验地图就派上用场了，它能帮助：从客户的角度看服务过程；描述客户体验随时间的变化；标注体验中的好与不好的点；为跨渠道分析打下基础；找出服务改进和服务创新的机会。

我们根据研究建立用户层，然后与客户一起构建业务层。关键是要与客户合作完成这一过程。这样可以激发客户的想象力，让他们在一种他们熟悉但可能还没找到方法来视觉化的技术中投入进来。
foreignization:
有些事情我们擅长，比如可视化，这可以帮助客户将那些本来看不见的东西生动地呈现出来。看到他们的产品是如何很好地支持业务和客户的需求，这只是其中一个机会。不出所料，客户在捕捉和保持这种视角方面存在困难。

这时，体验地图就派上用场了，它们帮助：
- 通过客户的眼睛来看服务的过程
- 描述客户体验随时间的变化
- 标记体验中的正面和负面点
- 为跨渠道分析奠定基础
- 识别服务改进和服务创新的机会

我们基于研究构建用户层，然后与客户一起构建业务层。关键是要与客户合作完成这一过程。这能激发他们在一种他们曾经思考过，但可能没有找到方法来可视化的技术上的想象力。

source: I know there 's no straight line to that progress , no single path to success . We come from different cultures , and carry with us different histories . But let us never forget that even as we gather here as heads of different governments , we represent citizens who share the same basic aspirations -- to live with dignity and freedom ; to get an education and pursue opportunity ; to love our families , and love and worship our God ; to live in the kind of peace that makes life worth living .
domestication: 我知道进步的道路不会一帆风顺，成功的路径也不止一条。我们来自不同的文化，背负着各自的历史。但请大家不要忘了，今天我们虽然以不同政府首脑的身份聚在一起，但我们代表的公民却有着相同的基本愿望——希望活得有尊严、自由；接受教育，追求机会；爱家人，信奉自己的信仰；生活在能让生活变得有意义的和平中。
foreignization: 我知道进步没有直线可循，成功也没有单一的道路。我们来自不同的文化，带着不同的历史。但请让我们永远不要忘记，即使我们作为不同政府的首脑聚集在这里，我们代表的是怀有相同基本愿望的公民——过有尊严和自由的生活；接受教育并追求机会；热爱我们的家庭，爱我们的上帝并敬拜他；生活在使生活值得过的和平之中。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I know there 's no straight line to that progress , no single path to success . We come from different cultures , and carry with us different histories . But let us never forget that even as we gather here as heads of different governments , we represent citizens who share the same basic aspirations -- to live with dignity and freedom ; to get an education and pursue opportunity ; to love our families , and love and worship our God ; to live in the kind of peace that makes life worth living .
我知道进步的道路不会一帆风顺，成功的路径也不止一条。我们来自不同的文化，背负着各自的历史。但请大家不要忘了，今天我们虽然以不同政府首脑的身份聚在一起，但我们代表的公民却有着相同的基本愿望——希望活得有尊严、自由；接受教育，追求机会；爱家人，信奉自己的信仰；生活在能让生活变得有意义的和平中。

source: This page explains how you can make a patch file . Patch is a standard format , and there are many options for how to create one . Pick the one that is easiest for you . One of the most critical aspects of patch usage is identifying for your audience the location for the patch file for application relative to the -p flag ! When you create patches note your location and provide that when you share patches .  Creating a patch using diff
domestication: 这页讲的是怎么生成一个补丁文件。补丁是一种标准格式，有很多种方法可以创建。挑个对你来说最简单的方法就行。使用补丁时最重要的一点，就是告诉别人补丁文件的存放位置，特别是相对于-p标志的位置！你制作补丁的时候要注意自己的位置，分享补丁时也要说明这一点。用diff工具来创建补丁是一种常见方法。

source: 38 . Which of the following would most likely occur first if the circulatory system suddenly stopped working ? A Blood clots would form in the arteries . source: I first met Jimbo Wales , the face of Wikipedia , when he came to speak at Stanford . Wales told us about Wikipedia 's history , technology , and culture , but one thing he said stands out . " The idea that a lot of people have of Wikipedia , " he noted , " is that it 's some emergent phenomenon -- the wisdom of mobs , swarm intelligence , that sort of thing -- thousands and thousands of individual users each adding a little bit of content and out of this emerges a coherent body of work . " + But , he insisted , the truth was rather different : Wikipedia was actually written by " a community ... a dedicated group of a few hundred volunteers " where " I know all of them and they all know each other " . Really , " it 's much like any traditional organization . "
domestication: 我第一次见到维基百科的代言人吉姆·威尔士，是在他来斯坦福大学演讲的时候。威尔士跟我们分享了维基百科的历史、技术和文化，但他的一番话特别引人深思。“很多人对维基百科的印象，”他说，“好像它是个突然冒出来的现象——什么集体智慧、群体智能之类的东西——成千上万的用户每人贡献一点点内容，结果竟然形成了一部连贯的作品。”不过，他坚持认为事实并非如此：维基百科其实是“一个由几百名热心志愿者组成的社区”写出来的，大家彼此都认识。“说到底，这跟传统的组织没什么两样。”
foreignization: 我第一次见到吉姆·威尔士，维基百科的代言人，是在他来斯坦福大学演讲的时候。威尔士向我们介绍了维基百科的历史、技术和文化，但他说的一件事特别突出。“人们对维基百科的一个普遍看法，”他指出，“是认为它是一种涌现现象——集体智慧、群体智能之类的东西——成千上万的独立用户各自添加一点点内容，从中产生了一个连贯的作品集。”但他坚持说，事实却大相径庭：维基百科实际上是由“一个社区……几百名志愿者组成的专门小组”编写，他们“我都认识，而且彼此之间也都认识”。事实上，“它非常像任何一个传统组织。”

source: The latter right is technically upheld in the United States , though legal and administrative mechanisms ensure that it is largely observed in the breach . By the time the Reaganites had completed their work , the U.S. was far enough off the spectrum so that the International Labor Organization , which rarely criticizes the powerful , issued a recommendation that the U.S. conform to international standards , in response to an AFL-CIO complaint about strikebreaking by resort to " permanent replacement workers . " Apart from South Africa , no other industrial country tolerated these methods to ensure that Article 23 remains empty words ; and with subsequent developments in South Africa , the U.S. may stand in splendid isolation in this particular respect , though it has yet to achieve British standards , such as allowing employers to use selective pay increases to induce workers to reject union and collective bargaining rights .
domestication: 后者在美国技术上是被维护的，但实际上由于法律和行政机制的存在，这条权利形同虚设。里根政府大展拳脚之后，美国在这一领域的表现已经偏离国际标准甚远，以至于一向对强国少有批评的国际劳工组织也站出来，应美国劳联-产联关于“使用永久替代工人破坏罢工”的投诉，建议美国遵守国际标准。除了南非，没有其他工业国家容忍这些手段来确保《世界人权宣言》第23条成为一纸空文；而随着南非情况的变化，美国或许将在这一点上独树一帜，尽管它尚未达到英国的水平，比如允许雇主通过选择性加薪来说服员工放弃工会和集体谈判的权利。
foreignization: 后者在美国从技术上得到维护，尽管法律和行政机制确保它主要是在违反中被遵守。到里根派完成他们的工作时，美国已经偏离到足以使国际劳工组织（该组织很少批评强国）发出建议，要求美国符合国际标准，这是对AFL-CIO关于通过使用“永久替代工人”破坏罢工的投诉作出的回应。除了南非之外，没有其他工业国家容忍这些方法以确保第23条只是一句空话；而随着南非事态的发展，美国可能在这一点上独自处于辉煌的孤立状态，尽管它尚未达到英国的标准，如允许雇主通过选择性加薪来诱导工人拒绝工会和集体谈判权利。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The latter right is technically upheld in the United States , though legal and administrative mechanisms ensure that it is largely observed in the breach . By the time the Reaganites had completed their work , the U.S. was far enough off the spectrum so that the International Labor Organization , which rarely criticizes the powerful , issued a recommendation that the U.S. conform to international standards , in response to an AFL-CIO complaint about strikebreaking by resort to " permanent replacement workers . " Apart from South Africa , no other industrial country tolerated these methods to ensure that Article 23 remains empty words ; and with subsequent developments in South Africa , the U.S. may stand in splendid isolation in this particular respect , though it has yet to achieve British standards , such as allowing employers to use selective pay increases to induce workers to reject union and collective bargaining rights .

" Apart from South Africa , no other industrial country tolerated these methods to ensure that Article 23 remains empty words ; and with subsequent developments in South Africa , the U.S. may stand in splendid isolation in this particular respect , though it has yet to achieve British standards , such as allowing employers to use selective pay increases to induce workers to reject union and collective bargaining rights .

source: However , the findings could also be useful in the search for new , powerful catalysts , which reduce the energy required for a chemical reaction , steer it in the desired direction or even make it possible at all . Disordered silica often serves as the substrate of the actual catalyst and affects its properties ; one additional good reason to find out more about the substrate material . And that is exactly what the researchers in Berlin have done .
domestication: 然而，这些发现对于寻找新的、高效的催化剂也大有裨益。催化剂能减少化学反应所需的能量，引导反应朝预期方向进行，甚至让某些反应成为可能。无定形二氧化硅常常作为催化剂的基底，对其性能有很大影响；因此，深入了解基底材料至关重要。柏林的研究人员正是这样做的。
foreignization: 然而，这些发现也可能在寻找新的、强大的催化剂方面有用，这些催化剂可以减少化学反应所需的能量，引导其向所需方向进行，甚至使其成为可能。无序二氧化硅通常作为实际催化剂的基底，并影响其性质；这是一个额外的好理由，去更多地了解基底材料。而这正是柏林的研究人员所做的。

She was probably trying to exit right when the secret service was coming through with Romney and they had to hold her off a few minutes . It was absolutely not cold enough for frost bite either . So your headline is completely ridiculous .
我在那儿。这次集会组织得很好，有很多自愿参加的人。到处都是警察，这就是我不相信这个故事的任何部分的原因。我有先见之明在6点左右离开，因为天气变得太冷，不适合我的孩子。其他人没有这么聪明。她可能是试图在特勤局带着罗姆尼经过时离开，他们不得不让她等了几分钟。天气绝对没有冷到会导致冻伤的程度。所以你们的标题完全是荒谬的。

source: Chile 's export-oriented economy remained , in 1970 , dependent for foreign exchange earnings on a single product -copper- much as it had depended on nitrate in the 19th century . However , the Allende Administration consciously adopted a policy of beginning to diversify Chile 's trade by expanding ties with Great Britain , the rest of the Western European countries , and Japan , and by initiating minor trade agreements with the Eastern Bloc countries .

source: After the two-week history class , the children were surveyed on their racial attitudes . source: July 18 -- July 22 : Ubuntu , Maya Freelon Asante Maya Freelon Asante 's site-specific tissue paper installation creates the illusion of a weightless floating sculpture . Creating a monumental , vibrant sculpture out of a typically fragile and insignificant material , the artist celebrates the importance of unity as expressed in the word Ubuntu , a classical African concept that means I Am Because We Are .
domestication:
7月18日到7月22日：乌布图，玛雅·弗雷洛恩·阿桑特

玛雅·弗雷洛恩·阿桑特的现场特定纸张装置艺术，营造出一种轻盈飘浮的雕塑幻觉。她用通常脆弱又不起眼的材料创作出一座宏大而绚丽的雕塑，以此庆祝团结的重要性。这正是“乌布图”一词所表达的意义——非洲古典概念，意为“我存在，因为我们同在”。
foreignization: 7月18日--7月22日：Ubuntu，Maya Freelon Asante。Maya Freelon Asante 的特定场域纸张装置创造了一种无重力漂浮雕塑的错觉。艺术家使用通常脆弱且微不足道的材料创作了一件宏大的、充满活力的雕塑，以此庆祝团结的重要性，这一概念体现在“Ubuntu”一词中，这是一个古典非洲概念，意为“我存在因为我们的存在”。

source: Women should avoid walking alone especially after dark , including in beach and tourist areas . In addition , female visitors to The Gambia should be particularly cautious of men locally known as " bumsters , " who approach females wishing " just to get to know you " or offering to be tour guides . Bumsters often use romance in hopes of gaining money and other assistance , or in the hope of departing The Gambia through marriage to a Westerner . Travelers are advised to be polite but decisive in turning down unwanted help or attempts at conversation .
domestication: 女性应避免独自一人行走，尤其是在天黑之后，包括海滩和旅游区。此外，到冈比亚的女游客要特别警惕当地被称为“混子”的男人。这些“混子”会主动接近女性，说想“认识你”或者提出当导游。他们常常用浪漫来博取钱财和其他帮助，或者希望借婚姻离开冈比亚，跟外国人一起生活。建议游客礼貌但坚定地拒绝不需要的帮助或搭讪。
foreignization: 女性应避免单独行走，尤其是在天黑后，包括在海滩和旅游区。此外，前往冈比亚的女性游客应对当地被称为“bumsters”的男性保持特别警惕，这些人接近女性时声称“只是想认识你”或提供担任导游的服务。“Bumsters”经常利用浪漫关系以期获得金钱和其他帮助，或者希望通过与西方人结婚离开冈比亚。建议旅客礼貌但坚定地拒绝不需要的帮助或交谈尝试。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Women should avoid walking alone especially after dark , including in beach and tourist areas . In addition , female visitors to The Gambia should be particularly cautious of men locally known as " bumsters , " who approach females wishing " just to get to know you " or offering to be tour guides . Bumsters often use romance in hopes of gaining money and other assistance , or in the hope of departing The Gambia through marriage to a Westerner . Travelers are advised to be polite but decisive in turning down unwanted help or attempts at conversation .

messages_foreignization.content:

Women should avoid walking alone especially after dark , including in beach and tourist areas . In addition , female visitors to The Gambia should be particularly cautious of men locally known as " bumsters , " who approach females wishing " just to get to know you " or offering to be tour guides . Bumsters often use romance in hopes of gaining money and other assistance , or in the hope of departing The Gambia through marriage to a Westerner . Travelers are advised to be polite but decisive in turning down unwanted help or attempts at conversation .
女性应避免单独行走，尤其是在天黑后，包括在海滩和旅游区。此外，前往冈比亚的女性游客应对当地被称为“bumsters”的男性保持特别警惕，这些人接近女性时声称“只是想认识你”或提供担任导游的服务。“Bumsters”经常利用浪漫关系以期获得金钱和其他帮助，或者希望通过与西方人结婚离开冈比亚。建议旅客礼貌但坚定地拒绝不需要的帮助或交谈尝试。

source: The National Aeronautics and Space Administration ( NASA ) designed and implemented a new Undergraduate Student Research Program ( USRP ) to improve the pipeline of undergraduate students majoring in engineering , science , mathematics , and information technology in to the NASA workforce . This stipend program consists of a 10 to 15 week research experience under the supervision of a NASA technical mentor at a NASA Center . www.epo.usra.edu/usrp

source: Clambering to his feet and donning a pair of boxers , the Doncaster native loped across the bedroom , procured his laptop , and slithered back into the comfort of his bed . He turned the device on , smothering the sigh that was begging to escape his lips as his desktop loaded and his wallpaper came into focus ( a picture of a wet Harry with a sleepy Louis clinging to him like the future of the world depended on it , which , let 's be honest , it did ) and quickly logged onto his Twitter .
domestication: 一骨碌爬起来，穿上一条内裤，唐卡斯特小伙子晃晃悠悠地穿过卧室，拿起他的笔记本电脑，又蹭蹭地钻回了被窝。他打开电脑，桌面一出来，背景图也现了形——湿漉漉的哈里，睡眼惺忪的路易像抓住救命稻草似的 cling 着他，仿佛世界末日都靠这股劲儿了，说实在的，还真是这么回事。他忍住了一口气，快速登录了推特。

source: Climate change threatens to displace up to 70 million Bangladeshis . Much of Bangladesh is at or near sea level , so if the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change 's forecast of a seven-meter sea-level rise this century comes true , possibly 17% of the country could be submerged . That would render 60 million to 70 million Bangladeshis homeless and destroy the livelihoods of countless more .
domestication: 气候变化威胁着孟加拉国多达7000万人的生存。孟加拉国大部分地区地势低洼，如果政府间气候变化专门委员会预测的本世纪海平面上升七米成为现实，该国可能有17%的土地会被淹没。这样一来，6000万到7000万孟加拉国人将无家可归，更多人的生计也将毁于一旦。
foreignization: 气候变化威胁到多达7000万孟加拉国人可能流离失所。孟加拉国的大部分地区处于或接近海平面，因此如果政府间气候变化专门委员会预测的本世纪海平面上升七米的情况成为现实，该国可能有17%的土地被淹没。这将使6000万至7000万孟加拉国人无家可归，并摧毁更多人的生计。

source: Jim , route 35 is clear and there are buses and cars using it for travel both north and southbound travel . Granted , there are some areas that should be off limits due to safety reasons , but many areas are intact and safe especially on the bayside up near Normandy Shores and some areas of Silver Beach . Property owners in these areas should be allowed to return to their homes to do some damage control like removing wet carpeting to reduce mold damage and to winterize . Toms River Township is adding to property losses by prohibiting these owners to do what is necessary to salvage what they have left .
domestication: 吉姆，35号公路畅通无阻，北上南下的车辆和公交车都正常使用。当然了，有些地方出于安全考虑应该禁止通行，但很多地方还是完好无损的，特别是诺曼底海岸附近和银色海滩的一些区域。这些地区的房主应该允许回家做一些紧急处理，比如去掉湿地毯防止发霉，做好过冬准备。汤姆斯河镇禁止房主们回去抢救剩余财产，这只会增加他们的损失。

source: And note that in Posner 's suggestions for putting Social Security on a sound footing , he makes no mention of the most obvious solution : eliminating the cap on the amount of income subject to the Social Security tax and applying the tax to all forms of income . If that were done , the overall Social Security tax rate could be reduced . It would be a huge tax cut for the middle class . But , hey , who gives a damn about them ?

source: Several years ago I lived in a small apt in a 1957 12-unit building . The bathroom walls were pink with black trim , but the tub and sink were white -- white paint on top of pink ! With my landlord 's approval I stripped the paint off and exposed the glory . Do n't know what 's become of it since moving , but I do miss that bathroom . Think Pink !
domestication: 几年前，我住在一栋1957年建的12户小楼里。卫生间的墙是粉红色的，边框是黑色的，但浴缸和洗漱台却是白色的——上面还盖了一层白漆！在房东的同意下，我把这些白漆都刮掉了，露出了原来的美貌。搬走后也不知道那浴室现在怎么样了，不过还真挺想念它的。想想就粉嫩得让人心动！

source: On September 15 , 1970 -after Allende finished first in the election but before the Chilean Congress had chosen between him and the runner-up , Alessandri ( 4 ) , -President Nixon met with Richard Helms , the Director of Central Intelligence , Assistant to the President for National Security Affairs Henry Kissinger and Attorney General John Mitchell . Helms was directed to prevent Allende from taking power . This effort was to be conducted without the knowledge of the Departments of State and Defense or the Ambassador . Track II was never discussed at a 40 Committee meeting .
domestication: 1970年9月15日，阿连德在智利大选中领先，但国会议员还没在阿连德和亚军亚历山德里之间做出最终选择。就在这个节骨眼上，尼克松总统与中央情报局局长理查德·赫尔姆斯、国家安全事务助理亨利·基辛格，以及司法部长约翰·米切尔召开了秘密会议。会上，尼克松指示赫尔姆斯一定要阻止阿连德上台。这项行动要背着国务院、国防部和驻智利大使进行。后来被称为“第二轨道”的计划，从头到尾都没在40委员会的会议上提过。

source: The sale of certain categories of natural gas in interstate commerce is subject to regulation under the Natural Gas Act and the Natural Gas Policy Act of 1978 ( ? NGPA ? ) . Under the NGPA , a comprehensive set of statutory ceiling prices applies to all first sales of natural gas unless the gas is specifically exempt from regulation ( i.e. , unless the gas is ? deregulated ? ) . Administration and enforcement of the NGPA ceiling prices are delegated to the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission ( ? FERC ? ) . In June 1986 , FERC issued Order No. 451 , which , in general , is designed to provide a higher NGPA ceiling price for certain vintages of old gas . It is possible that we may in the future acquire significant amounts of natural gas subject to NGPA price regulations and/or FERC Order No. 451 .
domestication: 某些类别的天然气在州际贸易中的销售受《天然气法》和1978年《天然气政策法》（简称“NGPA”）的监管。根据NGPA，所有首次销售的天然气都要遵守一套全面的法定最高价格，除非这些天然气被明确豁免监管，也就是所谓的“去监管”。NGPA规定的最高价格由联邦能源管理委员会（简称“FERC”）负责管理和执行。1986年6月，FERC发布了第451号命令，大体上是为某些老旧天然气提供更高的NGPA最高价格。未来，我们可能会收购大量受NGPA价格监管和/或FERC第451号命令约束的天然气。

source: I have a pink bathroom ! The pink tiles are actually plastic tiles . I had to replace some of them in the shower with a water proof surround ( so I have some extra tiles -- if any one needs them ) . My theme in working with the pink is shells . There are so many shells that go with pink . Enjoy the pink . I also had a pink room growing up .
domestication: 我有个粉红色的浴室！那些粉红色的瓷砖其实是塑料的。我得在淋浴区换了一些，换成防水的围挡（所以现在我有多余的瓷砖——谁要是需要的话可以拿去）。我在搭配粉色时的主题是贝壳。粉色和贝壳真是绝配。享受这股粉色风吧。我小时候住的房间也是粉色的。

source: Dr. Shuren has held various policy and planning positions within FDA from 1998 to 2009 , including acting deputy commissioner for policy , planning , and budget ; associate commissioner for policy and planning ; special counsel to the principal deputy commissioner ; assistant commissioner for policy ; and medical officer in the Office of Policy .
domestication: 舒伦博士从1998年到2009年在食品药品监督管理局（FDA）担任过多个政策和规划职位，可以说是身兼数职，历任要职。他曾担任政策、规划和预算代理副局长，政策和规划助理局长，首席副局长特别法律顾问，政策助理局长，以及政策办公室的医学官。真是干一行精一行，样样都能拿得出手。

source: " Whim " restaurant at Back of the House Cooking School is a wonderful place to lunch ! Barbara Mills , the owner/chef is charming , fun and enthusiastic about her business . I always order the " Whim " special , because it gives me a chance to try a couple of different things AND still have a taste of dessert ( you get this adorable little 3-part tray with samples of three different and always delicious sweets du jour ) . The restaurant/cooking school is housed in a cute little Victorian bungalow on Second Street in Reno and it 's a great place to take a friend to a special lunch .  Review from Mandy N.
domestication: “随心所欲”餐厅位于后厨烹饪学校里，是吃午餐的好去处！老板兼主厨芭芭拉·米尔斯人很亲切，风趣十足，对她的事业充满热情。我每次都会点“随心所欲”特色餐，这样能尝到几种不同的菜，还能尝一口甜品（会给你一个超可爱的小三格托盘，里面装着三种当天的美味甜点）。这家餐厅兼烹饪学校坐落在里诺市第二街的一栋可爱的小维多利亚风格平房里，带朋友来这儿吃顿特别的午餐再好不过了。——曼迪·N. 的点评
foreignization: “Whim”餐厅位于Back of the House烹饪学校内，是一个吃午餐的好地方！老板兼主厨Barbara Mills非常迷人、有趣，并且对她的生意充满热情。我总是点“Whim”特色菜，因为它让我有机会尝试几种不同的菜肴，还能品尝到甜点（你会得到一个可爱的小三格托盘，里面装有三种不同且始终美味的当日甜品样品）。餐厅/烹饪学校位于里诺市第二街的一栋可爱的小维多利亚式小屋中，是一个带朋友来享受特别午餐的好地方。 来自Mandy N.的评价

“Whim”餐厅位于Back of the House烹饪学校内，是一个吃午餐的好地方！老板兼主厨Barbara Mills非常迷人、有趣，并且对她的生意充满热情。我总是点“Whim”特色菜，因为它让我有机会尝试几种不同的菜肴，还能品尝到甜点（你会得到一个可爱的小三格托盘，里面装有三种不同且始终美味的当日甜品样品）。餐厅/烹饪学校位于里诺市第二街的一栋可爱的小维多利亚式小屋中，是一个带朋友来享受特别午餐的好地方。 来自Mandy N.的评价

source: A webmaster certificate program introduces the student to Web authoring , teaching skills in Extensible Hypertext Markup Language ( XHTML ) , Web design , accessibility and cascading style sheets ( CSS ) . Coursework includes an introduction to Web authoring tools , such as Dreamweaver or Front Page . Students are introduced to programming languages , such as PHP Hypertext Preprocessor ( PHP ) , application service provider ( ASP ) and common gateway interface ( CGI ) .

source: The local equivalent to the " 911 " emergency line in The Gambia is 116 for Ambulatory services , 117 for police assistance , and 118 for fire . The Gambian Police Force operates another 24 hour emergency line at ( 220 ) 422-4914 . Please be advised that the emergency numbers listed may or may not have an English-speaking operator available .
domestication: 在冈比亚，紧急求助电话相当于中国的“110”和“120”，其中救护车服务拨打116，警察求助拨打117，火警则是118。冈比亚警方还设有一条24小时的紧急热线，号码是（220）422-4914。需要注意的是，这些紧急电话可能没有会说英语的接线员。

source: Although the family name of Belcher is a prominent one in English and American history , it is actually Old French in origin . The ancestor of the Belcher family came to England from France , as part of William the Conqueror 's army that came to England in the Norman Conquest of 1066 A.D. This Belcher ancestor 's name , as listed on " The Roll of the Battle Abbey " ( the original list of those who came to England with William the Conqueror ) , was Belesur . Belesur is believed to have come from Bellasis ( near Paris , France ) . Belesur 's name can be defined from the meanings of the words that comprise it :

source: The first human to reach the 6.8-mile-deep ( 11-kilometer-deep ) undersea valley solo , Cameron arrived at the bottom with the tech to collect scientific data , specimens , and visions unthinkable in 1960 , when the only other manned Challenger Deep dive took place , according to members of the National Geographic expedition .
domestication: 卡梅隆是第一个独自潜入6.8英里（约11公里）深海谷的人。他带着先进的技术到达海底，收集了科学数据、样本和图像，这些都是1960年那次唯一的载人挑战者深渊探险时想都不敢想的。据国家地理学会的成员说，这次探险成果丰硕。
foreignization: 作为第一个独自到达6.8英里深（11公里深）海底峡谷的人，卡梅隆带着收集科学数据、标本和1960年唯一一次有人挑战者深渊潜水时无法想象的景象的技术抵达了海底，据国家地理探险队成员称。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

The first human to reach the 6.8-mile-deep ( 11-kilometer-deep ) undersea valley solo , Cameron arrived at the bottom with the tech to collect scientific data , specimens , and visions unthinkable in 1960 , when the only other manned Challenger Deep dive took place , according to members of the National Geographic expedition .

domestication: 一名电视摄像师透过门缝，拍摄通往安全简报室的走廊，当时参议院情报特别委员会正在国会山举行闭门听证会。前中央情报局局长、已退休的美国陆军将军彼得雷乌斯因与传记作家宝拉·布罗德威尔的婚外情曝光而辞职，他在这次听证会上就2011年利比亚班加西美国领事馆遇袭事件作证。-- 布兰登·斯马尔沃斯基，AFP/Getty图片社，2012年11月16日

source: " I will never forget attending my first World Future Society annual conference . What I remember most was the sheer excitement of seeing hundreds of people from all over the world engaged in serious debates about the future . The hotel bustled with scientists , economists , historians , philosophers , business people , academics , teachers , ordinary people debating and presenting new ideas about the social , political , economic , and technological trends and events for the next hundred years .
domestication: 我永远忘不了参加第一次世界未来学会年会的情景。最让我难忘的是，看到来自世界各地的数百人热烈讨论未来的景象，那种激动的心情难以言表。酒店里熙熙攘攘，科学家、经济学家、历史学家、哲学家、商人、学者、教师和普通民众齐聚一堂，畅谈社会、政治、经济和技术趋势，展望未来一百年的风云变幻。
foreignization: 我将永远不会忘记参加我的第一次世界未来学会年会。我记得最清楚的是看到来自世界各地的数百人参与关于未来的严肃辩论时的纯粹兴奋。酒店里充满了科学家、经济学家、历史学家、哲学家、商人、学者、教师和平民，他们就未来一百年的社会、政治、经济和技术趋势和事件展开辩论并提出新想法。

source: When working with the Library , the most common error is to include long passages and quotations from the cases in your text . Do not do this ! It adds nothing to your legal argument ( and no points ) but adds tremendously to your writing time . Instead , write something like this : " In Milford v. State , the court found that evidence of an offense committed by the defendant but two days before the current one was so linked in time and circumstances as to show state of mind that it was admissible . " Here , in one sentence , you have provided the holding in the case and the factual basis the court relied upon to reach that decision .

source: by the way obama is everything else than a socialist . look at the german political system ... the free and social market economy ... it made germanys economy to one of the strongest in the world ... and if you look on the map germany is pretty tiny if you compare it with the usa , china or the other states at the top of the list . And you might know most germans hate kommunists because of the cold war , which was pretty tough in germany . finaly : protecting the consumer isnt a bad thig ... but thats a thing you " true Americans " ( ; ) ) have to learn first
domestication: 顺便说一句，奥巴马可一点也不是社会主义者。你看德国的政治体系，自由与社会市场经济，这可是让德国经济成为世界最强之一的秘诀。你要知道，德国在地图上跟美国、中国这些大国比起来，简直小得可怜。再说，因为冷战，德国人大多数对共产主义可没什么好感，冷战那会儿，德国受的苦可不少。最后，保护消费者可不是坏事，但这可是你们这些“真正的美国人”（；））需要先学学的东西。

source: This collection of Susan Polis Schutz ? s poetry combines readers ' favorites from her first three volumes with many new poems to create yet another testament to Schutz ? s ability to translate sensitive feelings into words that people can appreciate and relate to . Illustrated by Stephen Schutz , this book is an eloquent reflection on love , friendship , society , nature , creativity , and women ? s empowerment .  Editorial Reviews  About the Author
domestication: 这本诗集汇集了苏珊·波利斯·舒茨前三部诗集中读者喜爱的诗歌，并加入了众多新作，再次证明了舒茨将细腻的情感转化为人们能够欣赏和共鸣的语言的能力。书中的插图由史蒂芬·舒茨绘制，这是一本对爱、友情、社会、自然、创造力以及女性赋权的深刻反思。编辑评论 作者简介

source: Even as Quinn and Santana slowly made their way downstairs , they heard raised voices and could see from the stairwell Brittany sitting in the lounge chair with Rachel sitting sideways in her lap with her legs hanging over one armrest . Their arms were wrapped around each other and they were nodding excitedly . They were so caught up in their conversation that they clearly had no idea that they were being overheard and Quinn and Santana stopped to listen .
domestication: 奎因和桑塔纳慢慢往下走，刚到楼梯口，就听到楼下的声音高了起来。定睛一看，布里特尼正坐在客厅的椅子上，蕾切尔侧坐在她腿上，两条腿悬在扶手外。两人紧紧搂着对方，兴奋地点着头。她们聊得热火朝天，完全没注意到有人在偷听，奎因和桑塔纳便停下了脚步，悄悄听着。
foreignization: 即使奎因和桑塔纳慢慢走下楼时，他们听到提高的声音，并且从楼梯井可以看到布里特妮坐在休息室的椅子上，瑞秋侧坐在她的腿上，双腿垂在一侧扶手上。她们的手臂环绕着对方，兴奋地点头。她们完全沉浸在对话中，显然没有意识到自己被偷听，于是奎因和桑塔纳停下来倾听。

source: If aggregators and forecasters do become more important , does that pose a danger for your data ? source: The main problem facing the United States two years before the election was the selection of a party and/or candidate to support against the leftist alliance . The CIA presented two papers to the Special Group on April 2 , 1962 . One of these papers proposed support for the Christian Democratic Party , while the other recommended support of the Radical Party , a group to the right of the Christian Democrats . The Special Group approved both proposals . Although this strategy appears to have begun as an effort to hedge bets and support two candidates for President , it evolved into a strategy designed to support the Christian Democratic candidate .
domestication: 两年前，美国面临的主要问题是如何选择一个政党或候选人来对抗左翼联盟。1962年4月2日，中情局向特别小组提交了两份文件。一份建议支持基督教民主党，另一份则推荐支持位于基督教民主党右侧的激进党。特别小组批准了这两项提议。虽然这个策略最初看起来像是为了押宝，支持两位总统候选人，但最终演变成了一种专门支持基督教民主党候选人的策略。
foreignization: 两年后选举前美国面临的主要问题是如何选择支持的政党或候选人以对抗左翼联盟。中情局在1962年4月2日向特别小组提交了两份文件。其中一份文件建议支持基督教民主党，而另一份则建议支持位于基督教民主党右翼的激进党。特别小组批准了这两项提议。尽管这一策略最初似乎是为了押注两边并支持两位总统候选人，但它最终演变为旨在支持基督教民主党的候选人的策略。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The main problem facing the United States two years before the election was the selection of a party and/or candidate to support against the leftist alliance . The CIA presented two papers to the Special Group on April 2 , 1962 . One of these papers proposed support for the Christian Democratic Party , while the other recommended support of the Radical Party , a group to the right of the Christian Democrats . The Special Group approved both proposals . Although this strategy appears to have begun as an effort to hedge bets and support two candidates for President , it evolved into a strategy designed to support the Christian Democratic candidate .
两年前，美国面临的主要问题是如何选择一个政党或候选人来对抗左翼联盟。1962年4月2日，中情局向特别小组提交了两份文件。一份建议支持基督教民主党，另一份则推荐支持位于基督教民主党右侧的激进党。特别小组批准了这两项提议。虽然这个策略最初看起来像是为了押宝，支持两位总统候选人，但最终演变成了一种专门支持基督教民主党候选人的策略。

The CIA presented two papers to the Special Group on April 2 , 1962 . The Special Group approved both proposals . Although this strategy appears to have begun as an effort to hedge bets and support two candidates for President , it evolved into a strategy designed to support the Christian Democratic candidate .
两年后选举前美国面临的主要问题是如何选择支持的政党或候选人以对抗左翼联盟。中情局在1962年4月2日向特别小组提交了两份文件。其中一份文件建议支持基督教民主党，而另一份则建议支持位于基督教民主党右翼的激进党。特别小组批准了这两项提议。尽管这一策略最初似乎是为了押注两边并支持两位总统候选人，但它最终演变为旨在支持基督教民主党的候选人的策略。

source: I am Jonah in regards to atheists or people who want to make a living on defaming Jesus . I know God is a forgiving and loving God showing kindness to those who do n't deserve it . I do n't need a whale to vomit me up so I simply say God break them and make them yours . That would be cool . Athiests and blasphemers there is a day of righteous judgement coming . Repent because God does not want to destroy you and because I am in His debt I beg of you to reconsider . Or , that God puts such awful conditions before you life that you 've no where to go but to Him .
domestication: 我是约拿，对于无神论者或者那些靠诋毁耶稣谋生的人，我就像约拿一样。我知道上帝是一位宽恕和慈爱的上帝，对不配得到他恩典的人也展现出仁慈。我不需要大鱼把我吐出来，我只需说：上帝啊，让他们破碎吧，将他们归为你自己，这样就太好了。无神论者和亵渎者们，末日审判终将到来。悔改吧，因为上帝不愿毁灭你们，而我欠他的太多，所以恳求你们重新考虑。否则，愿上帝让你们的生活充满苦难，使你们除了投靠他之外别无去处。
foreignization: 我是约拿，针对无神论者或那些想通过诽谤耶稣谋生的人。我知道上帝是一位宽恕和慈爱的上帝，向那些不配得的人显示仁慈。我不需要一条鲸鱼把我吐出来，所以我简单地说，上帝摧毁他们并使他们成为你的。那会很酷。无神论者和亵渎者，有公义的审判之日即将到来。悔改吧，因为上帝不想毁灭你，而且因为我欠祂的情，我恳求你们重新考虑。或者，上帝在你们生活中设置如此糟糕的条件，以至于你们无处可去，只能投奔祂。

Repent because God does not want to destroy you and because I am in His debt I beg of you to reconsider . Or , that God puts such awful conditions before you life that you 've no where to go but to Him .
