I am Jonah in regards to atheists or people who want to make a living on defaming Jesus . I know God is a forgiving and loving God showing kindness to those who do n't deserve it . I do n't need a whale to vomit me up so I simply say God break them and make them yours . That would be cool . Athiests and blasphemers there is a day of righteous judgement coming . Repent because God does not want to destroy you and because I am in His debt I beg of you to reconsider . Or , that God puts such awful conditions before you life that you 've no where to go but to Him .
我是约拿，针对无神论者或那些想通过诽谤耶稣谋生的人。我知道上帝是一位宽恕和慈爱的上帝，向那些不配得的人显示仁慈。我不需要一条鲸鱼把我吐出来，所以我简单地说，上帝摧毁他们并使他们成为你的。那会很酷。无神论者和亵渎者，有公义的审判之日即将到来。悔改吧，因为上帝不想毁灭你，而且因为我欠祂的情，我恳求你们重新考虑。或者，上帝在你们生活中设置如此糟糕的条件，以至于你们无处可去，只能投奔祂。

source: Yes , I 'll grant that it was shortsighted to bring one 's children out there in the first place . Does n't speak well of Republican supporters in the first place , but let 's set that aside for now for a more important question : How in the hell does that even come close to excusing the refusal to let them out after the fact ?
domestication: 没错，把孩子带到那种地方本身就是短视之举。这确实让人对共和党的支持者们不怎么看好，但咱们先搁置一边，来谈谈一个更关键的问题：事后拒绝放他们出来，这到底是怎么回事？这怎么就能说得过去呢？

source: Ketchup and other food products are classified for different purposes by different agencies under a wide variety of federal programs . The classification in this case was by the U.S. Department of Agriculture for its subsidized school lunch program . Then as now , local school districts could receive reimbursement for each lunch served provided it met minimum standards . In mid-1981 , only a few months after Reagan took office , Congress cut $1 billion from child-nutrition funding and gave the USDA 90 days--the blink of an eye , for the federal bureaucracy--to come up with new standards that would enable school districts to economize , in theory without compromising nutrition .
domestication: 番茄酱和其他食品由不同机构根据各种联邦计划进行分类。这次分类是美国农业部为了其资助的学校午餐项目而做的。当时和现在一样，地方学区只要提供的午餐达到最低标准，就能获得每餐的补贴。1981年中，里根上台没几个月，国会就削减了10亿美元的儿童营养资金，并给农业部90天的时间——对联邦官僚体系来说，这几乎是眨眼之间——来制定新的标准，理论上是为了让学区节省开支，同时不牺牲营养。
foreignization: 番茄酱和其他食品根据不同的目的由不同的机构在各种联邦计划下进行分类。在这种情况下，分类是由美国农业部为其补贴的学校午餐计划进行的。当时和现在一样，地方学区每提供一份符合最低标准的午餐，就可以获得报销。1981年中期，里根就任总统仅几个月后，国会削减了10亿美元的儿童营养资金，并给了农业部90天的时间——对于联邦官僚机构来说，这只是眨眼之间——来制定新的标准，使学区能够在理论上不牺牲营养的情况下节约开支。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Ketchup and other food products are classified for different purposes by different agencies under a wide variety of federal programs . The classification in this case was by the U.S. Department of Agriculture for its subsidized school lunch program . Then as now , local school districts could receive reimbursement for each lunch served provided it met minimum standards . In mid-1981 , only a few months after Reagan took office , Congress cut $1 billion from child-nutrition funding and gave the USDA 90 days--the blink of an eye , for the federal bureaucracy--to come up with new standards that would enable school districts to economize , in theory without compromising nutrition .

source: Julie , I really hope you 're reading this , because I 'm appealing to you ! Please bestow these things upon us , your loyal users , and in return , I shall bestow upon you good tidings of ambrosia , along with the finest samplings of milk and honey ! source: Dear Mr. Ebert May I be the first to officially thank you for your end-of-the year list . I eagerly look forward to it at the end of every year . Thank you , also , for doubling the pleasure by doubling the list . I really like the " honorable mentions " as you used to name them . I look forward to seeing some great films now in 2012 . Happy holidays .
domestication:
尊敬的埃伯特先生：

我能不能抢个先，正式感谢您今年年底的榜单。每年这个时候，我都盼着它呢。您还把榜单翻了一倍，真是双倍的快乐。以前您叫它们“荣誉提名”，我特别喜欢。现在我对2012年的电影更加期待了。祝您节日快乐！
foreignization:
尊敬的埃伯特先生：

我是否可以第一个正式感谢您今年的年终榜单。我每年年底都热切期待着它。此外，也要感谢您将榜单翻倍，使喜悦加倍。我真的很喜欢您以前称之为“荣誉提名”的部分。我现在期待在2012年看到一些伟大的电影。

祝假期愉快。

source: In one of his forewords he said that the book contained no map but readers should feel free to draw one if they wanted to . A reader named Stephen Briggs took him at his word , which is how the various Discworld maps ended up being drawn . In the forwords to the maps Pratchett expresses surprise that places he made up for the sake of a joke and then forgot about fit together so neatly .
domestication: 他在序言里说，书里没有地图，但读者要是想画的话，就尽管画吧。有个叫斯蒂芬·布里格斯的读者还真听了他的话，结果就有了各种《碟形世界》的地图。普拉切特在地图的序言中表示惊讶，那些他为了开个玩笑而编造出来、后来自己都忘了的地方，竟然能拼凑得如此完美。
foreignization: 在其中一篇序言中他说这本书里没有地图，但读者如果想画的话可以自由绘制。一个名叫斯蒂芬·布里格斯的读者照做了，这就是为什么后来出现了各种碟形世界地图。在地图的前言中，普拉切特表达了惊讶，他虚构的一些地方只是为了开个玩笑而后就忘记了，结果它们竟能如此巧妙地拼合在一起。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In one of his forewords he said that the book contained no map but readers should feel free to draw one if they wanted to . A reader named Stephen Briggs took him at his word , which is how the various Discworld maps ended up being drawn . In the forwords to the maps Pratchett expresses surprise that places he made up for the sake of a joke and then forgot about fit together so neatly .
他在序言里说，书里没有地图，但读者要是想画的话，就尽管画吧。有个叫斯蒂芬·布里格斯的读者还真听了他的话，结果就有了各种《碟形世界》的地图。普拉切特在地图的序言中表示惊讶，那些他为了开个玩笑而编造出来、后来自己都忘了的地方，竟然能拼凑得如此完美。

In one of his forewords he said that the book contained no map but readers should feel free to draw one if they wanted to . A reader named Stephen Briggs took him at his word , which is how the various Discworld maps ended up being drawn . In the forwords to the maps Pratchett expresses surprise that places he made up for the sake of a joke and then forgot about fit together so neatly .
在其中一篇序言中他说这本书里没有地图，但读者如果想画的话可以自由绘制。一个名叫斯蒂芬·布里格斯的读者照做了，这就是为什么后来出现了各种碟形世界地图。在地图的前言中，普拉切特表达了惊讶，他虚构的一些地方只是为了开个玩笑而后就忘记了，结果它们竟能如此巧妙地拼合在一起。

source: If you read contemporary accounts -- especially Jonathan Swift 's -- there 's some funny stuff written about the spiralling cost of Blenheim Palace , because a grateful nation basically gave it to John Churchill without setting a limit on the total bill . It 's a monument to a pretty huge ego ; of Vanburgh 's great houses , Castle Howard 's much prettier .
domestication: 如果你读当代的记载，特别是乔纳森·斯威夫特的，里面有关于布伦海姆宫成本不断攀升的有趣描述，因为这个感恩的国家基本上是把宫殿送给约翰·丘吉尔的，但没有限定总花费。这可真是个大 egoo（自大狂）的纪念碑；范堡的大宅中，霍华德城堡要漂亮得多。
foreignization: 如果你阅读当代的记述——特别是乔纳森·斯威夫特的——有关布伦海姆宫成本不断上升的一些有趣的东西被写了下来，因为一个感恩的国家基本上把它给了约翰·丘吉尔，而没有对总费用设定上限。它是一座纪念相当自负的纪念碑；在凡布赫的伟大宅邸中，霍华德城堡要漂亮得多。

It 's a monument to a pretty huge ego ; of Vanburgh 's great houses , Castle Howard 's much prettier .

source: Symbols are messy things and societies can not be hermetically sealed . The twin images of flow/obstruction do not have the currency in post-colonial Rwandan political society that they did before Rwandan independence in the time of sacred kingship ( the last Rwandan king was overthrown in 1959 ) . But , societies have long symbolic and mythic memories and it is from the time of the sacred kingship , in the rituals of the king , the dynastic poetry and the popular narratives about these kings that we find the metaphors of flow and obstruction played out most clearly in the political sphere .
domestication: 符号这东西，乱得很，社会也不可能完全封闭。流动与阻碍这两种意象，在后殖民时代的卢旺达政治社会中已经不如从前那样流行了。要知道，在神圣王权时代（最后一位卢旺达国王于1959年被推翻），这些意象可是大行其道。不过呢，社会对符号和神话的记忆可长着呢。我们要是想看流动与阻碍的比喻在政治领域里如何体现得淋漓尽致，还得回到神圣王权时期，看看那些关于国王的仪式、王朝的诗歌，还有流传于民间的故事。
foreignization: 符号是混乱的事物，社会也不能完全封闭。流动/阻塞的双重形象在卢旺达后殖民时期的政坛中并没有像卢旺达独立前的神圣王权时期（最后一位卢旺达国王于1959年被推翻）那样流行。但是，社会拥有长期的象征和神话记忆，正是在神圣王权时期，通过国王的仪式、王朝诗歌以及关于这些国王的民间叙事中，我们最清楚地看到了政治领域中的流动与阻塞的隐喻。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Symbols are messy things and societies can not be hermetically sealed . The twin images of flow/obstruction do not have the currency in post-colonial Rwandan political society that they did before Rwandan independence in the time of sacred kingship ( the last Rwandan king was overthrown in 1959 ) . But , societies have long symbolic and mythic memories and it is from the time of the sacred kingship , in the rituals of the king , the dynastic poetry and the popular narratives about these kings that we find the metaphors of flow and obstruction played out most clearly in the political sphere .
符号这东西，乱得很，社会也不可能完全封闭。流动与阻碍这两种意象，在后殖民时代的卢旺达政治社会中已经不如从前那样流行了。要知道，在神圣王权时代（最后一位卢旺达国王于1959年被推翻），这些意象可是大行其道。不过呢，社会对符号和神话的记忆可长着呢。我们要是想看流动与阻碍的比喻在政治领域里如何体现得淋漓尽致，还得回到神圣王权时期，看看那些关于国王的仪式、王朝的诗歌，还有流传于民间的故事。

source: Sunday , Nov. 5 , 1944 : We went to Sunday School . Ate a lunch and I then dressed a chicken to fry . Merle 's came for supper . We had gingerbread with whipped cream on it . Carole Sue has a new brown check snow suit and hat . She and I waved a flag and I sang , " It 's My Flag Too . " She tried to sing it too . She played a long time with some corn meal and a spoon and two measuring cups . She is a very busy child .

source: Achievements in an isolated system probably wo n't do much , but XBox Live , Playstation Network , or Steam ones might very well actually motivate some people . There are whole communities devoted to earning this virtual trinkets , after all . Those communities may not overlap that much with , say , accounting software , though . Furthermore , there are many who prefer to isolate their social and work spheres .
domestication: 在封闭的系统里，成就可能没啥大用，但在XBox Live、Playstation Network或者Steam上就不一样了，这些平台上的成就还真能激励不少人。毕竟，现在可是有整个社区的人热衷于收集这些虚拟小奖品呢。不过，这些社区跟会计软件的用户群可能交集不大。再说，也有人更愿意把社交和工作圈子分开来。

source: Puzzling over the contention that " human rights ' extend to food and shelter , " Seth Faison reviews a " perennial sticking point in United States-China diplomacy , highlighting the contrast between the American emphasis on individual freedom and the Chinese insistence that the common good transcends personal rights . " China calls for a right to " food , clothing , shelter , education , the right to work , rest , and reasonable payment , " and criticizes the U.S. for not upholding these rights -- which are affirmed in the UD , and are not a matter of " the common good " but are " personal rights " that the U.S. rejects . Again , the reasoning is straightforward enough , once the guiding ideas are internalized .
domestication: 对于“人权”包括“食物和住所”这一说法感到困惑，塞思·法森探讨了中美外交中的一个“长期争执点”，强调了美国重视个人自由与中国坚持公共利益高于个人权利之间的对比。中国主张“食物、衣着、住所、教育、工作权、休息权和合理报酬”的权利，并批评美国没有维护这些权利——这些权利在《世界人权宣言》中得到了确认，不是“公共利益”的问题，而是“个人权利”，而美国却拒绝承认。一旦理解了背后的理念，这种逻辑其实也不难懂。
foreignization: 对“人权”包括食品和住所的说法感到困惑，Seth Faison 回顾了“中美外交中的一个长期争议点”，强调了美国强调个人自由与中国坚持公共利益超越个人权利之间的对比。中国呼吁保障“食品、衣物、住所、教育、工作权、休息权和合理报酬”的权利，并批评美国没有维护这些权利——这些权利在《世界人权宣言》中得到确认，并不是“公共利益”的问题，而是美国拒绝承认的“个人权利”。一旦理解了指导思想，这种逻辑就足够直截了当了。

Again , the reasoning is straightforward enough , once the guiding ideas are internalized .

source: What 's wrong with this infographic ? It breaks the first rule right out of the gate . When you have an opportunity to display information visually , take it . Here , the tweets per second could have at least been shown in a bar graph . This would enable someone to quickly look at this section and see what 's going on ; by seeing the various heights of the bars , the eye could have quickly gauged the differences in tweets per second per event without having to read anything .
domestication: 这张信息图有什么问题？一上来就违反了基本原则。有机会用视觉方式展示信息时，一定要抓住机会。这里起码可以把每秒的推文数量做成柱状图。这样一眼就能看出个所以然来；通过观察各个柱子的高度，人们可以迅速判断出不同事件每秒推文数量的差异，根本不用细读内容。
foreignization: 这个信息图有什么问题？它一开始就违反了第一条规则。当你有机会以视觉方式展示信息时，就去做吧。在这里，每秒的推文数量至少可以用条形图来表示。这样可以让人们快速浏览这一部分，看看发生了什么；通过观察各个条形的高度，眼睛可以迅速判断出每个事件每秒推文数量的差异，而无需阅读任何内容。

source: Named one of ' America 's Favorite Beach Towns ' by ForbesTraveler.com and voted ' Best Beach ' by the viewers of Seattle 's KING-5 TV , the Peninsula offers visitors blocks of colorful shops , great seafood , comfortable lodging , small museums , horseback riding , and an expansive beach . source: Such person was the subject of , or a party to , any sanction or order , not subsequently reversed , suspended or vacated , of any self-regulatory organization ( as defined in Section 3(a) ( 26 ) of the Exchange Act ( 15 U.S.C. 78c(a) ( 26 ) ) ) , any registered entity ( as defined in Section 1(a) ( 29 ) of the Commodity Exchange Act ( 7 U.S.C. 1(a) ( 29 ) ) ) , or any equivalent exchange , association , entity or organization that has disciplinary authority over its members or persons associated with a member .

source: Management is responsible for establishing and maintaining adequate internal control over financial reporting , as defined in Exchange Act Rule 13a-15(f) . The Company ? s internal control over financial reporting is a process designed to provide reasonable assurance regarding the reliability of financial reporting and the preparation of financial statements for external purposes in accordance with accounting principles generally accepted in the United States of America .
domestication: 公司管理层负责建立并维护财务报告内部控制，这在《交易法》第13a-15(f)条中有明确规定。公司的财务报告内部控制是一套流程，旨在确保财务报告的可靠性，并按照美国通用会计准则编制对外财务报表，提供合理的保障。这套内部控制流程就像一道坚固的防线，确保公司的财务信息真实可靠，让股东和监管机构放心。
foreignization: 管理层负责建立和维护充足的财务报告内部控制，如《交易法》第13a-15(f)条所定义。公司的财务报告内部控制是一个旨在提供合理保证的过程，以确保财务报告的可靠性以及按照美国普遍接受的会计原则为外部目的编制财务报表。

source: To put it another way , a Gotterdammerung immolating Western influence is preferable to what was cobbled together at Versailles and which has limped along as neither fish nor fowl for some one hundred years . Once things have burned to the ground , the authentic voice of the indigenous peoples , unsullied by Western influence , can speak .
domestication: 换句话说，与其继续维系这个从凡尔赛拼凑起来、一百多年来既不鱼也不鸟的西方影响，不如来一场彻底的“诸神的黄昏”，让一切付之一炬。烧个精光后，原住民的真实声音才能不受西方污染，响亮地传出来。
foreignization: 换句话说，一场摧毁西方影响的诸神的黄昏比凡尔赛拼凑起来的东西更好，后者在过去一百年里既非鱼也非鸟地蹒跚前行。一旦一切都烧成灰烬，未受西方影响的土著人民的真实声音就可以发言。

source: The best way of describing this book is by noting what it does not do . It does not emphasize individual investors or push an investment philosophy . It does not focus heavily on coming up with strategies that beat the market , though there is reference to some of them in the course of the book . Instead , it talks about the process of investing and how this process is the same no matter what investment philosophy one might have .
domestication: 这本书最好的介绍方式就是说它不做什么。它不侧重个人投资者，也不推销某种投资理念。它并不大力推崇那些战胜市场的策略，虽然书中偶尔会提到一些。相反，它谈论的是投资的过程，强调这个过程无论你信奉哪种投资理念都是相通的。
foreignization: 描述这本书最好的方式是指出它没有做什么。它不强调个人投资者或推广投资哲学。它没有大量关注制定战胜市场的策略，虽然在书中的过程中确实提到了一些。相反，它讨论了投资的过程以及这一过程无论一个人拥有何种投资哲学都是相同的。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The best way of describing this book is by noting what it does not do . It does not emphasize individual investors or push an investment philosophy . It does not focus heavily on coming up with strategies that beat the market , though there is reference to some of them in the course of the book . Instead , it talks about the process of investing and how this process is the same no matter what investment philosophy one might have .

source: In a conversation with us several years ago , the Kiowa poet N. Scott Momaday remarked that the American West " is a place that has to be seen to be believed , and it may have to be believed in order to be seen . " For five years we have travelled that landscape , photographed its vistas , talked to its people , sought out its history , all as part of our production of THE WEST , an eight-part documentary series for public television .
domestication: 几年前，我们和基奥瓦族诗人N.斯科特·莫马迪聊天时，他提到美国西部“是只有亲眼见了才能相信的地方，而或许，只有先相信了，才能真正看到。”这五年来，我们走遍了这片土地，拍下了壮丽的风景，与当地居民交谈，探寻历史的痕迹，这一切都是为了制作《西部》，一部将在公共电视台播出的八集纪录片系列。
foreignization: 在几年前与我们的一次对话中，基奥瓦诗人N.斯科特·莫马迪提到，美国西部“是一个必须亲眼看到才能相信的地方，而且可能只有先相信了才能真正看到。”五年来，我们游历了那片土地，拍摄了它的风景，与那里的人们交谈，探寻它的历史，这一切都是为了制作《西部》，这是一部为公共电视制作的八集纪录片系列。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" For five years we have travelled that landscape , photographed its vistas , talked to its people , sought out its history , all as part of our production of THE WEST , an eight-part documentary series for public television .

source: While those players that do hit free agency are clear beneficiaries of the reduced supply -- most notably Zack Greinke , the Angels righthander who , in the absence of Hamels and Cain , is now the unquestioned best pitcher available -- clubs will have increasing difficulty affordably filling needs via this route of player acquisition . That puts even more onus on amateur scouting and minor league development to make sure the draft is an efficient feeder . It also encourages trading as a more appealing avenue to bolster a roster .
domestication: 那些成为自由球员的选手显然从中受益了，尤其是天使队的右投手扎克·格兰基，少了哈梅尔斯和凯恩的竞争，他现在成了市场上最抢手的投手。球队想通过自由市场填补需求越来越难，成本也高。这下，青训和小联盟的发展就得更加上心了，得确保选秀能高效输送人才。同时，这也让交易成为了一条更吸引人的路子来补强阵容。
foreignization: 虽然那些确实成为自由球员的球员是供应减少的明显受益者——最明显的是天使队的右投手扎克·格兰基，在没有哈梅尔斯和凯恩的情况下，他现在无疑是最好的可用投手——俱乐部通过这种球员获取方式来负担得起地填补需求将越来越困难。这进一步加重了业余球探和小联盟发展工作的责任，以确保选秀是一个高效的输送渠道。这也鼓励交易作为一种更吸引人的增强阵容的方式。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

While those players that do hit free agency are clear beneficiaries of the reduced supply -- most notably Zack Greinke , the Angels righthander who , in the absence of Hamels and Cain , is now the unquestioned best pitcher available -- clubs will have increasing difficulty affordably filling needs via this route of player acquisition . That puts even more onus on amateur scouting and minor league development to make sure the draft is an efficient feeder . It also encourages trading as a more appealing avenue to bolster a roster .
那些成为自由球员的选手显然从中受益了，尤其是天使队的右投手扎克·格兰基，少了哈梅尔斯和凯恩的竞争，他现在成了市场上最抢手的投手。球队想通过自由市场填补需求越来越难，成本也高。这下，青训和小联盟的发展就得更加上心了，得确保选秀能高效输送人才。同时，这也让交易成为了一条更吸引人的路子来补强阵容。

That puts even more onus on amateur scouting and minor league development to make sure the draft is an efficient feeder . It also encourages trading as a more appealing avenue to bolster a roster .
虽然那些确实成为自由球员的球员是供应减少的明显受益者——最明显的是天使队的右投手扎克·格兰基，在没有哈梅尔斯和凯恩的情况下，他现在无疑是最好的可用投手——俱乐部通过这种球员获取方式来负担得起地填补需求将越来越困难。这进一步加重了业余球探和小联盟发展工作的责任，以确保选秀是一个高效的输送渠道。这也鼓励交易作为一种更吸引人的增强阵容的方式。

I thought that was crowded , haha , but 25 cats ? ? Hehe , no offense , but are you the " wierd cat lady " in your neighborhood ?

source: New father Charlie Brooker has caught himself shouting at the machines in his life , given the matter careful consideration , and decided that it 's OK -- more than OK , really . For Brooker , the future will involve lots of shouting at machines . Makes me wonder if there is n't something to be said for designing machines that understand why you 're shouting at them .
domestication: 新晋奶爸查理·布鲁克发现自己对着生活中的机器大喊大叫，仔细一想，觉得这样做也挺好，甚至不仅仅是好。对布鲁克来说，未来少不了对着机器吼两声。这让我琢磨，是不是该设计出能理解你为何冲它吼的机器呢。
foreignization: 新晋父亲查理·布鲁克发现自己对他生活中的机器大喊大叫，经过深思熟虑后，他认为这样做是可以的——实际上，不仅仅是可以的。对布鲁克来说，未来将涉及对机器的大喊大叫。这让我觉得，设计能够理解你为何对他们大喊大叫的机器也许有其道理。

source: Even within the Central Intelligence Agency , processes for bringing considered judgements of intelligence analysts to bear on proposed covert actions were haphazard -and generally ineffective . This situation has improved ; covert action proposals now regularly come before the Deputy Director for Intelligence and the appropriate National Intelligence Officer ; but the operators still are separated from the intelligence analysts , those whose exclusive business it is to understand and predict foreign politics . For instance , the analysts who drafted the government 's most prestigious intelligence analyses -NIEs- may not even have known of U.S. covert actions in Chile .
domestication: 即使在中央情报局内部，让情报分析师的慎重判断影响拟议的秘密行动的程序也是杂乱无章，效果不佳。这种情况有所改善，现在秘密行动提案通常会提交给副局长和相应的国家情报官；但行动人员与情报分析师还是脱节，而情报分析师的职责就是理解和预测外国政治。比如，起草政府最高级别情报分析报告（NIE）的分析师可能根本就不知道美国在智利的秘密行动。
foreignization: 即使在中央情报局内部，将情报分析员的经过考虑的判断应用于拟议的秘密行动的过程也是杂乱无章的——而且通常无效。这种情况已经有所改善；现在，秘密行动提案定期呈交给情报副局长和相应的国家情报官员；但操作人员仍然与情报分析员分离，而情报分析员的专门业务是理解和预测外国政治。例如，起草政府最权威的情报分析——国家情报评估（NIEs）的分析员甚至可能不知道美国在智利的秘密行动。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Even within the Central Intelligence Agency , processes for bringing considered judgements of intelligence analysts to bear on proposed covert actions were haphazard -and generally ineffective . This situation has improved ; covert action proposals now regularly come before the Deputy Director for Intelligence and the appropriate National Intelligence Officer ; but the operators still are separated from the intelligence analysts , those whose exclusive business it is to understand and predict foreign politics . For instance , the analysts who drafted the government 's most prestigious intelligence analyses -NIEs- may not even have known of U.S. covert actions in Chile .
即使在中央情报局内部，让情报分析师的慎重判断影响拟议的秘密行动的程序也是杂乱无章，效果不佳。这种情况有所改善，现在秘密行动提案通常会提交给副局长和相应的国家情报官；但行动人员与情报分析师还是脱节，而情报分析师的职责就是理解和预测外国政治。比如，起草政府最高级别情报分析报告（NIE）的分析师可能根本就不知道美国在智利的秘密行动。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

This situation has improved ; covert action proposals now regularly come before the Deputy Director for Intelligence and the appropriate National Intelligence Officer ; but the operators still are separated from the intelligence analysts , those whose exclusive business it is to understand and predict foreign politics . For instance , the analysts who drafted the government 's most prestigious intelligence analyses -NIEs- may not even have known of U.S. covert actions in Chile .

source: While I as a Jew do n't believe Jesus was either the Messiah or divine , I do n't think this story is historical . Personally , I believe Jesus was handed over to the Romans by the Sadducees , a sect of Jews that rejected all oral traditions and embraced Roman traditions . Nearly all of the Priests serving in the Temple , including the Roman appointed High Priest , were Sadducees . The Temple was the main source of their authority and Jesus challenged that , which is why the Christian texts record the High Priest at Jesus ' trial . They had him executed in order to ensure their own authority was n't threatened .
domestication: 我作为一个犹太人，虽然不相信耶稣是弥赛亚或神，但我觉得这个故事不真实。我个人认为，耶稣是被撒都该人交给罗马人的。撒都该人是犹太教的一个派别，他们拒绝一切口传的传统，却拥抱罗马的文化。当时在圣殿服务的祭司，包括罗马任命的大祭司，大多是撒都该人。圣殿是他们权威的主要来源，而耶稣对这一点提出了挑战，这也是为什么基督教文献中记载了耶稣受审时有大祭司在场。他们处死耶稣是为了确保自己的权威不受威胁。

While I as a Jew do n't believe Jesus was either the Messiah or divine , I do n't think this story is historical . Personally , I believe Jesus was handed over to the Romans by the Sadducees , a sect of Jews that rejected all oral traditions and embraced Roman traditions . Nearly all of the Priests serving in the Temple , including the Roman appointed High Priest , were Sadducees . The Temple was the main source of their authority and Jesus challenged that , which is why the Christian texts record the High Priest at Jesus ' trial . They had him executed in order to ensure their own authority was n't threatened .

source: I love original tilework in baths ( and some very lucky kitchens ! ) and I 'd NEVER rip it out , but always try to work with it and preserve it -- it 's far more clever to work with what you HAVE than to just destroy things and put in " modern " styles that will soon go OUT OF STYLE .... trust me in 10 years ( or less ) you will hear the ripping sound of granite , stainless and " all white " being ripped out of countless homes and " the next trendy thing " being put in .
domestication: 我喜欢浴室里那些原始的瓷砖（还有一些非常幸运的厨房！），我绝不会把它们拆掉，而是尽量保留和利用——用你已有的东西比拆了换“现代”风格要聪明得多，毕竟这些现代风格很快就会过时。相信我，十年后（甚至更短时间），你会听到无数家庭撕掉花岗岩、不锈钢和“全白”装修的声音，换成“下一个流行趋势”。
foreignization: 我爱浴室里的原始瓷砖（还有一些非常幸运的厨房！），我绝对不会把它拆掉，而总是尽量与之合作并保护它——与你拥有的东西合作要比仅仅破坏东西并安装“现代”风格的要聪明得多，这些风格很快就会过时……相信我，在10年（或更短）后，你会听到无数家庭中花岗岩、不锈钢和“全白”被拆掉的声音，然后“下一个潮流事物”被装进去。

Dataviz Schmataviz，尤其是那个“平面东西”。我立刻想到了《奇爱博士》版本，而且很高兴不止我一个人茫然地盯着那个离合器/刹车鼓/戴尔克的眼睛/啤酒垫（圆形的东西）看了至少五秒钟才迅速移开。顺便问一下，“速度计”是什么？这肯定是搞错了。

source: We can not buy our security , our freedom from the threat of the bomb by committing an immorality so great as saying to a billion human beings now enslaved behind the Iron Curtain , " Give up your dreams of freedom because to save our own skins , we 're willing to make a deal with your slave masters . " Alexander Hamilton said , " A nation which can prefer disgrace to danger is prepared for a master , and deserves one . " Now let 's set the record straight . There 's no argument over the choice between peace and war , but there 's only one guaranteed way you can have peace -- and you can have it in the next second -- surrender .
domestication: 我们不能为了自己的安全和自由，去向核威胁低头，更不能做出如此不道德的事，对那十亿被铁幕奴役的人们说：“放弃你们的自由梦吧，为了保全我们自己，我们愿意与你们的压迫者做交易。”正如亚历山大·汉密尔顿所说：“一个宁愿受辱也不愿冒险的国家，注定要成为奴隶，并且活该如此。”现在让我们把话说清楚。和平与战争之间没有争论，但确保和平的方法只有一个——那就是屈服。不过，屈服换来的和平，绝不是我们想要的。
foreignization: 我们不能通过犯下一个如此巨大的不道德行为来购买我们的安全、我们的自由，摆脱原子弹的威胁，这个不道德行为就是对现在被铁幕奴役的十亿人民说：“放弃你们的自由梦想吧，为了保全我们自己的性命，我们愿意与你们的奴隶主做交易。” 亚历山大·汉密尔顿说过：“一个宁愿选择耻辱而不愿面对危险的国家，已经准备好接受主人，并且也配得上一个主人。” 现在让我们澄清事实。在和平与战争的选择上没有争论，但只有一种绝对保证的方法可以实现和平——那就是在下一秒投降。

source: So raise the consumption tax after that . Demand might not dry up so quickly if Japan were actually growing . Japan has run a budget deficit of 10% of GDP for three years . It was 3-5% during the not so sucky years between 2005 and 2008 ( basically the same that it was between 1975 and 1985 ) . Borrowing ca n't go on forever , but I do n't see how doubling the consumption tax will lead us back to 2005 .
domestication: 所以后来就提高了消费税。如果日本经济真的在增长，需求也不会那么快萎缩。日本的财政赤字已经连续三年达到GDP的10%了。2005年到2008年间，赤字比例大概在3%到5%之间，那几年还算过得去，跟1975年到1985年的水平差不多。借钱不可能一直借下去，但我觉得把消费税翻倍也未必能让我们回到2005年的光景。

source: It boils down to the fight between David McCandless and Stephen Few , both highly regarded professionals and leaders in their field , but adamantly in opposition to certain design practices that their nemesis holds dear . Obviously there is some common ground between them and viable alternative views on the subject , but I thought I 'd mention that the " do 's and don'ts of infographic design " can vary greatly depending on the school of thought you subscribe to and need not be the one this article put forth .
domestication: 归根结底，这是一场大卫·麦坎德勒斯和斯蒂芬·弗之间针锋相对的较量。两人都是各自领域的知名专家和领军人物，但在某些设计实践上却坚定地站在对方的对立面。当然，他们之间也有共同点，对于这个问题也有不同的看法。不过我觉得有必要提一下，“信息图设计的该与不该”会因为你的理念不同而有很大差异，并不一定非得遵循这篇文章的观点。
foreignization: 归根结底，这是大卫·麦肯德尔和斯蒂芬·福之间的争斗，他们都是备受尊敬的专业人士和领域内的领军人物，但对对方所珍视的某些设计实践坚决反对。显然，他们之间存在一些共同点，并且在这个问题上存在可行的替代观点，但我认为有必要提及的是，“信息图设计的应当与不应当”可以根据你所认同的思想流派而大相径庭，不必一定是本文提出的那一种。

source: We have just renovated my childhood home built in1949 and certainly saved the pink and blue bathroom ! My crew said I was not like a normal woman -- one who wants all torn out and replaced with new updated stuff ! I told them I was " old enough to appreciate the old " since I am 62 ! Also we have a double drainboard sink made in 1949 and in really good condition with metal cabinets below . We also took up the carpet and refinished hardwood floors that were original with the house . Mahoghany dining room and bedroom furniture that my parents had bought in High Point , NC in 1949 are also being used ! We move in next Tuesday and I ca n't wait ! ! !
domestication: 我们刚翻新了我家那座建于1949年的老宅，当然保留了那个粉蓝相间的浴室！工人们说我不像一般的女人，通常女人都喜欢把旧的全拆掉，换成新的现代化的东西！我跟他们说，我已经62岁了，年纪大了就懂得欣赏老东西了！我们还有一个1949年做的双水槽洗碗池，保养得很好，下面还有金属柜子。我们也把地毯掀掉了，重新打磨了原有的硬木地板。我爸妈在1949年从北卡罗来纳州的海波因特买回来的桃花心木餐厅和卧室家具也在用！下星期二就要搬家了，我可真是等不及了！

source: The Final Fantasy XI dev team is frustratingly notorious for this . Every interview they have will always have at least one question with an ambiguous answer that 's as vague as possible . Always . It 's not so bad to want your MMO to have some mysteries , but trying to have your game as Guide Dang It as possible with things that hundreds of thousands of players have n't figured out for 4+ years is something else entirely .
domestication: 《最终幻想XI》的开发团队在这方面真是让人头疼。每次接受采访，他们总要抛出至少一个问题，给出的答案模糊得不能再模糊。每次都是这样。想让你的大型多人在线游戏保留一些神秘感这没什么不好，但故意把一些东西弄得让几十万玩家琢磨了四年多还没搞明白，这就有点过分了。真是让人无奈，玩家又不是神仙，哪能什么都知道啊！
foreignization: 《最终幻想XI》的开发团队因这一点而令人沮丧地臭名昭著。每次接受采访，他们总是至少会有一个问题的回答模棱两可，尽可能含糊。总是如此。想要你的大型多人在线角色扮演游戏（MMO）保留一些神秘感并不是坏事，但试图让游戏尽可能地让人摸不着头脑，尤其是那些数十万玩家在四年多的时间里都未能解开的秘密，就完全是另一回事了。

source: Covert action during the 1964 campaign was composed of two major elements . One was direct financial support of the Christian Democratic campaign . The CIA underwrote slightly more than half of the total cost of that campaign . After debate , the Special Group decided not to inform the Christian Democratic candidate , Eduardo Frei , of American covert support of his campaign . A number of intermediaries were therefore mobilized to pass the money to the Christian Democrats .
domestication: 1964年竞选期间的隐秘行动主要包括两个方面。一个是直接资助基督教民主党。中情局承担了该党竞选总费用的一多半。经过讨论，特别小组决定不告诉基督教民主党的候选人爱德华多·弗雷，美国在暗中支持他的竞选。因此，他们找了一些中间人来传递这笔钱。

source: I love pink bathrooms . I am working on the house in which I grew up and will soon ( I hope ) be living in again . The only pink bath is a painted one , but I confess to being jealous of my cousin who has the real deal ! I do have 3 wonderful tiled bathrooms . One in white/burgundy tile , a half-bath in two-tone blue tile and one in green and yellow tile . Love ' em .

source: Thus the world saw Mao Tse Tung 's advocacy of a pure China cleansed from the influence of the West result in the building of useless backyard coke furnaces , doctors of philosophy being forced to carrying buckets of manure , and violinists and pianists who dared to play Western music having their fingers smashed while millions of Westernized " degenerates " were sent for re-education to the countryside .
domestication: 就这样，世界见证了毛泽东倡导的清除西方影响、建设纯洁中国的运动，结果却造出了毫无用处的土高炉，哲学博士被迫去挑粪，敢演奏西方音乐的小提琴家和钢琴家手指被砸断，数以百万计的“西化堕落分子”被送去农村接受再教育。
foreignization: 因此，世界见证了毛泽东倡导的纯洁中国、清除西方影响的结果：建造无用的后院土高炉，哲学博士被迫担粪，敢于演奏西方音乐的小提琴家和钢琴家的手指被砸断，而数百万“西方化的堕落分子”被送往农村进行再教育。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Thus the world saw Mao Tse Tung 's advocacy of a pure China cleansed from the influence of the West result in the building of useless backyard coke furnaces , doctors of philosophy being forced to carrying buckets of manure , and violinists and pianists who dared to play Western music having their fingers smashed while millions of Westernized " degenerates " were sent for re-education to the countryside .

source: During the 19th century , the Imperial Qing Dynasty gradually waned , as the power of Western capitalist states surged and consolidated . 1 The formidable military force commanded by the Western powers gained them entry into China 's vast territory , wherein to extend their power parameters . Yet , the constant pressure exerted by Western gunboats , and this eminently advanced civilization as a whole , did little to sway the Qing government from its traditional mode of Chinese Dynastic diplomacy . This raises the questions , why should the Qing government seriously imperil state security throughout its two-decade , persistent adherence to outmoded statecraft ? And why did the transformation in foreign policy that lead to the Qing government 's diplomatic modernization occur so rapidly after the signing of the Treaty of Peking ?
domestication: 19世纪，大清帝国的势力逐渐衰弱，而西方资本主义国家的力量却不断增强。西方列强凭借着强大的军事力量，强行打开了中国的大门，企图扩展其在中华大地上的势力范围。然而，西方炮舰的不断施压，以及他们先进的文明，并没有动摇清朝政府坚持传统的王朝外交模式。这就让人不禁要问，为什么清朝政府会不顾国家安危，固守陈旧的治国之道长达二十年之久？为何在《北京条约》签订后，清政府的外交现代化转型却能如此迅速地实现？
foreignization: 在19世纪，清朝逐渐衰落，而西方资本主义国家的力量却日益增强并巩固。1 西方列强所指挥的强大军事力量使他们得以进入中国广阔的领土，并在此扩展其势力范围。然而，西方炮舰不断施加的压力，以及这一高度发达的文明整体，并未使清政府偏离其传统的中国王朝外交模式。这引出了问题：为什么清政府在其二十年间坚持过时的治国之道，严重危及国家安全？为什么在《北京条约》签订后，导致清政府外交现代化的外交政策转变会如此迅速地发生？

Yet , the constant pressure exerted by Western gunboats , and this eminently advanced civilization as a whole , did little to sway the Qing government from its traditional mode of Chinese Dynastic diplomacy . This raises the questions , why should the Qing government seriously imperil state security throughout its two-decade , persistent adherence to outmoded statecraft ? And why did the transformation in foreign policy that lead to the Qing government 's diplomatic modernization occur so rapidly after the signing of the Treaty of Peking ?

source: One thing a lot of people do n't understand about Romney is he is a very focused problem solver . When he performed poorly in the debates the last cycle , he worked on that skill . This cycle , he was the winner or " not loser " of every debate except two . And after Gingrich 's surge , he got help again , and clearly won the next two and ended the Gingrich challenge .

source: Other children offered the idea that perhaps Santa was " mixed with black and white " -- something in the middle , like an Indian . One boy went with a two-Santa hypothesis : White Santa and Black Santa must be friends who take turns visiting children . When a teacher made the apparently huge mistake of saying that she 'd never seen Santa , the children all quickly corrected her : everyone had seen Santa at the mall . Not that that clarified the situation any .
domestication: 别的孩子提出了个想法，说圣诞老人可能是“黑白混血”——介于两者之间，就像印第安人一样。有一个男孩则提出了双圣诞老人理论：白圣诞老人和黑圣诞老人一定是好朋友，他们轮流拜访孩子们。当一个老师犯了个大错误，说自己从未见过圣诞老人时，孩子们立刻纠正她：大家都见过圣诞老人，他在商场里呢。但这也没能让事情更清楚些。

source: On September 4 , 1970 , Allende won a plurality in Chile 's presidential election , Since no candidate had received a majority of the popular vote , the Chilean Constitution required that a joint session of its Congress decide between the first-and second-place finishers . As for the *rape* aspect , I can only guess that Verwhorin 's attitude is like that of the guy in Blazing Saddles who explains , " I like rape . "
我能想到的唯一来源是多年前看过的一则古老的犹太资料（也不确定具体是哪一本），里面说拿撒勒的约书亚是他妈跟一个叫“帕恩忒”的罗马士兵生的，后来他自己拉扯起一小撮门徒，结果被钉死了。至于那个“强奸”方面的事儿，我只能猜测维尔霍林的态度可能跟《烧火马鞍》里那家伙差不多，他说：“我喜欢强奸。”

source: The price really is a bit alarming ; the list price of FOTR Complete is $59.98 , and Amazon sells it for close to that ( $2.10 off is not much of a discount ) . But although you are getting the same number of discs in an identical format , TTT Complete is listed at an astonishing $75.98 , although Amazon 's price is $60.99 . Ignoring for a moment the audio DVD , that prices out at over $20 per CD for the music content , which is really , really high .

source: Newt Gingrich went out of his way to try to smear us as extremists . Not only is he wrong about who we are -- he 's also wrong about who the real extremists are . The real extremists are the people who want to dig up forests to get dirty oil to send 1700 miles across precious drinking water only so that it can be burned and put catastrophic amounts of carbon into the atmosphere to alter our planet 's climate for good . That 's extremism .
domestication: 纽特·金里奇费尽心思想把我们描绘成极端分子。他不仅对我们是谁一无所知，还错认了真正的极端分子是谁。真正的极端分子是那些为了获取脏油不惜破坏森林，还要修建一条长达1700英里的管道穿越宝贵的饮用水源，最后只是为了燃烧这些脏油，将大量二氧化碳排放到大气中，永久性地改变我们的气候。这才是真正的走火入魔。
foreignization: 纽特·金里奇故意试图将我们抹黑为极端分子。他不仅对我们是谁的看法错误——他也错了关于真正的极端分子是谁。真正的极端分子是那些想要挖掘森林以获取脏油，并将其输送1700英里穿越宝贵的饮用水源，只是为了燃烧并释放灾难性的碳量到大气中，从而永久改变我们星球的气候的人。这才是极端主义。

source: I 'm sure that most of you , just like me , have numerous functions on your camera that you 've never used -- even reasonably simple " point and shoot " cameras these days have heaps of extra functions . Take this captive time to experiment with all the functions and figure out when it might be useful to use them . Knowing a few simple ways to use the manual settings on your camera can make the end result so much better than just using the automatic settings .  #7 : Plan Your Future
domestication: 我相信大多数人和我一样，相机里的很多功能从来没用过——现在就连普通的“傻瓜”相机也有一大堆额外的功能。趁着这段时间，不妨试试这些功能，看看什么时候能派上用场。学会几个简单的手动设置技巧，拍出来的照片比全自动模式强多了。第七条：规划你的未来。
foreignization: 我确定你们大多数人都和我一样，相机上有很多功能从未使用过——即使现在相当简单的“傻瓜”相机也有很多额外的功能。利用这段被限制的时间来尝试所有功能，并弄清楚在什么情况下使用它们可能有用。了解一些使用相机手动设置的简单方法可以使最终结果比仅使用自动设置好得多。#7：规划你的未来

source: But how deep does this conversion go ? source: We are slowly completing rennovations/repairs as we can afford to , and I have a query which you may be able to help me with.The vanity is laminate and seems to have lost some of its colour , when it is wet however the colour is quite vivid ( black with gold and silver speckles ) does this mean we could get some sort of clear coating put over the top to bring the colour back ? Just thought I would ask before I went and did something I would regret .
domestication: 我们手头有点紧，所以装修和修理工作只能慢慢来，能省一点是一点。我有个问题想请教一下。浴室的洗漱台是贴面的，颜色有些褪了，但奇怪的是，一沾水颜色就变得特别鲜艳（黑色带金色和银色的斑点）。是不是可以给它上一层透明的保护膜，让颜色恢复如初？我就是想在动手之前先问问，免得到时候弄巧成拙。
foreignization: 我们正在力所能及的情况下慢慢完成翻新/维修工作，我有一个问题，您可能能够帮助我解答。洗漱台是层压板的，似乎失去了一些颜色，但当它湿的时候，颜色却相当鲜艳（黑色带有金色和银色斑点），这是否意味着我们可以在上面涂一层透明涂层来恢复颜色？我只是想在采取行动之前先咨询一下，以免做出让自己后悔的事情。

source: I recently bought a ranch style house that was built in ' 68 . It happens to have a pink bathroom . And not just pink tile either . It also has a pink tub , sink and toilet . I am not a huge fan of pink but I would like to keep at least the tile due to cost of remodeling the whole bathroom . I was thinking of doing the rest of the bathroom in black and white but was told this is very 50 ? s . Also did I mention I am 28 years old . Any tips on a remodel that would still keep the pink tiles on the walls ?
domestication: 最近我买了一栋1968年建的牧场风格房子，里面居然有个粉红色的浴室。不光是瓷砖是粉色的，浴缸、洗手台和马桶也都是粉红色的。我对粉色其实不是特别感冒，但考虑到翻新整个浴室的成本，我还是想保留这些瓷砖。本来想把浴室其余部分弄成黑白配色，但有人告诉我这样会显得很老气，像是50年代的风格。对了，我今年28岁。有没有什么装修建议，能让我保留墙上的粉红瓷砖，又不会显得过时呢？

source: One year ago , Egypt had known one President for nearly 30 years . But for 18 days , the eyes of the world were glued to Tahrir Square , where Egyptians from all walks of life -- men and women , young and old , Muslim and Christian -- demanded their universal rights . We saw in those protesters the moral force of non-violence that has lit the world from Delhi to Warsaw , from Selma to South Africa -- and we knew that change had come to Egypt and to the Arab world .
domestication: 一年前，埃及几乎三十年来只有一个总统。但就在18天里，全世界的目光都聚焦在了开罗的解放广场上，那里有来自各行各业的埃及人——男女老少，穆斯林和基督徒——他们都在争取自己的普世权利。我们从那些抗议者身上看到了非暴力的力量，这种力量从德里到华沙，从塞尔玛到南非，照亮了世界——我们知道，埃及和阿拉伯世界已经迎来了变革。
foreignization: 一年前，埃及几乎30年的时间里只有一位总统。但在18天里，全世界的目光都聚焦在解放广场，来自各行各业的埃及人——男女老少，穆斯林和基督徒——都在那里要求他们的普遍权利。我们在那些抗议者身上看到了非暴力的道德力量，这种力量从德里到华沙、从塞尔玛到南非照亮了世界——我们知道变革已经来到埃及和阿拉伯世界。

source: The Walkability Checklist ( **40;13155;TOOLONG ... ) , developed by the Partnership for a Walkable America and the Pedestrian and Bicycle Information Center , provides an easy-to-use form for evaluating neighborhood walkability , taking account factors such as the quality of sidewalks and paths , roadway crossing conditions ( crosswalks , and traffic speeds and volumes ) , the degree of care by motorist , and amenities such as shade trees and street lighting along sidewalks , as perceive by users .
domestication: 《步行友好检查清单》是由美国步行友好联盟和行人自行车信息中心共同开发的，这个工具表提供了一个简单易用的表格，用来评估社区的步行友好度。它考虑了诸如人行道和步道的质量、过街条件（如斑马线、车速和车流量）、驾驶员的礼让程度，以及人行道旁的遮阳树和路灯等设施，这些都是用户实际感受到的因素。
foreignization: 《步行性检查表》（**40;13155;TOOLONG...），由美国步行联盟和行人与自行车信息中心共同开发，提供了一个易于使用的表格，用于评估社区的步行性，考虑了诸如人行道和路径的质量、道路交叉口状况（人行横道、交通速度和流量）、机动车驾驶者的注意程度以及人行道沿线的遮荫树和街灯等设施，正如使用者所感知的那样。

source: But the story that most affected us came from a small town in rural Ohio . Two first-grade teachers , Joy Bowman and Angela Johnson , had agreed to let a professor from Ohio State University , Jeane Copenhaver-Johnson , observe their classrooms for the year . Of the 33 children , about two thirds were white , while the others were black or of mixed-race descent .

source: The original comic does a better job of localizing its fascist government , and thus making its point that such regimes can emerge anywhere , by extrapolating from traits and tendencies that were supposedly observable in the Thatcherite government of the time of its creation . The movie undermines this by making Norsefire an out-and-out allegory for the Nazis the Bush administration ( Adam Susan is renamed Adam Sutler in a move that is , ironically , less subtle ) .
domestication: 原版漫画在将法西斯政府本土化方面做得更好，从而更有力地传达了这种政权可能在任何地方出现的观点。它从创作时期撒切尔政府的特征和倾向中推导出来。而电影却削弱了这一点，把“北斯火”直接变成了纳粹和布什政府的比喻（亚当·苏珊被改名为亚当·萨特勒，这个改动讽刺的是反而显得不那么隐晦了）。
foreignization: 原版漫画通过从其创作时期撒切尔政府中假定可观察到的特征和倾向进行推断，更好地将法西斯政府本地化，从而使其观点更加明确，即此类政权可能在任何地方出现。而电影则通过将诺斯费尔描绘成纳粹和布什政府的直接寓言（亚当·苏珊被改名为亚当·苏特勒，这一改动讽刺地来说反而不那么微妙）来削弱这一点。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

The movie undermines this by making Norsefire an out-and-out allegory for the Nazis the Bush administration ( Adam Susan is renamed Adam Sutler in a move that is , ironically , less subtle ) .

source: Upon seeing my new house 's pink bathroom , my first instinct was to gut . My husband urged me not to . This website helped me see the light . Now , with some pizzazz , some polished chrome , some frilly black accents , even a few rhinestones , I have fallen in love with Mamie Pink ! I love my pink bathroom and vow to stay true to Mamie 's vision .

source: The numbers are startling . During the next two decades , Minnesota 's 65-and-older population is expected to grow by 107 percent , while the rest of our population will grow by just 6 percent . And for those people who see their 65th birthday , 70 percent eventually will require some type of long-term care . Because the average size of a family is continuing to shrink , far fewer of us will receive that care from our children .

source: Sure , and that 's why people like Bourdain try to squeeze in a visit to someone 's home in foreign countries to get a taste of home cooked love . In some ways one tastes not just the love , but the good intentions ( reflected in their cooking and the way they communicate with you to really make you feel at home ) , the local vibes and flavors . There 's a term for this in Japanese and Chinese as well which is a basic interpretation of this feeling , that 's also reflected in Japanese approach to hospitality ( omotenashi , which is a separate topic altogether ) .
domestication: 当然了，这也是为什么像布尔丹这样的人，总想着在异国他乡挤出时间去拜访当地人家庭，品尝那一份家常的温暖。在某种程度上，你不仅尝到了爱，还感受到了那份善意——这种善意在他们的烹饪中，在他们与你沟通的方式中流露无遗，让你有种宾至如归的感觉。此外，还能体验到当地的风情和味道。这种感觉在日本和中国都有专门的词汇来形容，比如日本的待客之道“おもてなし”（omotenashi），这可是另一个大话题了。
foreignization: 当然，这就是为什么像博尔丁这样的人会设法在外国访问某人的家，以体验一番家常的温馨。在某些方面，人们不仅品尝到的是爱，还有好意（体现在他们的烹饪和与你的交流方式上，真正让你感到宾至如归），以及当地的气息和风味。在日本语和汉语中也有一个术语来基本诠释这种感觉，这也在日本的待客之道（“おもてなし”，这本身是一个单独的话题）中有所体现。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

There 's a term for this in Japanese and Chinese as well which is a basic interpretation of this feeling , that 's also reflected in Japanese approach to hospitality ( omotenashi , which is a separate topic altogether ) .

source: At this point the foundation is being laid . Once it is , then my web designer and I will start fine-tuning . I can tell you that the FAQs will stay , as well as the links and Buzz pages . source: In a strange imaginary loop , these two porn producers were creating the images that they thought the public wanted , which reinforced their idea of the sort of porn they should make . Whether they were right or wrong , I struggled with both insistences , and eventually decided to ignore them . But it sure did n't feel good . And it 's not difficult for me to see how the viewer could feel the same if he or she begins to compare himself to the models -- in porn or in advertising .
domestication: 在这个奇怪的想象循环中，这两个色情制片人不断创造他们认为公众想要的画面，反过来又强化了他们应该制作哪种类型的色情内容的想法。他们是对是错，我都难以接受，最终决定忽略这些坚持。但这确实让人心里不舒服。我也不难理解，观众如果开始拿自己和模特比较——无论是色情片里的还是广告里的——也会有同样的感受。
foreignization: 在一个奇怪的想象循环中，这两个色情制作者正在创造他们认为公众想要的图像，这强化了他们关于应该制作哪种类型色情片的想法。无论他们是对还是错，我在这两种坚持之间挣扎，最终决定忽略它们。但这确实让我感觉不好。我不难理解，如果观众开始将自己与模特（无论是色情片中的还是广告中的）进行比较，他们也会有同样的感受。

And it 's not difficult for me to see how the viewer could feel the same if he or she begins to compare himself to the models -- in porn or in advertising .

source: In the process of regularly doing our MEA , we not only build skill but we strengthen our willpower . Studies have demonstrated that rewarding your brain with small " success experiences " builds willpower over time . Once the MEA turns into a habit , it allows for expansion into slightly more advanced behaviors , such as walking for a few minutes more or increasing the pace . Through consistent practice of the MEA , both skill and willpower are increased until doing what once seemed difficult , becomes easy . Soon , the amateur is running several miles per day , accomplishing his goal of living a more healthful life .
domestication: 在定期做MEA的过程中，我们不仅锻炼了技能，还磨炼了意志。研究表明，用小小的“成功体验”来奖励大脑，能够逐渐增强意志力。一旦MEA成了习惯，就能逐步扩展到稍高级一点的行为，比如多走几分钟路，或者加快步速。通过持续的MEA练习，技能和意志力都会得到提升，那些一开始看似困难的事，慢慢就变得容易了。很快，新手就能每天跑几英里，实现健康生活的目标。

source: It is not for lack of trying . As a community , during the past decade , concerned citizens have spawned a wide variety of committees , panels , conferences , studies and programs , all of which have focused on stress reduction , parent education , homework and testing policies , broader visions of success , the importance of balance and self-care , how to identify the signs of mental health disorders , and how to help a young person in trouble . The efforts have contributed to a more caring , connected community , many say .
domestication: 这并不是因为大家没努力过。过去十年里，社区里的有心人成立了各种委员会、小组，开了无数会议，做了大量研究和项目，所有这些都围绕着减轻压力、家长教育、作业和考试政策、成功更宽泛的定义、平衡与自我照顾的重要性、如何识别心理健康问题的迹象，以及怎样帮助遇到困难的年轻人。这些努力让社区变得更加温暖、更加紧密，很多人都这么说。

source: If you want this person out of your life , you have to consider the situation as well . As Brian notes , telling your boss you do n't like them is n't going to be terribly helpful . When your goal is to remove your boss from your life , it 's probably a lot easier to just find another job . If you have an annoying co-worker , you 'll probably want to consult with your human resources department before taking any action yourself . Personal relationships offer a little more freedom , but you do n't necessarily want to burn a bridge if unnecessary . Be sure to weigh your options and consider possible outcomes . Sometimes it makes more sense to simply put little effort into a personal relationship than to end it . If you feel ending it is in your best interest , however , read on .  Do n't Be a Douche Bag
domestication: 要是想让这个人从你生活中消失，得先掂量掂量情况。就像布赖恩说的，跟老板说自己不喜欢他，这事儿肯定没好果子吃。如果你的目标是摆脱你的老板，找份新工作通常要容易得多。碰到讨厌的同事，最好先和人事部门商量商量，别自己贸然行动。私人关系上倒是自由些，但没必要的话，也别把桥给拆了。一定要权衡一下各种选择，考虑可能的结果。有时候，与其断绝关系，不如少花点心思在上面。不过，如果你觉得结束这段关系对你有好处，那就继续往下看吧。别做混蛋。
foreignization: 如果你想让这个人从你的生活中消失，你必须考虑一下情况。正如布莱恩所说，告诉你的老板你不喜欢他们是不会有太大帮助的。当你的目标是让你的老板从你的生活中消失时，最简单的方法可能是找另一份工作。如果你有一个讨厌的同事，你可能希望在采取任何行动之前先咨询你的人力资源部门。个人关系提供了一点更多的自由，但你不一定想要无缘无故地烧断一座桥。务必权衡你的选择并考虑可能的结果。有时，与其结束一段个人关系，不如少投入一些努力更有意义。然而，如果你觉得结束它是对你最有利的，那么请继续阅读。不要做一个混蛋。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

If you want this person out of your life , you have to consider the situation as well . As Brian notes , telling your boss you do n't like them is n't going to be terribly helpful . When your goal is to remove your boss from your life , it 's probably a lot easier to just find another job . If you have an annoying co-worker , you 'll probably want to consult with your human resources department before taking any action yourself . Personal relationships offer a little more freedom , but you do n't necessarily want to burn a bridge if unnecessary . Be sure to weigh your options and consider possible outcomes . Sometimes it makes more sense to simply put little effort into a personal relationship than to end it . If you feel ending it is in your best interest , however , read on .  Do n't Be a Douche Bag

source: What Makes a Great Seat ? Exit rows , aisle or window seats , and seats close to the front of the plane are typically considered the best . On a short business trip , you probably want an aisle seat near the front of the plane so you can debark as quickly as possible on arrival . On an overnight flight , you 'll want a window seat so you can rest your head . Nervous fliers may want to sit over the wing , where there is less turbulence .
domestication: 好座位的标准是什么？靠近出口的排、过道或靠窗的座位，还有飞机前部的座位通常被认为是最理想的。如果是短途商务旅行，你可能更想坐飞机前部的过道座位，这样到达后可以最快下飞机。对于夜间航班，靠窗的座位会是更好的选择，因为你可以把头靠着窗户休息。对于害怕飞行的人来说，坐在机翼附近是个好主意，因为那里的颠簸会少一些。
foreignization: 什么使一个座位成为好座位？出口排、过道或靠窗座位，以及靠近飞机前部的座位通常被认为是最好的。在短途商务旅行中，您可能想要一个靠近飞机前部的过道座位，这样您可以在到达时尽快下机。在夜间航班上，您会想要一个靠窗的座位，这样您可以休息头部。紧张的乘客可能希望坐在机翼上方，那里颠簸较少。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

What Makes a Great Seat ? Exit rows , aisle or window seats , and seats close to the front of the plane are typically considered the best . On a short business trip , you probably want an aisle seat near the front of the plane so you can debark as quickly as possible on arrival . On an overnight flight , you 'll want a window seat so you can rest your head . Nervous fliers may want to sit over the wing , where there is less turbulence .

source: IN that thread , Silverjay suggested that the result was a sort of " Pied au Cochon " style of sushi , the notable Montreal restaurant that serves delicious , but extremely rich and oppulent food with a surfeit of fois gras included in many of the dishes . He intimated that the result is not restrained and subtle and as the " yuba " name suggests since " yuba " is a Kyoto style dish . Kyoto cuisine is noted for it 's elegance and refinement . So if this is in fact a divergence from Japanese cuisine-is it the amalgamation of Japanese training ( the Chefs trained in Japanese restaurants ) with American sensibilities along with Chinese culture ?
domestication: 在那个讨论里，Silverjay 提到这道菜有点像是“Pied au Cochon”风格的寿司。“Pied au Cochon”是蒙特利尔一家有名的餐厅，那里的菜虽然美味，但极其丰盛和奢华，很多菜里都有大量的鹅肝。他暗示说，这道菜并不像“油皮”这个名字所暗示的那样，克制而细腻。毕竟，“油皮”是一道京都风味的菜肴，京都料理以优雅精致著称。所以，如果这真的是偏离了日本料理的传统，是不是可以认为这是日本料理培训（厨师们在日式餐厅受训）与美国人的口味再加上中国文化融合的结果呢？

source: This provision applies to debt forgiven in calendar years 2007 through 2012 . Up to $2 million of forgiven debt is eligible for this exclusion ( $1 million if married filing separately ) . source: You can find House Sparrows most places where there are houses ( or other buildings ) , and few places where there are n't . Along with two other introduced species , the European Starling and the Rock Pigeon , these are some of our most common birds . Their constant presence outside our doors makes them easy to overlook , and their tendency to displace native birds from nest boxes causes some people to resent them . But House Sparrows , with their capacity to live so intimately with us , are just beneficiaries of our own success .  Typical Voice  Size &; Shape

source: Table 4 lists factors to consider when evaluating Walking and Cycling Facilities such as sidewalks , paths and trails ( together called nonmotorized networks ) . Several walking and cycling Level-Of-Service rating systems have been developed . Some are more complete than others . For example , some focus on walkway conditions and give little consideration to roadway crossings , while others focus on roadway crossing conditions and give little consideration to walkways .

source: The method of detection of the variation decrease point F will be briefly described in the following . The intensity of the superposed light is measured every small unit of time . The difference between the presently measured and the previous values is obtained . Absolute values of the differences for 50 measurements for example are accumulated . The accumulated value is considered to represent the variation range of the intensity of the superposed light during the 50 measurements . The point where the result of the accumulation is smaller than a prescribed value is determined to be the variation decrease point F. Since this method is the same as a method of detection of a variation decrease point F used in an embodiment of the present invention , a detailed description thereof is set forth below .
domestication: 接下来简要介绍一下检测变化减少点F的方法。这个方法是这样的：每隔一小段时间测量一次叠加光的强度，然后算出这次测量值和上次测量值之间的差值。比如，取50次测量的差值绝对值之和，这个累积值就代表了这50次测量期间叠加光强度的变化范围。当这个累积值小于某个设定值时，就认为找到了变化减少点F。这种方法和本发明的一个实施例中使用的检测变化减少点F的方法是一样的，所以这里就不多赘述了。
foreignization: 以下将简要描述检测变化减少点F的方法。每隔很小的时间单位测量叠加光的强度。获得当前测量值与前一个值之间的差值。例如，累积50次测量的差值的绝对值。累积值被认为代表了在这50次测量期间叠加光强度的变化范围。当累积结果小于规定值时，该点被确定为变化减少点F。由于这种方法与本发明的一个实施例中使用的变化减少点F的检测方法相同，因此下面将对其进行详细描述。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The method of detection of the variation decrease point F will be briefly described in the following . The intensity of the superposed light is measured every small unit of time . The difference between the presently measured and the previous values is obtained . Absolute values of the differences for 50 measurements for example are accumulated . The accumulated value is considered to represent the variation range of the intensity of the superposed light during the 50 measurements . The point where the result of the accumulation is smaller than a prescribed value is determined to be the variation decrease point F. Since this method is the same as a method of detection of a variation decrease point F used in an embodiment of the present invention , a detailed description thereof is set forth below .
接下来简要介绍一下检测变化减少点F的方法。这个方法是这样的：每隔一小段时间测量一次叠加光的强度，然后算出这次测量值和上次测量值之间的差值。比如，取50次测量的差值绝对值之和，这个累积值就代表了这50次测量期间叠加光强度的变化范围。当这个累积值小于某个设定值时，就认为找到了变化减少点F。这种方法和本发明的一个实施例中使用的检测变化减少点F的方法是一样的，所以这里就不多赘述了。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

The method of detection of the variation decrease point F will be briefly described in the following . The intensity of the superposed light is measured every small unit of time . The difference between the presently measured and the previous values is obtained . Absolute values of the differences for 50 measurements for example are accumulated . The accumulated value is considered to represent the variation range of the intensity of the superposed light during the 50 measurements . The point where the result of the accumulation is smaller than a prescribed value is determined to be the variation decrease point F. Since this method is the same as a method of detection of a variation decrease point F used in an embodiment of the present invention , a detailed description thereof is set forth below .
以下将简要描述检测变化减少点F的方法。每隔很小的时间单位测量叠加光的强度。获得当前测量值与前一个值之间的差值。例如，累积50次测量的差值的绝对值。累积值被认为代表了在这50次测量期间叠加光强度的变化范围。当累积结果小于规定值时，该点被确定为变化减少点F。由于这种方法与本发明的一个实施例中使用的变化减少点F的检测方法相同，因此下面将对其进行详细描述。

source: It was reported that a huge blaze wrecked the Hogwarts set after a battle scene went spectacularly wrong . According to the report , explosives used in action sequences set light to scenery for the wizardry school , and that firefighters battled for 40 minutes to bring the flames under control but the set - centerpiece for the film 's Battle of Hogwarts climax - was left badly damaged . It was later confirmed that the fire was greatly exaggerated , and that the set that had been damaged was going to need be rebuilt anyway for use in another scene . Some actors were still filming at the studio but none of the movie 's biggest stars - Daniel Radcliffe ( Harry ) , Emma Watson ( Hermione ) or Rupert Grint ( Ron Weasley ) - were involved . No one was injured .
domestication: 据报道，一场大火毁坏了霍格沃茨的布景，原因是战斗场景出了大问题。据称，拍摄动作场面时使用的爆炸物点燃了魔法学校的布景，消防员奋力扑救了40分钟才控制住火势，但作为电影《哈利·波特》决战霍格沃茨场景核心的布景严重受损。后来证实，火灾被夸大了，其实受损的布景本来就需要重建，以便用于另一场戏。当时有些演员还在片场拍戏，但电影的三大主演——丹尼尔·雷德克里夫（哈利）、艾玛·沃森（赫敏）和鲁珀特·格林特（罗恩）都不在现场。所幸无人受伤。
foreignization: 据报道，一场巨大的火灾在一场战斗场景出现严重失误后摧毁了霍格沃茨的布景。据报告称，用于动作场景的爆炸物引燃了魔法学校的布景，消防人员奋战40分钟才将火势控制住，但作为影片《哈利·波特》霍格沃茨之战高潮部分的布景中心却被严重损坏。后来证实，这场火灾被大肆夸大，受损的布景本来就需要重建以用于另一场戏。一些演员仍在该片场拍摄，但电影的最大牌明星——丹尼尔·雷德克里夫（哈利）、艾玛·沃森（赫敏）或鲁伯特·格林特（罗恩·韦斯莱）——均未参与其中。没有人受伤。

It was later confirmed that the fire was greatly exaggerated , and that the set that had been damaged was going to need be rebuilt anyway for use in another scene . Some actors were still filming at the studio but none of the movie 's biggest stars - Daniel Radcliffe ( Harry ) , Emma Watson ( Hermione ) or Rupert Grint ( Ron Weasley ) - were involved . No one was injured .

source: I look around like you do , Thomas , and wonder who the next star will be . I keep thinking there must be someone out there that can make me say " yes , that 's what I think ... " , but I have n't heard him/her yet . Conservative ideas are more appealing than liberal ideas -- someone just has to be able to unpack them so the average person " gets it . " Liberals have it easy , they just say what they are going to do for you -- we have to explain how it 's better to do it for yourself .
domestication: 我跟你们一样，托马斯，四处张望，琢磨下一个明星会是谁。我总想着肯定有个人能让我说：“对，这就是我想的……”但我还没遇到这样的人。保守的想法比自由派的更吸引人——只是需要有人能把这些想法讲明白，让普通人都能“听懂”。自由派容易多了，他们只管说要给你做什么——而我们得解释自己动手为什么更好。
foreignization: 我像你一样环顾四周，托马斯，想知道下一个明星会是谁。我一直认为一定有人能让我说“是的，这就是我的想法……”，但我还没有听到他/她的声音。保守的想法比自由的想法更有吸引力——只是需要有人能够把这些想法解释清楚，让普通人“明白”。自由派很容易，他们只需说出他们将为你做什么——而我们则必须解释为什么自己做更好。

source: The screen is the same for all real purposes . It is technically a " new " part in that it is n't identical to the old , it 's a bit thinner and more efficient , but it 's the same resolution . The Glass is thinner though , and this amounts to a fair bit of the weight loss from one generation to the next . In playing with the device it seems surprising but despite feeling lighter it actually feels more sturdy in your hands . I still would n't suggest dropping it , but if it were to fall the iPad 2 certainly feels like it might stand a better chance to survive . Try not to drop it though .

source: Digital vs. analog : Many tubes are still entirely analog , meaning that they wo n't work with high-definition tuners or progressive-scan DVD players . An increasing number of direct-view tube TVs , however , can display high-definition sources . These sets still use the tube , an inherently analog display technology ( unlike plasma , LCD , DLP , and the rest ; see the following sections ) , but if they can accept and display high-definition and progressive-scan images , they qualify as honest-to-goodness HDTVs .
domestication: 数字与模拟：许多显像管电视仍然是纯模拟的，也就是说它们无法与高清调谐器或逐行扫描DVD播放机配合使用。不过，越来越多的直视型显像管电视可以显示高清信号了。这些电视虽然还是用显像管，这种本质上就是模拟技术的显示设备（不像等离子、液晶、DLP等；后面会详细介绍），但如果它们能接收和显示高清及逐行扫描的图像，那也算是真正的高清电视了。

source: As you wireframe the infographic , you will identify section breaks that help to tell the story . Most infographics online have a vertical flow , in which each section has a heading to distinguish it from the last . This gets boring fast . Organizing the data and sectioning off information without relying entirely on headings and color breaks is a good way to break the monotony .
domestication: 在设计信息图的框架时，你会找到有助于讲述故事的分区。大多数网上的信息图都是垂直布局的，每个部分都有一个标题来区分上一部分。这种方式很快就会让人觉得乏味。通过组织数据和划分信息，而不完全依赖标题和颜色分隔，可以有效打破这种单调。这样既能保持内容的连贯性，又能让读者眼前一亮。
foreignization: 当你绘制信息图的线框时，你会识别出有助于讲述故事的部分分隔。大多数在线的信息图都有垂直流向，每个部分都有一个标题以区别于前一部分。这很快就会变得无聊。通过组织数据和划分信息而不完全依赖于标题和颜色分隔是一种打破单调的好方法。

source: **32;2327;TOOLONG . SEC. 16 . The governor shall have power to grant reprieves , commutations and pardons , after conviction , for all offences except treason and cases of impeachment , subject to such regulations as may be provided by law . Upon conviction for treason , he shall have power to suspend the execution of the sentence until the case shall be reported to the general assembly at its next meeting , when the general assembly shall either grant a pardon , commute the sentence , direct the execution of the sentence , or grant a further reprieve . He shall have power to remit fines and forfeitures , under such regulations as may be prescribed by law ; and shall report to the general assembly , at its next meeting , each case of reprieve , commutation , or pardon granted , and the reasons therefor ; and also all persons in whose favor remission of fines and forfeitures shall have been made , and the several amounts remitted .
domestication: 第十六条：州长有权在定罪后，对除叛国罪和弹劾案外的所有罪行进行缓刑、减刑和赦免，具体规定由法律规定。若涉及叛国罪的定罪，州长可暂停执行判决，直到下一次立法会议时将案件报告给立法机关，由立法机关决定是否赦免、减刑、执行判决或再次缓刑。州长还有权根据法律规定减免罚款和罚金，并需在下次立法会议上报告所有缓刑、减刑、赦免的情况及理由，以及所有被减免罚款和罚金的人及其减免金额。
foreignization: **32;2327;TOOLONG . 第16节 . 州长在定罪后有权对所有罪行（除叛国罪和弹劾案外）授予缓刑、减刑和赦免，条件是遵守法律规定的规定。在叛国罪定罪后，他有权暂停执行判决，直到案件在下次会议时报告给立法机构，届时立法机构将要么授予赦免，要么减轻刑罚，要么指示执行判决，或者授予进一步的缓刑。他有权根据法律规定的规定减免罚款和罚金；并在下次会议时向立法机构报告每一起缓刑、减刑或赦免案件及其理由；以及所有获得罚款和罚金减免的人及其各自减免的金额。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

**32;2327;TOOLONG . SEC. 16 . The governor shall have power to grant reprieves , commutations and pardons , after conviction , for all offences except treason and cases of impeachment , subject to such regulations as may be provided by law . Upon conviction for treason , he shall have power to suspend the execution of the sentence until the case shall be reported to the general assembly at its next meeting , when the general assembly shall either grant a pardon , commute the sentence , direct the execution of the sentence , or grant a further reprieve . He shall have power to remit fines and forfeitures , under such regulations as may be prescribed by law ; and shall report to the general assembly , at its next meeting , each case of reprieve , commutation , or pardon granted , and the reasons therefor ; and also all persons in whose favor remission of fines and forfeitures shall have been made , and the several amounts remitted .
第十六条：州长有权在定罪后，对除叛国罪和弹劾案外的所有罪行进行缓刑、减刑和赦免，具体规定由法律规定。若涉及叛国罪的定罪，州长可暂停执行判决，直到下一次立法会议时将案件报告给立法机关，由立法机关决定是否赦免、减刑、执行判决或再次缓刑。州长还有权根据法律规定减免罚款和罚金，并需在下次立法会议上报告所有缓刑、减刑、赦免的情况及理由，以及所有被减免罚款和罚金的人及其减免金额。

**32;2327;TOOLONG . SEC. 16 . The governor shall have power to grant reprieves , commutations and pardons , after conviction , for all offences except treason and cases of impeachment , subject to such regulations as may be provided by law . Upon conviction for treason , he shall have power to suspend the execution of the sentence until the case shall be reported to the general assembly at its next meeting , when the general assembly shall either grant a pardon , commute the sentence , direct the execution of the sentence , or grant a further reprieve . He shall have power to remit fines and forfeitures , under such regulations as may be prescribed by law ; and shall report to the general assembly , at its next meeting , each case of reprieve , commutation , or pardon granted , and the reasons therefor ; and also all persons in whose favor remission of fines and forfeitures shall have been made , and the several amounts remitted .

**32;2327;TOOLONG . 第16节 . 州长在定罪后有权对所有罪行（除叛国罪和弹劾案外）授予缓刑、减刑和赦免，条件是遵守法律规定的规定。在叛国罪定罪后，他有权暂停执行判决，直到案件在下次会议时报告给立法机构，届时立法机构将要么授予赦免，要么减轻刑罚，要么指示执行判决，或者授予进一步的缓刑。他有权根据法律规定的规定减免罚款和罚金；并在下次会议时向立法机构报告每一起缓刑、减刑或赦免案件及其理由；以及所有获得罚款和罚金减免的人及其各自减免的金额。

source: Third , the left is utterly powerless . What I mean by this is that they must run a particular campaign if they expect to get any votes at all . Obama 's campaign was about as pathetic as you can get , and yet , he still earned 10 million fewer votes than he got last time around . It 's laughable , really . They have worked themselves into an ever-shrinking box . Our friends keep getting richer and smarter and have more kids . Their supporters get drugged up , die young , and do n't have kids . We have the demographic advantage . They 've already slaughtered millions of potential voters , and as time goes on , that gap , the abortion gap , is growing , because those aborted babies will never have children of their own . That 's what happens when you embrace the ideology of death rather than life . Your people end up dead .
domestication: 第三，左派完全没有力量了。我的意思是，他们要想拿到选票，就得搞特定的竞选活动。奥巴马那次的竞选可以说是惨不忍睹，结果他还比上次少了1000万张票。真是滑稽。他们把自己逼进了一个越来越小的角落里。我们的朋友越来越有钱，越来越聪明，孩子也越来越多。他们的支持者要么吸毒，要么早死，还不生孩子。我们在人口上占优势。他们已经杀死了数百万潜在选民，随着时间推移，这个差距，也就是堕胎造成的差距，越来越大，因为那些被堕胎的孩子永远不会有后代。这就是拥抱死亡而不是生命的结果，最终你的人民只会越来越少。

They 've already slaughtered millions of potential voters , and as time goes on , that gap , the abortion gap , is growing , because those aborted babies will never have children of their own . That 's what happens when you embrace the ideology of death rather than life . Your people end up dead .

source: Ross also uses the kalm argument to counter the common atheist taunt : " Who created God ? " He claims that God is not confined to a " half dimension " of time , and so need not have been created . I take this to mean that if I can demonstrate the universe is not necessarily confined to a half dimension , then Ross , Craig , and other theists who use the kalm argument will be forced to admit that the universe was not necessarily created . ( Of course they wo n't ) .

source: This kind of approach trades on a human instinct to conform to social norms , psychologists say . In another well-known experiment , Dr. Cialdini and two colleagues tested how effective different messages were in getting hotel guests to reuse towels . The message " the majority of guests reuse their towels " prompted a 29 percent increase in reuse , compared with the usual message about helping the environment . The message " the majority of guests in this room reuse their towels " resulted in a 41 percent increase , he said .
domestication: 心理学家说，这种方法利用了人类趋同社会规范的本能。在另一个著名的实验中，西阿迪尼博士和他的两位同事测试了不同信息对酒店客人重复使用毛巾效果的影响。结果显示，比起通常用来呼吁环保的信息，“大多数客人都会重复使用毛巾”这一信息使得毛巾重用率提高了29%。而当信息变为“这个房间的大多数客人都会重复使用毛巾”时，重用率更是提高了41%。这说明，具体到某个房间的大多数人行为，更能带动人的跟风心理。

source: During the past 30 years , we have developed a two-pronged analysis for evaluating the validity of a premarital agreement . Under the first prong , the court must decide whether the agreement provides a fair and reasonable provision for the party not seeking enforcement of the agreement . If the court makes this finding , then the analysis ends and the agreement may be validated . If the agreement is not fair , the court must invoke the second prong and decide : ( A ) whether full disclosure has been made by the parties of the amount , character , and value of the property involved , and ( B ) whether the agreement was entered into intelligently and voluntarily on independent advice and with full knowledge by both spouses of their rights .
domestication: 在过去的30年里，我们发展了一套双管齐下的分析方法，用来评估婚前协议的有效性。第一部分，法院得判断这份协议是否给不主张执行协议的一方提供了公平合理的保障。如果法院认定确实如此，那分析到这儿就结束了，协议就可以生效了。如果协议不公平，法院就得启动第二部分的分析，看看：（A）双方是否已经全面披露了涉及财产的数量、性质和价值，（B）双方是否在有独立建议的情况下，并且在充分了解各自权利的前提下，自愿且明智地签订了协议。

During the past 30 years , we have developed a two-pronged analysis for evaluating the validity of a premarital agreement . Under the first prong , the court must decide whether the agreement provides a fair and reasonable provision for the party not seeking enforcement of the agreement . If the court makes this finding , then the analysis ends and the agreement may be validated . If the agreement is not fair , the court must invoke the second prong and decide : ( A ) whether full disclosure has been made by the parties of the amount , character , and value of the property involved , and ( B ) whether the agreement was entered into intelligently and voluntarily on independent advice and with full knowledge by both spouses of their rights .

source: 2004 - Owens ? agent failed to meet a free agency deadline in March , making him ineligible to become a free agent . Because they retained his rights , the 49ers then traded him to the Baltimore Ravens , but Owens refused to report to his new team . He expressed his desire to play in Philadelphia , and filed a grievance , claiming he should be granted free agency . After a series of negotiations , a deal was worked out between the three teams which sent Owens to Philadelphia where he signed a seven-year , $49 million deal against the advice of the players ? union .
domestication: 2004年，欧文斯的经纪人错过了3月份的自由球员截止日期，导致他无法成为自由球员。因为49人队还拥有他的签约权，所以他们就把欧文斯交易到了巴尔的摩乌鸦队。但是，欧文斯却拒绝去新球队报到。他一心想着去费城打球，于是提出了申诉，要求获得自由球员的身份。经过一系列的谈判，三支球队终于达成了协议，欧文斯如愿以偿地去了费城，并且签下了一份为期7年、总额4900万美元的大合同，尽管球员工会并不建议他这么做。

source: Listen to an acute exchange of dialogue between the son Jack ( Hunter McCracken ) and his father ( Brad Pitt ) . " I was a little hard on you sometimes , " Mr. Brien says , and Jack replies : " It 's your house . You can do what you want to . " Jack is defending his father against himself . That 's how you grow up . And it all happens in this blink of a lifetime , surrounded by the realms of unimaginable time and space .
domestication: 听听杰克（亨特·麦卡肯饰）和他父亲（布拉德·皮特饰）之间一段尖锐的对话吧。“有时候我对你的态度有点严厉，”布里恩先生说，杰克回答道：“这是你的家，你想怎么样都行。”杰克是在保护他的父亲，不受自己的责备。人就是这样长大的。这一切都在转瞬即逝的一生中发生，而周围却是无尽的时间和空间。

source: One day bled into two , and then into three , until Harry had lost count . They were at another radio interview , and all he wanted to do was go home , crawl into bed , and pretend as if the world did n't exist . But no , the grating voice of the interviewer was scratching at his nerves , and a deep-rooted headache had settled into the back of his neck ; his temples throbbing every time he deigned to partake in the conversation .
domestication: 一天拖成了两天，再拖成了三天，哈利都数不清了。他们又在做广播采访，他现在只想回家，钻进被窝，装作这世界与他无关。可是不行，采访人的声音像锉刀一样磨着他的神经，后颈窝里窝着个根深蒂固的头痛；只要他勉强挤出几句话，太阳穴就跟着跳。
foreignization: 一天拖成了两天，然后又拖成了三天，直到哈利已经失去了计数。他们正在进行另一次广播采访，而他唯一想做的就是回家，爬到床上，假装世界不存在。但不，采访者的刺耳声音正在侵蚀他的神经，而一个根深蒂固的头痛已经在他脖子后面安家；每次他屈尊参与谈话时，太阳穴都会跳动。

source: By late 1972 , the Chilean Ministry of the Economy estimated that almost one-third of the diesel trucks at Chuquicamata Copper Mine , 30 percent of the privately owned city buses , 21 percent of all taxis , and 33 percent of state-owned buses in Chile could not operate because of the lack of spare parts or tires . In overall terms , the value of United States machinery and transport equipment exported to Chile by U.S. firms declined from $152.6 million in 1970 to $110 million in 1971 .
domestication: 到了1972年底，智利经济部估计，丘基卡马塔铜矿有将近三分之一的柴油卡车，城市里私人运营的公交车中有30%，所有出租车中有21%，还有国有公交系统中的33%因为缺少零部件或轮胎而无法运行。总的来说，美国公司对智利出口的机械设备和运输工具的价值从1970年的1.526亿美元下降到了1971年的1.1亿美元。
foreignization: 到1972年底，智利经济部估计， Chuquicamata铜矿近三分之一的柴油卡车、30%的私人拥有城市公交车、21%的出租车和33%的国有公交车由于缺乏备件或轮胎而无法运行。总体而言，美国公司向智利出口的机械和运输设备价值从1970年的1.526亿美元下降到1971年的1.1亿美元。

In overall terms , the value of United States machinery and transport equipment exported to Chile by U.S. firms declined from $152.6 million in 1970 to $110 million in 1971 .

source: My wife ( Chinese ) ate some ramen the other day prepared by a Chinese owned ramen restaurant ( her cousin ) . She liked it but said- " does n't taste Japanese-it tastes like Chinese soup " . So to understand cooking that has a deep cultural rooting , you have to go beyond your own culture . Italian or Japanese .

source: I know firsthand that body image and presentation of the body are wed to corporate interest . Though most porn studios and producers have proved compassionate and kind , one studio owner once assured me that I needed to lose weight if I wanted to continue working , and another gently asked me to do steroids . They had perceptions of what the public wants to see , and pressured me into conforming to that image .
domestication: 我亲身体会到，身体形象和外貌展示与公司的利益紧密相连。虽然大多数色情工作室和制片人都很体贴友善，但有一次，一家工作室的老板直言不讳地告诉我，如果我还想继续干这行，就得减肥。另一位则婉转地建议我使用类固醇。他们心里有数，知道观众喜欢看什么，因此不断给我施压，让我去迎合这些标准。
foreignization: 我知道身体形象和身体呈现与公司利益息息相关。虽然大多数色情工作室和制作人都证明了他们是富有同情心和善良的，但有一位工作室老板曾经向我保证，如果我想继续工作，就需要减肥，另一位则温和地要求我使用类固醇。他们对公众想看到的形象有自己的看法，并对我施加压力，使我符合那种形象。

source: Having described the skills you need to perform on test day , now I will tell you how to develop them . It is very simple : you practice . Not quite a revelation , is it ? During your law school career , most of you studied from your professors ' sample exams . When you study from past exams , you get a sense of the type of questions asked and what is expected of you . Moreover , you get familiar with the style of the exam . The MPT is no different . Once again , you must study from past exams .
domestication: 既然已经讲了考试当天需要展示的技能，现在我要告诉你如何培养这些技能。其实很简单：多练习。这也不是什么新鲜事儿，对吧？在法学院的学习过程中，你们大多数人都做过教授出的样题。通过研究往年的考题，你能了解出题的风格和考点，还能熟悉考试的形式。MPT也是一样的道理。你还是得从历年的考题中学习。
foreignization: 在描述了你在考试当天需要展示的技能之后，现在我将告诉你如何培养这些技能。这非常简单：你去练习。这听起来并不像是什么新发现，对吧？在你的法学院学习期间，大多数人都会从教授的样本考试中学习。当你从过去的考试中学习时，你会了解到所问问题的类型以及对你的期望是什么。此外，你会熟悉考试的风格。MPT也不例外。再次强调，你必须从过去的考试中学习。

During your law school career , most of you studied from your professors ' sample exams . When you study from past exams , you get a sense of the type of questions asked and what is expected of you . Moreover , you get familiar with the style of the exam . The MPT is no different . Once again , you must study from past exams .

source: I think that football is quite apt . There are so many quarterbacks who receive the tremendous training that the American football system affords . Yet only a select few can actually learn the skill of an NFL quarterback . Hence , your statement that ANY SKILL CAN BE learned is defied by your own analogy . Not any skill can be learned such as the skill of an NFL quarterback . A certain talent or inclination must exist at some sort of extreme level . In the case of sushi , that inclination may very well be cultural . In the Japanese culture is a deep rooted sense of " mysticism " related to the shinto and Zen Buddhist traditions and includes a cultural attentiveness to elegance , mindfulness , and an array of spiritual compenents . I and others do n't consider this silly .
domestication: 我觉得足球就很恰当。美国的橄榄球系统培养了那么多四分卫，真正能学到NFL四分卫技能的却寥寥无几。所以，你所说的“任何技能都能学会”这个观点，在你自己的例子中就被反驳了。像NFL四分卫那样的技能，并不是人人都能学得会的。必须得有一定的天赋或倾向，而且这种天赋或倾向还得达到一定的高度。说到寿司，这种倾向可能就是文化上的。在日本文化里，有一种根深蒂固的“神秘感”，这与神道教和禅宗佛教传统有关，包括对优雅、专注及一系列精神元素的文化敏感度。我和许多人都不觉得这很荒谬。

source: As investors , we would all like to beat the market handily , and we would all like to pick " great " investments on instinct . However , while intuition is undoubtedly a part of the process of investing , it is just part of the process . As investors , it is not surprising that we focus so much of our energy and efforts on investment philosophies and strategies , and so little on the investment process . It is far more interesting to read about how Peter Lynch picks stocks and what makes Warren Buffett a valuable investor , than it is to talk about the steps involved in creating a portfolio or in executing trades . Though it does not get sufficient attention , understanding the investment process is critical for every investor for several reasons :
domestication: 作为投资者，我们谁都想轻松战胜市场，谁都希望凭直觉就能挑到“大牛股”。然而，虽然直觉在投资过程中确实起作用，但它只是其中的一部分。作为投资者，我们花大量精力和时间研究投资理念和策略，却很少关注投资过程，这也不奇怪。读彼得·林奇如何选股，沃伦·巴菲特的成功秘诀是什么，远比讨论建仓步骤或交易执行来得有趣。尽管投资过程没有得到足够的重视，但了解它对每个投资者都至关重要，原因有几点：

source: Thanks , that 's my experience as well . So the range of posts : Some people have had acceptable sushi prepared by non-Japanese chefs , many have preferred Japanese chefs . Yuba has Chinese chefs that seem to do a great job , but the food perhaps diverges from Japanese culture in some ways , but has a wonderful quality nonetheless . Someone had Korean chef made sushi that was good . Someone felt that the chef should be at least trained well in Japan , regardless of whether they were Japanese or not . Others felt that there is something not so desirable about a certain kind of exclusivity or preciousness applied to sushi of a particular type . Some people felt that offerings at Safeway and other more affordable versions of sushi were quite sufficient . Others talked of an almost spiritual aspect of food preparation . Very nice dialogue . Thanks .
domestication: 谢谢，我的经历也是这样。帖子的内容五花八门：有些人觉得非日本厨师做的寿司也能接受，很多人还是更喜欢日本厨师的手艺。裕巴的中国厨师做得很好，虽然他们的菜可能有点偏离日本文化，但品质还是很棒的。有人提到韩国厨师做的寿司也不错。还有人认为，无论是不是日本人，只要在日本受过良好培训就行。也有人觉得，对某种特定类型的寿司过分强调排他性和独特性，不太妥当。有些人觉得Safeway和其他便宜的寿司已经够好了。还有人谈到了食物准备过程中几乎带有精神层面的意义。这场讨论真是很精彩。谢谢大家。
foreignization: 谢谢，这和我的经历一样。所以各种帖子的范围：有些人认为非日本厨师做的寿司是可以接受的，许多人更喜欢日本厨师。Yuba有中国厨师似乎做得很好，但食物可能在某些方面偏离了日本文化，尽管如此，质量非常好。有人觉得韩国厨师做的寿司也很好。有人认为厨师应该至少在日本接受良好培训，无论他们是否是日本人。其他人则认为将某种排他性或珍贵性应用于特定类型的寿司并不是那么理想。有些人认为Safeway和其他更实惠版本的寿司已经相当足够。还有人谈到了食物准备过程中的近乎精神层面的方面。非常好的对话。谢谢。

source: For me , my IPhone , besides being one of the best toys I 've ever had , quickly became an essential tool I ca n't do without . source: Only Elvis Presley and Michael Jackson can rival Frank Sinatra for biggest-selling solo artist of all time . His jazz-influenced singing remained internationally renowned whatever whims , fashions or innovations were introduced by new generations . In a solo career that included over 70 albums and hundreds of singles , from the late-30s until the mid-90s , Sinatra remained universally loved even as item " , " Pre-order both items " , " Pre-order all three items "  Editorial Reviews
domestication: 只有猫王埃尔维斯·普雷斯利和迈克尔·杰克逊能与弗兰克·辛纳屈在最畅销的独唱艺人中一较高下。他的演唱深受爵士乐影响，无论新一代带来什么新奇、时尚或创新，他的名声依然响彻国际。从30年代末到90年代中期，辛纳屈的个人事业涵盖了超过70张专辑和数百首单曲，始终受到全球的喜爱。即使到了“预购两项商品”、“预购全部三项商品”的今天，编辑评论依旧对他赞不绝口。

只有埃尔维斯·普雷斯利和迈克尔·杰克逊能在最畅销的独唱艺术家之列与弗兰克·辛纳屈一较高下。他的受爵士乐影响的演唱风格无论新一代带来何种奇想、时尚或创新，始终享誉国际。在从30年代末到90年代中期的职业生涯中，辛纳屈发行了超过70张专辑和数百首单曲，即使在“预购这两项”、“预购所有三项”等项目出现时，他依然受到普遍的喜爱。编辑评论

source: Chicago , Indiana , Atlanta and obviously Orlando are all on the decline , whether through injuries or rebuilding , compared to where they were last season . The Boston Celtics give the distinct impression that they 're going to need the whole regular season , if it 's even still possible , to resemble the team that so troubled Miami last spring . The reality is that the Knicks ' conference , unlike what the aforementioned Mavs had to navigate in the annually unforgiving West , offers a real opportunity to snag a top-two seed and potentially avoid the Heat until the conference finals .
domestication: 芝加哥、印第安纳、亚特兰大和当然还有奥兰多，都因为伤病或重建的问题，比起上赛季都有所下滑。波士顿凯尔特人给人的感觉是，他们可能需要整个常规赛，如果还有可能的话，才能找回去年春天给迈阿密制造麻烦的那支队伍的样子。现实情况是，尼克斯所在的赛区不像前面提到的独行侠在每年残酷的西部联盟那样艰难，这个赛区给了他们一个真正的机会，可以争取前两名的位置，甚至可能直到分区决赛才遇到热火。

source: The sweet 1940 Lannonstone ranch we 're hoping to buy has not only one , but TWO lovely , vintage pink bathrooms in it ! The main bath has pink tile with black trim , and the master has , get this , black tile with pink trim and fixtures ( plus a pink trimmed , diamond gridded , tall casement window over the tank ) . Gorgeous . Lots of other vintage goodies too -- like a yellow and turquoise tiled kitchen with gridded floor-to-ceiling picture window in a nook overlooking the backyard , 4-season room with 3 walls of windows and french doors off the dining room , and an offset detached garage ( on an angle on the property ) . Amazeballs . I hope we get it . I can only imagine how just about anyone else would rip out all these fantastic finds to update and flip . No updates needed ! Well , maybe some MCM vintage wallpaper
domestication: 我们想要买的这座1940年的Lannonstone牧场不仅有一个，而是有两个超美的复古粉红浴室！主浴室是粉色瓷砖配黑色边，而主卧浴室更绝了，是黑色瓷砖配粉红边和五金（还有一个装有粉红镶边的钻石网格大窗，正对着水箱）。真是太美了。还有很多其他复古的好东西——比如黄色和蓝绿色瓷砖的厨房，角落里有一扇从地板到天花板的网格窗，可以俯瞰后院；四季房有三面墙都是窗户，餐厅还有通往外面的法式门；车库是错开的独立式（在地块上呈倾斜角度）。太棒了。真希望我们能买到它。我简直无法想象其他人买了会把这些好东西都拆了来翻新。根本不需要翻新啊！好吧，也许加点中世纪现代风格的复古壁纸也不错。
foreignization: 我们希望购买的这栋甜美的1940年Lannonstone牧场式住宅不仅有一个，而且有两个可爱的复古粉色浴室！主浴室铺有粉色瓷砖，边缘是黑色的，而主卧浴室则更令人难以置信，铺有黑色瓷砖，边缘和装置都是粉色的（还有一扇装在水箱上方的高大的粉边菱形格窗）。真是太美了。还有很多其他的复古好东西——比如一个黄色和蓝绿色瓷砖的厨房，角落里有一扇从地板到天花板的格子窗，可以俯瞰后院，四季房有三面都是窗户，餐厅外还有法式门，还有一个斜角独立车库（在房产上呈一定角度）。太棒了。我希望我们能买到它。我只能想象其他人可能会把这些美妙的东西全部拆除来翻新和转手。根本不需要更新！好吧，也许可以加一些MCM复古壁纸。

source: Operating performance for a company that is this highly leveraged is very important in this economy . United Rentals ' free cash flow is negative and is expected to remain negative for the remainder of the 2012 . L ooking at the Interest Coverage and Quick Ratios of the company , there is a risk for investors that the company could face trouble servicing its debt ( if the market sees rental rate declines ) , considering that its operating profits or current assets alone are not high enough to satisfy its interest obligations .
domestication: 在这个经济环境下，对于杠杆这么高的公司来说，运营表现尤为重要。联合租赁的自由现金流为负，预计2012年剩下的时间里都会保持负数。看看公司的利息保障倍数和速动比率，投资者得当心了，公司可能难以偿还债务，特别是如果市场出现租金下降的情况。毕竟，单靠经营利润或流动资产，还不足以支付利息。
foreignization: 对于杠杆率如此高的公司来说，在这种经济环境下运营表现非常重要。United Rentals的自由现金流为负，并预计在整个2012年剩余时间内都将保持负值。从公司的利息覆盖率和速动比率来看，如果市场看到租金率下降，投资者面临的风险是该公司可能难以偿还债务，因为其营业利润或流动资产本身不足以满足其利息支付义务。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Operating performance for a company that is this highly leveraged is very important in this economy . United Rentals ' free cash flow is negative and is expected to remain negative for the remainder of the 2012 . L ooking at the Interest Coverage and Quick Ratios of the company , there is a risk for investors that the company could face trouble servicing its debt ( if the market sees rental rate declines ) , considering that its operating profits or current assets alone are not high enough to satisfy its interest obligations .
在这个经济环境下，对于杠杆这么高的公司来说，运营表现尤为重要。联合租赁的自由现金流为负，预计2012年剩下的时间里都会保持负数。看看公司的利息保障倍数和速动比率，投资者得当心了，公司可能难以偿还债务，特别是如果市场出现租金下降的情况。毕竟，单靠经营利润或流动资产，还不足以支付利息。
