对于杠杆率如此高的公司来说，在这种经济环境下运营表现非常重要。United Rentals的自由现金流为负，并预计在整个2012年剩余时间内都将保持负值。从公司的利息覆盖率和速动比率来看，如果市场看到租金率下降，投资者面临的风险是该公司可能难以偿还债务，因为其营业利润或流动资产本身不足以满足其利息支付义务。

source: One final NIE on Chile was issued prior to Allende 's overthrow in September 1973 . That NIE focused on the prospects for the consolidation of power by Allende 's regime . It concluded that at that juncture a political standoff seemed to be the most likely course of events in Chile . The NIE stated that Allende had not consolidated the power of his Marxist regime ; the bulk of low-income Chileans believed that he had improved their conditions and represented their interests ; and the growth in support for his coalition reflected his political ability as well as the popularity of his measures . The NIE did warn , however , that the growing polarization of the Chilean society was wearing away the Chilean predilection for political compromise . Nevertheless , the analysts predicted that there was only an outside chance that the military would move to force Allende from office .
domestication: 在1973年9月阿连德被推翻前，美国还发布了一份关于智利的最后情报评估报告。这份报告主要讨论了阿连德政权巩固权力的可能性。报告认为，在那个时间点上，智利最可能出现的情况是政治僵局。报告指出，阿连德尚未巩固其马克思主义政权的权力；大多数低收入的智利人相信他改善了他们的生活条件，代表了他们的利益；他所属联盟的支持率上升，既反映了他本人的政治能力，也体现了他的政策受欢迎程度。不过，报告也警告说，智利社会日益加剧的两极分化正在侵蚀这个国家对政治妥协的偏好。尽管如此，分析人员预测，军方强行将阿连德赶下台的可能性仍然很小。
foreignization: 在1973年9月阿连德被推翻之前，还发布了一份关于智利的最后的NIE。该NIE重点关注阿连德政权巩固权力的前景。它得出结论，在那个阶段，政治僵局似乎是智利最可能的发展轨迹。NIE指出，阿连德尚未巩固其马克思主义政权的权力；大多数低收入智利人认为他改善了他们的生活条件并代表了他们的利益；以及对他联盟的支持增长反映了他在政治上的能力及其措施的受欢迎程度。然而，NIE确实警告说，智利社会日益加剧的两极分化正在侵蚀智利人对政治妥协的倾向。尽管如此，分析人士预测，军事力量将阿连德赶下台的可能性很小。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

One final NIE on Chile was issued prior to Allende 's overthrow in September 1973 . That NIE focused on the prospects for the consolidation of power by Allende 's regime . It concluded that at that juncture a political standoff seemed to be the most likely course of events in Chile . The NIE stated that Allende had not consolidated the power of his Marxist regime ; the bulk of low-income Chileans believed that he had improved their conditions and represented their interests ; and the growth in support for his coalition reflected his political ability as well as the popularity of his measures . The NIE did warn , however , that the growing polarization of the Chilean society was wearing away the Chilean predilection for political compromise . Nevertheless , the analysts predicted that there was only an outside chance that the military would move to force Allende from office .

source: I co-host a community radio show about movies and I made a list of 2011 releases that I must catch up on in order to put together a proper top ten list . However , I was aghast to see that this list totaled around 30 films ! Also , many of these movies which qualify as 2011 releases wo n't open in my city until January at best . These would include A Dangerous Method and Shame . Your No. 1 film , A Separation , I had only heard about week ago ! I have no idea when it 's opening here in Ottawa !
domestication: 我和人合办了一个关于电影的社区广播节目，列了个单子，要把2011年的电影都补上，好做出一份像样的十佳榜单。结果一看这单子，居然有30部电影！而且，好多2011年的片子，最快也得等到一月份才在我的城市上映，比如《危险方法》和《羞耻》。你排在第一位的《一次别离》，我也就是前一周才听说！也不知道这电影啥时候才轮到渥太华上映！

source: I guarantee ' A Separation ' will not win at the golden globes or even be acknowledged at the oscars ( we all know why , no matter how ' liberal ' hollywood is ) . I would be happy to eat my words if I am wrong , but I do n't think I will be . It should win best picture ( beside best foreign film ) in a perfect world but too bad we do n't live in one . Such a travesty so many great , worthy films of the past that do n't get recognised .
domestication: 我敢打赌，《一次别离》肯定拿不到金球奖，更别提奥斯卡了（咱们都心知肚明，不管好莱坞再怎么标榜自由）。要是我错了，我乐意吃自己说过的这些话，但我估摸着自己不会错。在理想世界里，这部电影应该拿下最佳影片（除了最佳外语片之外），可悲的是我们并不生活在那样的世界里。真是太可惜了，这么多年来那么多优秀的好电影都没得到应有的认可。
foreignization: 我保证《一次别离》不会在金球奖上获奖，甚至不会在奥斯卡上被提及（我们都知道原因，无论好莱坞多么“自由”）。如果我错了，我愿意吃自己的话，但我认为自己不会错。在一个完美的世界里，它应该获得最佳影片（除了最佳外语片之外），但可惜我们并不生活在一个完美的世界里。真是一场悲剧，这么多伟大的、值得认可的过去电影没有得到应有的认可。

source: The House 6 race illustrates the idea as well as any other . Whether Williams wins or Lawson wins will be determined by who turns out in a low-turnout election . If Williams wins the chances are that many Republicans will simply not vote in November . But more importantly , many of the grassroots " true Republicans " will not get out and work to turn out the Republican vote against Tine . He will get most of the Democrat vote and will thus have to pull only a few Unaffiliated voters , which he can probably do . Without a heavy conservative turnout , Tine wins . Simple as that .
domestication: 第6选区的竞选就很好地说明了这个问题。威廉姆斯和劳森谁能胜出，关键在于低投票率下的选民参与情况。如果威廉姆斯赢了，那很可能很多共和党人干脆就不去投票了。更重要的是，基层那些“真正的共和党人”也不会积极行动起来，为拉票出力。这样一来，蒂内基本能拿下大部分民主党人的票，他只需要争取一些无党派选民的支持，而这点他大概能做到。没有保守派的大规模投票，蒂内就能稳操胜券。就这么简单。
foreignization: 第6选区的竞选很好地说明了这一点。无论威廉姆斯还是劳森获胜，都将取决于在低投票率选举中谁会出来投票。如果威廉姆斯获胜，共和党人中有许多人可能根本不会在11月投票。但更重要的是，许多基层的“真正的共和党人”将不会出来动员共和党的选民对抗蒂内。他将赢得大多数民主党的选票，因此只需拉拢少数无党派选民，这他大概能做到。如果没有大量的保守派投票，蒂内就会赢。就这么简单。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The House 6 race illustrates the idea as well as any other . Whether Williams wins or Lawson wins will be determined by who turns out in a low-turnout election . If Williams wins the chances are that many Republicans will simply not vote in November . But more importantly , many of the grassroots " true Republicans " will not get out and work to turn out the Republican vote against Tine . He will get most of the Democrat vote and will thus have to pull only a few Unaffiliated voters , which he can probably do . Without a heavy conservative turnout , Tine wins . Simple as that .
第6选区的竞选就很好地说明了这个问题。威廉姆斯和劳森谁能胜出，关键在于低投票率下的选民参与情况。如果威廉姆斯赢了，那很可能很多共和党人干脆就不去投票了。更重要的是，基层那些“真正的共和党人”也不会积极行动起来，为拉票出力。这样一来，蒂内基本能拿下大部分民主党人的票，他只需要争取一些无党派选民的支持，而这点他大概能做到。没有保守派的大规模投票，蒂内就能稳操胜券。就这么简单。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The House 6 race illustrates the idea as well as any other . Whether Williams wins or Lawson wins will be determined by who turns out in a low-turnout election . If Williams wins the chances are that many Republicans will simply not vote in November . But more importantly , many of the grassroots " true Republicans " will not get out and work to turn out the Republican vote against Tine . He will get most of the Democrat vote and will thus have to pull only a few Unaffiliated voters , which he can probably do . Without a heavy conservative turnout , Tine wins . Simple as that .
第6选区的竞选很好地说明了这一点。无论威廉姆斯还是劳森获胜，都将取决于在低投票率选举中谁会出来投票。如果威廉姆斯获胜，共和党人中有许多人可能根本不会在11月投票。但更重要的是，许多基层的“真正的共和党人”将不会出来动员共和党的选民对抗蒂内。他将赢得大多数民主党的选票，因此只需拉拢少数无党派选民，这他大概能做到。如果没有大量的保守派投票，蒂内就会赢。就这么简单。

source: Without a hardware time source , W32time is configured as an NTP type . You must reconfigure the MaxPosPhaseCorrection and MaxNegPhaseCorrection registry entries . The recommended value should be 15 minutes or even less , depending on time source , network condition , and security requirement . This requirement also applies to any reliable time source that is configured as the forest root time source in the time sync subnet . For more information about these registry entries , see the " Windows Time service registry entries " section in this article .

source: The smell was awful , a mixture of bad eggs and rotted cabbages . Barrels of slimy stuff stood on the floor ; jars of herbs , dried roots , and bright powders lined the walls ; bundles of feathers , strings of fangs , and snarled claws hung from the ceiling . He saw silver unicorn horns at twenty-one Galleons each and minuscule , glittery-black beetle eyes ( five Knuts a scoop ) .

source: I continue to find my iPad remarkably productive and productive in ways I would not have anticipated . It does indeed redefine how we can use computing so that it does the work we want to do with minimal impediments . I now leave my laptop at school and take my iPad back and forth since 80 or 90% of the time the iPad does all I need to do . I use it 3 or 4 hours a day .
domestication: 我发现我的iPad真是个宝，好用得超乎我的想象。它确实改变了我们使用电脑的方式，让工作变得更加顺畅，少了很多阻碍。现在我几乎不带笔记本电脑去学校了，每天都是iPad来回带，因为大概80%到90%的时间，iPad就能搞定我所有的事。我每天要用上三四个小时呢。
foreignization: 我继续发现我的iPad非常高效，并且以我未曾预料到的方式高效。它确实重新定义了我们如何使用计算，使其能够以最小的障碍完成我们想要做的工作。我现在把笔记本电脑留在学校，而带着我的iPad来回，因为80%或90%的时间iPad可以完成我所有需要做的事情。我每天使用它3到4个小时。

source: When you 've played a game 115 times in 130 years , you 've probably collected some interesting history along the way , and Georgia-Auburn -- the most frequently played rivalry game south of the Mason-Dixon Line other than Virginia-North Carolina , which leads by a single contest -- is no different . Sometimes Georgia-Auburn is a coronation , as it was for the Dawgs in 1980 and 2002 and for the Tigers in 2004 and ' 10 . Over more than a century of matchups , though , it 's clear that the complete opposite outcome is just as likely -- in other words , a stunning upset of a highly ranked team by an unranked , unheralded spoiler .
domestication: 当你在一个多世纪里，130年间踢了115次比赛，自然会积累不少有趣的历史。乔治亚和奥本的较量就是个例子，除了弗吉尼亚和北卡罗来纳的比赛比它们多了一场外，这可是梅森-迪克森线以南最频繁的对手对决。有时候，乔治亚与奥本的对决就像1980年和2002年的乔治亚斗狗队，或是2004年和2010年的奥本老虎队那样，成了加冕之战。然而，在超过一百年的交锋中，结果往往大相径庭，说白了，就是排名靠前的强队被无名小卒逆袭的情况也屡见不鲜。

source: He 'll of course be wearing a specially designed pressure suit that will supply oxygen during his ascent and jump . During three minutes of freefall , he could reach up to 690 mph , which at those altitudes will exceed the speed of sound . As the atmosphere density increases , he 'll slow down to conventional descent speeds , deploy his parachute at about 3,000 feet , and land safely in the desert .

source: When Bryan met Jaime on a business trip six years ago , they immediately hit it off . The only problem was that he lived in Boston and she in Arkansas . " He told me how much he loved me and the kids , " she recalls -- and the rest is history !

source: Malaria is a serious risk to travelers in The Gambia . Travelers who become ill with a fever or flu-like illness while traveling in a malaria-risk area ( and for up to one year after returning home ) should seek prompt medical attention and tell the physician their travel history , as well as what anti-malarial medications they have been taking . For additional information on malaria , protection from insect bites , and anti-malarial drugs , visit the CDC website .
domestication: 在冈比亚旅行时，疟疾是个大隐患。旅途中或回家后一年内，要是发烧或有流感症状，得赶紧找医生看看，并告诉医生你的旅行经历和服用的防疟药物。想了解更多关于疟疾、防蚊虫叮咬和防疟药的信息，可以访问美国疾控中心的网站。
foreignization: 疟疾是对冈比亚旅行者的一个严重威胁。在疟疾风险区域旅行时（以及回国后最多一年内）生病出现发热或流感样症状的旅行者应立即寻求医疗帮助，并告知医生他们的旅行史以及他们所服用的抗疟药物。有关疟疾、防止昆虫叮咬和抗疟药物的更多信息，请访问CDC网站。

Malaria is a serious risk to travelers in The Gambia . Travelers who become ill with a fever or flu-like illness while traveling in a malaria-risk area ( and for up to one year after returning home ) should seek prompt medical attention and tell the physician their travel history , as well as what anti-malarial medications they have been taking . For additional information on malaria , protection from insect bites , and anti-malarial drugs , visit the CDC website .
在冈比亚旅行时，疟疾是个大隐患。旅途中或回家后一年内，要是发烧或有流感症状，得赶紧找医生看看，并告诉医生你的旅行经历和服用的防疟药物。想了解更多关于疟疾、防蚊虫叮咬和防疟药的信息，可以访问美国疾控中心的网站。

疟疾是对冈比亚旅行者的一个严重威胁。在疟疾风险区域旅行时（以及回国后最多一年内）生病出现发热或流感样症状的旅行者应立即寻求医疗帮助，并告知医生他们的旅行史以及他们所服用的抗疟药物。有关疟疾、防止昆虫叮咬和抗疟药物的更多信息，请访问CDC网站。

source: What about crime , fraud , corruption ? A free society protects itself against these things rather easily . Normally , these types of people aggregate to institutions of power . Case in point , the global warming movement . There is absolutely no weight behind any of their absurd claims , and yet here we are . Why ? Because they are working through government . If they had to instead compete in the free market of ideas , we would 've recognized and rejected their baseless allegations immediately .
domestication: 犯罪、诈骗、腐败怎么办？自由社会对付这些事儿其实挺容易的。通常，这些坏蛋都往有权有势的地方靠。就拿全球变暖这事儿来说吧，他们的那些荒唐说法根本站不住脚，可现在却闹得沸反盈天。为什么呢？因为他们是通过政府在搞事情。要是让他们在自由的思想市场上竞争，我们早就识破并拒绝他们的无稽之谈了。
foreignization: 犯罪、欺诈、腐败怎么办？自由社会很容易保护自己不受这些事情的影响。通常，这些人会聚集到权力机构。例如，全球变暖运动。他们那些荒诞的主张根本没有依据，然而我们却在这里讨论。为什么？因为他们是通过政府运作的。如果他们不得不在思想的自由市场上竞争，我们就会立即识破并拒绝他们这些毫无根据的指控。

If they had to instead compete in the free market of ideas , we would 've recognized and rejected their baseless allegations immediately .

source: My last comment was sarcastic . This one is sincere . I 've been to Germany twice . Germany has a pretty high tax rate on the most wealthy . Apparently it 's possible to have progressive taxation without driving the super-rich into penury .

source: The Obama campaign assembled an unprecedented , unified data base made up of information from pollsters , fundraisers , field workers , consumer databases , social-media and mobile contacts . They then fed that data into advanced predictive models that allowed them to target specific groups of voters with specialized messages , track how the electorate was moving as the campaign progressed , and guide the president to a second term .
domestication: 奥巴马竞选团队整合了来自民调机构、筹款人、现场工作人员、消费者数据库、社交媒体和手机联系人的信息，打造了一个前所未有的统一数据库。这些数据被输入到先进的预测模型中，让他们能够精准定位特定选民群体，量身定制宣传信息，实时追踪选情变化，最终助力总统连任成功。
foreignization: 奥巴马竞选团队组建了一个前所未有的、统一的数据库，该数据库由来自民调人员、筹款人、实地工作人员、消费者数据库、社交媒体和移动联系人的信息组成。然后，他们将这些数据输入到高级预测模型中，使他们能够针对特定选民群体定制信息，跟踪选情随着竞选进展的变化，并引导总统连任。

source: Even then , it seemed as if he could sense the landscape shifting , from red to green to blue . As Nadal heads into the grass-court season and the hardcourt one beyond that , it would be foolish to think he will not contend for a title in every tournament . But he must also contend with Novak Djokovic and Roger Federer and others under conditions that are more favorable to them .

foreignization: 即使在那时，他也似乎能感觉到风景的变化，从红色变为绿色再变为蓝色。随着纳达尔进入草地赛季以及之后的硬地赛季，认为他不会在每个比赛中争夺冠军将是愚蠢的。但他也必须与诺瓦克·德约科维奇、罗杰·费德勒和其他人在对他们更有利的条件下竞争。

source: They found that questions about people 's concern for the future predict people 's motivational outlook . Specifically , Tory Higgins and his colleagues have distinguished between two broad motivational orientations . A promotion focus leads people to concentrate on potential positive things in the world and on the person they would ideally like to be . A prevention focus leads people to concentrate on potential negative things in the world and on their responsibilities .
domestication: 他们发现，人们对未来的担忧能预测他们的动机取向。具体来说，托里·希金斯和他的同事们区分了两种主要的动机导向。一种是进取型导向，会让人们关注世界上的潜在好事，以及他们理想中的自我。另一种是防御型导向，会让人们关注世界上的潜在坏事，以及自己的责任。
foreignization: 他们发现，关于人们未来关切的问题可以预测人们的动机展望。具体来说，Tory Higgins和他的同事区分了两种广泛的动机取向。促进焦点使人们集中于世界上的潜在积极事物和他们理想中想成为的人。预防焦点使人们集中于世界上的潜在消极事物和他们的责任。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

They found that questions about people 's concern for the future predict people 's motivational outlook . Specifically , Tory Higgins and his colleagues have distinguished between two broad motivational orientations . A promotion focus leads people to concentrate on potential positive things in the world and on the person they would ideally like to be . A prevention focus leads people to concentrate on potential negative things in the world and on their responsibilities .
他们发现，人们对未来的担忧能预测他们的动机取向。具体来说，托里·希金斯和他的同事们区分了两种主要的动机导向。一种是进取型导向，会让人们关注世界上的潜在好事，以及他们理想中的自我。另一种是防御型导向，会让人们关注世界上的潜在坏事，以及自己的责任。

A prevention focus leads people to concentrate on potential negative things in the world and on their responsibilities .

source: Does the Mortgage Forgiveness Debt Relief Act apply to debt incurred to refinance a home ? source: Delete file(s) that are no longer needed ( such as from your desktop , Documents folder , or other Home folder locations ) , so they will no longer be backed up . You can also enter the Time Machine restore interface and find files that can be removed from the backup drive itself to conserve space . To do this , select the file(s) and from the Action pop-up menu ( gear icon ) in the Time Machine Finder window choose " Delete All Backups of ... " . Be sure to only delete files you are sure you wo n't need or want to restore later .

source: Even after the decrease of the film thickness is ended , additional development is carried out for a prescribed amount of time in order to completely carry out the development . The period for the additional development needs to be accurately defined in order to carry out the development with good repeatability and with high efficiency . More specifically , if this period is too short , the development is insufficiently done . On the other hand , if this period is too long , excess development occurs and the efficiency of work is lowered .
domestication: 即使薄膜厚度减少的过程结束了，还要继续进行一段时间的显影，确保彻底完成显影过程。这额外的显影时间必须精确控制，才能保证显影效果既稳定又高效。说白了，时间短了，显影不充分；时间长了，又会过度显影，工作效率反倒下降。
foreignization: 即使在薄膜厚度减少结束后，仍需进行规定时间的额外显影，以完全完成显影。为了以良好的重复性和高效率进行显影，需要准确确定额外显影的时间。更具体地说，如果这段时间太短，显影不足；另一方面，如果这段时间太长，则会发生过度显影，工作效率降低。

On the other hand , if this period is too long , excess development occurs and the efficiency of work is lowered .

source: IRC is based on a client-server model . Clients are programs that connect to a server , a server is a program that transports data , ( messages ) , from a user client to another . There are clients running on many different systems , ( Unix , emacs , VMS , MSDOS , VM ... ) , that allow you to connect to an IRC server . The client which will be spoken of here is the most widespread : ircII , ( originally designed by Michael Sandrof ) . Other clients are similar , and often accept ircII commands .  1.2 How to behave on IRC
domestication: IRC 基于客户端-服务器模式。客户端是连接到服务器的程序，服务器则是传输数据（消息）从一个用户客户端到另一个的程序。各种不同的系统上都有客户端运行着，比如 Unix、emacs、VMS、MSDOS、VM 等等，它们让你能连接上 IRC 服务器。这里要说的客户端是最普及的一个：ircII（最初由迈克尔·桑德罗夫设计）。其他客户端也差不多，常常接受 ircII 的命令。1.2 在 IRC 上该怎么表现

source: Hollywood legend Michael Deane , who rises from PR guy extraordinaire to the aging producer of an odious web-cast dating program called Hookbook , rises to prominence by suggesting that the marketing of the film Cleopatra , which was hemorrhaging money , focus on the real-life Richard Burton-Elizabeth Taylor drama , rather than the movie itself . You seem to suggest that the Cleopatra PR was the starting point of today 's reality-TV-based culture . What gave you that idea ?

source: A little while back , I was tasked with defining the seven ages of goth . Basically , the goal was to go from the birth of the genre to its modern forms and incarnations based on the years which each of those subgenres were at their height . It was a fair bit of writing that pleased pretty much no one because goths are happiest when they 're pointing out how much more they know about goth than you , but there was always one huge , glaring omission to the article that I could n't hide : Nick Cave .
domestication: 前不久，我接了个活儿，要定义哥特文化的七个阶段。简单来说，就是要从这股潮流的起源讲到它现代的各种变体和形式，每个子类别的高峰期是在哪几年。这活儿写了不少，但几乎没人满意，因为哥特族最乐于干的事就是指出他们对哥特文化比你懂得多。不过，文章里有个大窟窿我一直掩盖不了：尼克·凯夫。
foreignization: 不久前，我被要求定义哥特的七个阶段。基本上，目标是从这个流派的诞生到它的现代形式和化身，根据每个子流派达到顶峰的年份来进行划分。这是一大段文字，几乎没有人满意，因为哥特族最高兴的时候就是指出他们比你懂得更多关于哥特的知识，但文章中有一个巨大且明显的遗漏是我无法掩盖的：尼克·凯夫。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

A little while back , I was tasked with defining the seven ages of goth . Basically , the goal was to go from the birth of the genre to its modern forms and incarnations based on the years which each of those subgenres were at their height . It was a fair bit of writing that pleased pretty much no one because goths are happiest when they 're pointing out how much more they know about goth than you , but there was always one huge , glaring omission to the article that I could n't hide : Nick Cave .

source: A third project supported a right-wing weekly newspaper , which was an instrument of the anti-Allende campaign during and for a time after the 1970 election campaign . Another project funded an asset who produced regular radio political commentary shows attacking the political parties on the left and supporting CIA se1ected candidates . After the Soviet invasion of Czechoslovakia , this asset organized a march on the Soviet Embassy which led to major police action and mass media coverage . Other assets funded under this project placed CIA-inspired editorials almost daily in El Mercurio , Chile 's major newspaper and , after 1968 , exerted substantial control over the content of that paper 's international news section .
domestication: 第三个计划支持了一份右翼周刊，这成了反对阿连德竞选活动的工具，从1970年选举期间一直延续到之后一段时间。另一个项目资助了一位资产，此人定期制作广播政治评论节目，攻击左派政党，支持中情局选定的候选人。苏联入侵捷克斯洛伐克后，这位资产组织了一次前往苏联大使馆的游行，导致了大规模的警方行动和媒体关注。该项目资助的其他资产几乎每天都在《信使报》——智利的主要报纸——上发表受中情局启发的社论，1968年后，还对报纸国际新闻版面的内容施加了重大影响。
foreignization: 第三个支持的项目是一家右翼周报，该报在1970年选举活动期间及之后一段时间内是反对阿连德运动的工具。另一个项目资助了一位制作定期电台政治评论节目的资产，这些节目攻击左翼政党并支持中情局选定的候选人。苏联入侵捷克斯洛伐克后，这位资产组织了前往苏联大使馆的游行，导致了重大的警方行动和大量媒体关注。此项目下的其他资产几乎每天都在《水星报》（智利的主要报纸）上刊登中情局启发的社论，并在1968年后对该报国际新闻版面的内容施加了相当大的控制。

Another project funded an asset who produced regular radio political commentary shows attacking the political parties on the left and supporting CIA se1ected candidates . After the Soviet invasion of Czechoslovakia , this asset organized a march on the Soviet Embassy which led to major police action and mass media coverage . Other assets funded under this project placed CIA-inspired editorials almost daily in El Mercurio , Chile 's major newspaper and , after 1968 , exerted substantial control over the content of that paper 's international news section .

source: The influence of gravitaional waves on polarization is different from that of overall energy distribution , so it should be possible to tell from polarization in the WMAP scans whether the variation is coming from contrasting energy density ( heat ) or gravitational waves that a Big Bang should have produced .

source: The father of one of the slain SEALs , Charles Woods , has called the White House version of what happened at Benghazi a " pack of lies . " He said in an interview , " To me -- I 'm an attorney , this may not legal test of murder -- but to me , that is not only cowardice . For those people who made the decision and who knew about the decision and lied about it are murderers of my son . "
domestication: 查尔斯·伍兹，一位在那次行动中丧生的海豹突击队队员的父亲，把白宫对班加西事件的说法称为“一派胡言”。他在一次采访中说：“我是个律师，这也许算不上法律意义上的谋杀，但对我来说，这不仅是懦弱的表现。那些做决定的人，知道真相却撒谎的人，就是杀害我儿子的凶手。”
foreignization: 被杀害的海豹突击队成员之一查尔斯·伍兹的父亲称白宫对班加西事件的解释是“一派谎言”。他在一次采访中说，“对我来说——我是一名律师，这可能不是谋杀的法律定义——但对我来说，这不仅是怯懦。那些做出决定并知道这一决定且撒谎的人是我儿子的凶手。”

source: I swore when I bought my house 14 years ago that the first thing I was going to do was gut my pink bathroom . But back then , I did n't have $20,000 to spare , and over time , I started to bond with my oh-so-ugly " oval office ! " So I named her Flo and decked her out in falmingos , and the rest is history !
domestication: 14年前买下这房子的时候，我发誓第一件事就是要把那间粉红色的浴室给彻底翻新了。那时候手头紧，哪有2万块闲钱呢。后来时间一长，我居然和这个难看的“椭圆形办公室”产生了感情。我就给它取了个名字叫“Flo”，还装饰了一堆火烈鸟，剩下的就是历史了！

source: There are a whole host of issues to address . Glass-Steagall has some very compelling and appealing characteristics . Easier said than done though especially at this point in time . Why is that ? There are only a small number of banks ( oligopoly ) and if those are further cordoned off by implementation of G-S , then the limited liquidity in the marketplace may actually decline even further .
domestication: 要解决的问题可多了。格拉斯-斯蒂格尔法确实有一些非常吸引人的特点。但说起来容易做起来难，尤其是在现在这个时间点。为什么呢？因为银行数量本就很少（寡头垄断），如果再通过实施格拉斯-斯蒂格尔法进一步限制它们，市场上的流动性可能会变得更加稀缺。
foreignization: 有一大堆问题需要解决。《格拉斯-斯蒂格尔法》有一些非常有吸引力的特性。但是说起来容易做起来难，尤其是在这个时候。为什么会这样？因为只有少数几家银行（寡头垄断），如果通过实施《格拉斯-斯蒂格尔法》进一步将它们隔离，那么市场上的有限流动性实际上可能会进一步下降。

source: Overall , Virginia boasts one of the best-educated and most productive workforces in the country . It employs a higher percentage of people in science and engineering than any other state in the nation , and has been successful both in providing higher education opportunities to its population and in attracting highly educated workers from other states . However , regional educational attainment varies considerably , suggesting that weaknesses exist .  Why is This Important ?
domestication: 总体来说，弗吉尼亚州拥有全国最优秀、生产力最高的劳动力之一。该州从事科学和工程领域的人口比例在全国名列前茅，不仅在提供高等教育机会方面取得了显著成绩，还成功吸引了来自其他州的高学历人才。不过，各地区的教育水平差异很大，说明仍存在一些薄弱环节。这重要在哪？
foreignization: 总体而言，弗吉尼亚州拥有全国最优秀和生产率最高的劳动力之一。它雇佣的科学和工程领域人员比例高于全国其他任何州，并且在为人口提供高等教育机会以及吸引来自其他州的高学历工人方面都取得了成功。然而，各地区的教育水平差异显著，表明存在弱点。这为什么重要？

source: In a sequence of decisions in 1971 through 1973 , the 40 Committee authorized nearly $4 million for opposition political parties in Chile . Most of this money went to the Christian Democratic Party ( PDC ) , but a substantial portion was earmarked for the National Party ( PN ) , a conservative grouping more stridently opposed to the Allende government than was the PDC . An effort was also made to split the ruling Popular Unity coalition by inducing elements to break away .
domestication: 1971年到1973年间，40人委员会接连做出决定，授权近400万美元给智利的反对党。这些钱大部分给了基督教民主党（PDC），但也有一大笔钱划给了立场更为强硬的国民党（PN），这个保守派团体比基督教民主党更加反对阿连德政府。同时，还努力分化执政的人民团结联盟，试图诱使其内部成员分裂出去。
foreignization: 在1971年至1973年的一系列决定中，40委员会授权近400万美元用于智利的反对党。这笔钱大部分给了基督教民主党（PDC），但相当一部分被指定给国家党（PN），这是一个比PDC更强烈反对阿连德政府的保守团体。还试图通过诱导某些成分脱离来分裂执政的人民团结联盟。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In a sequence of decisions in 1971 through 1973 , the 40 Committee authorized nearly $4 million for opposition political parties in Chile . Most of this money went to the Christian Democratic Party ( PDC ) , but a substantial portion was earmarked for the National Party ( PN ) , a conservative grouping more stridently opposed to the Allende government than was the PDC . An effort was also made to split the ruling Popular Unity coalition by inducing elements to break away .

source: AVIATION SAFETY OVERSIGHT : The U.S. Federal Aviation Administration ( FAA ) has assessed the government of The Gambia 's Civil Aviation Authority as not being in compliance with International Civil Aviation Organization ( ICAO ) aviation safety standards for oversight of The Gambia 's air carrier operations . Further information may be found on the FAA safety assessment page .

source: The Imperial Navy in Star Wars . The Empire also has " Stormtroopers " ( from German " Sturmtruppen " , a term originating with the German Army in World War One ) . And Darth Vader 's helmet vaguely resembles a Stahlhelm ( It 's also based on the samurai kabuto . The concept art made this vastly more obvious ) . The crew members on the Walkers appear to be wearing Wehrmacht uniforms down to the helmets , only with goggles added .
domestication: 《星球大战》里的帝国海军。帝国还有一支“冲锋队”（这个名称源自德语“Sturmtruppen”，最早出现在第一次世界大战的德军中）。达斯·维达的头盔有点像钢盔（也借鉴了日本武士的头盔，从概念图上看得更明显）。那些步行机上的士兵穿的好像是德军的制服，连头盔都一样，只是加了个护目镜。
foreignization: 《星球大战》中的帝国海军。帝国还有“风暴兵”（来自德语“Sturmtruppen”，这个词起源于第一次世界大战时期的德国陆军）。达斯·维达的头盔隐约类似于钢盔（它也基于日本武士的头盔。概念艺术使这一点非常明显）。步行机上的船员似乎穿着与钢盔相配的德军制服，只是加了护目镜。

source: Queen Isabella and King Ferdinand 's 1492 conquest of Granada marked the end of the Christians ' centuries-long battle to wrest control of the Iberian Peninsula from the Muslims and the acceleration of their religious purification of Spain . Based in part on her belief that Jews , Muslims , and other nonbelievers had to be converted to Christianity , the Queen sanctioned the Spanish Inquisition and , by 1499 , began a program of forced baptisms among the Muslim population . Within three years , all Muslims in Granada who had not converted to Christianity were ordered out of the city , just as the Jews had been in 1492 . These religious purification policies would have long-lasting consequences not only for non-Christians in Spain but also for the indigenous people of the Americas .
domestication: 1492年，伊莎贝拉女王和费尔南多国王征服格拉纳达，标志着基督徒历时数百年从穆斯林手中夺回伊比利亚半岛的战争终于落下帷幕，西班牙的宗教净化运动也随之加快了步伐。出于认为犹太人、穆斯林和其他不信教者必须皈依基督教的信念，女王批准了西班牙宗教裁判所，并在1499年开始对穆斯林实行强制洗礼。短短三年后，所有未皈依基督教的穆斯林被勒令离开格拉纳达，就像1492年的犹太人一样。这些宗教净化政策不仅对西班牙的非基督徒产生了深远的影响，也波及到了美洲的原住民。
foreignization: 女王伊莎贝拉和国王费尔南多于1492年征服格拉纳达，标志着基督徒经过数个世纪的努力终于从穆斯林手中夺回伊比利亚半岛控制权，并加速了他们在西班牙的宗教净化。基于她认为犹太人、穆斯林和其他异教徒必须皈依基督教的信念，女王批准了西班牙宗教裁判所，并在1499年开始对穆斯林人口实施强制洗礼计划。三年内，所有未皈依基督教的格拉纳达穆斯林被命令离开城市，就像1492年的犹太人一样。这些宗教净化政策不仅对西班牙的非基督徒产生了长期影响，也对美洲的原住民造成了深远的影响。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Queen Isabella and King Ferdinand 's 1492 conquest of Granada marked the end of the Christians ' centuries-long battle to wrest control of the Iberian Peninsula from the Muslims and the acceleration of their religious purification of Spain . Based in part on her belief that Jews , Muslims , and other nonbelievers had to be converted to Christianity , the Queen sanctioned the Spanish Inquisition and , by 1499 , began a program of forced baptisms among the Muslim population . Within three years , all Muslims in Granada who had not converted to Christianity were ordered out of the city , just as the Jews had been in 1492 . These religious purification policies would have long-lasting consequences not only for non-Christians in Spain but also for the indigenous people of the Americas .

source: Yet public pronouncements not withstanding , after Allende 's inauguration the 40 Committee approved a total of over seven million dollars in covert support to opposition groups in Chile . That money also funded and extensive anti-Allende propaganda campaign . Of the total authorized by the 40 Committee , over six million dollars was spent during the Allende presidency and $84,000 was expended shortly thereafter for commitments made before the coup . The total amount spent on covert action in Chile during 1970-73 was approximately $7 million , including project funds not requiring 40 Committee approval .
domestication: 尽管公开声明并非如此，但在阿连德就职后，“四十委员会”还是批准了超过七百万美元的秘密资金，支持智利的反对派团体。这钱还资助了一场大规模的反阿连德宣传运动。据“四十委员会”授权的总额中，有六百多万美元是在阿连德任内花掉的，政变前承诺的款项在政变后不久又支出了八万四千美元。1970年到1973年间，在智利秘密行动上花费的总金额约为七百万美元，其中包括不需要“四十委员会”审批的项目资金。
foreignization: 然而，尽管有公开声明，阿连德就职后，40委员会还是批准了超过七百万美元的秘密资金支持智利的反对派团体。这笔资金还资助了一场广泛的反阿连德宣传运动。在40委员会授权的总额中，有超过六百万美元是在阿连德任内支出的，另有84,000美元是在政变前不久为此前作出的承诺而花费的。1970-73年期间，在智利进行的秘密行动所花费的总金额约为700万美元，包括不需要40委员会批准的项目资金。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Yet public pronouncements not withstanding , after Allende 's inauguration the 40 Committee approved a total of over seven million dollars in covert support to opposition groups in Chile . That money also funded and extensive anti-Allende propaganda campaign . Of the total authorized by the 40 Committee , over six million dollars was spent during the Allende presidency and $84,000 was expended shortly thereafter for commitments made before the coup . The total amount spent on covert action in Chile during 1970-73 was approximately $7 million , including project funds not requiring 40 Committee approval .

source: Historians examining the detailed accounts in 1 and 2 Kings have determined that Queen Jezebel 's era , around 9th century B.C. , was one of Israel 's most intense religious-political struggles . The 22-year reign of Ahab and Jezebel was marked by a religious contest between adherents of Ba'al and followers of Yahweh , and by a political battle between urban elites and rural landowners .  Jezebel Was a Daughter of Intrigue
domestication: 历史学家们研究了《列王纪上》和《列王纪下》中的详细记载，发现约在公元前9世纪的耶洗别女王时期，是以色列历史上宗教与政治斗争最为激烈的时期之一。亚哈和耶洗别统治的22年间，宗教上是巴力信徒和耶和华追随者之间的较量，政治上则是城市精英和乡村地主之间的斗争。耶洗别出生在一个权谋之家。
foreignization: 历史学家在仔细研究《列王纪上》和《列王纪下》中的详细记载后，确定耶洗别女王的时代，大约公元前9世纪，是以色列最激烈的宗教政治斗争时期之一。亚哈和耶洗别统治的22年期间，以巴力信徒与雅赫维追随者之间的宗教竞赛为标志，并且还存在城市精英与农村地主之间的政治斗争。耶洗别是一位充满阴谋的女儿。

source: For example , one might object to comparisons of pornography and sexualized images of women in advertising because porn is consumed privately and advertising ( sometimes ) is n't . But the logical consequence could easily -- and often has easily -- become : we can not have women depicted sexually in public . To keep the argument logically consistent : in porn , we consent and so it 's okay , in advertisement , we do n't consent , so it 's not . That means banning advertisement with questionable content , back to women showing their ankles off in ads , and wearing full-length dresses otherwise .
domestication: 比如说，有人可能会反对将色情与广告中女性的性化形象相提并论，因为色情是私密消费的，而广告（有时）却不是。但逻辑的结果很轻易地——也确实经常发生——变成了：公共场合不能有女性被性化的描绘。要保持这个论点的一致性：在色情里，我们同意了，所以没问题；在广告里，我们没同意，所以就有问题。这就意味着要禁止那些内容有问题的广告，回到女性在广告中只能露出脚踝，平时得穿长裙的地步。
foreignization: 例如，有人可能反对将色情和广告中女性的性化形象进行比较，因为色情是私下消费的，而广告（有时）不是。但逻辑上的后果很容易——而且经常变得如此——：我们不能在公共场合将女性性化地描绘出来。为了保持论点的逻辑一致性：在色情中，我们同意，所以它是可以的；在广告中，我们不同意，所以它是不可以的。这意味着禁止内容有问题的广告，回到女性在广告中露出脚踝，其他时候穿全身长裙的情况。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

For example , one might object to comparisons of pornography and sexualized images of women in advertising because porn is consumed privately and advertising ( sometimes ) is n't . But the logical consequence could easily -- and often has easily -- become : we can not have women depicted sexually in public . To keep the argument logically consistent : in porn , we consent and so it 's okay , in advertisement , we do n't consent , so it 's not . That means banning advertisement with questionable content , back to women showing their ankles off in ads , and wearing full-length dresses otherwise .
比如说，有人可能会反对将色情与广告中女性的性化形象相提并论，因为色情是私密消费的，而广告（有时）却不是。但逻辑的结果很轻易地——也确实经常发生——变成了：公共场合不能有女性被性化的描绘。要保持这个论点的一致性：在色情里，我们同意了，所以没问题；在广告里，我们没同意，所以就有问题。这就意味着要禁止那些内容有问题的广告，回到女性在广告中只能露出脚踝，平时得穿长裙的地步。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

For example , one might object to comparisons of pornography and sexualized images of women in advertising because porn is consumed privately and advertising ( sometimes ) is n't . But the logical consequence could easily -- and often has easily -- become : we can not have women depicted sexually in public . To keep the argument logically consistent : in porn , we consent and so it 's okay , in advertisement , we do n't consent , so it 's not . That means banning advertisement with questionable content , back to women showing their ankles off in ads , and wearing full-length dresses otherwise .
例如，有人可能反对将色情和广告中女性的性化形象进行比较，因为色情是私下消费的，而广告（有时）不是。但逻辑上的后果很容易——而且经常变得如此——：我们不能在公共场合将女性性化地描绘出来。为了保持论点的逻辑一致性：在色情中，我们同意，所以它是可以的；在广告中，我们不同意，所以它是不可以的。这意味着禁止内容有问题的广告，回到女性在广告中露出脚踝，其他时候穿全身长裙的情况。

source: Wales is right about one thing , though . This fact does have enormous policy implications . If Wikipedia is written by occasional contributors , then growing it requires making it easier and more rewarding to contribute occasionally . Instead of trying to squeeze more work out of those who spend their life on Wikipedia , we need to broaden the base of those who contribute just a little bit .
domestication: 威尔士说的有一条是对的，这个事实确实对政策有重大影响。维基百科的内容是由偶尔贡献的人写的，所以要让它壮大，就得让偶尔贡献变得更容易、更有回报。我们应该拓宽那些只贡献一点点的人的基础，而不是逼着已经在维基百科上花费大量时间的人做更多工作。
foreignization: 威尔士确实说对了一件事。这一事实确实具有巨大的政策影响。如果维基百科是由偶尔的贡献者编写的，那么扩大其规模就需要使其更容易和更有回报地偶尔做出贡献。而不是试图从那些将一生献给维基百科的人身上榨取更多工作，我们需要扩大那些只贡献一点点的人的基础。

source: Generally speaking , the exceptions to discharge apply automatically if the language prescribed by section 523(a) applies . The most common types of nondischargeable debts are certain types of tax claims , debts not set forth by the debtor on the lists and schedules the debtor must file with the court , debts for spousal or child support or alimony , debts for willful and malicious injuries to person or property , debts to governmental units for fines and penalties , debts for most government funded or guaranteed educational loans or benefit overpayments , debts for personal injury caused by the debtor 's operation of a motor vehicle while intoxicated , debts owed to certain tax-advantaged retirement plans , and debts for certain condominium or cooperative housing fees .
domestication: 一般来说，如果第523(a)节规定的语言适用，那么免除债务的例外情况就会自动适用。最常见的不能免除的债务包括：某些类型的税款，债务人未在法院要求的清单和计划中列出的债务，赡养费或子女抚养费，故意和恶意造成的人身或财产损害赔偿，对政府单位的罚款和罚金，大多数由政府资助或担保的教育贷款或福利超额支付，酒驾造成的个人伤害赔偿，欠某些税收优惠退休计划的债务，以及某些公寓或合作住房费用。

source: A : As an academically employed researcher , the hours are highly variable . Research science is more of a lifestyle than a job . Researchers have certain goals that they would like to reach by certain dates , but most do not have specific hours which they must work . Some work from 9 to 5 . Most spend a few late nights or weekend days in the lab each week . The scientists I know work about 40-50 hours . Of course , the hours are longer when one is just starting out ( e.g. graduate school ) .  Q : How many years in college are needed to become a Marine Biologist ?
domestication:
A：作为一名学术界的科研人员，工作时间非常灵活。搞研究更像是种生活方式，而不仅仅是一份工作。研究人员通常有一些目标，希望在特定的时间节点前达成，但很少有人必须按时上下班。有的人朝九晚五，但也有很多人每周会在实验室加班到深夜或周末来几天。我认识的科学家们一般每周工作40到50个小时。当然了，刚起步时，比如读研究生期间，工作时间会更长。

Q：要成为海洋生物学家，需要在大学里读多少年？

source: First , review the table of contents . It identifies the types of materials in your File and the nature of your Library . You will want to know whether you are faced with a statutory problem or a common law problem . If you have a common law problem ( which will be obvious when all you have are cases in your Library ) , then it is likely that you will have more work to do ; typically , you will have to synthesize from the cases the applicable rule to be applied to your problem . Also , by perusing the table of contents , you can often identify the area of the law in controversy and thus immediately begin to inform your subsequent reading of the File .
domestication: 首先，看看目录。目录能告诉你文件中有哪些材料，你的资料库涉及的是什么类型的法律问题。你要判断自己面对的是一个法定问题还是普通法问题。如果是个普通法问题（当你资料库里的全是案例时，这点就很明显了），那你可能要做的工作会更多；通常情况下，你需要从这些案例中提炼出适用的规则，来解决你遇到的问题。此外，通过浏览目录，你往往能迅速找到争议的法律领域，从而为接下来阅读文件做好准备。

source: I 've never heard the term ninjoumi before . To be perfectly honest , I 'm not really all that concerned with the esoteric mystical essence of it all . I more enjoy being impressed with craft . And anyway , a lot of dining in Japan is done in restaurants with open kitchens and often intimate surroundings or at a counter in front of the chef(s) . So the personal touches and spot relationship you have or the relationship you may build over time , are sort of built into the dining experience . source: 6 ) Foreign policy . I am no expert , but any citizen paying attention to the Republican primaries has heard Mitt Romney talk like a trigger-happy Cold War president of the 1960s . Global political hot spots -- whether Israel-Palestine , India-Pakistan , North Korea -- South Korea , the African continent , or China -- require cool thinking and some empathy with other people 's needs . Romney has demonstrated neither . I 've been skeptical of Obama 's reinforcement of the Afghan war , his demands for military tribunals , his use of drones to target the Taliban , and his acceptance of warrantless wiretapping and " email-tapping . " But consider the likely Romney approach . Fighting a war with Iran , for example ? Sending troops to Syria ? And does anyone doubt that domestic surveillance and the infringement of privacy under Romney would be much , much worse ?
domestication: 6）外交政策。我不是专家，但只要关注了共和党的初选，就能听到米特·罗姆尼说起话来就像是个随时准备按核按钮的60年代冷战总统。全球政治热点问题，不论是巴以冲突、印巴关系、朝鲜半岛局势、非洲大陆问题，还是中美关系，都需要冷静思考和对他人需求的理解。罗姆尼这两样都不具备。我一向对奥巴马强化阿富汗战争、要求军事法庭审判、使用无人机打击塔利班，以及接受无令监听和“邮件监控”持怀疑态度。但你想想罗姆尼上台后会怎样？跟伊朗开战？派兵去叙利亚？还有谁会怀疑，罗姆尼当政下的国内监视和隐私侵犯会更严重？

source: After Cash for Clunkers gloriously shipped $3 billion chiefly to Tokyo- and Seoul-based automakers , the Obama administration concocted Cash for Caulkers -- fresh subsidies to make homes more energy-efficient . This program likely will cost $2 billion to as much as $20 billion , if House Democrats prevail . So far , Texas has spent $1.8 million in federal funds and has weatherized seven homes , averaging $257,000 each . Instead , this money could have purchased 10.4 median-priced homes .
domestication: “以旧换新”计划大手笔地向东京和首尔的汽车制造商砸了30亿美元后，奥巴马政府又推出了“家庭节能补贴”计划，打算再给家庭节能改造提供新的补贴。这个项目估计要花掉20亿美元到200亿美元，具体看众议院的民主党人能否得偿所愿。到目前为止，德州用180万美元的联邦资金只改造了7户家庭，平均每户花了25.7万美元。这笔钱如果用来买房，足够买10.4套中等价位的房子了。
foreignization: 在“旧车换现金”计划辉煌地向东京和首尔的汽车制造商支付了30亿美元之后，奥巴马政府炮制了“节能补贴”——新的补贴以使房屋更加节能。如果众议院民主党人得偿所愿，这项计划的成本可能达到20亿美元到200亿美元。到目前为止，德克萨斯州已经花费了180万美元的联邦资金，改造了七所房屋，平均每所房屋257,000美元。相反，这笔钱本可以购买10.4套中等价位的房屋。

source: Gags are placed in the game in much the same way as shooting-game designers place enemies . " In Call of Duty , you 'd pick the place where a bridge is going to explode . For us it was , ' This is where the gag is going to trigger . ' That was new for me as far as thinking about the way we 're doing our layout and our pacing . We ca n't do a gag every 15 seconds . But we want to make sure that the gags we do put in there are ones people experience . "
domestication: 在游戏中安排笑料和射击游戏设计师布置敌人差不多。就像在《使命召唤》里，你会选好一座桥什么时候爆炸。我们则要考虑“这个笑料什么时候触发”。这种布局和节奏的思考方式对我来说是全新的。我们不能每15秒就来个笑料，但得确保玩家能体验到我们精心设计的每一个笑料。
foreignization: 笑料被放置在游戏中的方式与射击游戏设计师放置敌人的方式大致相同。“在《使命召唤》中，你会选择一座桥即将爆炸的地方。对我们来说，就是‘这是笑料将要触发的地方。’这对我来说是新的思考方式，关于我们的布局和节奏的处理。我们不能每15秒就安排一个笑料。但我们希望确保人们能够体验到我们放置的笑料。”

For us it was , ' This is where the gag is going to trigger . ' That was new for me as far as thinking about the way we 're doing our layout and our pacing . We ca n't do a gag every 15 seconds . But we want to make sure that the gags we do put in there are ones people experience . "
笑料被放置在游戏中的方式与射击游戏设计师放置敌人的方式大致相同。“在《使命召唤》中，你会选择一座桥即将爆炸的地方。对我们来说，就是‘这是笑料将要触发的地方。’这对我来说是新的思考方式，关于我们的布局和节奏的处理。我们不能每15秒就安排一个笑料。但我们希望确保人们能够体验到我们放置的笑料。”

source: Alas , my 20s home has very plain white subway tiles in a mostly period bathroom . But I grew up in a 50s house , and have many wonderful memories of my Nana 's tiny 1954 bungalow with just your pink bathroom tiled in black ! ( Nana decorated it with a BLACK shower curtain with pink poodles and many other poodle accessories ! wish I had them still .... ) My mom had a yellow bathroom with black trim ; my best friend 's home had gray tile trimmed in maroon ( very attractive combo ) . My first apartment had yellow and peach tile ; the second had a wild setup with peach walls trimmed in green and GREEN fixtures ! ( I was insanely jealous of our neighbors who had the identical bath but with green walls and PEACH fixtures . )
domestication: 唉，我家20年代的房子浴室里全是普通的白色地铁砖，没啥特色。可我是在50年代的房子里长大的，对奶奶那间小小的1954年的平房有着美好的回忆，尤其是那个粉红色的浴室，铺着黑色的瓷砖！（奶奶还用了一个黑色的淋浴帘，上面有粉色的小狗图案，还有各种小狗装饰品！真希望我现在还能有这些……）妈妈的浴室是黄色的，边缘用黑色勾勒；我最好的朋友家的浴室是灰色瓷砖，配上深红色的边，这搭配可真好看。我第一套公寓的浴室是黄色和桃色的瓷砖；第二套公寓更夸张，墙壁是桃色的，绿色的边，连浴室设施都是绿色的！（我羡慕得要命，邻居家的浴室和我们的一模一样，只不过他们的墙是绿色的，设施是桃色的。）

source: 4 . Productivity is about meeting your goals , not getting out of doing work The week that Tim actually works a four-hour work week will be a cold week in hell . Tim got to where he is by being an insanely hard worker . I do n't know anyone who worked harder at promoting a book than he did . But the thing is , he did n't call it work . Somehow , sliming me into having coffee with him to talk about his book is not work .
domestication: 4. 提高生产力是为了达成目标，而不是逃避工作。要是真有那么一天，蒂姆一周只工作四小时，那可真是世界末日了。蒂姆能有今天的成就，靠的是拼命三郎的工作态度。我认识的人里，没人比他更卖力地推广自己的书了。但关键在于，他从不觉得这是在工作。不知怎么的，他约我喝咖啡聊他的书，这事儿就不算工作了。
foreignization: 4. 生产力是关于实现你的目标，而不是逃避工作。蒂姆真正实行四小时工作周的那周，地狱都会结冰。蒂姆之所以能有今天的成就，是因为他是一个疯狂的勤奋工作者。我不知道有谁比他更努力地推广一本书。但问题是，他并不称之为工作。不知怎么的，让我和他喝咖啡谈论他的书并不是工作。

source: Form 990 , Schedule H , for tax year 2010 was revised to include a new Part V , Section B , to gather information on hospitals ' compliance with the new requirements and on related policies and practices . To give the hospital community time to familiarize itself with the types of information the IRS is requesting , Part V , Section B of Schedule H was made optional for the 2010 tax year ( see Announcement 2011-37 ) .

source: Skype today confirmed rumors first reported by The Verge that it will become Microsoft 's new home for instant messaging . The video calling and online communication service announced that it will integrate Messenger into the latest version of Skype for Windows and Mac , which permit users to sign-in with their Microsoft account . Messenger users will then be able to reach their contacts , which are automatically imported , within Skype . Once connected , users will be gain access to instant messaging , video calling , screen sharing , group video calling with Facebook friends , and support for the Apple iPad and several Android tablets .
domestication: Skype 今天确认了《The Verge》最先报道的消息，它将成为微软即时消息的新大本营。这个视频通话和在线沟通服务宣布，将在 Windows 和 Mac 的最新版 Skype 中整合 Messenger，用户可以用微软账号登录。这样一来，Messenger 用户就能在 Skype 里找到自动导入的联系人。一连上，用户就能用上即时消息、视频通话、屏幕共享、和 Facebook 好友群聊视频，还能支持苹果 iPad 和几款安卓平板。
foreignization: Skype 今日证实了《The Verge》最先报道的传言，即它将成为微软即时通讯的新中心。这家视频通话和在线通信服务宣布，将把 Messenger 整合到最新版本的 Windows 和 Mac 版 Skype 中，允许用户使用他们的微软账户登录。然后，Messenger 用户将能够通过 Skype 联系他们的联系人，这些联系人将自动导入。一旦连接，用户将能够访问即时消息、视频通话、屏幕共享、与 Facebook 好友的群组视频通话，并支持 Apple iPad 和多款 Android 平板电脑。

source: Several of the worlds leading astrophysicists believe there was no Big Bang that brought the universe and time into existence . Before the Big Bang , the standard theory assumes , there was no space , just nothing . Einstein merged the universe into a single entity : not space , not time , but spacetime .
domestication: 世界上几位顶尖的天体物理学家认为，宇宙和时间的起源并非大爆炸。按照标准理论，在大爆炸之前，什么都没有，连空间都不存在。爱因斯坦将宇宙合二为一，不再是单纯的时空或时间，而是时空一体。
foreignization: 几位世界领先的天体物理学家认为，并没有大爆炸使宇宙和时间产生。在大爆炸之前，标准理论假设没有空间，只有虚无。爱因斯坦将宇宙合并为一个单一的实体：不是空间，也不是时间，而是时空。

source: What Tim does is sell books , and he does it very well . But he also sells hope in a different future which we can control a whole lot more than we already do . His methods are different than just about anyone else 's and his ethics surrounding those methods may be different than yours , but does that mean that what he is worthless ? Even if he was a " do as I say , not as I do " type of person , does that mean we should n't listen and tease out what works for us ? If he was telling people to leave their spouses or abandon their children , I could understand the furor .
domestication: 蒂姆是卖书的，而且他做得非常出色。但他卖的不仅仅是书，他还卖一种希望，让我们能够掌控更多未来的希望。他的方法与众不同，这些方法背后的道德观可能和你的不一样，但这就能说明他一无是处吗？即使他是一个“只许州官放火，不许百姓点灯”的人，这是否意味着我们不该听一听，从中找出对我们有用的东西呢？如果他让人抛弃配偶或者放弃孩子，我还能理解大家的愤怒。
foreignization: 蒂姆的工作是卖书，他做得非常好。但他还出售对未来不同的希望，这比我们已经做到的要多得多地掌控未来。他的方法与其他人几乎都不同，而这些方法的伦理可能也与你的不同，但这是否意味着他是毫无价值的？即使他是一个“照我说的做，而不是照我做的”类型的人，这是否意味着我们不应该倾听并从中提取出对我们有用的东西？如果他在告诉人们离开他们的配偶或抛弃他们的孩子，我能够理解这种愤怒。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

What Tim does is sell books , and he does it very well . But he also sells hope in a different future which we can control a whole lot more than we already do . His methods are different than just about anyone else 's and his ethics surrounding those methods may be different than yours , but does that mean that what he is worthless ? Even if he was a " do as I say , not as I do " type of person , does that mean we should n't listen and tease out what works for us ? If he was telling people to leave their spouses or abandon their children , I could understand the furor .
蒂姆是卖书的，而且他做得非常出色。但他卖的不仅仅是书，他还卖一种希望，让我们能够掌控更多未来的希望。他的方法与众不同，这些方法背后的道德观可能和你的不一样，但这就能说明他一无是处吗？即使他是一个“只许州官放火，不许百姓点灯”的人，这是否意味着我们不该听一听，从中找出对我们有用的东西呢？如果他让人抛弃配偶或者放弃孩子，我还能理解大家的愤怒。

What Tim does is sell books , and he does it very well . But he also sells hope in a different future which we can control a whole lot more than we already do . Even if he was a " do as I say , not as I do " type of person , does that mean we should n't listen and tease out what works for us ? If he was telling people to leave their spouses or abandon their children , I could understand the furor .
蒂姆的工作是卖书，他做得非常好。但他还出售对未来不同的希望，这比我们已经做到的要多得多地掌控未来。他的方法与其他人几乎都不同，而这些方法的伦理可能也与你的不同，但这是否意味着他是毫无价值的？即使他是一个“照我说的做，而不是照我做的”类型的人，这是否意味着我们不应该倾听并从中提取出对我们有用的东西？如果他在告诉人们离开他们的配偶或抛弃他们的孩子，我能够理解这种愤怒。

source: a seven-week election break to a lame-duck session with a lot of unfinished business on the agenda . The most urgent priority is to reach a compromise to keep from going over the " fiscal cliff " of huge mandatory spending cuts and tax increases that will kick in Jan. 1 if not averted . President Barack Obama is meeting with the leaders of the House and Senate from both parties to try to forge a deal . Some Democrats are urging congressional colleagues to let the government go over that cliff , at least temporarily , to gain political leverage over Republicans who adamantly oppose higher tax rates for the wealthy . Hearings are also planned this week on the events surrounding the attack on the U.S. consulate in Benghazi , Libya , that killed four
domestication: 七周的选举间歇期后，一院僵局的会议又开始了，议程上还有很多未完成的事务。当务之急是达成妥协，避免掉下“财政悬崖”。如果不在1月1日前解决，将会触发大规模强制性支出削减和增税。奥巴马总统正与两党国会领袖会面，试图达成协议。有些民主党人敦促同僚们，至少暂时让政府掉下这个悬崖，以获取对坚决反对富人增税的共和党的政治筹码。本周还计划举行有关利比亚班加西美国领事馆遇袭事件的听证会，该事件导致四人死亡。
foreignization: 为期七周的选举休会后，将重新召开一个有很多未完成事务需要处理的跛脚鸭会议。最紧迫的任务是达成妥协，以避免跌落“财政悬崖”——即如果未能避免，将于1月1日启动的大规模强制性支出削减和税收增加。奥巴马总统将与来自两党的众议院和参议院领导人会面，试图促成一项协议。一些民主党人敦促国会同僚至少暂时让政府跌落这一悬崖，以获得对坚决反对向富人增税的共和党人的政治杠杆。本周还计划就导致四人死亡的利比亚班加西美国领事馆袭击事件的相关情况进行听证。

source: The women 's march also inspired cartoonists , some of whom likened the suffrage movement to colonial America 's fight for independence . James Harrison Donahey , for example , substituted women for men in a cartoon based on the famous painting " Washington Crossing the Delaware . " In another such cartoon , women play the fife and drums in an imitation of Archibald Willard 's painting " Spirit of ' 76 " picture . 33 Suffrage and anti-suffrage cartoons appeared frequently in magazines and newspapers of the day . 34
domestication: 妇女游行也激起了漫画家的创作灵感，有的甚至将女性争取投票权的运动比作美国殖民时期的独立战争。比如，詹姆斯·哈里森·多纳希在一幅以著名的《华盛顿渡过特拉华河》为蓝本的漫画中，把画中的男性换成了女性。另一幅漫画则模仿了阿奇博尔德·威尔德的《1776年的精神》，画中的女性吹着口哨、打着鼓。那个时代的杂志和报纸上，支持和反对妇女投票权的漫画屡见不鲜。
foreignization: 妇女游行也激发了漫画家的创作灵感，其中一些人将女性争取投票权的运动比作殖民地美国争取独立的斗争。例如，詹姆斯·哈里森·多纳希在一幅基于著名画作《华盛顿渡过特拉华河》的漫画中，用女性代替了男性。在另一幅类似的漫画中，女性模仿阿奇博尔德·威拉德的画作《1776年的精神》中的形象演奏长笛和敲鼓。33 投票权支持者和反对者的漫画经常出现在当时的杂志和报纸上。34

source: Excessive bending can do fatal damage to a DVD , as I discovered much to my chagrin with the " Return of the King " movie boxed set which likewise had very tight DVDs . After six months or so , two of the discs showed signs of " DVD rot " and would no longer play properly . I had to replace the whole set . Fortunately , the maker had fixed the problem by then . Hopefully , the same will be true with the music .
domestication: 过度弯曲会对DVD造成致命损伤，我就是这么发现的，当时我买了一套《王者归来》的电影盒装，里面的DVD也特别紧。结果不到半年，两张碟就出现了“DVD老化”的迹象，放都放不了了。我只能整套换掉。好在厂家那时候已经解决了这个问题。希望这次音乐的问题也能如此顺利解决。
foreignization: 过度弯曲会对DVD造成致命损害，就像我发现的那样，我对“王者归来”电影收藏版感到非常懊恼，该版本同样配有非常紧的DVD。大约六个月后，两张光盘出现了“DVD腐烂”的迹象，无法正常播放。我不得不更换整套。幸运的是，制造商那时已经解决了问题。希望音乐也是如此。

Hopefully , the same will be true with the music .

source: The U.S. spends more money on health care than any other nation , roughly $4,000 per person annually . By 2025 , the number of Americans aged 65 or older will expand from 35 million to more than 60 million , which will strain the health-care system regardless of the passage of any particular piece of legislation .
domestication: 美国在医疗保健上的花费比任何其他国家都多，每年每人差不多要花4000美元。到了2025年，65岁及以上的美国老年人口将从3500万激增到6000多万，无论出台什么具体法案，这都将给医疗系统带来巨大压力。

source: Be Courageous and Write was inspired by a quote from friend and author Holley Gerth . Holley and I both write for a website called ( in ) courage , and once she said in an email to the site authors , " Be courageous and try to write in a way that scares you a little . " Well , that actually scared me a little , but I 've never forgotten it and it prompts me to dig deeper and write in a more meaningful way . I hope it inspires you , too .
domestication: 《勇敢写作》这本书的灵感来自我的朋友兼作家霍莉·格尔特的一句话。我和霍莉都在一个叫“（在）勇气”的网站上写文章，有次她在给网站作者们的邮件里说：“要勇敢一点，试着写一些能让自己有点害怕的内容。”这句话当时还真让我有点害怕，但我一直铭记在心，它激励我挖得更深，写出更有意义的文字。我也希望这能给你带来启发。
foreignization: 《勇敢地写作》是受到我的朋友兼作家Holley Gerth的一句话的启发。Holley和我都在一个叫做（在）勇气的网站上写作，有一次她在给网站作者们的电子邮件中说，“勇敢一些，试着以一种让你有点害怕的方式写作。”好吧，这实际上让我有点害怕，但我从未忘记这句话，它促使我挖掘得更深，以一种更有意义的方式写作。我也希望它能激励你。

" Well , that actually scared me a little , but I 've never forgotten it and it prompts me to dig deeper and write in a more meaningful way . I hope it inspires you , too .

source: Share Your Power . Sharing power does not make you less powerful . Listening and acknowledging the strengths in others , helping and promoting others , advocating for others you believe in , makes you more powerful . It 's a natural strength in many women who tend to have a more collaborative view of the world . Collaborate with others to increase your power .

source: Day-Lewis ' Lincoln is slow , deliberate , and matter-of-fact ... and so is the movie ... it feels every bit of its 2 hours and 29 minute runtime . But its the movie version of history class ... albeit a small slice of U.S. History ... because we only get to experience a few months of his time as President . Through Day-Lewis we see how gifted a speaker and storyteller Lincoln was ( afterall , his Gettysburg Address ( 1863 ) is one of the most quoted speeches in American history ) . This Lincoln tells stories ... he enjoys telling stories ... and even pushes forward on a story after a grumpy Bruce McGill ( as Edwin Stanton ( Secretary of War ) ) exclaims " No ! You 're not going to tell another story . "
domestication: 丹尼尔·戴-刘易斯饰演的林肯动作缓慢、深思熟虑、直截了当……电影也是如此……让人感觉这2小时29分钟的片长每一秒都很漫长。但这部电影就像一堂历史课……虽然只是美国历史的一小部分……因为影片只展现了林肯担任总统的几个月时光。通过丹尼尔·戴-刘易斯的演绎，我们看到了林肯作为一名演说家和讲故事高手的天赋（毕竟，他在1863年的葛底斯堡演说堪称美国历史上引用最多的演讲之一）。这个林肯爱讲故事……他乐此不疲……即使在布鲁斯·麦吉尔（扮演战争部长埃德温·斯坦顿）不耐烦地喊道“不行！你不能再讲一个故事了”时，他依然坚持要讲下去。
foreignization: 戴-刘易斯的林肯缓慢、从容、实事求是……电影也是如此……它的2小时29分钟的片长让人感觉每一分钟都那么漫长。但这是一部历史课的电影版本……尽管只是美国历史的一小部分……因为我们只能体验他作为总统的几个月时间。通过戴-刘易斯，我们看到了林肯是一位多么有天赋的演说家和讲故事的人（毕竟，他的葛底斯堡演说（1863年）是美国历史上被引用最多的一次演讲之一）。这个林肯会讲故事……他喜欢讲故事……即使在布鲁斯·麦吉尔（饰演埃德温·斯坦顿（战争部长））不耐烦地喊出“不！你不会再讲一个故事了”之后，他仍然继续讲下去。

You 're not going to tell another story . "

source: Even if the set of activities labeled " covert action " does not include all clandestine American efforts with possible political effects , that set is nonetheless broad . U.S. covert action in Chile encompassed a range of techniques and affected a wide variety of Chilean institutions . It included projects which were regarded as the framework necessary for covert operations , as well as major efforts called forth by special circumstances . The following paragraphs will give a flavor of that range .
domestication: 即使被标记为“秘密行动”的活动并不涵盖所有可能产生政治影响的美国隐秘努力，但这一范围仍然相当广泛。美国在智利的秘密行动涉及多种手段，影响了智利众多机构。这些行动不仅包括被视为秘密操作必要框架的项目，还包括因特殊情况而开展的重大努力。下面的段落将让你感受到这种多样性的味道。
foreignization: 即使标记为“秘密行动”的活动集并不包括所有可能具有政治影响的美国秘密努力，该集合仍然相当广泛。美国在智利的秘密行动涵盖了多种技术，并影响了各种智利机构。它包括被视为进行秘密操作所必需的框架项目，以及由特殊情况引起的重大努力。以下段落将展示这一范围。

source: It had so far not been possible to check the structure proposed by William Zachariasen , as X-ray diffraction , the method of choice to determine the structure of materials , can not be used in glasses and in amorphous materials in general - at least , not for determining the precise positions of the atoms . The Berlin-based researchers succeeded in doing just this with a trick ; however , they designed a two-dimensional model of a glass . In an ultrahigh vacuum chamber they produced just two atomic layers of silica on a substrate of the precious metal ruthenium , which they had earlier coated with an oxygen layer .
domestication: 威廉·扎卡赖森提出的结构至今未能验证，因为首选的材料结构测定方法——X射线衍射，在玻璃和非晶态材料上无法使用，至少不能用来确定原子的确切位置。柏林的研究人员却用了个巧办法，成功做到了这一点；他们设计了一个二维的玻璃模型。在超高真空室里，他们在钌这种贵金属基底上，只制造了两层原子厚度的二氧化硅，并且事先在其表面涂了一层氧气。
foreignization: 到目前为止，还无法检查威廉·扎查赖森提出的结构，因为X射线衍射，确定材料结构的首选方法，在玻璃和一般非晶态材料中不能使用——至少，不能用于确定原子的确切位置。柏林的研究人员通过一个技巧成功做到了这一点；然而，他们设计了一个二维的玻璃模型。他们在超高真空室中仅在钌这种贵金属基底上制备了两层原子的二氧化硅，而此前他们已经在该基底上涂覆了一层氧气。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

It had so far not been possible to check the structure proposed by William Zachariasen , as X-ray diffraction , the method of choice to determine the structure of materials , can not be used in glasses and in amorphous materials in general - at least , not for determining the precise positions of the atoms . The Berlin-based researchers succeeded in doing just this with a trick ; however , they designed a two-dimensional model of a glass . In an ultrahigh vacuum chamber they produced just two atomic layers of silica on a substrate of the precious metal ruthenium , which they had earlier coated with an oxygen layer .

It had so far not been possible to check the structure proposed by William Zachariasen , as X-ray diffraction , the method of choice to determine the structure of materials , can not be used in glasses and in amorphous materials in general - at least , not for determining the precise positions of the atoms . The Berlin-based researchers succeeded in doing just this with a trick ; however , they designed a two-dimensional model of a glass . In an ultrahigh vacuum chamber they produced just two atomic layers of silica on a substrate of the precious metal ruthenium , which they had earlier coated with an oxygen layer .

source: The Affordable Care Act establishes the Patient-Centered Outcomes Research Institute . Funded by the Patient-Centered Outcomes Research Trust Fund , the institute will assist patients , clinicians , purchasers and policy-makers in making informed health decisions by advancing clinical effectiveness research . The trust fund will be funded in part by fees paid by issuers of health insurance policies and sponsors of self-insured health plans .

source: During August , September and October of 1969 , it became increasingly clear from the agents ' reports that the growing dissatisfaction and unrest within the armed forces was leading to an unstable military situation . These events culminated in the abortive military revolt of October 1969 -the " Tacnazo " , named after the city where it occurred , Tacna . How close the amauterish " Tacnazo " came to success was a lesson to remember , particularly in light of the upcoming Presidential election of 1970 and the strong possibility that Salvador Allende would emerge victoriuos .
domestication: 1969年8月、9月和10月，特工的报告越来越清楚地显示，军队内部的不满和动荡正在导致军事局势的不稳定。这些事件最终在10月份爆发了一场未遂的军事叛乱——“塔克纳佐”，这个名字来源于叛乱发生的地点——塔克纳。这场由业余人士发动的“塔克纳佐”差点成功，给人们敲响了警钟，尤其是考虑到1970年的总统选举即将到来，萨尔瓦多·阿连德很有可能当选。
foreignization: 1969年8月、9月和10月期间，从特工的报告中越来越清楚地看出，武装部队内部日益增长的不满和动荡正导致军事局势不稳定。这些事件最终导致了1969年10月未遂的军事叛乱——“塔克纳佐”（Tacnazo），这一名称源自事变发生的城市塔克纳。这次业余的“塔克纳佐”距离成功有多近是一个值得铭记的教训，尤其是在1970年即将举行的总统选举以及萨尔瓦多·阿连德有可能胜出的情况下。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

During August , September and October of 1969 , it became increasingly clear from the agents ' reports that the growing dissatisfaction and unrest within the armed forces was leading to an unstable military situation . These events culminated in the abortive military revolt of October 1969 -the " Tacnazo " , named after the city where it occurred , Tacna . How close the amauterish " Tacnazo " came to success was a lesson to remember , particularly in light of the upcoming Presidential election of 1970 and the strong possibility that Salvador Allende would emerge victoriuos .

source: Imagine you 're at a party and a new acquaintance comes over to say hello . In a blind moment of panic you realize that you 've just met the person , but you ca n't remember their name . Sound familiar ? Memory is so important in our daily lives , and it can be frustrating ( not to mention embarrassing ) when we have trouble recalling information . But can we improve our memories ?
domestication: 想象一下，你在派对上，一位新认识的朋友过来打招呼。你突然间紧张得不行，明明刚见过面，却想不起来对方的名字了。这事儿听起来是不是很耳熟？记忆在我们的日常生活中太重要了，记不住东西不仅让人沮丧，还特别丢脸。但是，我们能改善自己的记忆力吗？
foreignization: 想象一下你在派对上，一个新认识的人过来打招呼。在一阵盲目的恐慌中，你意识到你刚刚见过这个人，但你记不起他们的名字。听起来熟悉吗？记忆在我们的日常生活中如此重要，当我们难以回忆信息时，这可能会令人沮丧（更不用说尴尬了）。但我们能改善我们的记忆吗？

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Imagine you 're at a party and a new acquaintance comes over to say hello . In a blind moment of panic you realize that you 've just met the person , but you ca n't remember their name . Sound familiar ? Memory is so important in our daily lives , and it can be frustrating ( not to mention embarrassing ) when we have trouble recalling information . But can we improve our memories ?
想象一下，你在派对上，一位新认识的朋友过来打招呼。你突然间紧张得不行，明明刚见过面，却想不起来对方的名字了。这事儿听起来是不是很耳熟？记忆在我们的日常生活中太重要了，记不住东西不仅让人沮丧，还特别丢脸。但是，我们能改善自己的记忆力吗？

source: The federal overtime provisions are contained in the Fair Labor Standards Act ( FLSA ) . Unless exempt , employees covered by the Act must receive overtime pay for hours worked over 40 in a workweek at a rate not less than time and one-half their regular rates of pay . There is no limit in the Act on the number of hours employees aged 16 and older may work in any workweek . The Act does not require overtime pay for work on Saturdays , Sundays , holidays , or regular days of rest , unless overtime is worked on such days .
domestication: 联邦加班规定包含在《公平劳动标准法》（FLSA）中。除非属于豁免情况，否则受该法保护的员工每周工作超过40小时的部分，必须以不低于平时工资的1.5倍支付加班费。对于16岁及以上的员工，法律没有限制他们每周可以工作的最长时间。此外，《公平劳动标准法》不要求在周六、周日、节假日或休息日工作时支付加班费，除非这些日子确实有加班。
foreignization: 联邦加班规定包含在《公平劳动标准法》（FLSA）中。除非属于豁免范围，受该法保护的员工必须为其每周工作超过40小时的时间获得不低于其正常工资的一倍半的加班费。该法对年满16岁的员工每周可工作的小时数没有限制。该法不要求在星期六、星期天、节假日或常规休息日工作的员工获得加班费，除非在这些日子工作了加班时间。

The Act does not require overtime pay for work on Saturdays , Sundays , holidays , or regular days of rest , unless overtime is worked on such days .

source: Gameification is just one part of Game Theory and as Game Theory is better understood by non-economists it does n't surprise me that we see more gameification . It is n't just tied to the software world , but it is no surprise to see it there first as many programers are also gamers . You see it being used more in schools than ever before as well .
domestication: 游戏化只是博弈论的一部分，随着非经济学家对博弈论的理解越来越深入，看到更多的游戏化应用也就不足为奇了。这不仅限于软件界，不过考虑到很多程序员本身也是玩家，游戏化首先出现在这里也就顺理成章了。如今，学校里也越来越多地采用游戏化手段，这更是前所未有。

It is n't just tied to the software world , but it is no surprise to see it there first as many programers are also gamers . You see it being used more in schools than ever before as well .
游戏化只是博弈论的一部分，随着非经济学家对博弈论有了更好的理解，看到更多的游戏化并不让我感到惊讶。它并不仅仅局限于软件世界，但首先在那里看到它并不令人意外，因为许多程序员也是游戏玩家。你也会发现它在学校的使用比以往任何时候都更多。

source: I think the issue is not a lack of compassion for people who have lost everything but rather anger at the delay . I think if the day after the storm they had asked everyone to wait for full time residents to clean out first there would n't have been an outcry at all . But two weeks after the hurricane patience has run out and tempers are frayed . We should n't let them divide us - we want EVERYONE with a legitimate interest there to be able to get on the island .
domestication: 我觉得问题不在于对失去一切的人缺乏同情，而是对拖延的愤怒。要是风暴过后第一天就让大家等一等，先让常住居民清理，估计也不会有人抱怨了。可现在都过去两周了，大家的耐心早就耗光了，脾气也变得暴躁。我们不能让他们挑拨离间，我们要的是所有有正当理由的人都能上岛。

source: However , this was anticipated from the beginning . The very purpose of life is to experience sin and death in this mortal realm . Having experienced that , we are to repent and obey Jesus Christ , who will show us how to get out of the mess we have created for ourselves . Our obedience to Jesus Christ is that we sacrifice ourselves to show love to each other . It is that we feed the hungry , clothe the naked , shelter the homeless , tend to the sick , and help the sinner and comfort those who stand in need of comfort . This is pretty much the entirety of what we are asked to do , in addition to inward actions such as trusting Jesus and repenting of our sins .
domestication: 不过，这一切从一开始就预料到了。人生的本质就是在尘世体验罪恶与死亡。经历了这些之后，我们要悔改，顺从耶稣基督，他会指引我们如何摆脱自己造成的困境。顺从耶稣基督，意味着我们要牺牲自己，彼此相爱。这意味着我们要给饥饿的人提供食物，给赤身的人穿上衣服，给无家可归的人提供住所，照顾病人，帮助罪人，安慰那些需要安慰的人。这几乎就是我们被要求去做的全部，除此之外，还要在内心信任耶稣，悔改自己的罪过。

source: GEN Alexander holds a Bachelor of Science degree from the U.S. Military Academy and a Master of Science degree in Business Administration from Boston University . He holds a Master of Science degree in Systems Technology ( Electronic Warfare ) and a Master of Science degree in Physics from the naval Post Graduate School . He also holds a Master of Science degree in National Security Strategy from the National Defense University . His military education includes the Armor Officer Basic Course , the Military Intelligence Officer Advanced Course , the U.S. Army Command and General Staff College , and the National War College .
domestication: 亚历山大将军毕业于美国军事学院，获得理学士学位，后又在波士顿大学取得了工商管理硕士学位。他在海军研究生院还拿到了系统技术（电子战）和物理学的两个理学硕士学位。此外，他还从国家国防大学获得了国家安全战略的理学硕士学位。他的军事教育背景也十分丰富，包括装甲军官基础课程、军事情报军官高级课程、美国陆军指挥与参谋学院以及国家战争学院的学习经历。

source: As the drought has ravaged corn producers and industrial consumers alike , three big intertwined but rival agribusinesses -- corn farmers , meat and poultry producers , and biofuel refineries -- are in a political fight to protect their interests . At issue is whether to suspend a five-year-old federal mandate requiring more ethanol in gasoline each year , a policy that has diverted almost half of the domestic corn supply from animal feedlots to ethanol refineries , driven up corn prices and plantings and created a desperate competition for corn as the drought has gripped the nation 's farm belt .
domestication: 干旱让玉米生产者和工业消费者都叫苦连天，三大相互竞争又紧密联系的农业巨头——玉米种植户、肉禽养殖商和生物燃料炼油厂——正为了保护自身利益而展开政治博弈。争论的焦点是是否要暂停一项已经实施五年的联邦法令，该法令要求每年在汽油中添加更多乙醇，这导致国内近一半的玉米供应从饲料转向了乙醇生产，推高了玉米价格和种植面积，也让旱情下的农户们陷入了对玉米的激烈争夺。
foreignization: 由于干旱已经重创了玉米生产者和工业消费者，三个相互关联但竞争激烈的农业企业——玉米农民、肉类和家禽生产商以及生物燃料炼油厂——正在为保护自己的利益而展开政治斗争。问题的焦点是是否暂停一项已有五年历史的联邦强制规定，该规定要求每年在汽油中添加更多的乙醇，这一政策已将国内近一半的玉米供应从牲畜饲料转向乙醇炼油厂，推高了玉米价格和种植量，并在干旱席卷全国农业带时造成了对玉米的迫切争夺。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

As the drought has ravaged corn producers and industrial consumers alike , three big intertwined but rival agribusinesses -- corn farmers , meat and poultry producers , and biofuel refineries -- are in a political fight to protect their interests . At issue is whether to suspend a five-year-old federal mandate requiring more ethanol in gasoline each year , a policy that has diverted almost half of the domestic corn supply from animal feedlots to ethanol refineries , driven up corn prices and plantings and created a desperate competition for corn as the drought has gripped the nation 's farm belt .
干旱让玉米生产者和工业消费者都叫苦连天，三大相互竞争又紧密联系的农业巨头——玉米种植户、肉禽养殖商和生物燃料炼油厂——正为了保护自身利益而展开政治博弈。争论的焦点是是否要暂停一项已经实施五年的联邦法令，该法令要求每年在汽油中添加更多乙醇，这导致国内近一半的玉米供应从饲料转向了乙醇生产，推高了玉米价格和种植面积，也让旱情下的农户们陷入了对玉米的激烈争夺。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

source: The poll workers job begins on the eve of Election Day , when they start setting up the polling booths at their precinct . At 7 a.m. the following morning , the poll workers officially announce that the polls are open . The polls do n't close until 8 p.m. after the last ballot has been cast . On a good night , Storre said , everything is turned off , accounted for and ready to be handed over to the election 's office by 9:30 p.m .
domestication: 选举工作人员的工作从选举前夜就开始了，那时他们要到各自的投票站去布置投票间。次日早上7点，工作人员正式宣布投票开始。投票要持续到晚上8点，等最后一张选票投完才会结束。如果一切顺利，斯托雷说，所有东西都能在晚上9点半前关闭、清点完毕，准备好交给选举办公室。

source: UPDATED : 11/16/12 : Federal extended unemployment benefits are in effect for for the remainder of 2012 . However , there are currently no extended benefits in place for 2013 . Workers who are laid-off starting in July 2012 are only eligible for a maximum of 26 weeks of state benefits , depending on location , unless Congress passes new legislation to extend unemployment . To date , there has been no reports of Congress working on legislation to extend benefits .
domestication: 更新：2012年11月16日：联邦延长的失业救济金将在2012年剩余时间里继续发放。不过，目前还没有2013年的延长期补贴政策。从2012年7月起被裁的员工，根据所在地不同，最多只能领取26周的州失业救济金，除非国会通过新立法延长失业救济。到目前为止，还没有任何关于国会在着手准备延长失业救济立法的消息。

source: " Not too long ago , two friends of mine were talking to a Cuban refugee , a businessman who had escaped from Castro , and in the midst of his story one of my friends turned to the other and said , " We do n't know how lucky we are . " And the Cuban stopped and said , " How lucky you are ? I had someplace to escape to . " And in that sentence he told us the entire story . If we lose freedom here , there 's no place to escape to . This is the last stand on earth .
domestication: 不久前，我的两个朋友在跟一个古巴难民聊天，那是个从卡斯特罗手下逃出来的商人。聊到一半时，其中一个朋友转向另一个说：“我们真幸运。”那个古巴人停了一下，说道：“你们幸运？我至少还有地方可以逃。”这一句话道出了所有真相。如果我们这里失去了自由，那可真是无处可逃了。这里可是最后的防线啊。

source: The Ugandan government then pays for the ongoing operating costs of the schools and the teachers ' and supervisors ' salaries . This arrangement -- versus many other efforts in the U.S. to raise money to build a school somewhere far away with no plans for what happens after the doors open -- has a clear plan for sustainable impact : it creates clarity around what is the local community 's responsibility , what is the Ugandan government 's responsibility and what is BT 's responsibility .
domestication: 乌干达政府负责支付学校的运营费用和教师及监管人员的工资。这种做法与美国很多筹款建校的行为不同，后者往往只关注远在天边的学校建起来，却对校门打开后的事不闻不问。而这里有一个清晰的可持续发展计划：明确了当地社区、乌干达政府和英国电信各自的责任。
foreignization: 乌干达政府随后支付学校的持续运营成本以及教师和监管人员的工资。这种安排——与美国许多其他筹集资金在遥远地方建学校的 effort 相比，那些 effort 在学校开门后对后续事宜没有任何计划——有一个明确的可持续影响计划：它明确了当地社区的责任、乌干达政府的责任和英国电信（BT）的责任。

source: But here 's the problem . If we are positively reinforcing community values primarily during climate-related tragedies ( and the same goes with America 's war on terrorism , its similar tragedies and our collective response ) , we may well be disinclined to prevent that tragedy from recurring and subconsciously reinforce practices that create more tragedies , and thus , more community building opportunities . Again , like with our response to climate change , so too with our response to terrorism .
domestication: 但问题来了。如果我们主要是在气候相关的悲剧中才积极强化社区价值观（美国反恐战争及其类似的悲剧和我们的集体反应也是如此），那么我们可能就不愿意防止这类悲剧再次发生，甚至潜意识里会强化导致更多悲剧的行为，从而获得更多的社区建设机会。就像我们对气候变化的反应一样，对待恐怖主义也是一样。

source: But authors focus myopically on the techniques used by notable greats , because we all assume the great ones have discovered a secret , which if we only knew , would ensure our success as well . source: The list of divas runs long and I can only keep your attention for so little time , so I 'd like to focus on two of my personal favorite divas : Audra McDonald and Sutton Foster . These two dynamic , superbly talented stage ( and TV ) actresses titillate , inspire , and rope rapturous audiences across the nation into the songs and characters they perform in profoundly different ways .

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The list of divas runs long and I can only keep your attention for so little time , so I 'd like to focus on two of my personal favorite divas : Audra McDonald and Sutton Foster . These two dynamic , superbly talented stage ( and TV ) actresses titillate , inspire , and rope rapturous audiences across the nation into the songs and characters they perform in profoundly different ways .
这份名单上的人数可不少，而我只能占用你一点点时间，所以我打算聊聊我个人最喜欢的两位天后：奥德拉·麦当劳和萨顿·福斯特。这两位舞台（还有电视）上的女演员，一个比一个有魅力，一个比一个有才华，她们用截然不同的方式让全国的观众如痴如醉，既被她们的歌声吸引，也被她们的角色打动。

source: I have TWO pink bathrooms ! ! ! One pink and gray and the other is pepto Bismal pink and blue ... We just moved into this grand house and found that I really love these bathrooms . source: Exactly - I do believe that there may be a correlation to the Japanese style of training ( that may be difficult to access outside of Japan ) and good sushi , but that 's completely different . source: " You were ambitious - for your life , what it was like when you woke up in the morning , and not for some attainment . Like most people who did not answer a particular calling from an early age , you placed work beside yourself ; any occupation would fill up your day but not your heart . I . I liked it enormously . " ? Lionel Shriver , We Need to Talk About Kevin
domestication: 你很有志向——为了你的生活，为了每天早晨醒来时的那种感觉，而不是为了什么成就。像大多数从小没有特定使命感的人一样，你把工作放在一边；任何职业都能填满你的一天，却填不满你的心。这一点我特别喜欢。
foreignization: 你很有抱负——为了你的生活，为了你早晨醒来时的生活状态，而不是为了某种成就。像大多数没有从小就有特定召唤的人一样，你把工作放在了次要位置；任何职业都可以填满你的一天，但不会填满你的心。我非常喜欢这一点。——利昂内尔·沙弗，我们需要谈谈凯文

source: In the popular crossover between Star Trek : The Original Series and Star Trek : Deep Space Nine , fans got a massive shrug regarding the discontinuity in Klingon makeup when Mr. Worf , a late series ridge-headed Klingon sits at a bar with early series guys in gold lame and dark makeup ( all the Original Series could afford to create an alien species ) . When asked by his fellow crewmates to explain how Klingons from different time frames could possibly look so different , even floating numerous explanations popular in fanon for decades , Worf merely replies " We do not discuss it with outsiders . "
domestication: 在《星际迷航：原初系列》和《星际迷航：深空九号》的热门联动中，粉丝们对克林贡人妆容不一致的问题得到了一个大大的“无所谓”。沃夫先生，一个晚期系列中顶着脊背的克林贡人，和早期系列中那些穿着金色亮片、化着深色妆容的家伙（原初系列能拿出的全部手段来创造外星种族）一起坐在酒吧里。当他的船员们问起不同时代的克林贡人怎么会长得如此不同，甚至提出了粉丝们几十年来流传的各种解释时，沃夫只是淡淡地回答：“这些我们不对外人说。”
foreignization: 在《星际迷航：初代》和《星际迷航：深空九号》的热门联动中，当沃夫先生，一位晚期系列的有棱角头颅的克林贡人，与早期系列中身穿金色金属光泽服装和深色化妆（这是《初代》所能负担得起的创造外星物种的方式）的角色坐在酒吧里时，粉丝们对于克林贡人妆容不连续的问题得到了一个巨大的耸肩回应。当他的船员同伴问及如何解释来自不同时期的克林贡人可能看起来如此不同，甚至提出了几十年来粉丝中流行的各种解释时，沃夫只是回答说“我们不跟外人讨论这个问题。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

When asked by his fellow crewmates to explain how Klingons from different time frames could possibly look so different , even floating numerous explanations popular in fanon for decades , Worf merely replies " We do not discuss it with outsiders . "

source: I am saying that the Japanese are not quite as interested in adapting their food from other cultures as you seem to suggest . Having KFC and McDonalds notwithstanding , the Japanese are very much about their own cultural food heritage and when they do import , they are more likely to transform their imports into their own style . If you go to a " yakiniku " restaurant , it has a very interesting Japanese style , not Korean , despite it 's roots in Korea . IN fact , I urge you to try the Yakiniku places in New York if you have a chance . You will see .
domestication: 我说的是，日本人对于从其他文化中借鉴食物的兴趣没有你想象的那么大。虽然他们也有肯德基和麦当劳，但日本人对自己的饮食文化传统非常看重。他们如果引进外来食物，往往会把这些食物变成自己的风格。比如去“烧肉”餐厅看看，尽管它的根源在韩国，但已经变成了很有日本特色的餐饮方式了。实际上，如果你有机会的话，我建议你去纽约试试那里的烧肉店，你就明白了。
foreignization: 我说的是，日本人并不是像你所暗示的那样热衷于从其他文化中改编他们的食物。尽管有肯德基和麦当劳，日本人非常重视他们自己的饮食文化遗产，当他们确实引进外来食品时，更倾向于将这些进口食品转变为他们自己风格的食品。如果你去“烧肉”餐厅，你会发现它有一种非常有趣的日本风格，而不是韩国风格，尽管它的根源在韩国。实际上，我敦促你如果有机会的话，去纽约的烧肉店尝试一下。你会看到的。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I am saying that the Japanese are not quite as interested in adapting their food from other cultures as you seem to suggest . Having KFC and McDonalds notwithstanding , the Japanese are very much about their own cultural food heritage and when they do import , they are more likely to transform their imports into their own style . If you go to a " yakiniku " restaurant , it has a very interesting Japanese style , not Korean , despite it 's roots in Korea . IN fact , I urge you to try the Yakiniku places in New York if you have a chance . You will see .
我说的是，日本人对于从其他文化中借鉴食物的兴趣没有你想象的那么大。虽然他们也有肯德基和麦当劳，但日本人对自己的饮食文化传统非常看重。他们如果引进外来食物，往往会把这些食物变成自己的风格。比如去“烧肉”餐厅看看，尽管它的根源在韩国，但已经变成了很有日本特色的餐饮方式了。实际上，如果你有机会的话，我建议你去纽约试试那里的烧肉店，你就明白了。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I am saying that the Japanese are not quite as interested in adapting their food from other cultures as you seem to suggest . Having KFC and McDonalds notwithstanding , the Japanese are very much about their own cultural food heritage and when they do import , they are more likely to transform their imports into their own style . If you go to a " yakiniku " restaurant , it has a very interesting Japanese style , not Korean , despite it 's roots in Korea . IN fact , I urge you to try the Yakiniku places in New York if you have a chance . You will see .
我说的是，日本人并不是像你所暗示的那样热衷于从其他文化中改编他们的食物。尽管有肯德基和麦当劳，日本人非常重视他们自己的饮食文化遗产，当他们确实引进外来食品时，更倾向于将这些进口食品转变为他们自己风格的食品。如果你去“烧肉”餐厅，你会发现它有一种非常有趣的日本风格，而不是韩国风格，尽管它的根源在韩国。实际上，我敦促你如果有机会的话，去纽约的烧肉店尝试一下。你会看到的。

source: September 4 Salvador Allende wins 36.3 percent of the vote in the Presidential election . Final outcome is dependent on October 24 vote in Congress between Allende and the runner-up , Jorge Alessandri , who received 35.3 percent of the vote . Allende 's margin of victory was 39,000 votes out of a total of 3,000,000 votes cast in the election .

source: Since the late 1980s , DNA analysis has helped identify the guilty and exonerate the innocent nationwide . While DNA testing was developed through extensive scientific research at top academic centers , many other forensic techniques ? such as hair microscopy , bite mark comparisons , firearm tool mark analysis and shoe print comparisons ? have never been subjected to rigorous scientific evaluation . Meanwhile , forensics techniques that have been properly validated ? such as serology , commonly known as blood typing ? are sometimes improperly conducted or inaccurately conveyed in trial testimony . In some cases , forensic analysts have fabricated results or engaged in other misconduct .  Forensic Science Misconduct
domestication: 自20世纪80年代末以来，DNA分析在全国范围内帮助识别了罪犯，也洗清了无辜者的冤屈。虽然DNA检测是在顶级学术中心经过大量科学研究开发出来的，但其他许多法医技术，比如头发显微镜检查、咬痕对比、枪械工具痕迹分析和鞋印比对等，却从未经历过严格的科学评估。与此同时，一些已经得到验证的法医技术，如血清学，也就是常说的血型鉴定，有时操作不当或在庭审中表述不准确。有些情况下，法医分析师甚至伪造结果或有其他不当行为。法医科学的乱象真是让人担忧。

Meanwhile , forensics techniques that have been properly validated ? such as serology , commonly known as blood typing ? are sometimes improperly conducted or inaccurately conveyed in trial testimony . In some cases , forensic analysts have fabricated results or engaged in other misconduct .  Forensic Science Misconduct

source: I pledge to keep my 1.5 pink bathrooms . We moved into our 1957 home three years ago . While I love pink , I was n't sure about our pink bathrooms . I thought they might get an update in the future but just could n't bring myself to realistically think of doing anything to these pink and brown tiles that cover the walls and floors .

source: The City of San Francisco has used the Highway Capacity Manual ' s Level of Service ( LOS ) intersection delay measure to evaluate the transportation impacts of new developments . However , this tends to contradict the city 's efforts to encourage compact , infill development , in support of its Transit First policy . Although such development may reduce nearby roadway LOS ratings in the short term , this is offset by improved accessibility and improvements to transit , bicycling , and walking conditions .
domestication: 旧金山市一直用《公路容量手册》中的服务水平（LOS）交叉口延误指标来评估新开发项目对交通的影响。不过，这种方法往往与该市鼓励紧凑型、填充式发展的努力相悖，这与城市的“公交优先”政策背道而驰。虽然这类发展可能会在短期内降低附近道路的服务水平评分，但提高了可达性，同时改善了公交、自行车和步行的条件，这些都是实实在在的好处。
foreignization: 旧金山市使用《公路容量手册》的服务水平（LOS）交叉口延误指标来评估新开发项目对交通的影响。然而，这往往与该市鼓励紧凑型、填充式发展的努力相矛盾，以支持其“公交优先”政策。虽然这种发展可能在短期内降低附近道路的服务水平评级，但这是由改善的可达性和对公交、自行车和步行条件的改进所抵消的。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The City of San Francisco has used the Highway Capacity Manual ' s Level of Service ( LOS ) intersection delay measure to evaluate the transportation impacts of new developments . However , this tends to contradict the city 's efforts to encourage compact , infill development , in support of its Transit First policy . Although such development may reduce nearby roadway LOS ratings in the short term , this is offset by improved accessibility and improvements to transit , bicycling , and walking conditions .

source: The undisputed truth is that you have been conditioned to need your pain . But when you come right down to it , all the aforementioned conditions involve your humble , pleading , acquiescent and compliant servitude . Huxley said that the ideal circumstance would be for the slave to be contented with his slavery ( paraphrased ) ? and here you are .
domestication: 不可否认的事实是，你已经被 Conditioning（环境影响）得离不开痛苦了。说到底，所有这些条件无非都是让你卑微地乞求、屈服和顺从。赫胥黎说过，理想的情况是奴隶对自己的奴隶状态感到满足（大意如此），而你现在就是这个样子。
