source: " The process of getting the app developed on Springbase was amazing . The team had a refreshing take on platform applications and customer service . Their sales and engineering teams took the time to listen to our specific needs , and were completely hands-on , helping us at every step to build our initial application . Springbase exceeded my expectations and continues to provide some of the finest service I 've encountered with any vendor . The cost savings and gains in efficiency we realized by using Springbase has been unbelievable , " said Reeder .  Springbase as a Platform
domestication: 在Springbase上开发应用的过程真是太棒了。团队对平台应用和客户服务有着耳目一新的见解。他们的销售和工程团队花时间倾听我们的具体需求，全程手把手帮助我们构建起最初的应用。Springbase超出了我的预期，至今仍在提供我所经历过的最佳服务之一。使用Springbase带来的成本节省和效率提升简直难以置信，里德如是说。Springbase作为平台的支撑作用真是不可小觑。
foreignization: “在Springbase上开发应用程序的过程令人惊叹。团队对平台应用程序和客户服务有着令人耳目一新的看法。他们的销售和工程团队花时间倾听我们的具体需求，并完全亲力亲为，在每一步都帮助我们构建初始应用程序。Springbase超出了我的期望，并继续提供我所遇到过的任何供应商中最优质的服务之一。通过使用Springbase实现的成本节约和效率提升令人难以置信，”里德说。Springbase作为一个平台

source: As one might expect from Atwood , The Year of the Flood is a beautiful telling of an ugly story . And what a story it is ! In addition to being very much a novel of ideas , it is an utterly un-put-downable page-turner ! It 's a quick read , with short chapters and lots of white space on the pages . The novel flies by . The ending is satisfying and unsatisfying at once . It sheds some light on Oryx and Crake 's enigmatic conclusion and completes this arc of the story , but leaves this reader very much hoping for a final volume of this rumored trilogy .
domestication: 正如阿特伍德的作品一贯风格，《洪水之年》用美丽的笔触讲述了一个丑陋的故事。这可真是个精彩绝伦的故事！不仅思想深刻，还让人一拿起就放不下，根本停不下来！虽然篇幅不长，章节短小，页面上留白很多，但这本书读起来飞快。故事的结尾既令人满足又令人意犹未尽。它解释了《羚羊与秧鸡》中那个神秘的结局，圆满了这个故事线，却又让读者对这部传言中的三部曲的最后一本充满了期待。
foreignization: 正如阿特伍德的作品所期待的那样，《洪水之年》是一部美丽地讲述了一个丑陋故事的作品。而这可真是一部故事！除了是一部思想小说之外，它还是一部令人无法放下的页页精彩的小说！这是一本快速阅读的书，章节短小，页面上有很多空白空间。小说一气呵成。结局同时让人感到满足又不满足。它为《羚羊与秧鸡》神秘的结尾提供了一些线索，并完成了这个故事的这一部分，但让读者非常希望看到这个传闻中的三部曲的最后一卷。

source: Mr. Putz , you are a hater . You are so consumed by your hatred of moderate and conservative people- not ideas- but people that you have lost all sense of reality . You are a sick individual . This is an form of intervention and I would really like to help you . Please , Mr. Putz , for your own sake , seek professional help . There are some very good drugs for people like you . Over time , with analysis and medication , you may be able to join the world of normal , sane people .
domestication: 普茨先生，你真是个心眼小的人。你对温和派和保守派人士的仇恨，已经让你失去了理智。你这样子真是太不正常了。我这是在劝你，真心想帮你。普茨先生，为了你自己好，还是去看看心理医生吧。现在有好多药对你这种人挺有效的。时间长了，再配合治疗和药物，你也许能回归正常人的世界。
foreignization: 普茨先生，你是一个仇恨者。你对温和派和保守派人士——不是思想——而是人，充满了如此深的仇恨，以至于你已经失去了所有的现实感。你是一个病态的人。这是一种干预形式，我真的很想帮助你。普茨先生，请为了你自己，寻求专业帮助。有一些非常好的药物适合像你这样的人。随着时间的推移，在分析和药物的帮助下，你可能会能够加入到正常、理智人的世界中。

source: I contacted a friend who was within an hour of where she was stranded and we coordinated for him to go pick her and her motorcycle up and bring her to his hotel in a small Mexican village . In the meantime we worked on troubleshooting what could be wrong with the motorcycle and then I went to Tucson and picked up the parts we thought we 'd need at the local BMW dealership .
domestication: 我联系了一个在她抛锚地点一小时车程内的朋友，我们商量好让他去把她和她的摩托车接上，带到他住的小墨西哥村庄的旅馆里。同时，我们开始研究摩托车可能出了什么问题，然后我就去了图森，在当地的宝马经销商那里买到了我们觉得需要的零件。
foreignization: 我联系了一位朋友，他距离她被困的地方只有一个小时的车程，我们协调让他去接她和她的摩托车，并把她带到他在一个小墨西哥村庄的酒店。与此同时，我们着手排查摩托车可能出了什么问题，然后我去了图森，在当地的宝马经销商那里取了我们认为需要的零件。

messages_domestication.content:

I contacted a friend who was within an hour of where she was stranded and we coordinated for him to go pick her and her motorcycle up and bring her to his hotel in a small Mexican village . In the meantime we worked on troubleshooting what could be wrong with the motorcycle and then I went to Tucson and picked up the parts we thought we 'd need at the local BMW dealership .
我联系了一个在她抛锚地点一小时车程内的朋友，我们商量好让他去把她和她的摩托车接上，带到他住的小墨西哥村庄的旅馆里。同时，我们开始研究摩托车可能出了什么问题，然后我就去了图森，在当地的宝马经销商那里买到了我们觉得需要的零件。

source: Then in the early 1990s , scenarios written by Shell planners foresaw the likelihood of a rapid and dramatic decline in the price of oil . This was the result of the discoveries of new oil fields outside of the OPEC sphere of influence , in combination with energy conservation . Positioning itself accordingly , Shell then rose from fourteenth to second place among the oil multinationals during the mid-1990s as prices fell . Meanwhile , Shell 's heavily over-invested competitors lost billions .  How Foresight Prevented Civil War
domestication: 到了20世纪90年代初，壳牌公司的规划人员预见到石油价格可能会迅速大幅下跌。这主要是因为，在欧佩克影响范围之外发现了新的油田，加上能源节约措施的推动。于是，壳牌公司提前布局，当油价在90年代中期开始下跌时，壳牌从第十四名跃升至第二名，成为石油巨头中的佼佼者。而那些过度投资的竞争对手却损失惨重。正是这种远见，让壳牌避免了一场“内战”。
foreignization: 然后在20世纪90年代初，壳牌规划者撰写的场景预见了石油价格迅速和急剧下降的可能性。这是由于在欧佩克影响范围之外发现了新的油田，加上能源节约的结果。据此定位，随着价格下跌，壳牌在20世纪90年代中期从第十四位升至第二大石油跨国公司。与此同时，壳牌那些严重过度投资的竞争对手损失了数十亿美元。远见如何防止内战

source: I have lived in my little old house , with my little old pink bathroom for 20 years . All the pink tile flooring , toilet , sink , tub is original . To compliment all that pink , the walls are painted a bright pepto pink and the accessories are pink as well . I never considered having anything but a pink bathroom and I could never understand why anyone would n't want a pink bathroom . Until now , I thought that I was the only person in the world that appreciated my pink bathroom . I feel totally vindicated . Viva la pink bathrooms ! !
domestication: 我在这座小老房子里住了20年了，房子里有个小小的粉色浴室。所有的粉瓷砖地板、马桶、洗手台和浴缸都是原装的。为了和这些粉色搭配，墙刷成了亮粉色，连小饰品也是粉色的。我从没想过要换掉这个粉色浴室，也一直不明白为什么有人不喜欢粉色浴室。以前我还以为自己是世界上唯一一个喜欢粉色浴室的人呢。现在我终于觉得心里有底了。粉色浴室万岁！
foreignization: 我住在我的小旧房子里，带着我的小旧粉色浴室已经20年了。所有的粉色瓷砖地板、马桶、洗脸池和浴缸都是原始的。为了与所有这些粉色相配，墙壁被涂成明亮的粉红色，配件也是粉色的。我从未考虑过除了粉色浴室以外的任何选择，而且我完全不能理解为什么有人不想要一个粉色的浴室。直到现在，我还以为我是世界上唯一一个欣赏我的粉色浴室的人。我现在感到完全得到了证明。万岁，粉色浴室！！

source: More than 50% do n't pay taxes ? How can this be ? Well , under the Bush Tax Cuts , a married couple can make $86,703 of capital gains and dividends and be at a zero tax . Of course , a wage earner family will be taxed at close to 18% , but they probably did not vote for Bush and , therefore , must be punished .
domestication: 超过一半的人不交税？这怎么可能？其实，在布什减税政策下，一对已婚夫妇可以通过资本收益和股息收入86703美元而无需缴税。当然，工薪家庭的税率接近18%，但他们可能没给布什投票，所以就得受罚。

source: We have a 1950 ? s cape with a great pink bathroom . When i decided to add some cute wallpaper to the scheme I found pieces of the most awesome mint green vintage wallpaper that had gondolas rowing ! ! It was AWESOME ! ! ! ! ! ! ! ! ! ! ! ! I wish it could have been saved ... I know there are vintage wallpapers out there but no amount of googling can recreate the awesomeness that was hiding behind the crappy 90s wallpaper . We have a pretty awesome custom vanity too with this cool formica with little gold flakes in it !
domestication: 我们家有个50年代的阁楼，里面有个超棒的粉红色浴室。我想给它添点可爱的壁纸，结果发现了一块超赞的薄荷绿复古壁纸，上面还有划船的贡多拉！简直太棒了！！！可惜啊，真希望当时能保存下来……我知道市面上有卖复古壁纸的，但再怎么搜也找不回那份藏在90年代破烂壁纸下的独特魅力。我们的洗手台也是定制的，表面贴的是这种带小金片的酷炫美耐板，特别好看！

source: API ( A pplication P rogramming I nterface ) A language and message format used by an application program to communicate with the operating system or some other control program such as a database management system ( DBMS ) or communications protocol . APIs are implemented by writing function calls in the program , which provide the linkage to the required subroutine for execution . Thus , an API implies that some program module is available in the computer to perform the operation or that it must be linked into the existing program to perform the tasks . http : **34;6565;TOOLONG ...
domestication: API（应用编程接口）就是应用程序用来和操作系统或其他控制程序，比如数据库管理系统或通信协议进行沟通的语言和消息格式。编写程序时，通过写函数调用来实现API，这样就能连接到需要执行的子程序了。也就是说，API的存在意味着计算机里有相应的程序模块可以执行操作，或者必须将这个模块链接到现有程序中来完成任务。
foreignization: API（应用程序编程接口） 应用程序用来与操作系统或某些其他控制程序（如数据库管理系统（DBMS）或通信协议）进行通信的一种语言和消息格式。API 是通过在程序中编写函数调用来实现的，这些函数调用提供了与所需子例程的链接以供执行。因此，API 意味着计算机中存在某个程序模块来执行操作，或者必须将其链接到现有程序中以执行任务。http : **34;6565;TOOLONG ...

API（应用程序编程接口） 应用程序用来与操作系统或某些其他控制程序（如数据库管理系统（DBMS）或通信协议）进行通信的一种语言和消息格式。API 是通过在程序中编写函数调用来实现的，这些函数调用提供了与所需子例程的链接以供执行。因此，API 意味着计算机中存在某个程序模块来执行操作，或者必须将其链接到现有程序中以执行任务。http : **34;6565;TOOLONG ...

source: Frodo and Sam 's journey , as soon as they encounter Gollum , is slowly getting dominated by his music . The Pity Of Gollum theme , already present in more conventional form in Fellowship , gets some serious workout , and not only that ; Howard Shore expands it and defines a distinct Gollum sound , together with the cembalon . This hammer dulcimer is the weapon of choice for Gollum 's evil " Stinker " motif , one of the many new themes for Two Towers . It can be heard prominently in " Lost In Emyn Muil " and on bassoon at the end of " The Tales That Really Matter " .
domestication: 弗罗多和山姆一遇到咕噜，他们的旅程就开始慢慢被咕噜的音乐所主导。《咕噜的悲悯》主题曲在《魔戒首部曲》中已经以较为传统的形式出现，这次更是得到了充分的发挥。不仅如此，霍华德·肖还扩展了这一主题，定义了一种独特的咕噜之声，加上扬琴的使用。这种击弦扬琴成了咕噜邪恶“臭佬”主题曲的首选乐器，是《双塔奇兵》中新加入的众多主题之一。在《迷雾锁伊敏穆伊尔》中，这个主题尤为突出，在《真正重要的故事》结尾处也可以听到低音管演奏的版本。
foreignization: 弗罗多和山姆的旅程，自从遇到咕噜后，逐渐被他的音乐所主导。《咕噜的怜悯》主题曲已经在《护戒使者》中以更传统的方式出现，现在得到了充分的发挥，不仅如此；霍华德·肖扩展了这一主题，并定义了一种独特的咕噜声音，与扬琴一起。这种锤弦扬琴是咕噜邪恶的“臭佬”主题的首选乐器，《双塔奇兵》中的许多新主题之一。它在《迷失在艾明莫尔》中尤为突出，并在《真正重要的故事》结尾处以低音管演奏。

This hammer dulcimer is the weapon of choice for Gollum 's evil " Stinker " motif , one of the many new themes for Two Towers . It can be heard prominently in " Lost In Emyn Muil " and on bassoon at the end of " The Tales That Really Matter " .

source: The United States Peace Core should be the model for the International Peace Core . It could be based in the United Nations City Nation as a separate institution from the United Nations . It could work hand in hand with the United Nations International Peacekeeping Forces on mission around the world . Only by directing more international resources to mission of peace rather than war will we have a different out come to the problems we face as people of the world . The United Nations annual budget is less than most states or nations it is more comparable to a large University or corporation .
domestication: 美国的和平队应该成为国际和平队的榜样。这个队伍可以设在联合国城，作为一个独立于联合国的机构。它可以和联合国国际维和部队携手合作，在世界各地执行任务。只有将更多的国际资源投入到和平而非战争的任务中，我们才能在全球问题面前迎来不同的结果。联合国每年的预算比不上大多数国家或州，跟大型大学或企业差不多。
foreignization: 美国和平队应当成为国际和平队的典范。它可以在联合国城作为与联合国分离的机构建立。它可以与联合国国际维和部队携手合作，在世界各地执行任务。只有将更多国际资源投入到和平而非战争的使命中，我们才能对作为世界人民所面临的问题有不同的结果。联合国的年度预算低于大多数州或国家，更类似于一所大型大学或企业的预算。

source: Alexander Julian Rhodes was born and raised in Pittsburgh , Pennsylvania , to parents Althea Azeff and Phillip Rhodes . He has two siblings , Axel and Claire , along with a cat named Huckle . He is three classes away from graduating with a B.S. in Biology ( minors in Chemistry and Theater Performance ) from the University of Pittsburgh ; however one of his primary passions has always been acting ...
domestication: 亚历山大·朱利安·罗德斯在宾夕法尼亚州的匹兹堡出生长大，爸妈分别是阿尔西娅·阿泽夫和菲利普·罗德斯。家里还有两个兄弟姐妹，一个叫阿克塞尔，一个叫克莱尔，还有一只名叫哈克的猫。他在匹兹堡大学读生物专业，辅修化学和戏剧表演，再修三门课就能毕业了。不过，演戏一直是他的心头好。

source: How do I report the forgiveness of debt that is excluded from gross income ? ( 1 ) Check the appropriate box under line 1 on Form 982 , Reduction of Tax Attributes Due to Discharge of Indebtedness ( and Section 1082 Basis Adjustment ) to indicate the type of discharge of indebtedness and enter the amount of the discharged debt excluded from gross income on line 2 . Any remaining canceled debt must be included as income on your tax return .
domestication: 如何报告被免除的债务中不计入总收入的部分？（1）在表格982（因债务免除而减少的税收属性，及第1082节基数调整）的第一行下，勾选适当的选项，表明债务免除的类型，并在第二行填写从总收入中排除的已免除债务金额。剩下的任何被豁免的债务都需要在你的税表上作为收入报税。
foreignization: 如何报告从总收入中排除的债务豁免？（1）在表格982（因债务解除而减少的税收属性（及第1082节基数调整））的第1行下勾选适当的框，以指明债务解除的类型，并在第2行输入从总收入中排除的已解除债务金额。任何剩余的被取消债务必须作为收入包含在您的纳税申报表中。

source: On November 11th of each year , we pause to reflect on the service and sacrifice of the men and women of our Armed Forces . source: Women often try to fulfill what they believe is society 's version of an acceptable type of power for women , which is much nicer , much more accommodating . This leads to what Catalyst calls " The Goldilocks Syndrome . " Women find themselves in situations where they are perceived as either " too hard " or " too soft , " but never just right for that top job .
domestication: 女性常常努力去满足社会对她们所期望的那种“合适”的权力形象，这种形象通常更加温婉、更加顺从。这就导致了 Catalyst 所说的“金发姑娘综合征”。女性发现自己要么被看作“太强硬”，要么被看作“太柔弱”，但就是没有“刚刚好”的时候，难以获得那个顶级职位。
foreignization: 女性经常试图满足她们认为社会对女性可接受的权力类型的要求，这种要求更加温和、更加体贴。这导致了Catalyst所说的“恰到好处综合症”。女性发现自己处于要么“太强硬”要么“太软弱”的境地，但从来不是那个顶级职位的合适人选。

source: Not one to mince words , famous reporter Nellie Bly picture , who rode as one of the heralds in the parade , bluntly stated in the headline to her article on the march -- " Suffragists Are Men 's Superiors . " With uncanny prescience , she added that it would take at least until 1920 for all states to grant woman suffrage . 32 Despite the pageantry of 1913 , Nellie Bly was right . It was to take seven more years before the Nineteenth Amendment to the Constitution , which gave women full rights to vote , finally passed both houses of Congress and was ratified by the required thirty-six states . ( To read the full text of the Nineteenth Amendment and a short discussion of its history , follow the link to the National Archives and Records Administration Web site under " Marching for the Vote " on the Topical Essays External Sites page . )
domestication: 著名记者奈莉·布莱从不绕弯子，她在游行中作为先驱之一骑马前行，在报道这次游行的文章标题上直截了当地写道：“女权主义者胜过男人”。她还颇具远见地补充说，至少要到1920年，所有州才会给予女性投票权。尽管1913年的游行场面宏大，奈莉·布莱的预测还是对的。直到1920年，宪法第十九修正案才在国会两院通过，并由所需的三十六个州批准，赋予了妇女完全的选举权。（想阅读宪法第十九修正案的全文及简要历史，可以点击“争取投票权”专题论文外部网站页面下的美国国家档案馆和记录管理局网站链接。）
foreignization: 不拐弯抹角的著名记者内莉·布莱，作为游行中的先驱之一，直言不讳地在她关于这次游行的文章标题中写道——“女权主义者是男人的 superior（优越者）”。她以令人惊讶的先见之明补充说，至少要到1920年，所有州才会赋予妇女选举权。尽管1913年的游行盛大壮观，内莉·布莱是对的。直到七年后，《宪法第十九修正案》才最终通过国会两院，并由所需的三十六个州批准，给予女性完全的投票权。（要阅读《第十九修正案》的全文及其历史的简短讨论，请访问“争取投票权”下的国家档案和记录管理局网站链接，位于专题论文外部网站页面上。）

Not one to mince words , famous reporter Nellie Bly picture , who rode as one of the heralds in the parade , bluntly stated in the headline to her article on the march -- " Suffragists Are Men 's Superiors . " With uncanny prescience , she added that it would take at least until 1920 for all states to grant woman suffrage . 32 Despite the pageantry of 1913 , Nellie Bly was right . It was to take seven more years before the Nineteenth Amendment to the Constitution , which gave women full rights to vote , finally passed both houses of Congress and was ratified by the required thirty-six states . ( To read the full text of the Nineteenth Amendment and a short discussion of its history , follow the link to the National Archives and Records Administration Web site under " Marching for the Vote " on the Topical Essays External Sites page . )

source: The promise that God had given me when we first came to pastor Eagle Mills Church was that He would give us fruit and that fruit would remain . He was faithful to His Word , as the new converts became strong workers for the Lord . In one revival with Brother Boyd Bryan , who was pastoring in Mooresville , North Carolina , some were delivered from the use of tobacco and others received the Baptism of the Holy Ghost . Mischief in the community , such as regular barn burnings ceased . Many lives were affected and many homes today still feel the affects of God ? s powerful move in that community .
domestication: 上帝当初领我们来到鹰磨教堂时曾许诺，他会赐给我们果实，并且这果实会长存。他守信了，新信徒们成了主的坚强工人。有一次，在与来自北卡罗来纳州穆尔斯维尔的牧师博伊德·布赖恩一起的复兴聚会上，有些人戒掉了烟草，还有人接受了圣灵的洗礼。社区里的那些坏事，比如经常发生的谷仓纵火，也停止了。许多人的生命受到影响，至今许多家庭还能感受到上帝在那个社区中强有力行动的影响。
foreignization: 上帝在我们刚到鹰磨教堂牧会时给我的应许是，祂会赐给我们果子，这果子必会存留。祂信守了祂的诺言，因为新信徒成为了主的坚强工人。在与博伊德·布赖恩弟兄（他在北卡罗来纳州穆尔斯维尔牧会）的一次复兴聚会中，一些人从烟草的使用中得到了释放，另一些人接受了圣灵的洗礼。社区中的恶作剧，如定期烧毁谷仓的行为停止了。许多生命受到了影响，今天许多家庭仍然感受到上帝在那个社区中大有能力的作为所带来的影响。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The promise that God had given me when we first came to pastor Eagle Mills Church was that He would give us fruit and that fruit would remain . He was faithful to His Word , as the new converts became strong workers for the Lord . In one revival with Brother Boyd Bryan , who was pastoring in Mooresville , North Carolina , some were delivered from the use of tobacco and others received the Baptism of the Holy Ghost . Mischief in the community , such as regular barn burnings ceased . Many lives were affected and many homes today still feel the affects of God ? s powerful move in that community .

source: Unfortunately , my expectations were set very high due to my interest in the civil war as a child ( after a visit to Gettysburg ) and the director and cast involved in the movie . While that 's probably not fair to Mr. Spielberg to have my expectations set so high , my disappointments were mostly about what was not covered in this story -- not about the overall production of the movie . While intriguing , " Lincoln " is more important than traditionally entertaining but its epic feel and yet narrow scope will be sure to get it a lot of Oscar attention .
domestication: 小时候对内战的兴趣，特别是去了一次葛底斯堡之后，再加上这部电影的导演和演员阵容，让我对它抱有很大期待。不过，这么高的期望对斯皮尔伯格导演来说可能不太公平。我的失望主要在于电影没讲到的内容，而不是电影的整体制作。虽然《林肯》很有意思，但它的意义远超一般的娱乐性。这部电影虽然有宏大的感觉，但视角相对狭窄，应该能吸引不少奥斯卡评委的目光。
foreignization: 不幸的是，由于我童年时对内战的兴趣（在访问葛底斯堡之后）以及参与这部电影的导演和演员，我的期望被设定得非常高。虽然对斯皮尔伯格先生来说，我有这样的高期望可能不太公平，但我大部分的失望在于这个故事没有涵盖的内容——而不是电影的整体制作。尽管引人入胜，《林肯》比传统的娱乐性更为重要，但其史诗般的氛围和狭窄的视角肯定会为它赢得许多奥斯卡的关注。

messages_domestication.content:

Unfortunately , my expectations were set very high due to my interest in the civil war as a child ( after a visit to Gettysburg ) and the director and cast involved in the movie . While intriguing , " Lincoln " is more important than traditionally entertaining but its epic feel and yet narrow scope will be sure to get it a lot of Oscar attention .

source: We just bought a house with a pink bathroom . The floor tiles &; walls are all pink accented with the black . source: I 'm SO excited to take my nieces and nephew to Disney World for the VERY FIRST TIME this August ! The older two are amazing , they 'll try just about anything ( especially my nephew- how many four year olds do you know that ask for sushi ? ? ) , but the little one will ODDLY only eat fruit , pasta with butter , and beans ( any kind of bean ) !
domestication: 这个八月我要带侄女和侄子第一次去迪士尼世界玩，真是太激动了！大一点的两个孩子可棒了，什么新鲜的事物都愿意尝试（特别是我那侄子，你们见过几个四岁的小孩会主动要吃寿司的？）。不过最小的那个孩子就有点儿怪了，他居然只吃水果、黄油意面和豆子（任何种类的豆子都行）！

source: Since they 've gotten into power we 've been treated to the appalling spectacle of the House passing the Ryan budget , the Tea Party , secessionists , anti-science freaks , Governors ( who are popular in national polls yet ) leading MASS PRAYER RALLIES to pray for rain ... for heaven 's sake - and of course playing chicken with the debt ceiling which has made the rest of world think we are nuts .
domestication: 自从他们掌权后，我们目睹了众议院通过瑞安预算案，茶党闹腾，分裂主义者横行，反科学的怪人层出不穷，还有那些在民调中依然受欢迎的州长们，竟然带头举办大规模的祈雨祷告会，真是让人哭笑不得——当然，最离谱的是他们在债务上限问题上玩起了极限施压的游戏，让全世界都开始觉得我们是不是疯了。
foreignization: 自从他们上台后，我们目睹了众议院通过瑞安预算案、茶党、分裂主义者、反科学狂热分子、州长们（在全美民调中仍受欢迎）领导大规模祈祷集会祈求降雨……天哪——当然还有在债务上限问题上玩“胆小鬼游戏”，这使得世界其他地方认为我们疯了。

source: Grace Bichon , who is managing her father 's riding-stable , discovers that her husband Eddie deceives her with another woman . After confronting him in the middle of the night on the streets of their small home town , she decides to stay at her sister Emma Rae 's house for a while , to make up her mind . Breaking out of her everyday life , she starts to question the authority of everyone , especially her father 's , thus causing a stir in her parent 's Sound Mix :  Color :  Aspect Ratio :  Did You Know ?  Trivia
domestication: 格蕾丝·比雄打理着她父亲的马厩，发现丈夫埃迪跟她人有染。半夜里，她在小镇街上跟埃迪对质后，决定暂时搬去姐姐艾玛·蕾家住，好好想想下一步怎么走。脱离了日常生活的格蕾丝开始质疑所有人的权威，尤其是她父亲的，这在她父母之间掀起了不小的风波。色彩斑斓的画面、宽银幕比例，你可能不知道的是，这部电影还有一些有趣的幕后花絮。

source: Within a week of first seeing Jason , I received a referral to assess another 16- year- old schoolboy with suspected PCS . The referral came from the New Zealand Government Accident Compensation Corporation -- the ACC -- which provided national insurance for accident victims , including funding medical treatments , counseling , assessments , rehabilitation , retraining , and financial compensation . Howie was brought into my office by his ACC caseworker , who explained that he had been referred to the ACC by his GP after his school rugby coach had expressed concerns about his slow recovery from a concussion during a match .
domestication: 初次见到杰森后的一周，我又收到了一个转介，要评估另一位16岁的高中生，怀疑他也患上了持续性症状后遗症（PCS）。这个转介来自新西兰政府的意外伤害赔偿公司——ACC，这家公司提供全国性的事故受害者保险，包括资助医疗治疗、心理咨询、评估、康复、再培训和经济补偿。豪伊是由他的ACC个案经理带到我的办公室的，个案经理解释说，豪伊的学校橄榄球教练对他在比赛中脑震荡后的恢复缓慢表示担忧，于是他的全科医生就把他转介给了ACC。

source: The erosion of traditional ideas lead to emergence and acceptance of the more modern Western concept of foreign affairs and diplomacy , and eventual establishment of the Qing government 's updated diplomatic system . Ideational change played a key role in the modernization of late Qing Dynasty foreign policy and diplomacy .  The Introduction of International Law to China , the Rise of the Concept of Sovereignty and their Influence on Late Qing Diplomacy
domestication: 传统观念的侵蚀，促使了更现代的西方外交理念的兴起和接受，最终促成了清朝政府更新外交体系的建立。思想上的转变在晚清外交政策现代化过程中起到了关键作用。国际法引入中国，主权概念的兴起及其对晚清外交的影响。
foreignization: 传统观念的侵蚀导致了更现代的西方外交事务和外交概念的出现和接受，以及清政府更新的外交系统的最终建立。思想变化在晚清外交政策和外交现代化中发挥了关键作用。国际法引入中国、主权概念的兴起及其对晚清外交的影响。

source: Neighborhood Bikeability Score ( **38;13197;TOOLONG ) is a rating from 0 ( worst ) to 100 ( best ) that indicates the number of destinations ( stores , schools , parks , etc. ) that can be reached within a 20-minute bike ride , taking into account the quality of cycling infrastructure ( McNeil 2010 ) .  Shared-Use Path Level-Of-Service Ratings
domestication: 邻里自行车友好度评分（38；13197；TOOLONG）是从0分（最差）到100分（最好）的一个指标，反映了在20分钟内能骑车到达的目的地数量，比如商店、学校、公园等。这个评分还考虑了骑行基础设施的质量（McNeil 2010）。共享路径服务水平评级
foreignization: 邻近自行车友好度评分（**38;13197;TOOLONG）是从0（最差）到100（最佳）的评级，表示在20分钟自行车骑行范围内可到达的目的地（商店、学校、公园等）数量，并考虑到自行车基础设施的质量（McNeil 2010）。共享使用路径服务水平评级

Neighborhood Bikeability Score ( **38;13197;TOOLONG ) is a rating from 0 ( worst ) to 100 ( best ) that indicates the number of destinations ( stores , schools , parks , etc. ) that can be reached within a 20-minute bike ride , taking into account the quality of cycling infrastructure ( McNeil 2010 ) .  Shared-Use Path Level-Of-Service Ratings
邻里自行车友好度评分（38；13197；TOOLONG）是从0分（最差）到100分（最好）的一个指标，反映了在20分钟内能骑车到达的目的地数量，比如商店、学校、公园等。这个评分还考虑了骑行基础设施的质量（McNeil 2010）。共享路径服务水平评级

source: The Iowa quarter is the fourth of 2004 , and the 29th in the 50 State Quarters r Program . On December 28 , 1846 , Iowa became the 29th state to be admitted into the Union . The Iowa quarter design features a one-room schoolhouse with a teacher and students planting a tree , and the inscriptions " Foundation in Education " and " Grant Wood . " The design is based on " Arbor Day , " a painting by Grant Wood , who was born near Anamosa , Iowa . He spent his career as a proponent of small-town values , which he celebrated in the iconic images of small-town plain folk and verdant Midwestern vistas for which he is world-renowned .

source: Mr. Ebert , I look forward to your list every year with great anticipation and , year after year , you never fail to choose many of the films that I have enjoyed and have considered " one of the best this year " . You also choose many films that I have n't heard of which , once I finally do watch them , I throughly enjoy . I always make it a point to check your review of a film before I watch it , a habit that my kids have now picked up . Your " Best of " list ranks right up there with all of the great things that I look forward to each year . Anniversaries , the Oscars , the Super Bowl , Ebert 's " Best of " list . Thanks . Sincerely , Ken
domestication: 埃伯特先生，我每年都很期待您的年度最佳影片名单，年复一年，您总能选出许多我和我心中的“今年最佳”影片。还有那些我从未听说过的电影，等我看了之后，也总是非常喜欢。每次看电影前，我都会先看看您的影评，这个习惯现在连我的孩子们都学去了。您的“年度最佳”名单和我每年期待的其他大事一样重要：周年庆、奥斯卡颁奖典礼、超级碗，还有埃伯特的“年度最佳”名单。感谢您。此致，敬礼，肯。

source: Discussions that begin on the platform are more likely to appear elsewhere on the web than they are from any other network . Brands need to begin paying attention to their Twitter Followers as these consumers represent the most influential online users . Brands should be treating Twitter as an entirely different ecosystem of users , rather than directing brand messages on Twitter towards the majority of their consumers .

source: Nike has vigorously opposed the Workers ' Rights Consortium , a factory monitoring program that is independent , transparent and makes it a priority to build relationships of trust with workers . In contrast , Nike 's monitoring and factory assessment programs are not independent , lack full transparency and have so far made very little effort to win workers ' trust so that they can speak honestly about factory conditions without fear of reprisal .
domestication: 耐克公司坚决反对工人权益联盟，这个独立透明的工厂监督项目着重于建立与工人的信任关系。相反，耐克自己的监督和工厂评估项目既不独立，也不完全透明，至今几乎没怎么努力赢得工人的信任，让工人能毫无顾忌地畅所欲言，说出工厂的真实情况。
foreignization: 耐克强烈反对工人权利联盟，这是一个独立、透明的工厂监控项目，优先建立与工人的信任关系。相比之下，耐克的监控和工厂评估计划不独立，缺乏完全的透明度，到目前为止几乎没有做出努力赢得工人的信任，使他们能够毫无畏惧地如实谈论工厂条件。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Nike has vigorously opposed the Workers ' Rights Consortium , a factory monitoring program that is independent , transparent and makes it a priority to build relationships of trust with workers . In contrast , Nike 's monitoring and factory assessment programs are not independent , lack full transparency and have so far made very little effort to win workers ' trust so that they can speak honestly about factory conditions without fear of reprisal .
耐克公司坚决反对工人权益联盟，这个独立透明的工厂监督项目着重于建立与工人的信任关系。相反，耐克自己的监督和工厂评估项目既不独立，也不完全透明，至今几乎没怎么努力赢得工人的信任，让工人能毫无顾忌地畅所欲言，说出工厂的真实情况。

source: All that being said , typography does have its uses , which should not be ignored when creating an infographic . Most of the time , you will want to focus your creative typographical energies on titles and headings . The title of the infographic is a perfect opportunity to use a fun and eye-catching font and to give it a treatment that fits the theme or topic . Just make sure the title is n't so distracting that it takes away from the reason we are looking at the infographic in the first place . The truth of the matter is that some infographic topics are boring , but the right title design can engage people enough to scroll through .
domestication: 话说回来，字体设计在制作信息图时确实有它的用途，这可不能忽视。大多数时候，你得把创意字体的精力放在标题和大标题上。信息图的标题是展示有趣、抓人眼球字体的最佳机会，还得让这种风格和主题或内容搭调。当然了，标题也不能太花哨，抢了信息图本身的风头。说实在的，有些信息图的主题本身就挺枯燥的，但一个好的标题设计能吸引人们继续往下看。

source: Some track more closely than others . ETFs following large , widely followed indexes such as the S &P; 500 should be really close to the underlying benchmark . source: Because Romney had run on not cutting taxes , he attempted to close the budget deficit by severe cuts and raising fees . source: Many women I work with have a love-hate relationship with Power . They want to be powerful , but the definition of power in their heads leaves a bad taste in their mouths . For many women , power conjures up pictures of a dictatorial , hierarchic , dominating , aggressive , " my way or the highway " person . So , without even realizing this , many women give away their power .
domestication: 我身边很多女性对权力又爱又恨。她们渴望变得有力量，但一想到权力，心里就不是滋味。对许多女性来说，权力这个词让人联想到独断专行、等级森严、颐指气使、咄咄逼人、“不听我的就滚蛋”的人。于是，不知不觉中，许多女性就把自己的权力拱手让给了别人。

source: Louis worried his bottom lip between his teeth ; his eyes were glazed over and he unconsciously rubbed the nape of Harry 's neck . Was it better than -- God , Hazza , these are delicious . "

source: #7 , though very crudely put , is actually warning of an important confusion . When an American compliments someone , it 's meant sincerely , but does n't go further than what is said . If I say you play the tuba well , I really do mean that I like your tuba playing . However , I am not trying to flatter you , suck up to you , or get in your pants by saying so ; I 'm just trying to find a single point of connection between us . This is obvious to Americans but not to others , who tend to only use compliments in the three situations I mentioned .
domestication: 第七条虽然说得粗了点，但确实指出了一个重要的误会。美国人夸人时是真心的，但不会超出所说的话本身。比如我说你大号吹得好，我真的是觉得你的大号吹得不错。不过，我不是为了奉承你、巴结你，或者有什么其他目的；我只是想找一个咱们之间的共同点。这点对美国人来说是显而易见的，但对于其他人来说就不一定了，他们通常只会在这三种情况下才会夸人。
foreignization: 尽管表达得很粗鲁，但第7点实际上是在警告一个重要误解。当一个美国人赞美某人时，这是真诚的，但不会超出所说的内容。如果我说你大号吹得很好，我确实是指我喜欢你的大号演奏。然而，我说这话并不是为了奉承你、讨好你或博取你的欢心；我只是试图在我们之间找到一个共同点。这对美国人来说是显而易见的，但对其他人来说却不是这样，他们往往只在我说到的那三种情况下使用赞美。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

#7 , though very crudely put , is actually warning of an important confusion . When an American compliments someone , it 's meant sincerely , but does n't go further than what is said . If I say you play the tuba well , I really do mean that I like your tuba playing . However , I am not trying to flatter you , suck up to you , or get in your pants by saying so ; I 'm just trying to find a single point of connection between us . This is obvious to Americans but not to others , who tend to only use compliments in the three situations I mentioned .
第七条虽然说得粗了点，但确实指出了一个重要的误会。美国人夸人时是真心的，但不会超出所说的话本身。比如我说你大号吹得好，我真的是觉得你的大号吹得不错。不过，我不是为了奉承你、巴结你，或者有什么其他目的；我只是想找一个咱们之间的共同点。这点对美国人来说是显而易见的，但对于其他人来说就不一定了，他们通常只会在这三种情况下才会夸人。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

#7 , though very crudely put , is actually warning of an important confusion . When an American compliments someone , it 's meant sincerely , but does n't go further than what is said . If I say you play the tuba well , I really do mean that I like your tuba playing . However , I am not trying to flatter you , suck up to you , or get in your pants by saying so ; I 'm just trying to find a single point of connection between us . This is obvious to Americans but not to others , who tend to only use compliments in the three situations I mentioned .
尽管表达得很粗鲁，但第7点实际上是在警告一个重要误解。当一个美国人赞美某人时，这是真诚的，但不会超出所说的内容。如果我说你大号吹得很好，我确实是指我喜欢你的大号演奏。然而，我说这话并不是为了奉承你、讨好你或博取你的欢心；我只是试图在我们之间找到一个共同点。这对美国人来说是显而易见的，但对其他人来说却不是这样，他们往往只在我说到的那三种情况下使用赞美。

source: Today , I tell my clients that I 'm a Product Experience Designer. nBut what we do is closely related to many other words. nClients find this confusing . This schizophrenia does not instil confidence in what we do. nA pretty poor start for the guardians of simplicity. nBut even if titles are come and go , we 've got beautifully visualised process diagram to wow clients and explain what we do , right ? nnn
domestication: 今天，我跟客户说我是产品体验设计师。但我们的工作其实跟很多其他头衔息息相关。客户对此常常感到一头雾水，这种混乱感让人对我们工作的信心大打折扣。我们这些简化的守护者，居然从一开始就搞得这么复杂，真是讽刺。不过话说回来，就算这些头衔换来换去，我们总还有那些漂亮的过程图来吸引客户，解释我们是干什么的，对吧？

source: Harry straightened up and straddled the elder 's lap ; completely mistaking the hitch in the latter 's breath as anticipation . Snaking his arms around Louis ' neck , he pressed his hands into the collar of Louis ' shirt , and allowed his fingertips to skim over the gold-tinged skin that stretched tight over layers of pure muscle and sinew . Diving in , he ghosted his mouth over Louis ' cheekbones ; his jaw line ; before pressing his lips gently onto the one spot on the older boy 's neck where the flesh lay thinnest : where the quickening of Louis ' pulse was most palpable .
domestication: 哈利挺直身子，骑到了老人的腿上，误以为对方呼吸急促是因为期待。他伸出胳膊环住路易的脖子，手掌贴着路易衬衫的领口，指尖轻轻滑过那层金黄色的皮肤，感受到下面紧绷的肌肉和肌腱。他俯下身，嘴唇轻抚过路易的脸颊、下巴，最后轻轻吻在了路易脖子上那块最薄的肉上，那里脉搏跳动得最快。

source: " In Brett J. Talley 's That Which Should Not Be I have to admit I think I 've found one of the best homages to Lovecraft I have read . I 'd go so far as to use the almost cheesy line that it 's " a Love letter to the work of Lovecraft " . Anybody with any interest in Lovecraft 's work will recognise the style of writing and the on-going themes that Talley has pulled into the book . " - Paul Metcalf , PisssedOffGeek.com

source: Every good strategy , he writes , includes what he calls the kernel : a " diagnosis " of the challenge ( " What 's going on here ? " ) , a " guiding policy " for dealing with that challenge ( the core idea often called a strategy ) , and a set of " coherent actions " to carry out that policy ( the implementation ) .

source: 9 , Well , what about daytrading ? A lot of people seem to do that successfully . Please see my article " 8 Reasons Not to Daytrade " . I got a lot of criticism after that . People wanted to show me their tax returns to show me how good they daytraded . Get lost , punks . Some people make millions playing the violin also . Does n't mean the other six billion people on the planet should perform in Carnegie Hall . In any case , we 're talking about investing in stocks . Not scalping like a little kid with eight terminals in front of him . And guess what , even the best daytraders in the world with twenty year track records go broke sometimes .
domestication: 好，那日交易呢？好像很多人靠这个赚得盆满钵满。你看看我那篇文章《不要日交易的八个理由》吧。写完之后，我收到了不少批评。有些人还拿他们的税单给我看，想证明他们日交易赚了多少。滚开，小子们。有人拉小提琴也能赚大钱，但这不意味着地球上其他六十亿人都应该去卡内基音乐厅表演。总之，我们说的是股票投资，不是像小孩子一样对着八个屏幕炒短线。告诉你吧，即使是最牛的日交易者，有二十年交易记录的人，有时也会破产。

source: The big danger in the US remains that the government will fail to attack the debt problem , leaving a Japanese-style anchor on the recovery . Just as it makes no sense to analyze emerging markets in terms of generic rubrics like BRICs , developed markets also need to be analyzed as individual stories . The dramatically different approaches of the developed nations to the basic challenges -- de-leveraging and maintaining strength in manufacturing -- is going to put them on very different growth paths . And if you compare the United States to its rich peers , it has the best chance to be a Breakout Nation , particularly if Washington can get its game together and attack the public debt .
domestication: 在美国，最大的隐患在于政府可能无法解决债务问题，这会让经济复苏像日本那样被拖累。分析新兴市场不能一概而论，比如用“金砖国家”这样的标签，同样地，发达国家也需要一个个具体分析。发达国家在应对去杠杆化和保持制造业实力这两个基本挑战时，采取了截然不同的策略，这将导致它们的增长路径大相径庭。如果把美国和它的富裕伙伴们相比，美国最有可能成为“突破国”，尤其是如果华盛顿能团结起来，解决公共债务问题的话。
foreignization: 美国的最大危险仍然是政府未能解决债务问题，这将使经济复苏像日本那样受到拖累。正如不能用金砖国家等通用框架来分析新兴市场一样，发达市场也需要作为单独的故事进行分析。发达国家在应对去杠杆化和保持制造业实力等基本挑战方面采取了截然不同的方法，这将使它们走上非常不同的增长路径。如果将美国与其富裕的同行相比，它最有成为突破性国家的机会，特别是如果华盛顿能够团结一致并解决公共债务问题。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The big danger in the US remains that the government will fail to attack the debt problem , leaving a Japanese-style anchor on the recovery . Just as it makes no sense to analyze emerging markets in terms of generic rubrics like BRICs , developed markets also need to be analyzed as individual stories . The dramatically different approaches of the developed nations to the basic challenges -- de-leveraging and maintaining strength in manufacturing -- is going to put them on very different growth paths . And if you compare the United States to its rich peers , it has the best chance to be a Breakout Nation , particularly if Washington can get its game together and attack the public debt .
在美国，最大的隐患在于政府可能无法解决债务问题，这会让经济复苏像日本那样被拖累。分析新兴市场不能一概而论，比如用“金砖国家”这样的标签，同样地，发达国家也需要一个个具体分析。发达国家在应对去杠杆化和保持制造业实力这两个基本挑战时，采取了截然不同的策略，这将导致它们的增长路径大相径庭。如果把美国和它的富裕伙伴们相比，美国最有可能成为“突破国”，尤其是如果华盛顿能团结起来，解决公共债务问题的话。

source: Implications : Biking is seen as an easy , inexpensive solution to a large number of interrelated problems . As the world continues urbanizing , people 's health will increasingly suffer from environmental pollution and from sedentary lifestyles that do not allow for enough physical activity . Meanwhile , resource depletion will accelerate . Local transportation systems that encourage biking and walking could be a powerful antidote to these harmful trends .
domestication: 影响：骑自行车被视为解决诸多相互关联问题的简便且经济的方案。随着世界城市化进程的加快，人们的健康会因环境污染和缺乏运动而日益受损，同时资源枯竭也会加速。而鼓励骑车和步行的城市交通系统，就像是对抗这些不良趋势的一剂良药。
foreignization: 含义：骑自行车被视为解决大量相互关联问题的一个简单、廉价的解决方案。随着世界继续城市化，人们的健康将越来越多地受到环境污染和缺乏足够体育活动的久坐生活方式的影响。同时，资源枯竭将加速。鼓励骑自行车和步行的地方交通系统可能是这些有害趋势的强大解毒剂。

source: As well as having precisely measurable results , we have a lot of them . Instead of doing a small number of large deals like a traditional venture capital fund , we do a large number of small ones . We currently fund about 40 companies a year , selected from about 900 applications representing a total of about 2000 people . 1
domestication: 我们不仅有精确可量化的成果，而且数量还多。不像传统的风险投资基金那样做少量的大额投资，我们是做大量的小额投资。我们现在每年资助大约40家公司，这些公司是从大约900份申请中挑选出来的，涉及约2000人。
foreignization: 除了有可以精确测量的结果外，我们还有很多。与传统的风险投资基金不同，我们不做少量的大交易，而是做大量的小交易。我们目前每年资助大约40家公司，这些公司是从约900份申请中选出的，代表了总共约2000人。1

source: While I disagree with what you said about Zen originating in China , I agree with your points about . 1 . Training period on sushi-10 years vs. 6 months-very important . 2 . Japanese do n't have exclusive abitlity to become sushi chefs ; anyone can become one . 3 . Japanese have an advantage . 4 . HOWEVER : It 's not just training-but it 's a cultural heritage that makes a big component of hte difference . That heritage can be learned , or at least appreciated . SO training CAN work , but not necessarily .
domestication: 虽然我不认同你说禅宗起源于中国这个观点，但你提到的几点我还是赞同的：1. 做寿司的训练时间，十年和六个月的区别很大，这点很重要；2. 做寿司师傅不光日本人能行，谁都能学；3. 但日本人确实有优势；4. 不过，训练时间长短只是其中一个方面，文化传承才是关键。这种传承是可以学习的，至少可以去体会。所以，训练是有效果的，但也不一定完全决定一切。
foreignization: 虽然我不同意你关于禅宗起源于中国的说法，但我同意你的以下观点：1. 寿司培训期——10年对比6个月——非常重要。2. 日本人没有成为寿司厨师的专有能力；任何人都可以成为寿司厨师。3. 日本人有优势。4. 然而：不仅仅是培训——还有一种文化传承构成了很大一部分差异。这种传承可以学习，或者至少可以被欣赏。因此，培训可以奏效，但并不一定。

source: Okay idiot leftists ... Here 's a news flash for you . Every single campaign rally holds at least one gate -- and usually it 's all the gates -- until the candidate and his/her staff leaves the area . It 's a safety measure that is set up -- not by campaign staffers -- but the secret service . This story is a load of bs. from top to bottom . Temperatures were nowhere near freezing .
domestication: 好吧，你们这些笨蛋左派……听好了。每次竞选集会至少有一个门——通常是所有门——直到候选人和他的团队离开现场才会开放。这是出于安全考虑设置的措施，不是由竞选团队，而是特勤局来安排的。这个新闻从头到尾都是胡扯。当时气温根本就没有接近冰点。
foreignization:
好的，以下是翻译内容：

好吧，白痴左派……这里有个新闻快报给你们。每个竞选集会都会至少关闭一个入口——通常情况下是所有入口——直到候选人及其工作人员离开该区域。这是由特勤局设立的安全措施——而不是竞选团队人员。这个故事从头到尾都是胡说八道。当时的气温根本就没有接近冰点。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Okay idiot leftists ... Here 's a news flash for you . Every single campaign rally holds at least one gate -- and usually it 's all the gates -- until the candidate and his/her staff leaves the area . It 's a safety measure that is set up -- not by campaign staffers -- but the secret service . This story is a load of bs. from top to bottom . Temperatures were nowhere near freezing .

source: Stonking debut novel that starts at full pelt and never really slows down . I wanted to read this book as it is a time in history I studied so I was intrigued to see how well it would be portrayed . James Wilde brings the hardship , horror and violence of the time to life with bloody realism . It 's a grim time where life is easily and torturously forfeit . Hereward is possibly one of England 's forgotten heroes and this interpretation of his troubled life is well worth the read .
domestication: 这本处女作一开篇就让人眼前一亮，节奏紧凑，一气呵成。因为这段历史我曾经研究过，所以特别想看看作者能描绘到什么程度。詹姆斯·维尔德用血淋淋的现实主义手法，生动再现了那个时代的苦难、恐怖与暴力。那是一个生命随时可能在折磨中消逝的黑暗年代。赫里沃德可能是英格兰被遗忘的英雄之一，而这本书对他的坎坷一生的解读，绝对值得一读。

令人震撼的处女作，一开始就全速展开，从未真正放慢过。我想读这本书是因为我对那段历史有所研究，所以很好奇它会被描绘得如何。詹姆斯·维尔德以血腥的现实主义手法生动地展现了那个时代的困苦、恐怖和暴力。那是一个残酷的时代，生命轻易且痛苦地丧失。赫里沃德可能是英格兰被遗忘的英雄之一，而对他这段动荡生活的解读非常值得一读。

source: This same line of thinking manifested itself when contrast ratio became a spec for Plasma and LCD displays ( OMG ONE ZILLION TO ONE CONTRAST RATIO ) -- ca n't see it , does n't matter -- and is now resurfacing as companies enter the pixel density arms race . Increases in pixel density are going from impressive technical feats to masturbatory experiments for the sake of marketing strategy .

foreignization: 这种思维方式在对比度成为等离子和LCD显示器的规格时（天哪，一百万比一的对比度）——看不见，无关紧要——表现出来，并且现在随着公司进入像素密度军备竞赛而再次浮现。像素密度的提高正从令人印象深刻的技术成就变为为了营销策略而进行的自慰式实验。

source: This would be a splendid acquisition for small children , for teens deep into social networking , for an adult wanting to drop into the love seat for a quick look at what is happening in the world , for a senior citizen who wants a simple , inviting system with few hassles , to stay in touch with grandchildren . source: Ghetto revolts also occurred beginning in 1942 . The Nazis began to destroy the established ghettos , and many underground groups organized the burning of buildings and mass attempts at escaping the Nazis . Some Jews who were able to flee joined the partisans in Russia . The partisans were a non-Jewish organization that vehemently opposed Nazi rule . Approximately 10,000-20,000 Jews joined the movement .

source: At one point in the film , two missionaries knock on the door of Eva 's small , run-down house and ask her if she knows where she 's spending the afterlife . " Oh , yes I do as a matter of fact , " she responds cheerfully . " I 'm going straight to hell . " It 's delivered as a flippant comment to get the pair off her doorstep , but Eva is entirely serious . Moreover , she 's not so much awaiting damnation as she is already living it .
domestication: 电影里有这么一段，两个传教士敲开了艾娃那间破旧小屋的门，问她知不知道自己死后会去哪里。“哦，知道，当然知道。”她 cheerful 地回答，“我直接下地狱。”这话听起来像是随口一说，只想打发这两个人走，但其实艾娃是认真的。而且，与其说她在等待着诅咒，倒不如说她已经在地狱里活着了。

source: Cross shows O'Brien the photo of Martha playing volleyball . The image is the exact same one that he burned after Lavender 's death ( see " The Things They Carried " ) . O'Brien is surprised to see it , so Cross explains how he came to have another copy . He had run into Martha after the war . She had never married , had trained as a nurse , and gone on Lutheran missions to the Third World . She was unreceptive when Cross confessed that he had always loved her . When the conversation took a slightly sexual turn , she shut her eyes and rocked back and forth , seeming very disturbed . She gave him another copy of the photo of her playing volleyball and told him " not to burn this one . "
domestication: 克罗斯给奥布莱恩看了一张玛莎打排球的照片。这张照片正是他在拉文德死后烧掉的那张（见《他们所携带的》）。奥布莱恩看到后很惊讶，克罗斯便解释了他是怎么得到另一张的。战后他遇到了玛莎。她一直没结婚，当了护士，还去了第三世界做路德教会的传教士。克罗斯向她坦白自己一直爱着她，但她显得很冷淡。聊着聊着话题有点往那个方向偏时，她闭上眼睛前后摇晃，看起来非常不安。她给了克罗斯另一张她打排球的照片，还告诉他“这张可别烧了”。

" The future of Medicare should be marked by competition , choice , and by innovation , rather than bureaucracy , stagnation and bankruptcy , " Romney said last fall when he unveiled his Medicare plan . " Tomorrow 's seniors should have the freedom to choose what their health coverage looks like . "
“Medicare 的未来应该以竞争、选择和创新为标志，而不是官僚主义、停滞和破产，”罗姆尼去年秋天在公布他的 Medicare 计划时说。“明天的老年人应该有自由选择他们的健康保险看起来像什么。”

source: You know , I no longer think it 's merely tone-deafness , or ineptitude ( although both of those things are true ) . I 've thought for a while , and now with this I completely believe , that Mittens really really does n't want to win , does n't want to be President . I think he wanted the Republican nomination ( avenging Daddy ? ) , he got that , and now he 's doing all he can to ensure he does n't win on November 6th . If he were to win , I think he 'd be the most terrified , paralyzed-with-fright person on earth the morning of November 7th . At this point , it just ca n't be an accident that he 's saying stuff like this .
domestication: 你知道，我觉得这不仅仅是失言或无能（虽然这两点确实存在）。我琢磨了很久，现在更确信了，米特真的不想赢，不想当总统。我觉得他是想拿到共和党的提名（可能是为了给老爸报仇吧），这一步他做到了，现在他正拼命确保自己在11月6号那天不会赢。要是真赢了，我猜11月7号早晨，他会害怕得要命，整个人都吓瘫了。到这地步了，他说这些话不可能是无意的。
foreignization: 你知道，我不再认为这只是语气不当或无能（尽管这两者都是事实）。我有一段时间这么想了，现在有了这件事我完全相信，Mittens 真的真的不想赢，不想当总统。我觉得他想要的是共和党的提名（为爸爸报仇？），他已经得到了，现在他正在尽他所能确保他在11月6日不会赢。如果他赢了，我想在11月7日早晨他会成为这个世界上最为恐惧、被吓瘫的人。到了这个地步，他说这样的话绝不可能是偶然的。

source: Through the discovery of this site I have learned to love my pink bathroom that is in my Victorian brownstone . I need suggestions for a ceiling light . The tub , sink , tile and floor are all pink . We are painting the walls powder blue ( one day I 'd like to do a retro wall paper . ) The ceiling is high . Suggestions for a ceiling light ?
domestication: 发现了这个网站之后，我开始爱上我家维多利亚式褐石别墅里的粉色浴室了。现在需要大家帮我出出主意，天花板上该装什么样的灯。浴缸、洗手池、瓷砖和地板都是粉色的，我们打算把墙漆成淡蓝色（将来有一天想换成复古壁纸）。天花板挺高的，有没有什么好的灯具推荐？

source: I have to make a comment to the people who are saying that they disliked Melancholia because it was " too depressing " . I have to address this because it just seemed so ridiculous to me that someone would go to a Von Trier film expecting to feel uplifted ; especially if you read the synopsis about the end of the world , and then of course ... the title of the film itself . What exactly was being expected ?
domestication: 得对那些说《忧郁症》太压抑的人说两句。我觉得这事儿挺可笑的，有人去看冯·特里尔的电影居然还指望得到点正能量，特别是看过了剧情简介，讲的是世界末日，还有电影的名字《忧郁症》。他们到底想看啥呢？
foreignization: 我必须对那些说他们不喜欢《忧郁症》因为它“太压抑”的人发表评论。我必须对此作出回应，因为对我来说，有人去看冯·特里尔的电影却期望感到振奋，这实在是太荒谬了；特别是如果你读过关于世界末日的剧情简介，当然还有……电影的标题本身。究竟在期待什么呢？

source: Different users want different types of content . Some people may like to read . Other people want to ingest it through their eyes and ears . Instead of reading , they can watch and listen to it , and get the content in the same way that they prefer . It 's also much better on mobile . There 's a much higher retention rate of content when you 're viewing it on your mobile phone through video as opposed to reading text on the small screens .
domestication: 不同的用户喜欢不同类型的内容。有的人可能喜欢阅读，而另一些人则更愿意通过眼睛和耳朵来接收信息。与其读书，他们更喜欢看视频、听音频，以自己喜欢的方式获取内容。这种形式在手机上尤其受欢迎。当人们用手机看视频时，内容的留存率比在小屏幕上阅读文字要高得多。
foreignization: 不同的用户想要不同类型的內容。有些人可能喜欢阅读。其他人希望通过他们的眼睛和耳朵来获取它。而不是閱讀，他們可以觀看和聆聽，並以他們偏好的方式獲取內容。這在移動設備上也更好。當你通過視頻在手機上查看內容時，保留率要高得多，而不是在小屏幕上閱讀文本。

source: In truth , Vittrup did n't expect that children 's racial attitudes would change very much just from watching these videos . Prior research had shown that multicultural curricula in schools have far less impact than we intend them to -- largely because the implicit message " We 're all friends " is too vague for young children to understand that it refers to skin color .
domestication: 实际上，维特鲁普并没指望孩子们的种族态度仅靠看这些视频就会有多大改变。之前的研究显示，学校里的多元文化课程远没有达到我们期望的效果——主要是因为“我们都是朋友”这样的潜台词对孩子来说太笼统了，他们根本无法理解这跟肤色有什么关系。

source: Although the design and funding came from the University of Virginia , the local community around Gita built the school . Through more than 20,000 hours of donated labor , prospective parents and grandparents made the BT Academy in Gita a reality . It was the best-looking , most inviting school we saw on our drive down the dirt road , and yes , still one made of mud and bricks and stone and with outdoor , though hygienic and private , latrines .

source: Christopher Nolan has n't had much to say about various interpretations of Inception since its release , but costume designer Jeffrey Kurland and actor Dileep Rao ( Yusuf ) have both weighed in on their views of the ending . Nolan in general does n't comment too directly to fan theories and canon . In fact , he 's admitted that he 's highly amused that people keep constantly asking him questions about the ending even though he has no intention of answering them .

source: Time Machine is the built-in backup that works with your Mac and an external drive ( sold separately ) or Time Capsule . Connect the drive , tell Time Machine to use it , and relax . Time Machine automatically backs up your entire Mac , including system files , applications , accounts , preferences , email messages , music , photos , movies , and documents . But what makes Time Machine different from other backup applications is that it not only keeps a spare copy of every file , it remembers how your system looked on any given day -- so you can revisit your Mac as it appeared in the past . Time Machine keeps hourly backups for the past 24 hours , daily backups for the past month , and weekly backups until your backup drive is full .  Setting up Time Machine backups using an external drive
domestication: 时光机是Mac自带的备份工具，可以搭配外接硬盘（需单独购买）或时间胶囊使用。你只需将硬盘连接上，告诉时光机使用这个硬盘，然后就可以放心了。时光机会自动备份你的整个Mac系统，包括系统文件、应用程序、账户、偏好设置、邮件、音乐、照片、电影和文档等。但让时光机与众不同的是，它不仅保留每个文件的副本，还能记住你系统在任何一天的样子——这样你就能回到过去，看看Mac当时的样子。时光机会保存过去24小时内的每小时备份，过去一个月的每日备份，以及直到备份硬盘空间用完为止的每周备份。使用外接硬盘设置时光机备份很简单。

source: By all accounts , what you need to live a satisfied , pleasant life can be purchased relatively inexpensively nowadays . People 100 years ago would look at the lifestyle of a middle class American and their jaws would drop at the wealth . Meat for breakfast , lunch , and dinner , three hour trips from Chicago to Salt Lake , instant communication with anyone anywhere , Honda Civics , 2,000 square foot houses .

source: When you call something " not that bad " and , again , " I 've read worse " with the same breath as noting that it made a commercial splash in publishing the likes of which all the National Book Awards Finalists together will not make in a hundred years , you have affirmed that the dichotomy between art and commerce is getting ever larger .
domestication: 你说某本书“还不赖”，又说“我看过更差的”，可同时又提到这本书在出版界造成的商业轰动，是全国图书奖所有入围作品加起来一百年也赶不上的。这说明艺术和商业之间的鸿沟正变得越来越大。

source: " So far , every columnist that TNR has posted on the subject of what can be done about he current crisis has answered , " Nothing , let 's talk about something else . " Then we get a lot of half-baked and flat out backwards economics on the subjects that they prefer to talk about , the deficit , the excuse to do nothing , and long-term productivity , the other excuse to do nothing . "
domestication: 到目前为止，TNR（《新共和》杂志）找来讨论当前危机对策的每一个专栏作家，都一个劲地说：“没招儿，换个话题吧。”结果呢，他们喜欢谈论的话题——赤字问题、无所作为的借口，还有长期生产力，又成了另一个无所作为的借口——全都是些半生不熟、甚至完全倒退的经济观点。
foreignization: 到目前为止，TNR（《新共和》）关于如何应对当前危机的每一位专栏作家都回答说，“什么也做不了，让我们换个话题。”然后他们就他们更愿意谈论的话题——赤字、无所作为的借口，以及长期生产率、另一个无所作为的借口——发表了许多半生不熟甚至完全错误的经济学观点。

source: The first question to Romney gave Romney a chance to unload a series of devastating blows on Obama , one after the other . Obama came out of his corner strong , but from the very beginning , his face was bruised and he was faltering . source: Incidentally , Qui Tam , your interpretation of the Mayflower colonists is also more than a bit mythologized ; they were Puritans , and they were hardly searching for " religious freedom " . source: Although a specified explanation is not given , if there is no light transmitting layer under the layer to be treated as described above , the extreme value of the data of the superposed light appearing immediately before the layer to be treated is penetrated is always the minimal value . In any preceding point where an extreme value occurs , the thickness of the film to be treated is larger than that at the point of the latest minimal value . Accordingly , using the point of the latest minimal value as a reference , there is the least error compared with the cases where any other point of an extreme value is adopted as a reference point and the end point of treatment can be determined more accurately .
domestication: 虽然没有给出具体的解释，但如果在上述要处理的层下面没有透光层，那么在要处理的层马上就要被穿透时，出现的叠加光的数据的极值总是最小值。前面任何出现极值的地方，待处理膜的厚度都比最近一次最小值点的厚度要大。因此，以最近一次最小值点作为参考，误差最小，与其他任何极值点作为参考点相比，处理终点能更准确地确定。

source: The " 60 " is the aspect ratio of the tire . That means that the sidewall ( the part of the tire that extends from the car 's wheel to the edge of the tread ) is 60% of the width of the tire 's tread . In our example case , then , the sidewall measures 12.3 cm from the wheel to the tread , measured radially .

source: " We have clear rules about screen time and TV time , " Mrs. Obama says . Among those rules : No TV or computer time during the week , unless it involves homework ( for Malia , who is in eighth grade , many homework assignments require computer use ) . The girls have limited TV access on the weekends , she adds , but their weekends are pretty packed . " I try to fill up their weekends with a lot of stuff , " Mrs. Obama laughs . " It 's like , sports and games and ... oh , it 's bedtime . So sorry you did n't get your TV time in ! "
domestication: 米歇尔·奥巴马说：“我们对看屏幕和看电视的时间有明确规定。” 其中一条规矩是：除非是为了写作业，不然平时上学期间不允许看电视或用电脑（对上八年级的马莉亚来说，很多作业都需要用到电脑）。周末的时候，两个女儿看电视的时间也是有限制的，不过她们的周末安排得满满的。米歇尔·奥巴马笑着说：“我尽量让她们的周末排得满满当当的。”“比如运动、游戏……然后一转眼就到睡觉时间了。所以呀，不好意思，你没时间看电视啦！”

source: Talking Points -- India 's Firstpost assesses Thursday 's meeting between Prime Minister Manmohan Singh and Pakistani President Asif Ali Zardari on the sidelines of the Non-Aligned Movement summit in Tehran . " It was remarkable as much for what was not discussed as for what was , " it wrote . Pakistan 's Dawn agrees : " It achieved little beyond Pakistan reiterating the desire for close bilateral relations and improved trade and the Indian leader saying little ... "
domestication: 谈点 -- 印度《第一邮报》评估了周四在德黑兰不结盟运动峰会上，印度总理辛格与巴基斯坦总统扎尔达里会面的情况。“这次会面的不寻常之处在于，没谈什么比谈了什么更值得关注。”该报写道。巴基斯坦的《黎明报》也持相同观点：“除了巴基斯坦重申希望密切双边关系和增进贸易外，印度领导人几乎没说什么……”

source: I grew up with a 60 ? s pink bathroom and have often wished it had white tile . It is n't that sweet pale pink ; it 's a strong pink . My sister &; I joked about it being Pepto Pink . I have recently inherited the house with that pink bathroom ( and a green bathroom ) . I really considered " destroying " them both ; my niece convinced me not to . So one night while searching for ideas for the bathroom , I came across the " Save the Pink Bathrooms " website . Now , I am excited about my pink bathroom and the decorating possibilities ! ! I promise to cherish &; save the pink bathroom ! !

source: Sikhism : Sikhism was created in reaction to the conflict between Hinduism and Islam , and carries on many of Hinduism 's influences -- although Sikhs are monotheistic . " Evil " is merely human selfishness . Salvation is attained by living an honest life and meditating on god . If performed sufficiently , the worshipper is released from the cycle of reincarnation and becomes one with god .
domestication: 锡克教：锡克教是在印度教和伊斯兰教冲突的背景下产生的，虽然锡克教徒是一神论者，但锡克教仍然受到了印度教的许多影响。所谓的“邪恶”其实就是人的自私自利。要想得救，就要过诚实的生活，一心一意地念诵上帝。如果做得足够虔诚，信徒就能摆脱轮回之苦，与上帝合为一体。

锡克教：锡克教是在印度教和伊斯兰教之间的冲突中产生的，并继承了许多印度教的影响——尽管锡克教徒是一神论者。“邪恶”仅仅是人类的自私。通过过诚实的生活和冥想上帝可以获得救赎。如果执行得足够充分，信徒将从轮回中解脱出来并与上帝合为一体。

source: Roast . Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or foil . Spread the vegetables on the sheet and roast in the oven for 30-40 minutes . source: A good client / designer relationship is one that has an inevitable outcome . nOne where the client has been involved , knows what 's coming and the outcome seems inevitable . nInevitability is a much undervalued term in design . It comes from having a shared vision of the future . nOne where both of you can see the steps to take you towards or away from the vision . nIt can feel far better than the big tad-dah , which can go wrong . n
domestication: 好的客户与设计师的关系，结果往往是水到渠成的。客户参与其中，知道接下来会发生什么，结果看似自然而然。在设计中，“顺理成章”这个词被严重低估了。它来自双方对未来有一个共同的愿景。双方都能看到通往或偏离这个愿景的每一步。这种感觉比那些可能出差错的大惊喜要好得多。
foreignization: 良好的客户/设计师关系是一种结果必然会发生的关系。一种客户参与其中，知道会发生什么，结果显得不可避免的关系。不可避免性在设计中是一个被严重低估的术语。它来自于对未来有一个共同的愿景。一种双方都能看到通向或远离愿景的步骤的关系。这种感觉可能比大张旗鼓的效果好得多，后者可能会出错。

source: ESTES KEFAUVER : This is Estes Kefauver . The General 's promise to bring down prices was another broken promise . Since the Republicans took office the cost of living has reached its highest point in history . Today the consumer can buy less food , less housing , less clothing , less medical care than he could in nineteen hundred and fifty-two for the same money . The General promised a change for the better , and we got shortchanged for the worse . Think it through .  Share  Save
domestication: 这就是埃斯特斯·凯福弗。将军承诺要降低物价，结果又是一张空头支票。共和党上台后，生活成本达到了历史最高点。现在老百姓手里的钱能买到的食物、住房、衣服和医疗都比1952年少了。将军承诺要改善，结果我们却吃了个大亏。细想一下吧。分享 保存
foreignization: 埃斯特斯·凯富弗：这是埃斯特斯·凯富弗。将军承诺降低物价，但这又是一个未兑现的承诺。自从共和党上台以来，生活成本达到了历史最高点。今天，消费者用同样的钱能买到的食物、住房、衣物和医疗护理都比1952年少了。将军承诺会带来更好的改变，而我们却得到了更差的结果。好好想想。分享 保存

source: Show students how to use the balance pan ; they can place expressions in each side of the balance pan to solve two equations simultaneously . For example , place - ( x 2 ) + 6* x . Note : It is important to show students that the tool requires the * for multiplication , and exponents , such as the power of 2 , can be shown by 2 . Next , place 2* x in the right pan . Since both expressions equal y , by the Transitive Property of Equality , they should be equal to each other . Slowly move the slider to find out when the pans are balanced . The value for x may also be typed in the blue . Students should notice that when x = 4 , the pans are balanced . They should also notice that the value of the expression , 8 , is displayed above the pans , indicating the height .
domestication: 给学生们展示如何使用天平；他们可以把等式放在天平的两边，同时解两个方程。比如，左边放 - (x^2) + 6*x。注意：要告诉学生，这个工具做乘法时需要用 * 号，指数，如平方，可以用 2 表示。接着，在右边的盘子里放 2*x。因为这两个表达式都等于 y，根据等式的传递性，它们应该相等。慢慢移动滑块，找到天平平衡的时候。x 的值也可以直接输入到蓝色框里。学生会发现，当 x 等于 4 时，天平就平衡了。他们还会注意到，表达式的值 8 显示在天平上方，表示高度。

source: The existence of a skilled workforce is an indicator of both the presence of industries that need them and a measure of a state 's ability to educate or attract skilled workers . Thus , workforce quality can be improved both by investing in education and by creating a business-friendly environment that attracts knowledge-intensive businesses and the skilled workforce that these businesses employ .
domestication: 有一支技术娴熟的劳动力队伍，既说明了有需要这些人才的行业存在，也反映了这个地区培养或吸引技术人才的能力。所以，要提高劳动力的质量，既要加大对教育的投资，也要营造一个对商业友好的环境，吸引知识密集型企业及其所需的技术人才。
foreignization: 熟练劳动力的存在既是需要这些劳动力的行业存在的指标，也是衡量一个国家教育或吸引熟练劳动力能力的标准。因此，通过投资教育和创造吸引知识密集型企业及其所雇佣的熟练劳动力的商业友好环境，可以提高劳动力质量。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The existence of a skilled workforce is an indicator of both the presence of industries that need them and a measure of a state 's ability to educate or attract skilled workers . Thus , workforce quality can be improved both by investing in education and by creating a business-friendly environment that attracts knowledge-intensive businesses and the skilled workforce that these businesses employ .
有一支技术娴熟的劳动力队伍，既说明了有需要这些人才的行业存在，也反映了这个地区培养或吸引技术人才的能力。所以，要提高劳动力的质量，既要加大对教育的投资，也要营造一个对商业友好的环境，吸引知识密集型企业及其所需的技术人才。

source: A petition under the Federal bankruptcy laws or any state insolvency law which was filed by or against , or a receiver , fiscal agent or similar officer was appointed by a court for the business or property of such person , or any partnership in which he was a general partner at or within two years before the time of such filing , or any corporation or business association of which he was an executive officer at or within two years before the time of such filing ;
domestication: 根据联邦破产法或任何州的无力偿债法，如果某人或其作为普通合伙人的合伙企业，或其担任高管的公司或商业机构，在申请破产或无力偿债的前两年内，被自己或他人提起诉讼，或者法院指派了接管人、财政代理人或其他类似官员来管理其业务或财产；
foreignization: 根据联邦破产法或任何州的无力偿债法提出的请愿书，该请愿书是由或针对该人士，或由法院为该人士的业务或财产，或其在提出请愿书时或提出请愿书前两年内为普通合伙人的任何合伙企业，或其在提出请愿书时或提出请愿书前两年内担任高管的任何公司或商业协会任命的接管人、财政代理人或类似官员；

source: INEVITABLE NOT TA-DAHA good client / designer relationship is one that has an inevitable outcome.One where the client has been involved , knows whats coming and the outcome seems inevitable.Inevitability is a much undervalued term in design . It starts with a shared vision of the future.One where both of you can see the steps to take you towards or away from the vision.It can feel far better than the big tad-dah , which can go wrong .
domestication: 客户和设计师之间良好的关系，一定是水到渠成的。这种关系中，客户全程参与，对结果了如指掌，仿佛最终成果是顺理成章的。在设计领域，“水到渠成”这个词其实被严重低估了。这一切始于双方对未来有共同的愿景，能够看到实现这个愿景的每一步。比起那种大张旗鼓的效果，这种自然而然的过程往往更让人感到安心，也更不容易出错。
foreignization: 不可避免的不是大惊喜 客户/设计师之间的良好关系是那种结果不可避免的关系。一种客户参与其中，了解即将发生的事情，结果显得不可避免的关系。不可避免性在设计中是一个被严重低估的术语。它始于对未来共同愿景。一种你们俩都能看到将你们带向或远离愿景的步骤的关系。这可能比大的惊喜感觉好得多，因为大惊喜可能会出错。

source: In the end , the thinking behind the producers ' decision to go light on science and heavy on ideology in Mr. Hockenberry 's questioning and in the editing of the piece becomes clear . source: Still , the most controversial component of the law - the requirement that nearly all Americans obtain health insurance -- does not sit well with the American public . In that same March poll , 45 percent approve of that provision , but 51 percent do not . According to an April Kaiser Family Foundation survey , seven in ten find that element of the law unfavorable
domestication: 然而，这部法律中最具争议的部分——要求几乎所有美国人都要购买健康保险——并不讨美国公众的喜欢。三月份的一项民调显示，只有45%的人支持这项规定，而51%的人不支持。根据四月份凯撒家庭基金会的调查显示，十个人里有七个对这一条款持负面看法。
foreignization: 仍然，该法律中最具争议的部分——要求几乎所有美国人都必须获得健康保险的规定——并不受美国公众的欢迎。在同一次三月的民意调查中，45%的人支持这一规定，但51%的人不支持。根据四月份凯撒家庭基金会的一项调查，十分之七的人认为该法律的这一部分是不利的。

source: But despite the Presidential intervals of George Bush , Barack Obama , and others , it remains a fact that our great men and women who serve in uniform do so longer than the terms served by Washington D.C. politicians . It 's a real commitment to make . That commitment affects families , friends , children , and communities . That 's why it 's an honorable commitment . It 's a lifetime gig and it is no luxury . Our men and women in uniform deserve mention every time a commander-in-chief or one applying for the job stands to address the country -- it 's the epitome of unity .
domestication: 但不管是在乔治·布什、巴拉克·奥巴马等总统的任期内，事实仍然是，我们那些身着军装的男女英雄们服役的时间，往往比华盛顿政客们的任期要长得多。这真是一份沉甸甸的责任啊。这份责任不仅影响到军人自己，还影响到他们的家人、朋友、孩子和整个社区。正因如此，它才显得如此崇高。这是一辈子的事业，绝不是什么轻松的事。每当一位在任或竞选中的最高统帅站出来对国家讲话时，都该提到我们的军人——这是团结的最高体现。
foreignization: 但尽管有乔治·布什、巴拉克·奥巴马等总统的任期间隔，事实仍然是，我们那些身穿制服的伟大男女服役的时间比华盛顿特区政客们的任期要长。这是一项真正的承诺。这项承诺影响着家庭、朋友、孩子和社区。这就是为什么这是一项光荣的承诺。这是一生的职业，不是什么奢侈品。每次指挥官或竞选该职位的人站起来向国家发表讲话时，都应提到我们的军人——这是团结的最高体现。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

But despite the Presidential intervals of George Bush , Barack Obama , and others , it remains a fact that our great men and women who serve in uniform do so longer than the terms served by Washington D.C. politicians . It 's a real commitment to make . That commitment affects families , friends , children , and communities . That 's why it 's an honorable commitment . It 's a lifetime gig and it is no luxury . Our men and women in uniform deserve mention every time a commander-in-chief or one applying for the job stands to address the country -- it 's the epitome of unity .

source: We do n't need a great speaker . We need a president who loves this country and will work to put it back on the right track . In 2008 people voted for all the utopian rhetoric and we ended up with an inexperienced , thin-skinned , empty suit hack who hides his past , apologizes for America and is determined to turn America into a divided third-world country .
domestication: 咱们不需要什么雄辩家，需要的是个爱国家的总统，能带领国家重回正轨。2008年，大伙儿投的是那些美好得不切实际的言辞，结果呢？来了个没经验、心眼小、肚子里没货的家伙，遮遮掩掩自己的过去，动不动就替美国道歉，铁了心要把美国变成一个分裂的第三世界国家。
foreignization: 我们不需要一个伟大的演说家。我们需要一位热爱这个国家并会努力将其重新引上正轨的总统。在2008年，人们投票给了所有的乌托邦式的言论，结果却得到了一个缺乏经验、敏感脆弱、空洞无物的骗子，他隐藏自己的过去，为美国道歉，并决心将美国变成一个分裂的第三世界国家。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

We do n't need a great speaker . We need a president who loves this country and will work to put it back on the right track . In 2008 people voted for all the utopian rhetoric and we ended up with an inexperienced , thin-skinned , empty suit hack who hides his past , apologizes for America and is determined to turn America into a divided third-world country .

source: MOTOKO RICH I really enjoyed Page One . As you 've probably heard , we had a staff screening in the Times Center and it was great to feel the warmth in the room for our friends in the film . I thought David Carr was a phenomenal movie presence , and Bruce Headlam was a break-out star . ( Did you see his appearance on The Daily Show ? The movie was n't a fluke ... ) And along with Brian Stelter , Tim Arango and Richard Perez-Pena , they all came across as fighting the good fight for the journalism we believe in .
domestication: 莫托科·里奇 真的很喜欢《第一版》。你可能也听说了，我们在时报中心给员工们搞了一场试映，大家对电影里的朋友们都特别有感情，整个房间都暖洋洋的。大卫·卡尔在电影里的表现简直太棒了，布鲁斯·海德拉姆也成了新星。（你看过他在《每日秀》上的亮相吗？电影里的表现可不是偶然的……）再加上布莱恩·斯特尔特、蒂姆·阿兰戈和理查德·佩雷斯-佩纳，他们几个都像是在为我们坚信的新闻事业而奋斗。
foreignization: MOTOKO RICH 我真的很喜欢《Page One》。你可能已经听说了，我们在《纽约时报》中心举行了一次员工放映会，能感受到房间里对我们电影中的朋友的温暖支持。我认为大卫·卡尔在电影中的表现非常出色，布鲁斯·海德拉姆是新星。（你看过他在《每日秀》上的 appearances 吗？电影并不是偶然……）还有布莱恩·斯特尔特、蒂姆·阿朗戈和理查德·佩雷斯-佩纳，他们都在电影中展现出了为我们所信仰的新闻业而奋斗的形象。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

MOTOKO RICH I really enjoyed Page One . As you 've probably heard , we had a staff screening in the Times Center and it was great to feel the warmth in the room for our friends in the film . I thought David Carr was a phenomenal movie presence , and Bruce Headlam was a break-out star . ( Did you see his appearance on The Daily Show ? The movie was n't a fluke ... ) And along with Brian Stelter , Tim Arango and Richard Perez-Pena , they all came across as fighting the good fight for the journalism we believe in .

domestication: 《生命之树》的差评简直是外行人的嘴脸。哪条法律规定了电影必须得给观众讲明白？我觉得很多影评人看片之前早就下了定论。希望布拉德·皮特能凭对的电影拿到提名。杰西卡·查斯坦的无声表演堪称自桑曼莎·莫顿在《甜蜜与低语》以来最佳。怎么突然间大家都不喜欢恐龙了？特伦斯·马利克爱怎么拍就怎么拍，他有这个资格。

source: Leading the push for the King family is Cousin Hugh ( Beau Bridges ) . As affable as Bridges can be , he does n't want to listen to any woo-woo Green nonsense about not selling . The film follows Clooney 's character 's legal , family and emotional troubles in careful detail , until director Alexander Payne shows us , without forcing it , that they are all coiled together . We get vested in the lives of the characters . We come to understand how they think , and care about what they decide about the substantial moral problems underlying the plot .
domestication: 带头推动金家卖地的是表哥休（由博·布里奇斯饰演）。别看布里奇斯平易近人，可他才不想听什么格林的胡言乱语，说什么不能卖地。电影细致入微地展现了克鲁尼角色在法律、家庭和情感上的种种困境，直到导演亚历山大·佩恩不动声色地让我们看到，这一切其实都纠缠在一起。我们渐渐投入了这些人物的生活，开始理解他们的想法，关心他们在剧情背后那些重大道德问题上的选择。

source: Rick Perry 's already lackluster presidential bid went on a deathwatch after his debate debacle . In talking to the many who have known Perry over the years , fellow Texan Bryan Burrough discovers the surprising reasons behind the campaign 's train wreck and how Perry , with an unbroken string of nine political victories , might yet stage a comeback -- despite his shocking backroom dealings with big campaign donors , the rumors about gay affairs and painkiller use , and the nasty bullying tactics he has used to implement a truly radical agenda .
domestication: 里克·佩里的总统竞选本来就不怎么起眼，辩论失败后更是雪上加霜，几乎被判了死刑。布赖恩·伯勒姆和佩里是同乡，他通过与许多认识佩里多年的知情人交谈，发现了这场竞选灾难背后的惊人原因，还探讨了佩里如何可能东山再起——尽管他有令人震惊的与大额捐款人的幕后交易，关于同性恋丑闻和滥用止痛药的传闻，以及为了推行极端政策而采取的卑鄙手段。
foreignization: 里克·佩里的本已乏善可陈的总统竞选在辩论灾难后进入了死亡倒计时。在与多年来认识佩里的许多人交谈后，同为德克萨斯人的布赖恩·伯勒发现了这场竞选崩溃背后令人惊讶的原因，以及佩里如何可能东山再起——尽管他与大竞选捐款人有令人震惊的幕后交易，有关同性恋丑闻和止痛药使用的传闻，以及他为实施真正激进的议程而使用的恶劣欺凌手段。

source: Though the temporary capitol of Portland was the largest city in the state many thought a permanent capitol should be more centrally located . A number of cities and towns sought the honor of becoming the state capitol and site of the new State House . The principal aspirants were Portland , Brunswick , Hallowell , Waterville , Belfast , Wiscasset and Augusta . The Legislature finally selected the City of Augusta , and Governor Enoch Lincoln signed the bill establishing Augusta as the official capitol on February 24 , 1827 .
domestication: 虽然波特兰是州里最大的城市，但很多人觉得永久首府应该选在更中心的位置。一时间，许多城市和小镇都争着要当这个光荣的首府和新州议会大厦的所在地。主要竞争者有波特兰、布伦瑞克、哈洛韦尔、沃特维尔、贝尔法斯特、威斯卡塞特和奥古斯塔。最后，立法机关选中了奥古斯塔，1827年2月24日，州长埃诺赫·林肯签署法案，正式确定奥古斯塔为州首府。

The Legislature finally selected the City of Augusta , and Governor Enoch Lincoln signed the bill establishing Augusta as the official capitol on February 24 , 1827 .

source: Not only was it the first time since NFL realignment in 2002 that all four teams in a division were tied as late as Week 6 , it gave the other teams in the AFC East , namely the Bills and Dolphins , who had finished third and fourth in the division each of the previous three years , hope they might unseat the Patriots from their lofty perch .
domestication: 这不仅是自2002年NFL重组以来，首次出现分区内的四支球队在第六周还并列的情况，也让AFC东区的其他球队，特别是过去三年一直排在第三和第四的比尔队和海豚队看到了希望，他们或许能将高高在上的爱国者队拉下马。

source: The financial statements are presented in United States dollars . In accordance with ASC 830 ? Foreign Currency Translation ? , foreign denominated monetary assets and liabilities are translated into United States dollars at rates of exchange in effect at the balance sheet date . Non-monetary items , including equity , are translated at the historical rate of exchange . Revenues and expenses are translated at the average rates of exchange during the year . During the year ended July 31 , 2012 , the company had immaterial translation loss due to cash translation which was deemed to be irrelevant .
domestication: 财务报表以美元呈现。根据ASC 830《外币折算》的规定，以外币计价的货币性资产和负债按资产负债表日的汇率折算成美元。非货币性项目，包括股本，按历史汇率折算。收入和费用则按年度平均汇率折算。截至2012年7月31日的财年里，公司因现金折算产生的汇兑损失微乎其微，被认为无关紧要。

source: Even if it WAS N'T that cold , it is still wrong to hold people -- especially children , in like that and refuse to let them leave when they are asking to leave . source: The decision abruptly ends the public-service career of one of the military 's most vaunted leaders . He led the surge in Iraq , and was later tapped to lead U.S. and NATO forces in Afghanistan -- following two years at the helm of U.S. Central Command . In April 2011 , Obama again tapped Petraeus to lead the CIA .
domestication: 这个决定突然终结了一位军中明星的公共服务生涯。他曾在伊拉克战场指挥增兵行动，后来又担任美国中央司令部的负责人，随后又被选为驻阿富汗美军和北约部队的领导人。2011年4月，奥巴马再次提名彼得雷乌斯出任中情局局长。

source: J.K. Rowling initially considered having Arthur or Ron as the Weasley casualty but decided to give reprieve to both as they form an integral part of the series . She ultimately settled on having Fred killed as it serves two purposes : to give a sense of loss for George and the payoff of Percy 's rivalry against his Ministry 's arch-rival Rookwood ( who was revealed to be a Death Eater ) .
domestication: J.K. 罗琳最初考虑让亚瑟或罗恩成为韦斯莱家的牺牲者，但最后还是手下留情了，因为他们在整个系列中都起着关键作用。最终，她决定让弗雷德领便当，这样一举两得：既能给乔治带来失去亲人的痛苦，又能作为珀西与他在魔法部的死对头卢克伍德（后来揭露是食死徒）之间矛盾的高潮。
foreignization: J.K. 罗琳最初考虑让亚瑟或罗恩成为韦斯莱家的牺牲者，但最终决定宽恕他们俩，因为他们是系列小说的重要组成部分。她最终决定让弗雷德死亡，这有两个目的：一是给乔治一种失去的感觉，二是珀西与他在魔法部的大敌鲁克伍德（后被揭露为食死徒）之间的竞争的高潮。

source: If you want the best sushi in my area , you oddly skip the Asian-owned places , and go with two small places in strip malls . Each is owned by white guys ( though one of them is married to a Japanese woman , and her family helps out ) who spent several years living and learning in Japan and who still shut down for 2-3 weeks in the off season to go back to Japan for a refresher on proper technique .
domestication: 想在我这儿吃最好的寿司，你得绕过那些亚洲人开的店，反而要去购物中心里两家不起眼的小店。这两家店的老板都是白人，其中一个还娶了个日本老婆，他岳家人也会帮忙打理生意。这两位老板都在日本待过几年，学到了真功夫，每年淡季还会关店两三个星期，专门回日本进修，保持手艺纯正。
foreignization: 如果你想在我附近吃到最好的寿司，奇怪的是你要跳过那些亚洲人开的店，而选择两家位于购物中心的小店。每家店都是由白人男子经营的（虽然其中一人娶了一位日本妻子，她的家人也帮忙），他们曾在日本生活和学习了几年，并且仍然会在淡季关闭店铺2-3周，回到日本重温正确的技术。

source: The problem is that so many people lived on earth but never received baptism . Many of them never even had a chance to receive baptism . So Jesus provided a way for all those hosts of the dead to be on equal footing with the most righteous of saints . We can be baptized in their behalf in our temples . We can offer them the ordinance of baptism and the Gift of the Holy Ghost , which they are free to receive if they so desire .
domestication: 问题在于，世上那么多人从未接受过洗礼，许多人甚至连洗礼的机会都没有。所以耶稣给所有这些亡灵提供了一条路，让他们能和最圣洁的圣徒站在同一起跑线上。我们可以在圣殿里代他们受洗，为他们施行洗礼仪式，赐予他们圣灵之恩，他们若愿意，就可以接受。
foreignization: 问题在于地球上有很多人从未受过洗。他们中的许多人甚至从未有过受洗的机会。因此，耶稣为所有这些亡灵提供了一种方式，使他们能够与最义圣徒平等。我们可以在我们的圣殿中代表他们受洗。我们可以向他们提供洗礼的仪式和圣灵的恩赐，如果他们愿意，是可以自由接受的。

We can offer them the ordinance of baptism and the Gift of the Holy Ghost , which they are free to receive if they so desire .
问题在于地球上有很多人从未受过洗。他们中的许多人甚至从未有过受洗的机会。因此，耶稣为所有这些亡灵提供了一种方式，使他们能够与最义圣徒平等。我们可以在我们的圣殿中代表他们受洗。我们可以向他们提供洗礼的仪式和圣灵的恩赐，如果他们愿意，是可以自由接受的。

source: >> Where to buy 23-inch LCD HDTV . This Sony TV is one of the few currently available small-screen LCD TVs with a digital tuner . That means it wo n't become obsolete when analog broadcasting ends in early 2009 . It is an HDTV with a native resolution of 1366 x 768 pixels . Features are generous for a small-screen TV , but some things , such as picture-in-picture , are missing . Reviews say that the TV does a relatively good job with fast-motion video , and that it excels in displaying video games . However , the Sony TV is expensive for its size . ( compare prices )
domestication: 去哪里买23英寸的液晶高清电视呢？这款索尼电视是目前市面上少数带有数字调谐器的小屏液晶电视之一，这意味着在2009年初模拟信号停播后，它也不会过时。这是一款高清电视，分辨率达到了1366x768像素。对于小屏幕电视来说，它的功能相当丰富，但像画中画这样的功能就没有了。评论说，这款电视处理快速运动画面表现不错，玩游戏的效果尤其好。不过，考虑到它的尺寸，价格还是偏高了些。

source: Also , for example , when you have lots of " if " clauses , those languages force us to use mutable state ( and a variable initialized as null ) just to avoid early exits . But we can avoid both by treating the " if " as an expression , as in Ruby , Lisp , etc , or with the ternary conditional operator ...
domestication: 比如，当你有好多“如果”条件时，这些语言就逼着我们用可变状态（变量先初始化为null），只是为了防止提前退出。但我们可以两全其美，要么像Ruby、Lisp那样，把“如果”当作表达式处理，要么用三元条件运算符……
foreignization: 另外，例如，当你有很多“if”子句时，这些语言迫使我们使用可变状态（以及初始化为null的变量）只是为了避免提前退出。但是我们可以通过将“if”视为表达式，如在Ruby、Lisp等中，或者使用三元条件运算符来避免这两者。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Also , for example , when you have lots of " if " clauses , those languages force us to use mutable state ( and a variable initialized as null ) just to avoid early exits . But we can avoid both by treating the " if " as an expression , as in Ruby , Lisp , etc , or with the ternary conditional operator ...
比如，当你有好多“如果”条件时，这些语言就逼着我们用可变状态（变量先初始化为null），只是为了防止提前退出。但我们可以两全其美，要么像Ruby、Lisp那样，把“如果”当作表达式处理，要么用三元条件运算符……

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Also , for example , when you have lots of " if " clauses , those languages force us to use mutable state ( and a variable initialized as null ) just to avoid early exits . But we can avoid both by treating the " if " as an expression , as in Ruby , Lisp , etc , or with the ternary conditional operator ...
另外，例如，当你有很多“if”子句时，这些语言迫使我们使用可变状态（以及初始化为null的变量）只是为了避免提前退出。但是我们可以通过将“if”视为表达式，如在Ruby、Lisp等中，或者使用三元条件运算符来避免这两者。

source: I have a pink bathroom with pink tiles and smaller tiles around the top with swans on them . The floor is a maroon color . I did put in a new vanity sink that is cherry wood and the bowl has a pinkish marble look to it . The tiles around the top go into an arch over the bathtub . Everyone loves my pink bathroom . source: There was a successful effort to restrict blacks from voting in Florida in November , 2000 . Not only was the effort successful , because the success was not reported on Fox News , many believe it never happened . When the documentary on the subject " Unprecedented " was shown and advertised in my local newspaper , I was the only person in the city to attend . While efforts to block blacks from voting have been less overt since 2000 , one would be foolish to believe that the success in 2000 would not be followed by more efforts in this direction .
domestication: 2000年11月，佛罗里达州成功地限制了黑人选民投票。这事儿不仅成了，因为福克斯新闻没报道，很多人都以为这事根本就没发生过。后来有关这个话题的纪录片《空前之举》在当地报纸上做广告放映时，我成了全城唯一一个去看的人。虽然自2000年以来，阻止黑人投票的手段变得不那么明显了，但要是认为2000年的成功不会引发更多的类似行动，那可就太天真了。

source: I think MLB umpires are a little over the top , but it is important for refs to maintain control of the game and players . That 's why they are there . No one wants to play against an unfair advantage where some players are dirty and get away with it , so it escalates until the refs assert control .

source: I n 1977 , the physicist Freeman Dyson published the first of a series of articles about how plants affect the planet 's carbon-dioxide concentrations . Every summer , plants absorb about a tenth of the carbon dioxide in the atmosphere . In the fall , when they stop growing or shed their leaves , they release most of it back into the air . Dyson proposed creating forests of " carbon-eating trees , " engineered to suck carbon more ravenously from the air , and to keep it tied up in thick roots that would decay into topsoil , trapping the carbon . He now estimates that by annually increasing topsoil by just a tenth of an inch over land that supports vegetation , we could offset all human carbon emissions .
domestication: 1977年，物理学家弗里曼·戴森发表了一系列关于植物如何影响地球二氧化碳浓度的文章。每到夏天，植物会吸收大气中大约十分之一的二氧化碳。到了秋天，植物停止生长或落叶时，又会把大部分二氧化碳释放回空气中。戴森提议种植“吃碳树”森林，这些树经过改造，能更贪婪地从空气中吸碳，并将碳储存在粗壮的根系中，让根系腐烂成表土，从而锁住碳。他现在估计，如果每年在有植被的土地上增加不到一英寸厚的表土，就能抵消所有人类的碳排放。
foreignization: 1977年，物理学家弗里曼·戴森发表了一系列关于植物如何影响地球二氧化碳浓度的文章中的第一篇。每年夏天，植物吸收大气中约十分之一的二氧化碳。秋天，当它们停止生长或落叶时，会将大部分二氧化碳重新释放到空气中。戴森提出创建“碳食树”森林，这些树木经过工程设计，能够更贪婪地从空气中吸收碳，并将其固定在会腐烂成表土的粗根中，从而捕获碳。他现在估计，通过每年增加植被覆盖土地上的表土厚度仅十分之一英寸，我们可以抵消所有人类的碳排放。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I n 1977 , the physicist Freeman Dyson published the first of a series of articles about how plants affect the planet 's carbon-dioxide concentrations . Every summer , plants absorb about a tenth of the carbon dioxide in the atmosphere . In the fall , when they stop growing or shed their leaves , they release most of it back into the air . Dyson proposed creating forests of " carbon-eating trees , " engineered to suck carbon more ravenously from the air , and to keep it tied up in thick roots that would decay into topsoil , trapping the carbon . He now estimates that by annually increasing topsoil by just a tenth of an inch over land that supports vegetation , we could offset all human carbon emissions .

1977年，物理学家弗里曼·戴森发表了一系列关于植物如何影响地球二氧化碳浓度的文章。每到夏天，植物会吸收大气中大约十分之一的二氧化碳。到了秋天，植物停止生长或落叶时，又会把大部分二氧化碳释放回空气中。戴森提议种植“吃碳树”森林，这些树经过改造，能更贪婪地从空气中吸碳，并将碳储存在粗壮的根系中，让根系腐烂成表土，从而锁住碳。他现在估计，如果每年在有植被的土地上增加不到一英寸厚的表土，就能抵消所有人类的碳排放。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I n 1977 , the physicist Freeman Dyson published the first of a series of articles about how plants affect the planet 's carbon-dioxide concentrations . Every summer , plants absorb about a tenth of the carbon dioxide in the atmosphere . In the fall , when they stop growing or shed their leaves , they release most of it back into the air . Dyson proposed creating forests of " carbon-eating trees , " engineered to suck carbon more ravenously from the air , and to keep it tied up in thick roots that would decay into topsoil , trapping the carbon . He now estimates that by annually increasing topsoil by just a tenth of an inch over land that supports vegetation , we could offset all human carbon emissions .

1977年，物理学家弗里曼·戴森发表了一系列关于植物如何影响地球二氧化碳浓度的文章中的第一篇。每年夏天，植物吸收大气中约十分之一的二氧化碳。秋天，当它们停止生长或落叶时，会将大部分二氧化碳重新释放到空气中。戴森提出创建“碳食树”森林，这些树木经过工程设计，能够更贪婪地从空气中吸收碳，并将其固定在会腐烂成表土的粗根中，从而捕获碳。他现在估计，通过每年增加植被覆盖土地上的表土厚度仅十分之一英寸，我们可以抵消所有人类的碳排放。

source: The hot , dry weather is also harming parts of the nation 's infrastructure . Highways in Texas , nuclear power plants in Illinois , runways and subway rails in Washington and the concrete , steel and sophisticated engineering that undergird the nation 's infrastructure are being taxed to worrisome degrees by heat , drought and vicious storms .
domestication: 炎热干燥的天气也在损害国家的部分基础设施。德克萨斯州的高速公路、伊利诺伊州的核电站、华盛顿的跑道和地铁轨道，还有支撑国家基础设施的混凝土、钢铁和先进工程，都因为高温、干旱和猛烈的风暴而承受着令人担忧的压力。这可真是“火烧眉毛”了。

source: I found this the perfect book for a long weekend spent at home . This is an unashamed love story without cynicism or any attempt to be too clever . Instead , Quinn ( I am assuming no relation to Zorba the Greek ) allows us to get lost in the relationship between Connie , a dedicated Suffragette and Will , the county cricketer/First World War veteran , along with a gallery of believable characters . As always , that time period in European history provides an inexhaustible backdrop for any story .
domestication: 我发现这本书是周末宅家的完美选择。这是一段坦率的爱情故事，没有半点世故和装腔作势。奎因（我猜他和希腊的佐巴没关系）让我们沉浸在康妮和威尔的关系中，康妮是个热心的女权运动者，威尔则是一位县板球队员兼一战老兵，还有其他一群真实可信的角色。就像往常一样，那个时期的欧洲历史为任何故事提供了说不完的背景。
foreignization: 我发现这是一本适合在家度过长周末的完美书籍。这是一个毫不掩饰的爱情故事，没有一丝的愤世嫉俗或试图过于聪明。相反，奎因（我假设与希腊的佐巴无关）让我们沉浸在康妮和威尔的关系中，康妮是一位敬业的妇女参政论者，而威尔则是一位县板球运动员/第一次世界大战退伍军人，还有其他一系列可信的角色。正如往常一样，那一段欧洲历史为任何故事提供了无穷无尽的背景。

source: My son wears an EZ-on vest . It slips over his arms and zippers up the back . You have to attach straps on your car that come with it . 2 straps come over top of seat and attach to vest , and 2 straps come between seats to attach at his waist . This has worked great for him and he likes wearing it .
domestication: 我儿子穿了一件EZ-on背心，这背心往胳膊上一套，再从后面一拉链就搞定了。还配了两条带子，得在车里装上。两条带子从座椅上方绕过，固定在背心上；另外两条带子从座椅中间穿过，绑在他腰上。这东西对他来说挺管用的，他也喜欢穿。
