source: I n Austin , where Perry has emerged as the longest-serving -- and probably the most powerful -- governor in Texas history , everyone has a different theory about why he has fared so poorly in the early rounds of the presidential campaign . His team , most of whom have been at Perry 's side for a decade or more , is considered very tight , very skillful , and very controlling ; they do n't leak , and , in Texas elections at least , they do n't make many mistakes . Their zeal for control , however , means that Perry has given fewer press interviews over the years than many governors . He has thus never been forced to develop the conversational polish that televised debates and interviews demand .
domestication: 在奥斯汀，佩里成为了得克萨斯州历史上任职时间最长、可能是最有权势的州长，但关于他为何在总统竞选的早期阶段表现不佳，每个人都有不同的看法。他的团队大多数人都追随佩里十多年了，被认为非常团结、非常有技巧、掌控力极强；他们从不泄露内部信息，在得克萨斯的选举中几乎不出差错。然而，这种对控制的热衷也意味着佩里这些年接受的媒体采访比许多其他州长要少得多。因此，他从未被迫培养出电视辩论和采访时所需的流畅对话能力。
foreignization: 在奥斯汀，佩里已成为德克萨斯州历史上任职时间最长——也许也是最有权势的——州长，每个人对他在总统竞选初期表现不佳的原因都有不同的看法。他的团队成员大多已跟随佩里十年有余，被认为非常紧密、非常熟练且极具控制力；他们不会泄露信息，并且至少在德克萨斯的选举中很少犯错。然而，他们对控制的热衷意味着佩里在过去几年中接受的新闻采访比许多州长都要少。因此，他从未被迫培养出电视辩论和采访所需的谈话技巧。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I n Austin , where Perry has emerged as the longest-serving -- and probably the most powerful -- governor in Texas history , everyone has a different theory about why he has fared so poorly in the early rounds of the presidential campaign . His team , most of whom have been at Perry 's side for a decade or more , is considered very tight , very skillful , and very controlling ; they do n't leak , and , in Texas elections at least , they do n't make many mistakes . Their zeal for control , however , means that Perry has given fewer press interviews over the years than many governors . He has thus never been forced to develop the conversational polish that televised debates and interviews demand .

source: When did Europe pull ahead of Asia in terms of living standards ? A number of well-known scholars compare economic and demographic indicators of well-being in the pre-industrial period . The emerging picture is not one of great differences , but of considerable similarities in standard of living between Europe and Asia before the Industrial Revolution .  Editorial Reviews  Review
domestication: 欧洲的生活水平是什么时候超过亚洲的呢？不少知名学者在研究前工业时期经济和人口指标时，发现了一个有趣的现象：在工业革命之前，欧洲和亚洲的生活水平并没有太大的差异，而是存在着相当多的相似之处。编辑评论如是说。
foreignization: 欧洲在生活标准上是什么时候超越亚洲的？一些知名学者比较了前工业时期经济和人口福祉指标。出现的画面不是巨大的差异，而是工业革命前欧洲和亚洲生活水平的相当大的相似性。编辑评论 评论

When did Europe pull ahead of Asia in terms of living standards ? A number of well-known scholars compare economic and demographic indicators of well-being in the pre-industrial period . The emerging picture is not one of great differences , but of considerable similarities in standard of living between Europe and Asia before the Industrial Revolution .  Editorial Reviews  Review
欧洲的生活水平是什么时候超过亚洲的呢？不少知名学者在研究前工业时期经济和人口指标时，发现了一个有趣的现象：在工业革命之前，欧洲和亚洲的生活水平并没有太大的差异，而是存在着相当多的相似之处。编辑评论如是说。

source: Download speeds will also be slower , since you 'll usually only be downloading the torrent from one person instead of many -- that means your download speed is pretty much limited to your friend 's upload speed . source: I was just aiming at the jagged hole Torn in the yellow sandbags of their trench , When something threw me sideways with a wrench , And the skies seemed to shrivel like a scroll And disappear . . . and propped against the bole Of a big elm I lay , and watched the clouds Float through the blue , deep sky in speckless crowds , And I was clean again , and young , and whole .
domestication: 我正瞄准他们堑壕里那些破旧的黄沙袋上不规则的洞口，突然间一股力量将我甩到了一边，天好像卷起的画轴一样消失了……后来，我发现自己倚在一棵大榆树的树干旁躺着，看着云朵一群群地飘过湛蓝的天空，那时我感到自己又干净了，年轻了，完好无损。
foreignization: 我正对着他们战壕的黄色沙袋上 那个参差不齐的洞口瞄准， 突然有东西猛地将我甩到一边， 天空似乎像卷轴一样收缩 并消失了……我倚靠在 一棵大榆树的树干上躺着，看着云朵 在清澈的蓝天中成群飘过， 我又变得干净了，年轻了，完整了。

source: This book was/is an education for me . Visceral , haunting , provoking , gripping -- the stories Tim O'Brien tells rip into you . He puts you on the front line facing the man you just killed -- on the Canadian border deciding that you are n't brave enough to escape to Canada to avoid the draft -- back in Vietnam watching your best buddy slowly sink into a field of mud as sniper fire rains all around you -- back at home with no sense of purpose surrounded by people who do n't know how to welcome you home .
domestication: 这本书让我深受教育。生动、揪心、引人深思、让人手不释卷——蒂姆·奥布赖恩的故事直击心灵。他让你亲临前线，面对刚刚被你杀死的人；站在加拿大边境，发现自己没有勇气逃到加拿大以逃避征兵；回到越南，看着最好的兄弟慢慢沉入泥潭，四周是狙击手的枪林弹雨；回到家后，没有目标，周围的人不知如何欢迎你归来。
foreignization: 这本书对我而言是一种教育。生动、萦绕不去、引人深思、扣人心弦——蒂姆·奥布赖恩讲述的故事直击心灵。他让你置身前线，面对你刚刚杀死的人——站在加拿大边境，决定自己不够勇敢，无法逃到加拿大以避免征兵——回到越南，看着你最好的朋友在狙击手的子弹如雨点般落下时，慢慢沉入泥潭——回到家中，没有目标感，周围是不知道如何欢迎你回家的人。

source: Goofy 's catch phrases are " gawrsh ! " ( which is his usual exclamation of surprise ) , along with " ah-hyuck ! " ( a distinctive chuckle ) , and especially the Goofy holler ( see below ) . In his 1930s cartoon appearances , Goofy commonly wore a black vest , blue pants , a turtleneck shirt ( colored either red or orange ) , white gloves , extra-long brown shoes , and a very distinctive hat ( either blue or green ) . This has been the character 's iconic look ever since , even though it was seldom featured in cartoons after the 1930s .
domestication: 高飞的口头禅有“哎呀！”（他常常用这个来表示惊讶），还有“呵-呵！”（一种独特的笑声），特别是他的标志性尖叫（见下文）。在20世纪30年代的动画片里，高飞经常穿着一件黑色背心，蓝色裤子，套头衫（有时候是红色，有时候是橙色），白色手套，超长的棕色鞋子，还有一顶非常特别的帽子（要么是蓝色，要么是绿色）。这套装扮自那时起就成了高飞的经典形象，即使在30年代之后的动画中很少出现，也依然让人记忆犹新。
foreignization: 古菲的口头禅是“gawrsh！”（这是他通常表示惊讶的感叹词），还有“ah-hyuck！”（一种独特的咯咯笑），尤其是古菲大叫（见下文）。在20世纪30年代的卡通片中，古菲通常穿着黑色背心，蓝色裤子，高领衫（颜色为红色或橙色），白色手套，超长的棕色鞋子，以及一顶非常有特色的帽子（蓝色或绿色）。这自从那时起就成了这个角色的标志性形象，尽管这种造型在20世纪30年代之后的卡通中很少出现。

source: HDMI output . Really this is a Pro and a Con . The iPad does allow for HD output over HDMI but again it requires an adapter . source: Iran ' s nuclear program is one of the most polarizing issues in one of the world 's most volatile regions . While American and European officials believe Tehran is planning to build nuclear weapons , Iran 's leadership says that its goal in developing a nuclear program is to generate electricity without dipping into the oil supply it prefers to sell abroad , and to provide fuel for medical reactors .

source: My mom and dad were true partners , a life lesson that shaped me by everyday example . When my mom ran for the Senate , my dad was there for her every step of the way . I can still hear her saying in her beautiful voice , " Why should women have any less say than men , about the great decisions facing our nation ? "
domestication: 我爸妈是真正的搭档，他们每天的相处给我上了一课，影响了我。当年我妈竞选参议员，我爸一直陪在她身边，每一步都支持着她。我至今还记得她那动听的声音，常说：“女人为什么不能和男人一样，对国家大事有发言权呢？”

source: She describes the Gunn environment then as competitive , judgmental and " hostile to learning . " Her parents , she said , pushed her but were not as demanding as other parents . She felt the added pressure , though , of other students ' parents being " transferred " through her peers onto her . The high anxiety among peers at school , and on Facebook , was contagious .
domestication: 她形容当时的冈恩环境竞争激烈、充满评判，而且“对学习不利”。她说，她的父母虽然对她要求颇高，但比起其他家长还是要宽松一些。不过，她感受到了来自同学的压力，这些压力像是被他们父母“传染”过来的一样。学校里和脸书上的紧张气氛，也像传染病一样蔓延开来。

source: **29;2361;TOOLONG . SEC. 22 . A secretary of state , an auditor of state and a treasurer of state shall be elected by the qualified electors at the same time that the governor is elected and for a four-year term commencing on the first day of January next after their election , and they shall perform such duties as may be provided by law . Repealed and rewritten 1972 , Amendment 32

source: I live in the house that my great-grandparents built . It 's like living in a time-warp . Our bathroom is pink with blue trim , blue tub , sink , and toilet . And blue floor . I have always wanted to change it , but never had the money . We did have to replace the sink and toilet , but still have the tub . Who knew there was such a resurgence in the retro house . Maybe I will just re-grout the tile and learn to love it . I also have knotty pine walls , and kitchen cabinets that will never be changed .
domestication: 我住的房子是我高祖父建的，就像穿越了时光隧道一样。我们的浴室是粉红色的，有蓝色的边框，浴缸、洗手池和马桶也都是蓝色的，连地板也是蓝色的。我一直想改造它，但就是没钱。我们不得不换了洗手池和马桶，但还是保留了浴缸。没想到复古风又流行起来了，也许我就重新勾缝瓷砖，学着去喜欢它吧。我家还有松木墙板，厨房的橱柜也永远不会再换了。
foreignization: 我住在我的曾祖父母建的房子里。这就像生活在时光倒流中。我们的浴室是粉红色的，有蓝色的装饰，蓝色的浴缸、洗脸池和马桶。还有蓝色的地板。我一直想改变它，但从未有足够的钱。我们确实不得不更换了洗脸池和马桶，但仍然保留着浴缸。谁会想到复古风格的房子会有这样的复兴。也许我只需要重新勾缝瓷砖，学会去爱它。我还有一面松木墙，以及永远不会被更换的厨房橱柜。

Maybe I will just re-grout the tile and learn to love it . I also have knotty pine walls , and kitchen cabinets that will never be changed .

source: Good discussion here . I 'm curious as to how Japan 's social programs are " great . " The country has limited national health insurance , unemployment benefits , old-age care , etc. but Japan 's welfare state is thin compared to what exists in Western European nations . In fact for decades , Japanese companies providing lifetime employment and other benefits effectively substituted for the government in offering social welfare provisions . Only when compared to the USA does Japan 's welfare state look extensive .
domestication: 这里讨论得挺热闹的。我对日本的社会福利项目被称作“很棒”感到好奇。日本的国民健康保险、失业救济、老人照护等福利确实存在，但比起西欧国家，日本的福利体系还是显得单薄。事实上，几十年来，日本企业提供的终身雇佣和其他福利在很大程度上替代了政府的社会保障作用。只有和美国相比，日本的福利制度才显得相对全面一些。
foreignization: 好的讨论。我很好奇日本的社会福利项目是如何“很棒”的。该国的国民健康保险、失业救济、老年护理等有限，但与西欧国家相比，日本的福利国家体系较为薄弱。事实上，数十年来，日本公司提供的终身雇佣和其他福利在很大程度上替代了政府在社会福利方面的角色。只有与美国相比，日本的福利国家体系才显得较为完善。

source: " Tragedy seems to bring out all varieties of unexpected qualities in people . It was as if some folks got dunked in plastic , vacuum-sealed like backpacking dinners , and could do nothing but sweat in their private hell . And others seemed to have just the opposite problem , as if disaster had dipped them in acid instead , stripping off the outside layer of skin that once protected them from the slings and arrows of other people 's outrageous fortunes . For these sorts , just walking down the street in the wake of every stranger 's ill wind became an agony , an aching slog through this man 's fresh divorce and this woman 's throat cancer . They were in hell , too , but it was everybody 's hell , this sloshing sea of toxic waste . " ? Lionel Shriver , We Need to Talk About Kevin
domestication: 悲剧似乎能激发人们身上各种意想不到的品质。有些人好像被泡在了塑料里，真空密封得像背包客的晚餐，只能在自己的小地狱里大汗淋漓。而另一些人却恰恰相反，仿佛灾难用酸液浸泡了他们，剥去了曾经保护他们免受他人飞来横祸伤害的外层皮肤。对这些人来说，在灾后的大街上走一圈，就成了煎熬，一步一痛地穿过这个男人的新婚变故和那个女人的喉癌。他们也身在地狱，但这地狱却是众人的地狱，一片波涛汹涌的毒海。
foreignization: 悲剧似乎能激发出人们各种意想不到的品质。有些人仿佛被浸入了塑料，像背包客的晚餐一样真空密封起来，除了在自己的私人地狱里流汗之外什么也做不了。而另一些人则似乎恰好相反，好像灾难将他们浸入了酸液中，剥去了曾经保护他们免受他人命运无常之苦的外层皮肤。对于这些人来说，在灾后，仅仅是在街上走动，面对每一个陌生人的不幸之风便成了一种折磨，一种痛苦的跋涉，穿过这个男人的新近离婚和那个女人的喉癌。他们也在地狱中，但那是众人的地狱，一片有毒废物的海洋。? 利昂诺·沙弗，我们需要谈谈凯文

source: At the end of this year , America 's military operation in Iraq will be over . We will have a normal relationship with a sovereign nation that is a member of the community of nations . That equal partnership will be strengthened by our support for Iraq -- for its government and for its security forces , for its people and for their aspirations .
domestication: 今年年底，美国在伊拉克的军事行动就要结束了。我们将与这个主权国家建立正常的外交关系，它也是国际大家庭的一员。我们会支持伊拉克政府和安全部队，支持伊拉克人民及其美好愿望，以此来巩固我们之间的平等伙伴关系。
foreignization: 在今年年底，美国在伊拉克的军事行动将结束。我们将与一个主权国家建立正常关系，这个国家是国际社会的成员。这种平等伙伴关系将通过我们对伊拉克的支持而加强——支持其政府和安全部队，支持其人民及其愿望。

source: Right now , the best way to control blood glucose levels is by eating well , being physically active and taking any medications and/or insulin as prescribed by your doctor . Space the carbohydrates you eat throughout the day and pay attention to portion sizes . If you are overweight , losing about 10-15 pounds can make it easier to manage your blood glucose .
domestication: 目前，控制血糖最好的方法就是好好吃饭、多动动，还有按照医生的建议吃药或打胰岛素。一天中分散吃含碳水化合物的食物，注意食物分量。如果你超重的话，减个10到15磅，对控制血糖大有帮助。
foreignization: 目前，控制血糖水平的最佳方法是吃得健康、进行身体活动以及按照医生的处方服用任何药物和/或胰岛素。将你吃的碳水化合物分散到一天中，并注意食物的分量。如果你超重，减轻大约10-15磅可以使管理你的血糖变得更轻松。

source: This report is based on an extensive review of documents of the Central Intelligence Agency , the Department of State and Defense , and the National Security Council ; and on testimony by officials and former officials . With few exceptions , names of Chileans and of Chilean institutions have been omitted in order to avoid revealing intelligence sources and methods and to limit needless harm to individual Chileans who cooperated with the Central Intelligence Agency . The report does , however , convey an accurate picture of the scope , purposes and magnitude of United States covert action in Chile .
domestication: 这份报告基于对中央情报局、国务院和国防部以及国家安全委员会大量文件的广泛审查，还有现任和前任官员的证词。除了少数例外，为了不泄露情报来源和方法，也为了避免无谓地伤害与中情局合作的智利人，报告中省略了智利人的姓名和智利机构的名称。不过，报告还是准确反映了美国在智利的秘密行动的范围、目的和规模。
foreignization: 本报告基于对中央情报局、国务院和国防部以及国家安全委员会文件的广泛审查；以及现任和前任官员的证词。除少数例外，为了避免透露情报来源和方法并限制对与中央情报局合作的智利个人造成不必要的伤害，智利人和智利机构的名称已被省略。然而，该报告确实传达了美国在智利秘密行动的范围、目的和规模的准确画面。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

This report is based on an extensive review of documents of the Central Intelligence Agency , the Department of State and Defense , and the National Security Council ; and on testimony by officials and former officials . With few exceptions , names of Chileans and of Chilean institutions have been omitted in order to avoid revealing intelligence sources and methods and to limit needless harm to individual Chileans who cooperated with the Central Intelligence Agency . The report does , however , convey an accurate picture of the scope , purposes and magnitude of United States covert action in Chile .

source: Today , I tell my clients that I 'm a Product Experience Designer. nBut what we do is closely related to many other words. nClients find this confusing . This schizophrenia does not instil confidence in what we do. nA pretty poor start for the guardians of simplicity. nBut even if titles are come and go , we 've got beautifully visualised process diagram to wow clients and explain what we do , right ? nnn
domestication: 今天，我跟客户说我是产品体验设计师。但这行当和许多其他头衔紧密相关，搞得客户一头雾水。这可真让人对我们的专业性打了个大大的问号。我们可是简约的守护者啊，这开场白也太不给力了吧。不过，就算头衔换来换去，我们总还有精美的流程图来吸引客户，解释我们的工作，对吧？

source: I love pink bathrooms , especially the ones that are pink and black.I cringe when I see them tearing apart old bathrooms on t.v .... Our house was built in 1937 but was " renovated " around 1989 so they have stolen all the charm the house undoubtedly was built with and replaced it with fake marble black stick down tiles , and popcorn ceilings bleh . source: This is not to say that it is inherently wrong to evaluate or even judge others within certain limits . Scripture teaches that we should observe and evaluate others ' behavior so that we can respond and minister to them in appropriate ways , which may even involve loving confrontation ( see Matthew 7:1-5 ; 18:15 ; Galatians 6:1 ) .

source: Interesting article , but I think you 're being overly dismissive of the insiders/formatters . Because the likelihood of casual users making significant contributions is determined not only by how easy it is for casual readers to contribute , but also by how many such readers there are to begin with . And the size of that pool of readers depends to a great extent on how readable , reliable and accessible the information presented is . So a change that imposes a minor impediment to casual edits can still result in a net increase in casual editors if it also helps the " insiders and formatters " improve Wikipedia 's usability , and increase its readership .
domestication: 文章有趣，不过我觉得你对内部人士和格式编辑者有点太苛刻了。毕竟，普通用户能否做出重大贡献，不仅取决于他们贡献的难易程度，还取决于潜在贡献者的数量。而这些潜在贡献者的数量，很大程度上又取决于信息的可读性、可靠性和获取的便捷性。所以，即使对随意编辑设置了一点障碍，只要这能帮助“内部人士和格式编辑者”提升维基百科的用户体验，扩大读者群，最终还是可能增加更多的随意编辑者。
foreignization: 有趣的文章，但我觉得你对内部人士/格式化人员的看法过于轻率。因为普通用户做出重要贡献的可能性不仅取决于普通读者贡献的难易程度，还取决于从一开始就存在多少这样的读者。而这个读者群体的规模在很大程度上取决于所呈现信息的可读性、可靠性和可访问性。因此，即使对随意编辑施加轻微障碍的变化，如果它也有助于“内部人士和格式化人员”提高维基百科的可用性并增加其读者群，仍然可能导致随意编辑者的净增加。

source: The Chicago Bears and the Houston Texans each came into Sunday night as a 7-1 team built on defense . They played a defensive game in defensive conditions , and over four sloppy , soggy and hard-hitting quarters , the Bears lost their quarterback , Jay Cutler , and the Texans ' Arian Foster proved why he may be the N.F.L. 's best running back as Houston emerged with a 13-6 win .
domestication: 芝加哥熊队和休斯顿德州人队在周日晚上都是带着7胜1负的战绩，两队都以防守见长。比赛那天天气也不给力，场地湿滑，双方在泥泞中激烈拼抢，整个比赛过程堪称肉搏战。熊队的四分卫杰伊·卡特勒还受了伤，中途退场。而德州人的跑卫阿瑞安·福斯特则用实际行动证明了自己可能是全美橄榄球联盟的最佳跑卫。最终，德州人队以13比6战胜了熊队。

source: A. Peer review of datasets as part of the peer review of articles 1 . In my field , many journals request that one make a replication dataset available . 2 . In my field , the peer reviewer normally has access to the underlying dataset for a publication and that dataset is taken into account when assessing the publication . 3 . In my field , it is feasible for a peer reviewer to simultaneously assess the publication and the underlying dataset. 4 . I think it is important that the underlying dataset be assessed along with the publication during the peer review process .
domestication:
A. 数据集同行评审作为论文同行评审的一部分

1. 在我们领域，很多期刊要求提供一个可重复使用的数据集。
2. 在我们领域，同行评审者通常可以接触到论文背后的数据集，并且在评估论文时会考虑这个数据集。
3. 在我们领域，同行评审者同时评估论文和数据集是可行的。
4. 我认为，在同行评审过程中，评估论文的同时也评估其背后的数据集是非常重要的。

In my field , it is feasible for a peer reviewer to simultaneously assess the publication and the underlying dataset. 4 . I think it is important that the underlying dataset be assessed along with the publication during the peer review process .

source: Enacting religious beliefs into law has been a disaster down through history . source: Good points . Chauvinism does seem to be a bad trait of many cultures , as I think you might be suggesting . I do notice that my enjoyment level is quite different with a great sushi chef , and I have yet to experience one who is not Japanese . But your experience may be different . I had some wonderfully crafted sushi by a Korean sushi chef . It just was n't the same somehow . I did n't know he was Korean when I went into the restaurant . But after eating some of the sushi , it did n't feel as good . But as you may be pointing out , it was n't a " bad " experience . It just was n't optimal for me .
domestication: 说得对。大男子主义确实是很多文化中的一个坏毛病，正如你可能在暗示的那样。我发现，一个好的寿司师傅确实能大大提升我的享受感，而我还没遇到过不是日本人的寿司师傅。不过，你的经历可能不一样。我曾经在一个韩国寿司师傅那里吃过寿司，做得也相当不错。只是感觉不太一样。去那家餐厅的时候，我并不知道他是韩国人。但吃了几口后，总觉得味道差点意思。不过，正如你可能想说的，那并不是“糟糕”的体验，只是对我而言不算最佳罢了。
foreignization: 好的方面。沙文主义似乎是许多文化的不良特质，正如你可能在暗示的那样。我确实注意到，有一位出色的寿司厨师时，我的享受程度会有所不同，而我至今尚未遇到过不是日本人的优秀寿司厨师。但你的经历可能不同。我曾经尝过一位韩国寿司厨师制作的非常精美的寿司。不知为何，感觉就是不一样。我去那家餐厅时并不知道他是韩国人。但在吃了些寿司之后，感觉不太好。但正如你可能指出的那样，那并不是“糟糕”的体验。只是对我而言，并不是最理想的。

source: When my parents were shopping for the house they raised me in , the only reason my mother agree to the house we live in was because of the pink bathroom in the basement with a matching flamingo mirror . Now it is the last room in the house to be renovated , and I promise to make sure it is restored to its brightest and best pink , so that some day a new family can look into the flamingo mirror and think , " I love my house ! "
domestication: 我爸妈买下养我长大的这房子时，我妈同意买这套房，全是因为地下室那间粉红色的浴室，还有那面配套的火烈鸟镜子。现在，这可是家里最后一个等着翻新的房间了。我发誓，一定要把它恢复到最鲜艳、最美的粉色，这样总有一天，新的房主在照着火烈鸟镜子时，也会说：“我爱我的家！”

source: I remind students and those that email me that while these so called " Wizards " have been tested in laboratory settings , police work is not so neat and clean . Over 95% of all police interviews are done on the street : car stops , in doorways ( domestic situations ) , in the presence of others , in noisy dangerous environments under limited or poor lighting conditions . That is much different than in a quiet laboratory without distractions where you can concentrate fully .
domestication: 我常提醒学生和给我发邮件的人，这些所谓的“大师”虽然在实验室里测试过，但警察的工作可不像实验室那么干净利索。超过95%的警察询问都是在街头进行的：停车检查、家门口（家暴情况）、当着别人的面、在嘈杂危险的环境中，还经常光线不足或光线条件差。这跟安静的实验室可大不相同，实验室里没有干扰，可以全神贯注。
foreignization: 我提醒学生和那些给我发邮件的人，虽然这些所谓的“巫师”在实验室环境中已经进行了测试，但警务工作并不那么整洁和干净。超过95%的警察访谈是在街上进行的：汽车停车检查、在门廊（家庭纠纷）、他人在场的情况下、在嘈杂危险的环境中以及在有限或光线不佳的条件下进行的。这与在一个没有干扰的安静实验室中可以完全集中注意力的情况大不相同。

That is much different than in a quiet laboratory without distractions where you can concentrate fully .

source: As we know , government is beholden to the corporations , primarily those of finance , insurance and war . It 's been that way since the railroads won in the Santa Clara decision around 1880 . Ronnie was a great spokesperson for the Fortune 500 but was n't exactly the savior of the American people that the press would have you believe . Look closer before blindly accepting what you 're told .
domestication: 大家都知道，政府被大企业牵着鼻子走，尤其是那些金融、保险和军工企业。这种情况从1880年左右的圣塔克拉拉案之后就开始了。里根是《财富》500强企业的绝佳代言人，但要说他是美国人民的救世主，那媒体可真是吹过头了。别急着相信别人告诉你的，还是自己多看看、多想想。
foreignization: 正如我们所知，政府受制于企业，主要是金融、保险和战争领域的企业。自从1880年左右的圣克拉拉决定铁路胜诉以来，情况一直如此。罗尼是《财富》500强企业的优秀代言人，但并不是媒体让你相信的美国人民的救世主。在盲目接受你被告知的信息之前，请仔细审视。

source: Registered voters go to their assigned polling place where there will be three or more poll workers at a table checking voters in . Voters will be asked for their name and the residence address they are living at . In primary elections voters will also be asked to name their party . Upon verifying the information , the election workers will provide the voter with ballots assigned to persons living in their district and instructions on how to cast a ballot .
domestication: 登记选民前往指定的投票站，那里会有三名或更多的工作人员在桌前核对选民信息。工作人员会问选民的名字和目前居住的地址。在初选时，还会问选民所属的政党。信息核对无误后，选举工作人员会给选民发放所在选区的选票，并告知如何投票。
foreignization: 注册选民前往他们指定的投票站，在那里将有三名或更多的选举工作人员在桌子旁检查选民的身份。选民将被要求提供他们的姓名和目前居住的住址。在初选中，选民还将被要求说出他们的党派。在核实信息后，选举工作人员将向选民提供分配给居住在他们选区的人的选票，并告知如何投票的指示。

source: In his ' History of Plymouth Plantation , ' the governor of the colony , William Bradford , reported that the colonists went hungry for years , because they refused to work in the fields . They preferred instead to steal food . He says the colony was riddled with " corruption , " and with " confusion and discontent . " The crops were small because " much was stolen both by night and day , before it became scarce eatable . "
domestication: 在《普利茅斯殖民地史》中，殖民地总督威廉·布拉德福德记载，殖民者们多年挨饿，因为他们不愿意去田里干活，反而更喜欢偷东西。他说，整个殖民地充满了“腐败”，到处是“混乱和不满”。庄稼收成少，因为“白天晚上都有人偷，还没等到能吃的时候就差不多被偷光了。”
foreignization: 在《普利茅斯殖民地历史》中，殖民地总督威廉·布拉德福德报告说，殖民者多年来一直挨饿，因为他们拒绝在田里工作。他们更愿意偷食物。他说殖民地充满了“腐败”，以及“混乱和不满”。庄稼很少，因为“无论白天黑夜，都大量被盗，在变得勉强可食之前就已被偷走。”

source: Harris said on a perfect day , kicking it out of bounds with good distance is easier , but he could n't guarantee boots longer than 25 yards when factoring in the typically unpredictable swirling winds in Solider Field . source: My mouth fell open when Hume made his statement that the speech was OK but not great . I think he has been around too long and has become jaded to any speech by anyone . The entire Fox panel was a little jaded in my opinion and they do not seem to have the perspective of an out of the beltway voter . They all seemed to be trying to tone it down so that they did not appear to be cheerleaders for Romney/Ryan . I can not figure out why the would feel that way since every other media hack is so in the tank for Obama that it is not even in dispute . There were so many good/great speeches that it is hard to remember them all .
domestication: 当休谟说演讲还行但不算出色时，我张大了嘴。我觉得他待得时间太长了，对任何人的演讲都麻木了。在我看来，整个福克斯小组都有些麻木，他们好像没有带一个圈外选民的视角。他们都似乎在努力压低调门，不想显得像是罗姆尼/瑞安的啦啦队。我实在想不通他们为什么会有这种想法，毕竟其他媒体人对奥巴马的支持都明目张胆，根本没什么争议。这场面里有太多好的甚至伟大的演讲了，让人很难一一记住。

source: The Genii in Stargate Atlantis have uniforms that bear a fair resemblance to some German uniforms from World War One . A downplayed version occurs in a season two episode that features a society which deports its prisoners to the vicinity of the planet 's Stargate so the Wraith will feed only on them , where the Magistrate 's uniform bears some fascistic overtones .
domestication: 《星际之门：大西洋》里的基因人穿的制服和一战时期的德军制服挺像的。到了第二季有一集，讲的是一个社会把犯人流放到星球上的星门附近，让瓦raith只吃这些犯人。那个行政长官穿的衣服还有点法西斯的味道。
foreignization: 《星际之门：亚特兰蒂斯》中的基因人在穿着上与第一次世界大战期间的某些德军制服有相当的相似之处。在第二季的一集中，这种情况有所减弱，该集描述了一个社会将囚犯驱逐到行星星门附近，以便吸血鬼只以他们为食，其中治安官的制服带有一些法西斯主义的色彩。

《星际之门：亚特兰蒂斯》中的基因人在穿着上与第一次世界大战期间的某些德军制服有相当的相似之处。在第二季的一集中，这种情况有所减弱，该集描述了一个社会将囚犯驱逐到行星星门附近，以便吸血鬼只以他们为食，其中治安官的制服带有一些法西斯主义的色彩。

source: But every single impartial observer of that instant replay--the one that showed Lehman with two hands on the ball , reaching out over the goal line--could tell that the ball crossed the plane . Sean McDonough and Chris Spielman did n't even pretend , as so many announcers tend to do , that it was a call that could have gone either way . They did n't hedge with their consternation . The legion of football writers across the country echoed in agreement . Even all but the most defiant of Nebraska partisans , I 'm sure , ca n't deny that Lehman scored Penn State a go-ahead touchdown before losing the ball .
domestication: 但是，每一个看到重播镜头的公正观众都能看出——那个显示莱曼双手抱球，伸过球门线的镜头——球确实已经越过了界线。肖恩·麦克唐纳和克里斯·斯皮尔曼甚至都没有像其他解说员那样假装说这球可以有两种判罚。他们没有含糊其辞地表示困惑。全国各地的橄榄球记者们也纷纷表示赞同。我想，即使是内布拉斯加最固执的支持者，也不得不承认，莱曼在掉球之前确实为宾夕法尼亚州立大学攻入了一个反超比分的达阵。

source: In the Cathedral of Cuzco , built by the Spanish on the very spot where Incan rulers constructed the great plaza they considered the center of the universe , hangs Marcos Zapata 's 1753 painting of Jesus and his disciples at the Last Supper . The painting is similar to European depictions of the event , except here the disciples feast on guinea pig and Inca chichi beer , foods reserved for special celebrations in the Andes .
domestication: 在库斯科大教堂里，西班牙人在印加统治者认为是宇宙中心的大广场原址上建起了这座教堂。这里悬挂着马科斯·扎帕塔1753年的画作《最后的晚餐》，画中耶稣和他的门徒围坐一桌。这幅画和欧洲的描绘相似，只是这里的门徒们享用的是安第斯山脉特供节日的食物——豚鼠和印加奇奇酒。

source: As with articles , access to research data may be affected by copyright considerations . A dataset , for example a body of texts , may be made up of subordinate collections that are subject to different copyright rules . In these cases an Open Access system with standard provisions such as the Creative Commons licences would provide an effective solution .
domestication: 就像文章一样，科研数据的获取也可能受到版权的影响。比如，一个数据集可能由多个子集合构成，而这些子集合又各自受不同的版权规则约束。在这种情况下，采用开放访问系统，比如使用创意共享许可这样的标准条款，就能提供一个有效的解决办法。

source: Guilt had eroded his very being , and when he 'd seen Harry lope through Heathrow , Louis had felt his breath catch within his throat . The younger boy had halted the minute he 'd spied Louis : his expression had been so innocent ; so open , and yet Louis ' thoughts had been trained single-mindedly on the fact that he was the reason Harry had cracked . Harry never cracked . Harry never broke . Harry was the foundations upon which he still managed to stand , and yet Harry had crumbled right in front of him , when Louis , himself , was still standing .
domestication: 内疚侵蚀了他的心，当他看到哈利大步穿过希思罗机场时，路易斯感觉喉咙像被什么东西卡住了。那个小家伙一看到他就停了下来：那表情天真无邪，坦诚开放，但路易斯满脑子想的都是他才是哈利崩溃的原因。哈利从不崩溃，哈利从不倒下。哈利是他还能站得住脚的根基，可哈利却在他面前分崩离析，而他自己却还站在那里。
foreignization: 内疚侵蚀了他的整个存在，当他看到哈利穿过希思罗机场时，路易斯感到自己的呼吸在喉咙里停滞了。那个年纪较小的男孩一看到路易斯就停了下来：他的表情如此无辜；如此坦率，而路易斯的想法却坚定不移地集中在他是哈利崩溃的原因这一事实上。哈利从不会崩溃。哈利从不会崩溃。哈利是他仍然能够站立的基础，然而哈利就在他面前瓦解了，而路易斯自己却还站着。

source: Just barely averted in Animal House . The Omegas ( the " evil " fraternity ) are basically styled as " East Coast preppy snobs , " but the filmmakers decided to go the extra mile to make them truly despicable by giving them unnecessarily militaristic rituals to practice ( " Sergeant " Niedermeyer 's drills on horseback come to mind ) , along with some casual racism and religious intolerance . The head of the costuming department later admitted that she would have dressed the Omega characters in Nazi uniforms if she had thought she could get away with it .
domestication: 《动物屋》里好不容易才躲过一劫。欧米伽兄弟会（“邪恶”的兄弟会）基本上被刻画成“东海岸的预备校风势利眼”，但电影制作人还不嫌事儿大，给他们加上了过分军事化的仪式，比如尼德迈尔“中士”骑马操练那一幕，还有随口就来的种族歧视和宗教偏见。服装部门的负责人后来承认，如果她觉得能蒙混过关的话，本来打算给欧米伽兄弟会穿上纳粹的制服。
foreignization: 刚刚在《动物屋》中得以避免。欧米伽兄弟会（“邪恶”的兄弟会）基本上被塑造成“东海岸预备校风的势利眼”，但电影制作人决定更进一步，通过给他们一些不必要的军事仪式来使他们真正令人厌恶（比如尼德迈尔“中士”骑马进行的操练），以及一些随意的种族主义和宗教不容忍。服装部门的负责人后来承认，如果她认为自己能够逃脱惩罚的话，她会给欧米伽角色穿上纳粹制服。

source: The DVD-ROM included with the book is what really makes the " Complete Cartoons " complete . Compatible with most home computers and easily browsable , the disk contains a mind-boggling 70,363 cartoons , indexed in a variety of ways . Perhaps you 'd like to find all the cartoons by your favorite artist . Or maybe you 'd like to look up the cartoons that ran the week you were born , or all of the cartoons on a particular subject . Of course , you can always begin at the beginning , February 21 , 1925 , and experience the unprecedented pleasure of reading through every single cartoon ever published in The New Yorker .
domestication: 这本书附带的DVD-ROM才是真正让《完整漫画集》名副其实的东西。这张碟片与大多数家用电脑兼容，操作起来也相当方便，里面收录了令人惊叹的70363幅漫画，索引方式多种多样。你想找自己最喜欢的画家的所有作品吗？或者想看看自己出生那周发表的漫画？又或者是关于某个特定主题的所有漫画？当然，你也可以从头开始，从1925年2月21日的第一幅漫画看起，体验在《纽约客》上刊登过的每一幅漫画带来的无与伦比的乐趣。
foreignization: 随书附带的DVD-ROM才是真正使“Complete Cartoons”完整的东西。与大多数家用电脑兼容且易于浏览，该光盘包含令人难以置信的70,363幅漫画，以多种方式索引。也许你想找到你最喜欢的艺术家的所有漫画。或者你可能想查阅你在某一周出生时发表的漫画，或者关于某个特定主题的所有漫画。当然，你也可以从头开始，1925年2月21日，并体验阅读《纽约客》有史以来发表过的每一幅漫画所带来的前所未有的乐趣。

source: The U.S. rich -- poor gap is another disaster waiting to happen -- probably around 2020 . If the economic situation looks bad now , just wait until the end of the decade , warns former U.S. Labor Secretary Robert B. Reich in his book Aftershock . Present-day concentration of wealth in the hands of too few Americans , and the related problem of out-of-control consumer debt , will lead to economic stagnation and political upheaval with impacts felt across the world .
domestication: 美国的贫富差距是个定时炸弹，大概在2020年就要爆炸了。现在的经济形势已经够糟糕了，到了十年末，情况只会更糟。这是美国前劳工部长罗伯特·B·赖克在他的书《余震》中的警告。如今财富集中在少数美国人手中，再加上消费者债务失控，会导致经济停滞不前，政治动荡不安，这些影响波及全世界。

source: You can call them " unaffiliated , " as in a recent Pew poll , or " nones " -- or even just " not very religious . " A new poll by the Public Religion Research Institute divides this group further ( and somewhat counterintuitively ) into " unattached , " " atheists/agnostics , " and " seculars . " But whatever you call them , this ever-growing cohort of unchurched Americans makes up , at 23 percent , the single largest segment of Barack Obama 's " religious coalition " ( compared to the 37 percent of white evangelicals who support Mitt Romney ) .
domestication: 你可以称他们为“无所属”，就像最近皮尤研究中心的民调那样；也可以叫他们“无宗教信仰者”或干脆就是“不太信教的人”。公共宗教研究所的一项新民调进一步（而且有点出乎意料地）将这一群体细分为“未加入任何教会的”、“无神论者/不可知论者”和“世俗人士”。不管怎么称呼，这群越来越壮大的无教堂背景的美国人占到了23%，成为奥巴马“宗教联盟”中最大的一部分（相比之下，支持罗姆尼的白人福音派信徒比例为37%）。
foreignization: 你可以称他们为“无所属”，如同最近的皮尤民调所示，或者称为“无宗教归属者”——甚至仅仅是“不太宗教”。公共宗教研究所的一项新民调进一步（且有些出乎意料地）将这一群体划分为“未绑定者”、“无神论者/不可知论者”和“世俗者”。但无论你怎么称呼他们，这个不断壮大的无教派美国人群体，占到23%，是巴拉克·奥巴马“宗教联盟”中最大的一个部分（相比之下，37%的白人福音派支持米特·罗姆尼）。

source: Gluten is found in wheat , rye , and barley and any foods made with these grains . As you can imagine , eliminating gluten from your diet can be challenging . There are many foods and food additives that contain gluten or are cross-contaminated with gluten during processing . Many of these foods are things you would never think of like lunch meats , broth , salad dressing , etc .

source: In Canada , November 11 is traditionally observed as a day of somber rememberance ; respect for those who died and reflection on the horrors of war . " Never again " is a frequent refrain . Typical events include pipers and veterans marching to the war memorial for wreath-laying ceremonies and/or a gun salute . Some years , this parade reminds me of a funeral procession .

source: MIAMI ( AP ) -- An Atlantic hurricane season that got an early start is likely to stay busy and may produce a few more storms than originally predicted , U.S. forecasters said Thursday . The updated forecast for the season that runs from June 1 to Nov. 30 says there are dueling weather conditions that could also tamp down activity later in the six-month stretch .

迈阿密（美联社）-- 美国预报员周四表示，大西洋飓风季节提前开始，可能会保持活跃，并可能产生比最初预测更多的风暴。该季节从6月1日至11月30日的更新预测称，存在相互竞争的天气条件，也可能在六个月期间的后期抑制活动。

source: General How do I get to the park ? Katmai National Park and Preserve does not have any road access . Instead , flights or boat trips into the park must be chartered . Commercial flights are available from Anchorage to King Salmon via Alaska Airlines or PenAir . Flights or boat trips into the park may be chartered from many locations such as King Salmon , Homer , and Kodiak .

source: I grew up with a pink and grey bathroom ( mint green in my parents MBR ) . When I walk into mid-century ranch homes for sale , I always point out the selling feature opportunity created by the presence of a pink bathroom . Sadly , the real estate agents look at me like I have two heads . It brings a tear to the eye to know these fabulous and timeless potties are being ripped out and replaced with faux zen in a box . Stay strong ! Save the Pink Bathrooms !
domestication: 我从小就是在粉色和灰色的浴室里长大的（父母的主卧浴室是薄荷绿）。每当我去看那些待售的中世纪牧场风格的房子时，总会指出那个粉色浴室是多么好的卖点。可惜，房产中介总是像看外星人一样看着我。一想到这些经典又时尚的卫浴设施会被拆掉，换成那种假禅意的套装，真是让人心里不是滋味。坚持住！拯救粉色浴室！

我女儿露易莎不爱吃蔬菜水果，这事儿大家都知道。有好几年时间，她连一口水果蔬菜都不肯碰，现在都十二岁了，哪怕是像红薯、香蕉这样普通的东西，也得哄着她才能吃上一两口。

source: Like any piece of design , you need to consider your audience and the context in which the infographic will be viewed . If it 's to go on a very businesslike website -- where the main design features are clean edges , whitespace , and a minimalist approach to its colour palette -- then anything involving cutsey icons is out . Do n't make the mistake of speaking down to your audience .

source: While he calls Russia our " number one geostrategic foe , " he also invested in the politically influential Russian state oil company , Gazprom . Gazprom is one of Russia 's " national champion " companies , which are expected not only to turn a profit but also to advance the country 's national interests . It has long been seen as Vladimir Putin 's " premier instrument of power , " according to Foreign Affairs .
domestication: 他嘴上说俄罗斯是我们的头号地缘战略对手，却投资了俄罗斯国有石油公司——俄气。俄气是俄罗斯的“国字号企业”，不仅要盈利，还得为国家利益服务。长久以来，俄气被视为普京手里的头号权力工具，这话可是《外交事务》杂志说的。

source: He will break many records . One of them was set by United States Air Force Captain Joe Kittinger on August 16 , 1960 . Kittinger jumped from the Excelsior III balloon , which at the time was flying at 102,800 feet-that 's 19.47 miles or 31 kilometers up in the sky . Felix will do at least 120,000 feet , 23 miles .

source: It is unnerving that these parties have caused such a stir while the standard bro/ho parties in all their manifestations have gone completely unspoken against , even becoming increasingly popular . Ethnic-themed parties are receiving widespread criticism for cultural intolerance , even when the organizers are part of the ethnic tradition being celebrated . Yet at the same time , their primary critics are all too happy to don tight skirts and unbuttoned blouses for progressives like " CEOs and Office Hoes " -- a theme that wholeheartedly celebrates the glass ceiling women continue to face in the workforce .
domestication: 这些聚会引起轩然大波，让人心里直打鼓。反观那些常见的兄弟姐妹聚会，却从未受到谴责，反而越来越流行。民族主题派对因为文化不尊重而受到广泛批评，即使组织者本身就是那个民族的一部分。然而，与此同时，那些主要批评者却乐于穿上紧身裙和解开扣子的上衣，参加“CEO和办公室诱惑”这样的主题派对，这可是对职场女性面临的玻璃天花板赤裸裸的庆祝。
foreignization: 这些派对引起了如此大的轰动，而各种形式的普通兄弟/姐妹派对却完全没有受到谴责，甚至变得越来越流行，这令人不安。民族主题派对因为文化不宽容而受到广泛批评，即使组织者是被庆祝的民族传统的一部分也是如此。然而与此同时，他们的主要批评者们却乐于穿上紧身裙和解开纽扣的衬衫，参加像“CEO和办公室妓女”这样的派对——这一主题完全庆祝了女性在职场中继续面临的玻璃天花板。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

It is unnerving that these parties have caused such a stir while the standard bro/ho parties in all their manifestations have gone completely unspoken against , even becoming increasingly popular . Ethnic-themed parties are receiving widespread criticism for cultural intolerance , even when the organizers are part of the ethnic tradition being celebrated . Yet at the same time , their primary critics are all too happy to don tight skirts and unbuttoned blouses for progressives like " CEOs and Office Hoes " -- a theme that wholeheartedly celebrates the glass ceiling women continue to face in the workforce .

source: Had you ever made a video before ? Other than home movies , no . I had excellent guidance from Jim Kragel and Jim Leightenheimer , at Cedarville University . I also just learned by doing . I also found other documentaries that I liked and modeled after them . A notable model was Divided Memories , a PBS documentary . I really liked the idea of doing a documentary format .
domestication: 你以前做过视频吗？除了家庭录像，没做过。在辛德维尔大学的时候，吉姆·克雷格尔和吉姆·莱滕海默给了我很好的指导。我也是一边做一边学。我还找了些我喜欢的纪录片来模仿，其中最值得一提的是PBS的《分裂的记忆》。我觉得用纪录片的形式来做这个项目特别好。

source: To protect themselves against jumps in oil prices , most airlines hedge against them by buying a sort of insurance called an option . These options allow airlines to lock in a price for a portion of their fuel for several months at today 's prices . So long as prices rise , options are valuable in keeping prices more stable . But if prices remain flat or fall , options are another expense for airlines .
domestication: 为了应对油价的突然上涨，大多数航空公司都会买一种叫期权的保险来对冲风险。这些期权能让航空公司以今天的价格锁定未来几个月的一部分燃油成本。只要油价上涨，期权就能发挥价值，帮助稳定成本。但如果油价不变或下跌，期权就会变成航空公司的额外开销。
foreignization: 为了保护自己免受油价波动的影响，大多数航空公司通过购买一种称为期权的保险来对冲。这些期权允许航空公司以今天的价格锁定未来几个月部分燃油的价格。只要价格上涨，期权就有价值，可以保持价格的稳定。但如果价格保持平稳或下跌，期权就成为航空公司的另一笔支出。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

To protect themselves against jumps in oil prices , most airlines hedge against them by buying a sort of insurance called an option . These options allow airlines to lock in a price for a portion of their fuel for several months at today 's prices . So long as prices rise , options are valuable in keeping prices more stable . But if prices remain flat or fall , options are another expense for airlines .

More4本周末正在纪念阵亡将士追思日，播放一系列短片，其中一些英国最优秀的演员将朗读该时期的战争诗歌。Sean Bean和Gemma Arterton朗读Wilfred Owen的诗，而Sophie Okonedo则朗读Rupert Brooke的一首作品。由Augenblick于11月11日上午4:12发布。

source: Of course I believe the producers . Jacko is crazy . She is jealous of the success Theresa has . If Jacko was a good friend like she claimed she was , she would had pulled Theresa aside and told her what the " friend " texted her before it all escalated . Instead , she said there with that stupid smirk on her face ( which I wish I can slap off her face ) and let it all go down .
domestication: 当然我相信制片人们的说法。杰克真是疯了，她嫉妒特蕾莎的成功。如果杰克真像她说的那样是好朋友，早就该私下里把那个“朋友”发的信息告诉特蕾莎，不至于让事情闹成这样。可她呢，却笑嘻嘻地站在那儿，那副模样真想上去给她一巴掌，任由事情越闹越大。

source: Worker productivity , defined as output per worker , is an alternate measure of workforce quality . Unlike educational attainment , which captures the inputs into workforce quality , worker productivity measures the average output of workers . High labor productivity typically results in higher standards of living .
domestication: 劳动生产率，指的是每个工人的产出量，是衡量劳动力质量的另一种方式。与教育水平不同，教育水平反映的是劳动力质量的投入，而劳动生产率则是工人平均产出的体现。通常来说，劳动生产率高，人们的生活水平也会跟着水涨船高。
foreignization: 劳动生产率，定义为每个工人的产出，是衡量劳动力质量的另一种指标。与教育水平不同，教育水平捕捉的是劳动力质量的投入，劳动生产率则衡量工人的平均产出。高劳动生产率通常会导致更高的生活水平。

source: Ryan : Nobody is proposing a voucher . Barack Obama said , " If you do n't have any fresh ideas , if you do n't have anything to run on , paint your enemy with a broad brush . " Let younger Americans have a voluntary choice . That 's not what Romney 's proposing : old people keep their benefits . For younger people : Do n't give rich benefits , raise retirement age slowly .
domestication: 瑞安：没人提议要发代金券。奥巴马说过：“如果你没有新点子，如果你没什么可以拿来说事儿的，那就往你的对手身上泼脏水。”让年轻美国人自己做选择。这可不是罗姆尼的提议：老人的福利保持不变；对年轻人来说，不要给富人那么多福利，逐步提高退休年龄。
foreignization: 瑞安：没有人提议使用凭证。巴拉克·奥巴马说：“如果你没有任何新想法，如果你没有什么可以竞选的，就用大笔抹黑你的敌人。”让年轻的美国人有一个自愿的选择。这并不是罗姆尼提议的：老年人保持他们的福利。对于年轻人：不要给予富人福利，逐步提高退休年龄。

source: This post particularly caught my eye as this blog and F 's blog are the only two " personal " blogs to which I subscribe . I 've always considered the two blogs as very different : your blog is for professional and more career related advice , whereas Tim 's is for more lifestyle and personal life advice . I stumbled onto your blog as I was looking for resume tips and I stumbled onto his blog as I was looking for a way to more efficiently pack for a backpacking trip .
domestication: 这篇帖子特别吸引了我的注意，因为你的博客和F的博客是我订阅的仅有的两个“个人”博客。我一直觉得这两个博客各有千秋：你的博客更偏向职业发展，提供专业的建议；而Tim的博客则更侧重生活方式和个人生活的指导。我是在找简历写作技巧时偶然发现了你的博客，而在寻找如何高效打包背包旅行物品的方法时，无意间又发现了他的博客。

source: Washington 's relentless spending and resultant debt auctions prompted Moody 's to hint that America 's triple-A bond rating could disappear . It recently called U.S. public finances " resilient " -- not bad , but a notch below Canada , France , and Germany 's " resistant " rating . Beside America 's , their debt profile looks less like a junkie trolling for heroin .
domestication: 华盛顿不停地花钱，结果债台高筑，穆迪暗示美国的AAA级债券评级可能保不住了。最近它还说美国的公共财政“有韧性”——虽然不错，但还是比加拿大、法国和德国的“抵抗力强”低一等。和这些国家比起来，美国的债务状况就像是个瘾君子在四处找海洛因。
foreignization: 华盛顿持续不断的支出和由此产生的债务拍卖促使穆迪暗示美国的AAA债券评级可能会消失。它最近称美国公共财政“有韧性”——虽然不错，但比加拿大、法国和德国的“抗压”评级低一个档次。与美国相比，这些国家的债务状况看起来不像吸毒者在寻找海洛因。

source: --ALL POLITICS IS LOCAL -- L.A. Times columnist Bill Plaschke , " The Giants leave the Dodgers in their wake ... San Francisco becomes the better franchise in a longtime rivalry , its presence in the World Series a clinching piece of evidence ... The Giants have now appeared in 19 World Series , one more than the Dodgers . If the Giants win , they will have seven world titles , one more than the Dodgers. " http : //lat.ms/XsdoeU
domestication: 政坛风云，归根结底还是地方问题——《洛杉矶时报》专栏作家比尔·普拉斯奇克写道：“巨人队让道奇队望尘莫及……旧金山在这场长久的对抗中，终于成为更好的球队，闯入世界大赛就是最好的证明……巨人队已经第19次进入世界大赛，比道奇队多了一次。如果巨人队夺冠，他们将拥有7个世界冠军头衔，同样比道奇队多一个。”

政坛风云，归根结底还是地方问题——《洛杉矶时报》专栏作家比尔·普拉斯奇克写道：“巨人队让道奇队望尘莫及……旧金山在这场长久的对抗中，终于成为更好的球队，闯入世界大赛就是最好的证明……巨人队已经第19次进入世界大赛，比道奇队多了一次。如果巨人队夺冠，他们将拥有7个世界冠军头衔，同样比道奇队多一个。”

source: The first Russian mission in the original Call of Duty was a good indication of what developer Infinity Ward was going to bring to the FPS table , namely shock factor . The boat trip across the Volga River is loud and chaotic , disorientating and terrifying . It 's a master-class in scene setting , creating an unusual sense of powerlessness in the player even before it eventually throws you into the fray without so much as a rifle .
domestication: 最初的《使命召唤》里的俄罗斯任务就显示了开发商Infinity Ward在FPS游戏中的独特风格，那就是震撼。伏尔加河上的船程嘈杂混乱，让人晕头转向，心惊胆战。这简直就是场景设置的典范，在玩家真正被扔进战斗前，就已经让人感到无力。甚至还没给玩家一把步枪，就让你直面战场的残酷。
foreignization: 《使命召唤》中原版的第一个俄罗斯任务很好地预示了开发商Infinity Ward将为第一人称射击游戏带来什么，即震撼因素。伏尔加河上的船之旅既喧闹又混乱，令人头晕目眩，心生恐惧。这是场景设置的大师级表现，在玩家被投入战斗甚至没有步枪之前，就创造了一种不同寻常的无力感。

They spoke against the contingency plan , and a decision on it was deferred pending the results of the September 4 election .
6月27日，40人委员会批准将反对阿连德的“破坏”行动的资金增加30万美元。出席会议的国务院官员只勉强投了“赞成”票。他们反对应急计划，并决定在9月4日选举结果出来之前推迟对该计划的决定。

source: Gave my low mileage ' 03 Cobra convertible to my daughter and her husband . They were just getting started and only had a POS Grand Am to get around in . They used the Cobra as trade-in on a new Ford Edge . Got them into a better safer car they could n't afford on their own that is now being used to cart my new granddaughter around .
domestication: 我把那辆跑了没多少里程的2003款科obra敞篷车给了女儿和女婿。他们刚开始过日子，手头只有一辆破旧的Grand Am。他们用这辆科obra换了辆新的福特Edge。这样一来，给他们换了个更安全、更好的车，要不是我，他们自己是买不起的。现在这车还用来接送我的外孙女呢。

source: The time has once again come to look back at my set review and weigh the good and the bad to see where I measure up . If you heeded my advice during spoiler season and wrote down your predictions , it is time to dust them off and see just how accurate we were . I will run down the same list I did in these articles so we can directly compare predictions versus actual prices .

source: I looked all over and found out the radiator fan was siezed up . I pulled the fan out and tried to spin it ... no dice , it was siezed up tight . The owener and I got in my truck and went to the pick-and-pull 20 minutes from campus where I found him a taurus with a brand new fan in it ( date stamp was 3 months prior ) . He paid $15 for it and we went on our way . I installed the new fan and topped off his coolant with a 50/50 mix I kept behind my seat .
domestication: 我四处检查，发现散热器风扇卡住了。我把风扇拽出来试着转了转，没门儿，卡得死死的。车主和我上了我的皮卡，开了20分钟到校园外的旧车零件店，我在那儿给他找了一辆塔乌斯，里面装着个全新的风扇（日期戳显示是三个月前的）。他花了15块钱买了下来，然后我们就回去了。我帮他装上了新风扇，还用我座位后面存的50/50防冻液给他加满了。
foreignization: 我到处查看，发现散热器风扇卡住了。我拔出风扇试着旋转它……不行，它紧紧地卡住了。我和车主上了我的卡车，开车去了离校园20分钟车程的废旧汽车回收场，在那里我找到了一辆装有全新风扇的金牛座轿车（日期戳是三个月前的）。他花了15美元买了这个风扇，然后我们就离开了。我安装了新风扇，并用我座位后面存放的50/50混合冷却液给他的车补充了冷却液。

source: We live in a home built in 1914 that had a bathroom added in the 50s , that includes splendid pink tile , a pink sink and a pink toilet . My son calls it " the girl 's potty " although the bathroom has officially become my husband 's bathroom . I love our pink bathroom and almost cried this weekend when my son broke the toilet seat off the hinges when he was standing on it . I found your site when searching for a replacement toilet seat . We love our pink bathroom and wo n't be renovating it ever !
domestication: 我们住的房子是1914年建的，50年代加了个浴室，里面铺着漂亮的粉色瓷砖，还有个粉色的洗手台和粉色的马桶。我儿子管它叫“小姑娘的厕所”，不过这间浴室现在成了我老公专用的。我特别喜欢我们家这个粉粉的浴室，上周末儿子站在马桶盖上，把它给弄坏了，我差点儿没哭出来。后来我在网上搜粉色马桶盖的时候找到了你们的网站。我们可喜欢这个粉色的浴室了，这辈子都不打算翻新！

source: Which religion is true ? You can investigate the claims of each until you find one that actually preaches a consistent and verifiable religion . source: You take money out of the HELOC and put it into the mortgage , so that there is less principle due on the primary and it accrues less interest . But you borrow on the HELOC , and so the HELOC accrues interest . In the example given above , the $5000 HELOC is assumed paid off in a year with $430 of interest.That means that in addition to paying your mortgage , you paid an additional $5430 , $5000 of which went to the principle and $430 to interest .
domestication: 你从房屋净值信用额度（HELOC）里取出钱，放到房贷里，这样主贷的本金就减少了，利息也跟着少了。但是，你在HELOC上借了钱，所以HELOC那边就要计息了。按照上面的例子，假设5000美元的HELOC在一年内还清，利息是430美元。这样一来，除了还房贷之外，你还得多付5430美元，其中5000美元是本金，430美元是利息。
foreignization: 你从HELOC（房屋净值信贷额度）中取出钱并将其用于抵押贷款，这样主要贷款的本金就会减少，从而产生更少的利息。但是你会在HELOC上借款，因此HELOC会产生利息。在上述例子中，假设5000美元的HELOC在一年内还清，利息为430美元。这意味着除了支付你的抵押贷款外，你还额外支付了5430美元，其中5000美元用于本金，430美元用于利息。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

You take money out of the HELOC and put it into the mortgage , so that there is less principle due on the primary and it accrues less interest . But you borrow on the HELOC , and so the HELOC accrues interest . In the example given above , the $5000 HELOC is assumed paid off in a year with $430 of interest.That means that in addition to paying your mortgage , you paid an additional $5430 , $5000 of which went to the principle and $430 to interest .

蒙科：结婚了？

source: " Our country has been distracted by this matter for too long and I take my responsibility for my part in all of this , " he said . " That is all I can do . Now is the time -- in fact , it is past time -- to move on . . . . And so tonight I ask you to turn away from the spectacle of the past seven months , to repair the fabric of our national discourse , and to return our attention to all the challenges and all the promise of the next American century . "

source: True . The redesigned graphics are visually more exciting but far more confusing . Do n't over intellectualize . If your trying to attract consumers thru visually attractive graphics with few words and still gets to the point . Example : If your selling shaving cream for men , a picture of a beautiful woman and the words Shaving Cream , that should do it .  Saadcreative
domestication: 确实如此。重新设计的图案看起来更吸引眼球，但同时也让人一头雾水。别想得太复杂了。如果你想通过视觉吸引力强的图案来吸引消费者，文字尽量少，但又要说到点子上。比如说，如果你卖的是男士剃须膏，放张美女的照片，再写上“剃须膏”几个字，就足够了。
foreignization: 确实如此。重新设计的图形在视觉上更加吸引人，但同时也更加令人困惑。不要过度理智化。如果你试图通过视觉吸引力强的图形和少量文字来吸引消费者，并且仍然能够传达信息。例如：如果你正在销售男士剃须膏，一张漂亮女性的照片和“剃须膏”这几个字就足够了。Saadcreative

确实如此。重新设计的图形在视觉上更加吸引人，但同时也更加令人困惑。不要过度理智化。如果你试图通过视觉吸引力强的图形和少量文字来吸引消费者，并且仍然能够传达信息。例如：如果你正在销售男士剃须膏，一张漂亮女性的照片和“剃须膏”这几个字就足够了。Saadcreative

source: WikiLeaks editor-in-chief Julian Assange addressed members of the United Nations at an event with Ecuador Foreign Minister Ricardo Patino and Center for Constitutional Rights legal director Baher Azmy . He spoke to members on the current status of his asylum case and how the United States currently is engaged in a wide investigation into members of WikiLeaks and others , who the US believes to be connected .
domestication: 维基解密主编朱利安·阿桑奇在一场活动上向联合国成员发表讲话，与他一同出席的有厄瓜多尔外交部长里卡多·帕蒂诺和宪法权利中心法律总监巴赫尔·阿兹米。阿桑奇向成员们讲述了他目前的庇护案件情况，以及美国正在对维基解密成员和其他被认为有关联的人进行大规模调查。

source: I purchased my grandparents ' house after my grandpa passed away last year . My grandparents purchased the house new in 1961 . Not only does this midwestern ranch have a pink bathroom , but also a powder blue one and the original range . I have many good childhood memories in this house , but must get a new oven as 1961 technology requires rotating items multiple times for even baking . However , the pink bathroom reminds me so much of my grandma I would have trouble changing it .
domestication: 去年爷爷去世后，我把爷爷奶奶的房子买了下来。这房子是1961年爷爷奶奶买的新房。这幢中西部的平房不仅有个粉色的浴室，还有一个淡蓝色的浴室，还有原装的老式炉灶。小时候在这房子里留下了很多美好的回忆，但1961年的技术实在太落后了，烤东西得不停转动才能烤均匀，所以我得换一个新的烤箱。不过，每次看到那个粉色的浴室，就会想起奶奶，真舍不得改它。
foreignization: 我在祖父去年去世后购买了我祖父母的房子。我的祖父母在1961年购买了这所新房子。这所中西部的牧场风格房屋不仅有一个粉红色的浴室，还有一个浅蓝色的浴室和原始的炉灶。我在这所房子里有许多美好的童年回忆，但必须换一个新的烤箱，因为1961年的技术需要多次旋转物品以实现均匀烘烤。然而，粉红色的浴室让我如此想念我的祖母，我很难改变它。

source: A wonderfully paced , rising crescendo of a level . At first requiring a softly-softly snipey-snipey approach , with the relative peacefulness of the forest creating an edgy atmosphere , the player never quite knowing where the next Nazi 's going to spring from . Then it kicks things up a notch , with the battle intensifying as it moves between tight burrow-like trenches and wide-open spaces . Finally -- and a complete contrast to the cautious way the mission starts -- you 're given a mortar to play with , allowing you to merrily blow apart any of Hitler 's helmeted hobgoblins unfortunate enough to still be lurking in the forest .
domestication: 这个关卡节奏掌握得非常好，一步步推向高潮。一开始，玩家需要小心翼翼地狙击，森林的相对平静营造出一种紧张的氛围，让人时刻提心吊胆，不知道下一个纳粹分子会从哪里冒出来。随后，难度骤然提升，战斗变得更加激烈，玩家在狭窄的战壕和开阔地带之间来回穿梭。最后，与任务开始时的谨慎形成鲜明对比，玩家得到了一门迫击炮，可以痛快地将希特勒手下那些不幸还躲在森林里的头盔小妖炸得灰飞烟灭。
foreignization: 一个节奏美妙、逐渐升高的关卡。一开始需要采取轻手轻脚的狙击方式，森林的相对宁静营造出紧张的气氛，玩家从来不知道下一个纳粹会从哪里冒出来。然后事情升级了，战斗在狭窄的地道和开阔地带之间变得更加激烈。最后——与任务开始时的谨慎形成鲜明对比——你得到了一个迫击炮来玩，可以愉快地炸飞任何不幸仍躲在森林中的希特勒的头盔小妖精。

source: The covert action budget for Chile was cut back sharply after the coup and all the anti-Allende projects except for one , a major propaganda project , were terminated . Covert activities in Chile following the coup were either continuations or adaptations of earlier projects , rather than major new initiatives .
domestication: 智利政变后，秘密行动的预算大幅削减，除了一个大型宣传项目外，所有反阿连德的项目都终止了。政变后的秘密活动，要么是之前项目的延续，要么是做了些调整，而不是大规模的新行动。
foreignization: 智利的隐蔽行动预算在政变后被大幅削减，除了一个主要的宣传项目外，所有反阿连德的项目都被终止。政变后的智利隐蔽活动要么是先前项目的延续或改编，而不是重大的新举措。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The covert action budget for Chile was cut back sharply after the coup and all the anti-Allende projects except for one , a major propaganda project , were terminated . Covert activities in Chile following the coup were either continuations or adaptations of earlier projects , rather than major new initiatives .

source: " The head of the nation 's judicial branch was purposefully deceptive during his " umpire " testimony . Or he had no idea what his words meant . Or he has had a complete change of philosophy and temperament while in his mid-50s . Those are the logical possibilities . None of them is too encouraging about the basic soundness of our governing institutions . "
domestication: 国家司法部门的头头在作“裁判”证词时故意撒谎，或者他根本不知道自己在说什么，又或者是他在五十多岁的时候突然来了个大转变，换了个人似的。这几种可能性都不让人对我们的政府机构有什么信心。
foreignization: “国家司法部门的负责人在他的‘裁判’证词中故意欺骗。或者他根本不知道自己说的话意味着什么。或者他在五十多岁时彻底改变了哲学和性格。这些是逻辑上的可能性。没有一种对我国治理机构的基本健全性有太大的鼓舞。”

source: Now back to the notion of moving money from one place to another to realize a gain . Instead of x and y -- which makes the eyes of everyone who did poorly in algebra glaze over , including my own , let 's call them cookies and ice cream . Your mortgage debt will be ice cream . We 'll get to the cookies in a minute . Right now , since the mortgage interest on your home could be your largest expense , we 'll call that a stomach ache . Stepping back to look at something not quite that costly which we might parlay into a savings at ice cream brings us back to the home itself , cookies .
domestication: 现在回到把钱从一个地方转移到另一个地方来赚取收益这个概念上。别提什么x和y了，这会让那些代数学得不好的人，包括我自己，眼睛发直。我们把它们换成饼干和冰淇淋吧。你的房贷就是冰淇淋。饼干的事儿咱们一会儿再说。眼下，因为你的房子贷款利息可能是你最大的开销，我们就说这是个头痛的问题。退一步说，看看那些没那么贵的东西，说不定还能省下点冰淇淋钱，这就又回到了房子本身，也就是饼干。
foreignization: 现在回到把钱从一个地方转移到另一个地方以实现收益的想法。代替x和y——这会让那些代数学得不好的人，包括我自己，眼睛发愣——我们称之为饼干和冰淇淋。你的抵押债务将是冰淇淋。我们会稍后谈到饼干。目前，由于你家的抵押贷款利息可能是你最大的支出，我们称之为胃痛。退一步来看一些不太昂贵的东西，我们可以将其转化为节省冰淇淋的开支，这就又回到了房子本身，饼干。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Now back to the notion of moving money from one place to another to realize a gain . Instead of x and y -- which makes the eyes of everyone who did poorly in algebra glaze over , including my own , let 's call them cookies and ice cream . Your mortgage debt will be ice cream . We 'll get to the cookies in a minute . Right now , since the mortgage interest on your home could be your largest expense , we 'll call that a stomach ache . Stepping back to look at something not quite that costly which we might parlay into a savings at ice cream brings us back to the home itself , cookies .
现在回到把钱从一个地方转移到另一个地方来赚取收益这个概念上。别提什么x和y了，这会让那些代数学得不好的人，包括我自己，眼睛发直。我们把它们换成饼干和冰淇淋吧。你的房贷就是冰淇淋。饼干的事儿咱们一会儿再说。眼下，因为你的房子贷款利息可能是你最大的开销，我们就说这是个头痛的问题。退一步说，看看那些没那么贵的东西，说不定还能省下点冰淇淋钱，这就又回到了房子本身，也就是饼干。

source: The libertarian might believe that it really does n't matter what I do with myself , as long as I do n't hurt others . They often forget that by reducing your economic ability , you are hurting others . Even private actions , such as engaging in extra-marital relations or smoking a joint have long-term and expensive costs to society .
domestication: 自由主义者可能觉得，只要不伤害别人，自己怎么做都无所谓。他们常常忘了，经济能力下降了，其实就是在坑别人。就算是私下的事情，比如婚外情啊、抽点大麻啊，这些长期下来也会给社会带来沉重的负担。
foreignization: 自由意志主义者可能认为，只要我不伤害他人，我怎么做自己都无所谓。他们常常忘记，通过降低你的经济能力，你是在伤害他人。即使是私人的行为，如婚外情或吸大麻，也对社会有长期且昂贵的成本。

source: Mike Triplett writes that Sean Payton probably will take his time in getting a new contract done with the Saints . That would give Payton time to see if the Dallas job , which Triplett says is the only job that might lure him away from the Saints , does come open . If you 're a Saints ' fan , it 's time to start rooting for the Cowboys to go on a playoff run so that coach Jason Garrett keeps his job .
domestication: 迈克·特里普莱特说，肖恩·佩顿可能不会急于和圣徒队续约。这样，佩顿就有时间看看达拉斯的那个职位会不会空出来，因为特里普莱特认为，只有那个位置可能会让佩顿离开圣徒队。如果你是圣徒队的球迷，现在得开始祈祷牛仔队能在季后赛大放异彩，这样教练贾森·加勒特就能保住他的工作了。
foreignization: 迈克·特里普莱特写道，肖恩·佩顿可能会花时间与圣徒队签订新的合同。这将给佩顿时间看看达拉斯的职位是否会空缺，特里普莱特说这是唯一可能让他离开圣徒队的工作。如果你是圣徒队的球迷，现在是时候开始为牛仔队的季后赛征程加油了，这样主教练杰森·加勒特就能保住他的工作。

If you 're a Saints ' fan , it 's time to start rooting for the Cowboys to go on a playoff run so that coach Jason Garrett keeps his job .

source: " You are leaving , my darling boy . You always have been your mother 's joy . " Those words come from 1920s gospel singer Washington Phillips 's " Mothers Last Word to Her Son , " a hauntingly beautiful expression of the bittersweet bond between a mother and a son she knows she can no longer protect . But what happens when everything ugly about the world is embodied in the son , when he 's the source of the " sin and woe " that Phillips sings about over his ethereal zither ? If the bond between mother and son becomes tenuous or broken , is that the result of his evil deeds , or the cause of them ?
domestication: “你要走了，我亲爱的孩子。你一直是妈妈的骄傲。”这话出自20世纪20年代福音歌手华盛顿·菲利普斯的《母亲对儿子最后的话》，这首歌曲深情地表达了母亲与即将离开的儿子之间苦乐参半的情感。但当世间所有丑陋都集中在儿子身上，当他成了菲利普斯歌中所说的“罪恶与苦难”的源头时，又会怎样呢？如果母子间的关系变得脆弱甚至破裂，这到底是他作恶的结果，还是原因呢？

source: All of these technologies reflect a dynamic that is expresssed in one of my fundamental design thingies ( I do n't know what to call this . " ) Technology is designed for a group , but experienced by individuals sitting behind screens of all sizes . We create the experience for ourselves , and we create a sense of how others are experiencing the same thing in our own heads . I imagine ( or not ) your body language or tone as I read your tweet .
domestication: 所有这些技术都体现了我一个基本设计理念（其实我也不知道该叫它什么）。技术是为一群人设计的，但却是由一个个坐在各种大小屏幕前的个体来体验的。我们为自己创造了这种体验，同时也在脑海中想象其他人是如何体验同一事物的。我在读你的推特时，会想象（或者不会）你的肢体语言和语气。

source: When it comes to lists , I like what the Oscars have done this year by not setting a particular number of Best Picture nominees but allowing for an adaptable amount depending on demand for that year . I hate rankings myself and especially forcing a top ten or top 20 ( how often do I preferences come out to exactly 10 or exactly 20 films ? ) so I vote for next year , just name your Best Picture of the year and then group the rest in tiers . Ranking each film can get messy in my opinion and it seems to degrade the art form a bit .
domestication: 说到榜单，我挺喜欢今年奥斯卡的做法，不再设定固定的最佳影片提名数量，而是根据当年的需求灵活调整。我自己很不喜欢排名，特别是那种硬要排出前十或前二十的榜单（我什么时候正好只喜欢十部或二十部电影了？）。所以我建议明年就直接选出年度最佳影片，然后把其他电影按层次分组就行了。在我看来，给每部电影排名太乱了，还显得有点贬低艺术作品。
foreignization: 当谈到名单时，我喜欢奥斯卡今年的做法，没有设定特定的最佳影片提名数量，而是根据当年的需求允许一个可调整的数量。我自己讨厌排名，尤其是强行列出前十或前二十（我有多少次偏好恰好是10部或恰好20部电影？），所以我为明年的投票建议，只需命名你的年度最佳影片，然后将其他影片按层级分组。我认为对每部电影进行排名会变得很混乱，并且似乎会有点贬低艺术形式。

Ranking each film can get messy in my opinion and it seems to degrade the art form a bit .

source: " So , Louis , let 's talk about your lovely girlfriend , " the interviewer , wrenching Harry out of his reverie . The younger boy turned around quick enough to cause whiplash , but as he fixated the woman with a steely glare , she continued obliviously , " We 've heard you two are getting very serious . "
domestication: “好了，路易斯，咱们来聊聊你那位可爱的女朋友吧，”采访者的话打断了哈里的沉思。年轻男孩猛地转过身来，那速度足以让人脖子抽筋，但他盯着女人的眼神却冷得像块铁，可那女人毫不在意地接着说：“我们听说你们俩现在可是越来越认真了。”

source: What was it about the Yak &; Yeti beans that made Louisa such a fan ? Yes , they were quite tasty , and yes , the green part was handily obfuscated by a crunchy , yumtastic fried breading coating ; but we had tried similar ploys in the past to no avail . My theory is that the Yak &; Yeti beans were flavored by the spice of ( cue the orchestra ) The Theme Park Food Effect .
domestication: 路易莎为啥那么喜欢牦牛和野人豆呢？的确，这豆子好吃，外边裹着一层香脆的炸面衣，把里面的绿色遮得严严实实；不过我们以前也试过类似的手法，都没啥用。我猜啊，牦牛和野人豆之所以受欢迎，是因为它们沾了“主题公园美食效应”的光。这味道一上来，就像乐团奏响了乐章，让人根本停不下来。
foreignization: 是什么让露易莎如此喜欢牦牛和雪人的豆子？是的，它们很好吃，是的，绿色的部分被一层脆脆的、美味的炸面包屑巧妙地遮盖住了；但我们过去也尝试过类似的方法，但都没有成功。我的理论是，牦牛和雪人的豆子之所以美味，是因为它们被（cue管弦乐队）主题公园食品效应的香料调味了。

source: The White House denied Israel 's request to fly over Iraq to reach Iran 's major nuclear complex at Natanz , American officials said , and the Israelis backed off their plans , at least temporarily . But the tense exchanges also prompted the White House to step up intelligence-sharing with Israel and brief Israeli officials on new American efforts to subtly sabotage Iran 's nuclear infrastructure .

source: Talking with the singers themselves confirms that there is an intangible , almost magical component as there is with all great conductors . But the singers offer more . " He has the best ears in the business , " two of them told me . " He misses nothing and he knows how to communicate what he hears and what he wants to reach his goal .

source: Dance , a major work created in the early 1970 's , and displayed in front of the Herberger Theater , is a representation of John 's unique ability to give bronze motion . He offers us a glimpse into the inner beauty in each of the grouped figures , and brings to life a feeling of gentle grace and energy . Each dancer has a " portrait- like " quality that is unique to the model while adding to the overall dimension of the piece as a whole .
domestication: 《舞蹈》是约翰在20世纪70年代初创作的一件大型作品，矗立在赫伯格剧院前。这件作品展现了约翰让青铜动起来的独特才华。他让我们窥见了每组人物内心的美，赋予作品以温婉的优雅和活力。每个舞者都有一种肖像般的特质，既独特又为整件作品增色不少。
foreignization: 《舞蹈》是约翰在20世纪70年代初期创作的主要作品，陈列在赫伯格剧院前，展现了他赋予青铜动感的独特能力。他让我们得以一窥每组人物内在的美，并赋予整个作品一种温柔的优雅和活力之感。每位舞者都具有一种“肖像式”的品质，这种品质既独特地属于每个模特，又增添了作品整体的多维性。

Each dancer has a " portrait- like " quality that is unique to the model while adding to the overall dimension of the piece as a whole .

source: Social media plays a big role in this year 's election as Twitter becomes a more prominent networking tool than ever . With the Political Engagement Map , you can check how each presidential candidate 's tweets are received in particular parts of the United States . The top tweets are presented in vertical bar graphs that display the most popular tweet , and you can search for tweets with keyboards of specific issues .
domestication: 社交媒体在今年的选举中扮演了重要角色，推特的影响力比以往任何时候都要大。通过政治参与地图，你可以看看每位总统候选人的推文在美國各地的反响如何。最热门的推文会以竖条图的形式展示，你还能用关键词搜索特定议题的相关推文。

source: This memoir is honest , entertaining , and enlightening . By including the biographies of individuals McCain admired , we gain even better insight into the way John McCain 's mind works . We begin to understand his motivations , his aspirations , and above all , his values . I am almost startled by how TRUTHFUL he is in approaching the challenges and obstacles in his life ( running the gamut from his first bid for congress , the Keating Five Scandal , the run for President , and his Campaign Finance Reform movement . ) What a life he 's led !
domestication: 这本回忆录诚实、有趣又发人深省。书中加入了麦凯恩敬佩的几个人物传记，让我们更深入地了解了麦凯恩的思维方式。我们开始明白他的动机、抱负，最重要的是，他的价值观。他面对生活中的挑战和障碍时，那种坦诚几乎让我感到吃惊——从首次竞选国会议员，到凯廷五人丑闻，再到总统竞选和他的竞选财务改革运动。他这一生真是不平凡！
foreignization: 这本回忆录是诚实的、有趣的、启发性的。通过包含麦凯恩所敬佩的个人传记，我们更能深入了解约翰·麦凯恩的思维方式。我们开始理解他的动机、抱负，最重要的是，他的价值观。我几乎被他对待生活中的挑战和障碍（从他首次竞选国会议员，到基廷五人丑闻，再到总统竞选和他的竞选资金改革运动）时的真诚所震惊。他过着多么精彩的生活！

source: The policy of economic pressure -articulated in NSDM 93 of November 1970- was to be implemented through several means . All new bilateral foreign assistance was to be stopped , although disbursements would continue under loans made previously . The U.S. would use its predominant position in international financial institutions to dry up the flow of new multilateral credit or other financial assistance . To the extent possible , financial assistance or guarantees to U.S. private investment in Chile would be ended , and U.S. businesses would be made aware of the government 's concern and its restrictive policies .
domestication: 1970年11月出台的国家安全决策备忘录第93号中提出的经济压力政策，将通过多种手段实施。所有新的双边外援都将停止，不过之前承诺的贷款还会继续发放。美国将利用其在国际金融机构中的主导地位，切断新的多边信贷和其他金融援助。尽可能地终止对智利的美国私人投资的财政援助或担保，并让美国企业了解政府的关切及其限制性政策。
foreignization: 经济压力政策——如1970年11月的国家安全决定备忘录第93号所阐述——将通过几种手段实施。所有新的双边对外援助都将停止，尽管先前贷款下的拨款将继续进行。美国将利用其在国际金融机构中的主导地位来切断新的多边信贷或其他财政援助的流动。在可能的范围内，将终止对美国在智利的私人投资的财政援助或担保，并使美国企业意识到政府的关注及其限制性政策。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The policy of economic pressure -articulated in NSDM 93 of November 1970- was to be implemented through several means . All new bilateral foreign assistance was to be stopped , although disbursements would continue under loans made previously . The U.S. would use its predominant position in international financial institutions to dry up the flow of new multilateral credit or other financial assistance . To the extent possible , financial assistance or guarantees to U.S. private investment in Chile would be ended , and U.S. businesses would be made aware of the government 's concern and its restrictive policies .
1970年11月出台的国家安全决策备忘录第93号中提出的经济压力政策，将通过多种手段实施。所有新的双边外援都将停止，不过之前承诺的贷款还会继续发放。美国将利用其在国际金融机构中的主导地位，切断新的多边信贷和其他金融援助。尽可能地终止对智利的美国私人投资的财政援助或担保，并让美国企业了解政府的关切及其限制性政策。

To the extent possible , financial assistance or guarantees to U.S. private investment in Chile would be ended , and U.S. businesses would be made aware of the government 's concern and its restrictive policies .

source: It 's going to allow our dollar to become strong enough that we can invest overseas with true income producing assets . That 's the choice we have in front of us , and I like to think we will make the right choice . If we screw it up again ( and go the way of Italy and Spain ) , then , well , it 's going to be a tough time for my kids and for a lot of us . "
domestication: 这会让我们的美元变得足够强劲，我们就能放心大胆地在海外投资，赚取实实在在的收益。这就是摆在我们面前的选择，我愿意相信我们会做出正确的决定。要是再搞砸了，走上意大利和西班牙的老路，那可就苦了我们这一代，还有孩子们的日子也不会好过。
foreignization: 这将使我们的美元变得足够强劲，我们可以用它进行海外投资，获得真正产生收益的资产。这就是摆在我们面前的选择，我希望我们会做出正确的选择。如果我们再次搞砸了（像意大利和西班牙那样），那么，好吧，我的孩子和很多人都将面临艰难的时刻。"

source: She and her co-authors derived records of atmospheric carbon dioxide from ancient soils that have been preserved as rocks , and from plant fossils and coal . They extracted a record of sea surface temperatures from the fossils of brachiopod shellfish and looked at the extensive records of past plant life from fossils of the ancient rainforests . To see how glaciers advanced and retreated , the researchers looked at the scars and other clues left by the ice sheets that covered the great southern continent of Gondwanaland , which included most of the land masses of the modern southern hemisphere .
domestication: 她和她的合作者从古代保存下来的岩石中，还有植物化石和煤里，提取了大气中二氧化碳的记录。他们从腕足动物化石中找到了海面温度的变化，还仔细研究了古代雨林植物化石，了解过去植物的生长情况。为了弄清楚冰川的进退，研究人员考察了冈瓦纳大陆上冰盖留下的痕迹和其他线索，这个古老的南部大陆包含了现代南半球的大部分陆地。
foreignization: 她和她的合作者从被保存为岩石的古代土壤，以及植物化石和煤炭中得出了大气二氧化碳的记录。他们从腕足动物壳化石中提取了海表面温度的记录，并查看了来自古代雨林化石的过去植物生命的广泛记录。为了观察冰川的进退，研究人员查看了覆盖了包括现代南半球大多数陆地的大南部大陆冈瓦纳大陆的冰盖留下的伤痕和其他线索。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

She and her co-authors derived records of atmospheric carbon dioxide from ancient soils that have been preserved as rocks , and from plant fossils and coal . They extracted a record of sea surface temperatures from the fossils of brachiopod shellfish and looked at the extensive records of past plant life from fossils of the ancient rainforests . To see how glaciers advanced and retreated , the researchers looked at the scars and other clues left by the ice sheets that covered the great southern continent of Gondwanaland , which included most of the land masses of the modern southern hemisphere .
她和她的合作者从古代保存下来的岩石中，还有植物化石和煤里，提取了大气中二氧化碳的记录。他们从腕足动物化石中找到了海面温度的变化，还仔细研究了古代雨林植物化石，了解过去植物的生长情况。为了弄清楚冰川的进退，研究人员考察了冈瓦纳大陆上冰盖留下的痕迹和其他线索，这个古老的南部大陆包含了现代南半球的大部分陆地。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

They extracted a record of sea surface temperatures from the fossils of brachiopod shellfish and looked at the extensive records of past plant life from fossils of the ancient rainforests . To see how glaciers advanced and retreated , the researchers looked at the scars and other clues left by the ice sheets that covered the great southern continent of Gondwanaland , which included most of the land masses of the modern southern hemisphere .
她和她的合作者从被保存为岩石的古代土壤，以及植物化石和煤炭中得出了大气二氧化碳的记录。他们从腕足动物壳化石中提取了海表面温度的记录，并查看了来自古代雨林化石的过去植物生命的广泛记录。为了观察冰川的进退，研究人员查看了覆盖了包括现代南半球大多数陆地的大南部大陆冈瓦纳大陆的冰盖留下的伤痕和其他线索。

source: The good news is you are not the only one who experienced what you have , so you are not alone . Anxiety disorders are the common consequence of exposure to Pentecostalism . Everyone is my Pentecostal family suffered from generalized anxiety and/or panic attacks . That says a lot about just how unhealthy Pentecostalism is . We were taught to fear demons , the devil , the rapture and being left behind , and most of all the face-to-face encounter with the angry Pentecostal God . Even death offered no escape from the fear !
domestication: 好消息是，你遇到的这些事并不是孤例，所以你并不孤单。焦虑障碍在经历过五旬节派宗教活动的人中非常普遍。我们家里的每个人，只要是五旬节派的成员，都遭受过广泛性焦虑或恐慌发作的折磨。这足以说明五旬节派有多不健康了。我们被灌输了对恶魔、魔鬼、被提和被遗弃的恐惧，最让人害怕的是与那位愤怒的五旬节派上帝面对面的遭遇。连死亡也不能让人逃脱这份恐惧！

source: Demonstrators from India 's main opposition Bharatiya Janata Party ( BJP ) shout slogans against the Irish government for the death of Indian national Savita Halappanavar , who died in Ireland after doctors allegedly refused her an abortion , in front of the Embassy of Ireland in New Delhi . New Delhi on November 16 demanded a " transparent " probe into the death of an Indian woman in Ireland after doctors there allegedly refused to terminate her pregnancy even though she was miscarrying. -- Raveendran , AFP/Getty Images , Nov. 16 , 2012
domestication: 印度主要反对党印度人民党（BJP）的示威者在新德里的爱尔兰大使馆前高呼口号，抗议爱尔兰政府。此事缘起于一名印度女子萨薇塔·哈拉帕纳瓦尔在爱尔兰因医生拒绝为其流产而去世。新德里在11月16日要求对这起事件进行“透明”的调查，据说当时医生即便知道她在流产，仍拒绝终止她的妊娠。-- 拉文德拉，法新社/盖蒂图片社，2012年11月16日

source: Ever heard someone called a " Jezebel ? " The term is n't used much anymore , but not so long ago " Jezebel " was a word for a woman who flouted society 's conventions , who wielded stolen power , who ordered people killed -- in short , someone utterly wicked . The biblical Queen Jezebel , wife of King Ahab , has become an archetype of a wicked woman .  Little Documentation Exists for the Wicked Queen Jezebel
domestication: 你听过有人被叫做“耶洗别”吗？这个词现在不怎么用了，但在不久以前，“耶洗别”是指那种不守规矩的女人，她擅用不属于她的权力，甚至下令杀人——总之，就是个十恶不赦的人。《圣经》中的耶洗别王后，作为亚哈王的妻子，成了邪恶女人的代名词。关于这个恶毒女王耶洗别的记载其实不多。

source: We stayed at this lovely B &B; twice , the first time with just my husband and me ( in the Bishop 's Retreat room ) and the second time with our 11 year old son ( in the 1790 Suite ) . The rooms are very clean and we really felt at home . They even provided DVD 's , games , books and magazines . You can tell that they went above and beyond with providing other necessities within the room/bathroom . We all had a great time and would definitely recommend this B &B; to anyone that is looking to have a nice relaxing/fun weekend !

source: However , the problem with the big bang theory is that the weight of space is constant . You need to comprehend that God 's creation of planets , suns , and beings do n't increase the weight of space . They just cause another part of space to become less dense and as such , one part of space becomes denser , therefore ; not affecting the weight of space , which remains constant . The part of space that is putting pressure on the denser center will become less . Since this natural mechanistic process exists , the plausibility of the Big Bang Theory of space becoming so compressed as to explode would be quite impossible !
domestication: 不过，大爆炸理论的问题在于空间的重量是恒定的。你要明白，上帝创造行星、太阳和生命，并不会增加空间的重量。它们只是让另一部分空间变得不那么密集，这样一来，某部分空间变得更加密集，但并不会影响空间的总重量，这重量始终不变。对密集中心施压的空间部分会减少。既然存在这种自然机制，那么大爆炸理论中空间被压缩到爆炸的程度就不太可能了！
foreignization: 然而，大爆炸理论的问题在于空间的重量是恒定的。你需要理解，上帝创造行星、太阳和生物并不会增加空间的重量。它们只会导致空间的另一部分变得不那么密集，因此，空间的一部分变得更加密集，因此；不会影响空间的重量，这仍然是恒定的。对更密集中心施加压力的空间部分将变得较少。由于这种自然机械过程的存在，空间被压缩到爆炸的程度的大爆炸理论的合理性将是不可能的！

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

However , the problem with the big bang theory is that the weight of space is constant . You need to comprehend that God 's creation of planets , suns , and beings do n't increase the weight of space . They just cause another part of space to become less dense and as such , one part of space becomes denser , therefore ; not affecting the weight of space , which remains constant . The part of space that is putting pressure on the denser center will become less . Since this natural mechanistic process exists , the plausibility of the Big Bang Theory of space becoming so compressed as to explode would be quite impossible !

The part of space that is putting pressure on the denser center will become less . Since this natural mechanistic process exists , the plausibility of the Big Bang Theory of space becoming so compressed as to explode would be quite impossible !
然而，大爆炸理论的问题在于空间的重量是恒定的。你需要理解，上帝创造行星、太阳和生物并不会增加空间的重量。它们只会导致空间的另一部分变得不那么密集，因此，空间的一部分变得更加密集，因此；不会影响空间的重量，这仍然是恒定的。对更密集中心施加压力的空间部分将变得较少。由于这种自然机械过程的存在，空间被压缩到爆炸的程度的大爆炸理论的合理性将是不可能的！

source: China 's defeat in the Second Opium War , along with the signing of the Treaty of Tientsin and the Treaty of Peking , further alarmed certain Chinese intellectuals and government officials . source: Just a decade ago , every one of these schemes was considered outlandish . Some still seem that way . But what sounded crankish only 10 years ago is now becoming mainstream thinking . Although using geo-engineering to combat climate change was first considered ( and dismissed ) by President Johnson 's administration , sustained political interest began on the business-friendly right , which remains excited about any solution that does n't get in the way of the oil companies . The American Enterprise Institute , a conservative think tank historically inimical to emission-reduction measures , has sponsored panels on the sulfur-aerosol plan .
domestication: 十年前，这些方案还被认为是离谱的。现在有些看起来还是挺离谱。但十年前听起来像是异想天开的东西，如今正逐渐成为主流思想。虽然利用地球工程应对气候变化最早是在约翰逊总统任内被考虑（随后又被否决），但持续的政治兴趣却是从商界友好的右派开始的，他们对任何不会妨碍石油公司的解决方案都感到兴奋。美国企业研究所这个传统上反对减排措施的保守智库，也主办了关于硫化物气溶胶计划的研讨会。
foreignization: 仅仅十年前，所有这些方案都被认为是离谱的。有些现在看起来仍然如此。但是，十年前听起来荒诞不经的想法如今正在成为主流思维。虽然利用地球工程来应对气候变化最初是由约翰逊总统的政府提出（并被否决）的，但持续的政治兴趣始于亲商的右翼，他们仍然对任何不妨碍石油公司的解决方案感到兴奋。美国企业研究所，一个历史上反对减排措施的保守智库，已经赞助了关于硫化物气溶胶计划的小组讨论。

The American Enterprise Institute , a conservative think tank historically inimical to emission-reduction measures , has sponsored panels on the sulfur-aerosol plan .

source: The Israelis in favor of military action , led by Defense Minister Ehud Barak , the most outspoken proponent of moving quickly against the Iranian program , will point to evidence that Iran has now installed over 2,100 of the roughly 2,800 centrifuges destined for the underground site , called Fordow . For Mr. Barak , that is evidence that the " zone of immunity " he has warned about -- the point at which Iran will be able to produce nuclear fuel from a site invulnerable to attack -- will be reached in a matter of weeks .
domestication: 支持军事行动的以色列人，以国防部长埃胡德·巴拉克为首，他是迅速对伊朗核计划采取行动的最直言不讳的支持者，他们会指出，伊朗已经在名为福尔多的地下设施安装了2100多台离心机，这个设施总共计划安装约2800台。在巴拉克看来，这证明他一直警告的“免疫区”——即伊朗能在一个无法被攻击的地点生产核燃料的关键时刻——将在几周内到来。

For Mr. Barak , that is evidence that the " zone of immunity " he has warned about -- the point at which Iran will be able to produce nuclear fuel from a site invulnerable to attack -- will be reached in a matter of weeks .

source: All That Can Be Shaken by Essie Collins ( a pseudonym ) is a moving true story of a family 's struggle with a tragedy that shakes their lives and their faith . Essie 's idyllic life is torn apart when her once joyful and exuberant husband , Stephen , is stricken with a deep depression . His suicidal tendencies force Essie to seek professional help . After shock treatment and a barrage of medications , Stephen becomes severely mentally ill , diagnosed as bi-polar and schizophrenic . Essie 's story will take you through the horrors her family endures as they become prey to a society that is largely unsympathetic and unequipped to help .
domestication: 《能被撼动的一切》是艾西·柯林斯（笔名）撰写的一部感人的真实故事，讲述了一个家庭在面对悲剧时的挣扎，这场悲剧不仅动摇了他们的生活，也动摇了他们的信仰。原本幸福美满的生活，因为丈夫史蒂芬突如其来的重度抑郁而支离破碎。曾经活泼开朗的史蒂芬变得抑郁消极，甚至有了自杀倾向，这让艾西不得不寻求专业帮助。电击治疗和各种药物都没能挽回他的病情，反而让他陷入严重的心理健康问题，被诊断为双相情感障碍和精神分裂症。艾西的故事将带你走进她的家庭所经历的种种磨难，社会对精神疾病患者的冷漠和无能为力，让这个家庭成了无助的牺牲品。
foreignization: 《凡能动摇的》是由埃西·柯林斯（化名）撰写的一部感人的真实故事，讲述了一个家庭在一场动摇他们生活和信仰的悲剧中挣扎的经历。埃西原本宁静的生活在她曾经快乐而充满活力的丈夫史蒂芬患上严重抑郁后被撕裂。史蒂芬的自杀倾向迫使埃西寻求专业帮助。经过电击治疗和一系列药物治疗后，史蒂芬变得严重精神疾病，被诊断为双相情感障碍和精神分裂症。埃西的故事将带你经历她的家庭所遭受的恐怖，以及他们在成为对一个大多不同情且不具备帮助能力的社会的猎物时的困境。

source: Victoria Holmes , one of the authors of Warrior Cats , does this a lot . When asked for spoilers , she usually responds , " Do you think I 'll tell you that ? source: The distilled quality of Pi 's existence is similar to the kind of bare-bones life lived by many religious mystics , for whom stripping down to the essentials is necessary for communion with God . A full , varied life with many distractions can cloud faith or even make it unnecessary . However , within a spare and even monastic existence , God 's presence becomes palpable . To put it another way , within the confines of a lifeboat , spirituality looms as large as a nearly 10 -foot , 450 -pound Bengal tiger .
domestication: 派的存在就像许多宗教神秘主义者的生活一样，简单到极致。对他们来说，只有舍弃一切繁杂，才能与神明沟通。生活丰富多变、充满诱惑，可能会模糊信仰，甚至让它变得可有可无。然而，在简朴如僧侣般的生活里，神的存在变得触手可及。换句话说，在救生艇的狭小空间里，精神的力量就像那头将近三米长、四百五十公斤重的孟加拉虎一样震撼。
foreignization: 派的存在所提炼出的品质类似于许多宗教神秘主义者所过的一种简朴生活，对他们来说，简化到本质是与上帝交流的必要条件。充实而多样的生活可能会因众多干扰而使信仰变得模糊甚至变得不必要。然而，在一种简约甚至修道院般的生活方式中，上帝的存在变得可以感知。换句话说，在一艘救生艇的狭小空间里，精神生活就像一只将近10英尺长、450磅重的孟加拉虎一样显得巨大。

source: We are not saying that you get a $50,000 HELOC and borrow the FULL $50,000 to pay down your mortgage then spend the next 2 or 3 years trying to pay down the large HELOC balance due , which likely WILL have a higher interest rate , as you pointed out . This method suggests pulling out an amount from the HELOC which will allow you to draw down your mortgage balance , but which you can pay back in a short period of time ( preferably a month ) . Then repeat every month there after .
domestication: 我们可不是说让你申请个5万的房屋净值信贷额度（HELOC），然后一下子全借出来还房贷，接下来两三年拼命还这个大额的HELOC欠款，利息还可能更高，就像你说的那样。这个方法建议你从HELOC里借出一部分钱，能帮你减少一点房贷余额，但最好是能在短时间内，最好是一个月内，还清这笔借款。之后每个月都这么操作一次。
foreignization: 我们并不是说你要获得一个50,000美元的房屋净值信用额度（HELOC），然后借出全部50,000美元来偿还你的抵押贷款，接下来在接下来的2到3年内努力还清这笔巨大的HELOC余额，这很可能如你所指出的会有更高的利率。这种方法建议从HELOC中提取一笔可以让你减少抵押贷款余额的金额，但你需要在短时间内（最好是一个月内）还清。然后每个月重复这个过程。

source: This version of the Constitution incorporates into the original document all amendments adopted through the 1998 general election and omits certain provisions apparently superseded or obsolete . The footnote following an amended section is the latest action only . The original Constitution and amendments in chronological order , referenced in footnotes following some sections , may be found in the official printed Code of Iowa . References in footnotes to the Code refer to the Iowa Code . This codified version generally adopts the rules for capitalization and punctuation used in drafting legislation .

source: Recently this YouTube clip about some British guys going to Tunisia to fix up Luke Skywalker 's house made the Internet rounds , which raised the question -- what the heck was Luke Skywalker 's house doing still standing ? Did n't they take down all the Star Wars sets they built in Tunisia after they were done filming ? The answer is no . Basically all the Tatooine sets were just built out in the middle of the desert , so hey , what the f--k , once they were done filming they just left them .
domestication: 最近有个视频在YouTube上火了，讲的是一群英国人在突尼斯修缮卢克·天行者的房子。这事儿一出，大家就纳闷了——卢克·天行者的房子怎么还立着呢？不是说拍完《星球大战》后，他们在突尼斯建的所有场景都拆了吗？其实没拆。那些塔图因星球的场景都是直接建在沙漠里的，拍完片儿，大家一想，反正荒无人烟的，就不管了，随它去吧。
foreignization: 最近，一段关于一些英国人去突尼斯修复卢克·天行者的房子的YouTube视频在互联网上疯传，这引发了一个问题——卢克·天行者的房子怎么会还矗立在那里？他们不是在拍完电影后就把所有在突尼斯搭建的《星球大战》场景都拆除了吗？答案是否定的。基本上所有的塔图因场景都是在沙漠中间搭建的，所以，管它呢，拍完之后他们就直接把这些场景留下了。

source: We 're going to spend the rest of our lives in the future . Therefore , if we want to be practical , we must focus our attention on the trends and ideas that are shaping the future . What will these likely changes mean for you , your family , your career , your community , and your organization ?  Today , it 's as if we 're driving 200 miles an hour and only looking into the rear-view mirror .
