source: You must recall that the roots of discrimination in this country are economic . The labor of Africans in America was appropriated for the benefits of slave holders in exchange for subsistence nutrition and shelter . The lands of native Americans and Hawaiians were taken repeatedly for the economic use of whites . Over time , laws were passed to codify these advantages to whites and , most importantly , a set of beliefs was promulgated that those being discriminated against actually deserved it . It is this belief system that is still largely in place , though the expression of it has evolved to fit the socially acceptable norms of the times . However , the enormous economic disadvantage of African Americans , Hispanics and Native Americans is largely unchanged and we have a new and updated American rationale for why that 's " right " . The focus on " civil rights " has only helped to conceal the great disparities in equal rights .
domestication: 你一定记得，这个国家的歧视根源在于经济。非洲人在美洲的劳力被奴隶主掠夺，换取的只是勉强维持生命的饮食和遮风避雨的住所。原住民和夏威夷人的土地也被一次次夺走，用来满足白人的经济需求。随着时间推移，一系列法律出台，将这些白人享有的特权合法化，更重要的是，形成了一套被广泛传播的观念：那些受到歧视的人实际上活该如此。这套观念体系至今仍根深蒂固，虽然它的表达方式已经适应了时代的社会规范。然而，非裔美国人、西班牙裔和原住民的巨大经济劣势几乎没有改变，我们又有了新的、更现代的美国理由来解释为什么这是“正确的”。所谓“民权”运动，只不过掩盖了平等权利上巨大的不公。
foreignization: 你必须记住，这个国家歧视的根源是经济的。非洲人在美国的劳动被奴隶主为了换取基本的生活和住所而占有。美洲原住民和夏威夷人的土地被反复夺取，供白人经济使用。随着时间的推移，法律被制定以将这些优势合法化，最重要的是，一套信念被推广开来，即那些受到歧视的人实际上应得如此。这一套信念系统至今仍大体存在，尽管它的表达方式已经发展以适应时代的社会可接受规范。然而，非裔美国人、西班牙裔和原住民的巨大经济劣势在很大程度上没有改变，我们有一个新的、更新的美国理由来解释为什么那是“正确的”。对“公民权利”的关注只帮助掩盖了平等权利上的巨大差异。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

You must recall that the roots of discrimination in this country are economic . The labor of Africans in America was appropriated for the benefits of slave holders in exchange for subsistence nutrition and shelter . The lands of native Americans and Hawaiians were taken repeatedly for the economic use of whites . Over time , laws were passed to codify these advantages to whites and , most importantly , a set of beliefs was promulgated that those being discriminated against actually deserved it . It is this belief system that is still largely in place , though the expression of it has evolved to fit the socially acceptable norms of the times . However , the enormous economic disadvantage of African Americans , Hispanics and Native Americans is largely unchanged and we have a new and updated American rationale for why that 's " right " . The focus on " civil rights " has only helped to conceal the great disparities in equal rights .

source: There is no good reason to default to Highlights . source: Deal and Coupon sites have garnered a lot of attention this year . Groupon , the most popular of them , has been in the news plenty due to rumors about Google showing an interest for them . Is there any chance for you as a developer to get access to huge dataset of deals and coupons , possibly containing Groupon deals to and offer it to users of your application ? 8coupons.com definitely thinks so and it has launched the 8coupons API for exactly that purpose .

source: It is totally possible and best practice to visualize any piece of data that you have , even if it is with simple pictograms -- it is possible to simply complicated data with practice . If you 're worried about the integrity of your data viz , then keep the graphs simpler and focus on the typography and maybe add a textured background to pretty up the design . And Amy is right -- plan bar charts and pie charts are a no-no ! Anyone can make those !

source: permanently embedded into the carpets ( who puts carpeting in fraternities ? ) . The walls , sticky from the popping of Andr bottles and the adhesive of elaborate paper decorations . Consider for a moment those decorations . This is where the typical fraternity progressive has the potential to get awkward . To a group of Stanford fratstars looking just looking to have a good time , the theme seems innocent enough , yet unfortunately one station presents an uncomfortable situation : Paper bricks line the walls , cleverly forming a miniature Great Wall of China . Fine , right ? Almost , until one notices that the station 's beverage is a sake bomb . Sake , of course , is from Japan . The Great Wall of China on the other hand , well , is in China . Not a move that many people would call delicate .
domestication: 永久地嵌在地毯里了（谁会在兄弟会里铺地毯啊？）。墙上粘乎乎的，都是安德饮料溅出来的和那些精心制作的纸装饰品的胶水留下的痕迹。想想这些装饰吧。这可是典型的兄弟会聚会容易出岔子的地方。对一群只想玩得开心的斯坦福兄弟会明星来说，这个主题看起来还挺无辜的，但不幸的是，有一个站台的设计让人感到不自在：墙上用纸砖巧妙地搭成了一个迷你长城。好吧，这看起来没什么问题，直到你注意到这个站台的饮料是烧酒炸弹。烧酒当然是日本的，而长城嘛，明摆着在中国。这不是个能让人觉得细心的举动。

source: Time was when little booklets , explaining a strange old world , were given to each GI getting off the troopship in Liverpool.These lists mean much less these days than they did even in the 70s or 80s . source: If this next generation Planck Telescope shows that there is no onvious distortions caused by gravity waves , it will rule out the Big Bang plus inflation theory -an add-on theory that explains the phenomenal sudden expansion of space from a tiny point . In it 's place will be new models that support what many leading cosmologists see as our universe to be proved to be one of just many in an eternal cycle of birth and rebirth .
domestication: 如果下一代普朗克望远镜显示没有明显的由引力波引起的扭曲，那么大爆炸加膨胀理论——这个解释了空间从一个微小的点突然膨胀的附加理论——就要被排除了。取而代之的将是新的模型，这些模型支持许多顶尖宇宙学家的看法，认为我们的宇宙只是众多宇宙中的一个，在永恒的生死循环中。
foreignization: 如果下一代普朗克望远镜显示没有明显的由引力波引起的扭曲，这将排除大爆炸加膨胀理论——这一附加理论解释了空间从一个微小点突然膨胀的壮观现象。取而代之的将是新的模型，支持许多领先宇宙学家认为我们的宇宙只是在永恒的生灭循环中众多宇宙之一的观点。

source: When I asked Lifehacker readers and other people on the web how they would prefer to receive the bad news themselves , the answers varied quite a bit . For the most part , people fell into two camps : either they preferred to hear the bad news quickly and rip the bandage off , or they simply wanted no confrontation whatsoever and wanted to get the tacit message through a lack of contact . So how do you tell what a specific person prefers ? You ask .
domestication: 当我问《生活黑客》的读者和其他网友他们希望如何接收坏消息时，大家的回答五花八门。大体上，人们分成两类：一类是希望快刀斩乱麻，直接听到坏消息，就像撕创可贴一样；另一类则是完全不想面对，宁愿通过对方不再联系来间接得知。那怎么知道某个人的偏好呢？直接问就是了。
foreignization: 当我问Lifehacker的读者和其他网络上的人他们希望如何接收坏消息时，答案差异很大。大多数情况下，人们分为两个阵营：要么他们希望快速听到坏消息，迅速揭过这一页；要么他们根本不想有任何 confrontation，并希望通过缺乏联系来传递隐含的信息。那么，你怎么知道某个具体的人更偏好哪种方式呢？你问问他们。

source: So we treated the decision of who to vote for in presidential elections as an evaluation of the individual candidates--which one seemed smarter , more likely to do the right things for whatever we considered the most important issues , the biggest problems . I voted for John Anderson in my first election as a voter , in 1980 . Other years I sometimes voted for a Dem and other times a Rep.
domestication: 所以，我们在总统选举中选择投票给谁，就像是在评价候选人个人——看谁更聪明，谁能更好地解决我们认为最重要的问题，最大的难题。我第一次投票是在1980年，投给了约翰·安德森。后来的几年里，有时候我会投给民主党候选人，有时候又会投给共和党候选人。
foreignization: 所以我们对待总统选举中投票给谁的决定是基于对候选人的个人评价——哪一个看起来更聪明，更有可能为我们认为最重要的问题、最大的问题做正确的事情。我在1980年第一次作为选民投票时投给了约翰·安德森。在其他年份，我有时投票给民主党候选人，有时则投票给共和党候选人。

17 他向他们说了许多类似的话，告诉他们人不能为自己的罪过赎罪，每个人在今生的遭遇都是按照生物的管理；因此，每个人根据自己的天资而繁荣，每个人都根据自己的力量而征服；并且，无论一个人做了什么，都不是犯罪。

source: The tragic death of a woman denied an abortion in Ireland should catalyze the Irish government to fulfill its international human rights obligation to ensure access to safe and legal abortions . Savita Halappanavar , 31 , who was 17 weeks pregnant , died from septicemia on October 28 , 2012 at a hospital in Galway after she was refused an abortion and miscarried .
domestication: 爱尔兰一名女子因被拒绝堕胎而身亡的悲剧，应该促使爱尔兰政府履行其国际人权义务，确保妇女能够安全合法地进行堕胎。31岁的萨维塔·哈拉帕纳瓦尔怀孕17周，在2012年10月28日因败血症在高威的一家医院去世。之前，她曾请求堕胎，但遭到了拒绝，最终流产，不幸离世。这事儿真是一出悲剧，政府得赶紧采取行动了。
foreignization: 一名妇女在爱尔兰被拒绝堕胎后悲惨死亡，这一事件应促使爱尔兰政府履行其国际人权义务，确保安全和合法的堕胎权利。萨维塔·哈拉帕纳瓦尔，31岁，怀孕17周，于2012年10月28日在戈尔韦的一家医院因败血症去世，此前她被拒绝堕胎并流产。

source: complete-The oldest manuscripts read , " fully assured . " It is translated , " fully persuaded , " Ro 4:21 ; 14:5 . In the expression " perfect , " he refers to what he has already said , Col 1:28 ; 2:2 ; 3:14 . " Perfect " implies the attainment of the full maturity of a Christian . Bengel joins " in all the will of God " with " stand . "
domestication: 最古老的抄本上写着：“完全有把握。”这个词被翻译成“完全信服”，见罗马书4:21；14:5。这里提到的“完全”，指的是他前面已经说过的内容，如歌罗西书1:28；2:2；3:14。“完全”意味着达到基督徒成熟的最高境界。 Bengel 把“在神的一切旨意中”与“站稳”连在一起讲。

source: So sit back and enjoy as the American voter continues his predictable ideological convergence to the rest of the world and his economic convergence to the world average inevitably continues ... The decline will prompt a gloomy electorate to vote itself a lot more additional " care " government packages ... paid by others ... some other greedy fools that will keep working outcompeting the rest of the world so that an increasingly indolent American middle class can maintain its six times world average standard of living ... sure ... just have HOPE and it 'll happen ...
domestication: 所以，坐稳了，看美国选民如何一步步地跟上世界意识形态的潮流，经济水平也不可避免地向世界平均水平靠拢……这种衰退会让心情沉重的选民们投票给自己更多的“关怀”福利大礼包……这些费用当然由别人来买单……那些贪婪的傻瓜们会继续努力工作，超越世界其他国家，好让越来越懒散的美国中产阶级还能维持他们六倍于世界平均水平的生活标准……没错……只要心存希望，一切都会如愿以偿……
foreignization: 所以，请坐下来享受吧，因为美国选民将继续可预测地在意识形态上与世界其他地区趋同，并且其经济与世界平均水平的趋同也必将持续……这种衰落将促使情绪低落的选民为自己投票更多的“关怀”政府方案……由其他人支付……一些其他的贪婪愚人将继续努力超越世界其他地区，以便越来越懒惰的美国中产阶级能够维持其六倍于世界平均水平的生活标准……当然……只要怀有希望，一切都会实现……

source: " The America I have grown up with and , as a Navy veteran , have protected for over fourteen years no longer exists . It has been painful to watch our elected officials destroy what our forefathers had fought and died for . Our children and their children will not have the same opportunities that we have had if we do not act . " - Charles J.
domestication: 我从小长大的美国，作为海军退伍军人保护了十多年的美国，已经不复存在了。看着我们选举出来的官员毁掉先辈们浴血奋战才换来的成果，真是痛心疾首。如果我们再不采取行动，我们的孩子和孙子们将不会再有我们曾经拥有的机会。——查尔斯·J.

source: i know that if i am sensitive to the spirit while making every decision in my life , i will be happier than i could ever anticipate . i know that i will be blessed with a choice son to be my partner and i will love him deeply and fully . i know that my life may go in a completely different direction than i have expected and planned for but if it 's the Lord 's will and in the Lord 's timing , i will become the best version of me and will be fulfilled by my experiences .
domestication: 我知道，只要我在生活中做每个决定时都能感受到心灵的指引，我就会比想象中更幸福。我知道我会有一个贴心的儿子成为我的伴侣，我将会深深地、全心全意地爱他。我知道生活可能会走向我未曾预料和计划的方向，但只要这是上帝的旨意，顺应上帝的时间表，我就能成为最好的自己，我的经历也会让我感到满足。
foreignization: 我知道，如果我在生活中做每一个决定时都敏感于圣灵，我会比我能预想到的更快乐。我知道我将得到一个选择的儿子作为我的伴侣，我会深深地、完全地爱他。我知道我的生活可能会朝着一个与我预期和计划完全不同的方向发展，但如果这是主的旨意，并在主的时间，我将成为最好的自己，并通过我的经历感到满足。

source: In the prologue of Margaret Craven 's I Heard An Owl Call My Name , a doctor explains to a bishop that a newly ordained priest is terminally ill : a few active years left , then a few as an invalid . source: The pending merger , which was widely followed by the antitrust bar amidst reports that the FTC was gearing up to fight the deal in court , was announced in August . The FTC alleged that the deal as originally proposed would have harmed competition at 72 airports around the United States and reduced the number of major competitors from four to three .
domestication: 这项备受瞩目的合并案早在八月就已宣布，当时有报道称美国联邦贸易委员会（FTC）正准备在法庭上挑战这笔交易。FTC指控，按照最初提议的合并方案，将在全美72个机场损害市场竞争，并将主要竞争对手从四个减少到三个。这事儿闹得沸沸扬扬，牵动了不少反垄断律师的心。

source: Many are wondering how to make the treadmill stop . And if it stops : Will young people still be as smart , as accomplished , as respected ? If they get off the treadmill : Will they still be able to live a good life ? --- William Damon , Stanford School of Education professor and psychologist , has spent years studying this set of issues and believes that it is a sense of purpose -- intrinsic , sustaining and noble -- that is missing in the majority of today 's youth , causing many of them to drift and founder . And it is this lack of purpose that should be attracting community attention , and not just its by-product , stress .
domestication: 很多人都在琢磨怎么才能让这个“跑步机”停下来。一旦停了：年轻人还能像现在这样聪明、有成就、受人尊敬吗？如果他们从“跑步机”上下来：还能过上好日子吗？——斯坦福大学教育学院的教授兼心理学家威廉·达蒙多年研究这些问题，他认为，当今大多数年轻人缺少的是一种内在的、持久的、崇高的目标感，这让很多人迷失方向、陷入困境。真正应该引起社会关注的，不是这种无目的状态的副产品——压力，而是这种无目的状态本身。

source: Credit cards are accepted only at major hotels , some grocery stores , and a few restaurants . Local personal checks from U.S. citizens are accepted only at exchange bureaus and only from U.S. citizens who are resident in The Gambia . There are a few ATMs in the Banjul area , but they often malfunction or fail to issue receipts . ATMs only accept VISA cards for international transactions and only dispense a maximum of about $140.00 ( in local currency ) per transaction , with three transactions allowed per day . Money transfers are widely available at Western Union branch offices in The Gambia .

source: Adoptions and application of Multi-Modal LOS standards can help create a more multi-modal transport system , resulting in reduced automobile travel and increased use of alternative modes . Impacts vary , depending on specific conditions , but large reductions in automobile travel are possible if improved transportation planning analysis leads to significant improvements in alternative mode service quality .  Benefits And Costs
domestication: 采用和应用多模式LOS标准能帮助打造更加多元的交通系统，从而减少私家车出行，增加使用其他出行方式。具体影响因情况而异，但如果通过改进交通规划分析，显著提高其他出行方式的服务质量，就能大幅减少私家车出行。这背后的利弊得失值得好好权衡。

source: Clumsy , unintelligent , childish , and pure goofy are some of the few words that describes Goofy . Aside from this he is extremely lovable and very charming which is shown when he confessed his love for Clarabelle . To his friends Mickey and Donald he is sometimes considered annoying , but they still care for him and they count him as a close friend .

source: Many passengers are concerned about safety , but unfortunately there 's no clear answer about where you should sit in order to fare best in a plane crash . One study suggests that you may have a higher chance of survival during a plane crash if you 're seated in the rear of an aircraft . However , another more recent study contradicts those findings , indicating that the safest place to sit is near the front of the plane within five rows of an emergency exit .
domestication: 许多乘客都担心安全问题，但遗憾的是，关于飞机失事时坐在哪儿最安全，并没有明确的答案。有一项研究指出，如果你坐在飞机的后部，生存的机会可能会更大。然而，另一项更近期的研究却得出了相反的结论，认为最安全的位置是在飞机前部，靠近紧急出口的五排座位内。
foreignization: 许多乘客担心安全问题，但不幸的是，关于你应该坐在飞机的哪个位置以在飞机坠毁时获得最好的结果，没有明确的答案。一项研究建议，如果你坐在飞机后部，可能在飞机坠毁时有更高的生存机会。然而，另一项更近期的研究反驳了这些发现，指出最安全的座位是在飞机前部靠近紧急出口的五排之内。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Many passengers are concerned about safety , but unfortunately there 's no clear answer about where you should sit in order to fare best in a plane crash . One study suggests that you may have a higher chance of survival during a plane crash if you 're seated in the rear of an aircraft . However , another more recent study contradicts those findings , indicating that the safest place to sit is near the front of the plane within five rows of an emergency exit .

source: I for one love it that we have the possibility to listen to every single note that Howard Shore recorded for the films - music for which he went through stress , worry , and god knows what emotions . For TTT , he 's worked himself into the ground over a period that lasted well over six months with the firm will to create something worthy of remembrance , he had barely any sleep in those times , just to do Tolkien 's book justice , to translate it into unbelievably complex music and to give us a bone- chilling experience - and I think that deserves at least an ounce of gratitude .
domestication: 我特别喜欢我们能听到霍华德·肖为电影录制的每一个音符，他为此经历了多少压力、焦虑，甚至天知道还有多少种情绪。为了《指环王》，他整整六个多月几乎拼了命，下定决心要创作出值得铭记的音乐，那段时间他几乎没怎么合眼，就是为了对得起托尔金的书，把它转化为难以置信的复杂音乐，给我们带来一种毛骨悚然的体验。我觉得这至少值得我们心存感激。
foreignization: 我本人非常喜欢我们有这种可能去聆听霍华德·肖为电影录制的每一个音符——他为此经历了压力、焦虑，天知道还有哪些情绪。对于《指环王》，他在长达六个月多的时间里几乎耗尽了心力，坚定地想要创作出值得铭记的作品，在那段时间里他几乎没有睡过觉，只是为了公正地对待托尔金的书，将其转化为难以置信复杂的音乐，并带给我们一种毛骨悚然的体验——我认为这至少值得我们给予一丁点的感激。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

I for one love it that we have the possibility to listen to every single note that Howard Shore recorded for the films - music for which he went through stress , worry , and god knows what emotions . source: Multi-modal LOS Indicators can help guide planning decisions to favor efficient modes and trips for transport system Prioritization for a Green Transportation Hierarchy . This essentially reverses priorities of transport planning which relies on roadway Level-of-Service ratings to allocate resources to increase automobile traffic volume and speed , with little consideration of other modes and problems .
domestication: 多模式LOS指标能帮助规划决策，优先考虑高效的交通方式和出行，促进绿色交通体系的建设。这实际上扭转了以往交通规划的优先级，过去主要依赖道路服务水平评级来分配资源，一味追求增加汽车流量和速度，却很少顾及其他交通方式和存在的问题。
foreignization: 多模式LOS指标可以帮助指导规划决策，优先考虑运输系统的绿色交通层次中的高效模式和行程。这实际上逆转了依赖道路服务水平评级来分配资源以增加汽车交通量和速度的交通规划优先级，而对其他模式和问题考虑较少。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Multi-modal LOS Indicators can help guide planning decisions to favor efficient modes and trips for transport system Prioritization for a Green Transportation Hierarchy . This essentially reverses priorities of transport planning which relies on roadway Level-of-Service ratings to allocate resources to increase automobile traffic volume and speed , with little consideration of other modes and problems .
多模式LOS指标能帮助规划决策，优先考虑高效的交通方式和出行，促进绿色交通体系的建设。这实际上扭转了以往交通规划的优先级，过去主要依赖道路服务水平评级来分配资源，一味追求增加汽车流量和速度，却很少顾及其他交通方式和存在的问题。

source: The publication by Marc van Opijnen 5 focuses on the structuring of information ( in the legal field ) and creates a link between the topic of our study ( the quality of research data ) and a central theme of the SURFshare programme ( enhanced publications ) , concluding that it is not technology that is the main challenge but scientific/scholarly professionalism .
domestication: 马克·范·奥皮恩在第五篇出版物中，关注了法律领域信息的结构化，并将我们研究的主题（研究数据的质量）与SURFshare项目的核心主题（增强出版物）联系起来，得出结论说，主要挑战不是技术问题，而是科研人员的专业素养。

source: " At this time the Toms River Police Department is implementing a plan which would enable residents of the Township to access their barrier island homes and businesses . Since the beginning of this event Toms River Township has actedin the best interest of the citizens of Toms River . Toms River Township is proud to report that we have had no loss of life or serious injury since the start of this disaster . We plan to keep it that way , and this is why we will continue tomove forward in an organized fashion regarding entry to this devastated area . We fully understand the frustrationour residents have endured with the inability to view their homes , and we are working diligently to accomplish this goal , " according to the township announcement .
domestication: 目前，汤姆斯河警察局正在实施一项计划，让镇上的居民可以回到他们位于屏障岛的家园和店铺。从一开始，汤姆斯河镇就一直把镇民的利益放在首位。值得高兴的是，自灾难发生以来，我们没有出现人员伤亡，也没有严重的受伤情况。我们希望能保持这样的状况，因此关于进入受灾区域，我们将继续有条不紊地推进。我们也非常理解居民们因为不能回家看看而感到的沮丧，我们正努力工作，争取早日实现这个目标。
foreignization: 目前，汤姆斯河警察局正在实施一项计划，该计划将使镇上的居民能够进入他们的屏障岛住宅和企业。自此次事件开始以来，汤姆斯河镇一直以汤姆斯河市民的最佳利益行事。汤姆斯河镇自豪地报告，自灾难开始以来，我们没有发生任何人员死亡或重伤。我们计划保持这种状态，这就是为什么我们将继续以有组织的方式推进进入这一受灾区域的工作。我们完全理解我们的居民由于无法查看他们的家园而遭受的沮丧，我们正在努力不懈地实现这一目标，”根据镇公告。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

" At this time the Toms River Police Department is implementing a plan which would enable residents of the Township to access their barrier island homes and businesses . Toms River Township is proud to report that we have had no loss of life or serious injury since the start of this disaster . We plan to keep it that way , and this is why we will continue tomove forward in an organized fashion regarding entry to this devastated area . We fully understand the frustrationour residents have endured with the inability to view their homes , and we are working diligently to accomplish this goal , " according to the township announcement .

source: Me : I need a quote to refinish my pink sink in my bathroom Guy : Why do n't you just tear it out and put in granite ? It 'll look real nice . Me : ( dying a little inside ) I think you 'll find that restoration is more eco-friendly and there is a growing movement to preserve the magic of the pink bathroom . We have a 1955 Atomic Ranch and I think granite would be inappropriate . There 's this website ...
domestication:
我：我需要个报价，翻新一下我卫生间的粉红色水槽。
师傅：你干嘛不直接拆了，换成花岗岩的？看起来可漂亮了。
我：（心里在滴血）我觉得你可能不知道，修复其实更环保，现在还流行保留粉色浴室的魔力呢。我们家是1955年的原子牧场风格，我觉得装花岗岩不太合适。我找到了一个网站……

We have a 1955 Atomic Ranch and I think granite would be inappropriate . There 's this website ...

我：我需要一个报价来翻新我的浴室里的粉色水槽。
盖伊：为什么不直接把它拆掉换成花岗岩呢？看起来会很漂亮。
我：（内心有点崩溃）我觉得你会发现修复更环保，而且有一股日益壮大的潮流是要保护粉色浴室的魔力。我们有一个1955年的原子牧场风格的房子，我觉得花岗岩不合适。有个网站……

source: I feel like no one else is saying this , and since I 've not ever been one to hold back what 's on my mind I absolutely will -- enough is enough . I 've had it with incremental updates to Android smartphones every two weeks , I 've had it with the super-sized ridiculousness , and I 've had it with all of these marketing gimmicks . Just focus on a quality product , and you wo n't have to release eight " flagship " models a year .
domestication: 我觉得没人说这事，而我这个人向来是有什么说什么，这次也绝不例外——够了，真的受够了。我受够了安卓手机每隔两周就来个小幅更新，受够了那些大得离谱的设计，还有那些营销噱头，真是让人忍无可忍。只要你们能专注做好产品，何必一年推出八款所谓的“旗舰”机型呢？

source: The preparation of financial statements in conformity with accounting principles generally accepted in the United States necessarily requires management to make estimates and assumptions that affect the amounts reported in the financial statements . We regularly evaluate estimates and judgments based on historical experience and other relevant facts and circumstances . Actual results could differ from those estimates .
domestication: 编制符合美国公认会计原则的财务报表，必然要求管理层作出估计和假设，这些估计和假设会影响报表中的数据。我们经常根据历史经验和当前实际情况来评估这些估计和判断。不过，实际结果可能与这些估计有所不同。
foreignization: 按照美国普遍接受的会计原则编制财务报表必然要求管理层做出估计和假设，这些估计和假设会影响财务报表中报告的金额。我们定期根据历史经验和其它相关事实与情况评估估计和判断。实际结果可能与这些估计有所不同。

source: Jim Butcher , author of The Dresden Files and Codex Alera series does book signings and fan events fairly frequently , and often reserves time for a Q &A; section . However , when he is asked a question which he considers to be too spoilerific , he has developed a habit of saying " I 'm not gon na tell you , " in a singsong voice .

source: At the same time , these leaders say that federal policy tends to be geared more towards issues related to distressed , urban school districts , which may not always fit comfortably with the agendas that suburban school systems may already be implementing with some success . For example , Dale said that the current national focus on tying teachers ' pay to student test scores does n't necessarily reinforce Fairfax 's work , which is attempting to link student performance to teams of teachers , rather than individual educators .
domestication: 这些领导们说，联邦政策往往更倾向于关注那些困境中的城市学区问题，这可能与郊区学校系统已经成功实施的议程不太合拍。比如，戴尔就提到，现在全国都在强调将教师薪酬与学生考试成绩挂钩，但这种方式并不一定能够加强费尔法克斯的工作。费尔法克斯试图把学生的表现与教师团队联系起来，而不是单个老师。
foreignization: 同时，这些领导人表示，联邦政策往往更倾向于处理与处境困难的城市学区相关的问题，这可能并不总是与郊区学区已经成功实施的议程完全契合。例如，戴尔说，当前全国关注将教师薪酬与学生测试成绩挂钩的做法，并不一定支持费尔法克斯的工作，费尔法克斯试图将学生表现与教师团队而不是个别教育者联系起来。

source: But my wife and I saw this differently in the years after our son , Luke , was born . When he was 4 months old , Luke began attending a preschool located in San Francisco 's Fillmore/Western Addition neighborhood . One of the many benefits of the school was its great racial diversity . For years our son never once mentioned the color of anyone 's skin . We never once mentioned skin color , either . We thought it was working perfectly .
domestication: 但是，儿子卢克出生后的几年里，我和妻子的看法有所不同。卢克四个月大的时候，就开始上旧金山菲尔莫/西部添区的一所幼儿园了。这所学校的好处之一就是种族多样性非常丰富。好多年里，儿子一次都没有提到过任何人的肤色。我们也没有提过。我们都觉得这样挺好的，挺完美的。

source: When investigating the maternal fecal microbiota we found that the allergic and non-allergic mothers were similarly colonized with regards to the bacteria analyzed . A correlation between maternal and infant B. breve and B. bifidum colonization was observed the first week of life . Unfortunately , neither breast milk samples nor vaginal swabs were collected thus we can not exclude that the infants are differently exposed . Grnlund et al has reported lower counts of bifidobacteria in breast milk from allergic mothers compared to non-allergic mothers 37 .
domestication: 在调查母亲的肠道菌群时，我们发现过敏和非过敏的母亲在所分析的细菌上定植情况相似。婴儿出生第一周内，观察到母亲和婴儿体内短双歧杆菌和两岐双歧杆菌的定植有关联。可惜的是，没有收集母乳样本和阴道拭子，因此不能排除婴儿受到不同暴露的可能性。Grnlund等人曾报告，过敏母亲的母乳中双歧杆菌的数量比非过敏母亲少。
foreignization: 在调查母体粪便微生物群时，我们发现过敏和非过敏母亲在分析的细菌方面具有相似的定植情况。观察到在生命的第一周，母亲与婴儿的B. breve和B. bifidum定植之间存在相关性。遗憾的是，没有收集母乳样本或阴道拭子，因此我们不能排除婴儿受到不同暴露的可能性。Grnlund等人报告称，与非过敏母亲相比，过敏母亲的母乳中双歧杆菌的数量较低。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

When investigating the maternal fecal microbiota we found that the allergic and non-allergic mothers were similarly colonized with regards to the bacteria analyzed . A correlation between maternal and infant B. breve and B. bifidum colonization was observed the first week of life . Unfortunately , neither breast milk samples nor vaginal swabs were collected thus we can not exclude that the infants are differently exposed . Grnlund et al has reported lower counts of bifidobacteria in breast milk from allergic mothers compared to non-allergic mothers 37 .
在调查母亲的肠道菌群时，我们发现过敏和非过敏的母亲在所分析的细菌上定植情况相似。婴儿出生第一周内，观察到母亲和婴儿体内短双歧杆菌和两岐双歧杆菌的定植有关联。可惜的是，没有收集母乳样本和阴道拭子，因此不能排除婴儿受到不同暴露的可能性。Grnlund等人曾报告，过敏母亲的母乳中双歧杆菌的数量比非过敏母亲少。

When investigating the maternal fecal microbiota we found that the allergic and non-allergic mothers were similarly colonized with regards to the bacteria analyzed . A correlation between maternal and infant B. breve and B. bifidum colonization was observed the first week of life . Unfortunately , neither breast milk samples nor vaginal swabs were collected thus we can not exclude that the infants are differently exposed . Grnlund et al has reported lower counts of bifidobacteria in breast milk from allergic mothers compared to non-allergic mothers 37 .
在调查母体粪便微生物群时，我们发现过敏和非过敏母亲在分析的细菌方面具有相似的定植情况。观察到在生命的第一周，母亲与婴儿的B. breve和B. bifidum定植之间存在相关性。遗憾的是，没有收集母乳样本或阴道拭子，因此我们不能排除婴儿受到不同暴露的可能性。Grnlund等人报告称，与非过敏母亲相比，过敏母亲的母乳中双歧杆菌的数量较低。

source: Nate , what do you think about revamping this site after the election so we can keep discussing current events ? I think that would be a great thing to do , because I had a very hard time finding a respectful forum where people from all political vantage points could discuss the news ( which has been mainly election-oriented for a while ) .
domestication: 内特，你觉得选举结束后重新整修这个网站怎么样？这样我们就能继续讨论时事了。我觉得这主意不错，因为我之前很难找到一个大家能互相尊重、不同政治立场的人都能一起讨论新闻的平台，最近的新闻主要都是跟选举有关的。
foreignization: Nate，你认为选举后重新整顿这个网站怎么样，这样我们就可以继续讨论时事了？我觉得这样做很好，因为我很难找到一个尊重所有政治立场的人可以讨论新闻的论坛（这几个月主要都是与选举相关的）。

source: As for the substance of Stephanie Vanderslice 's post , I hope most educational opportunities include ideals . A high bar that I could n't already meet has been important to my education . source: The goal , broadly , was to prevent or minimize the influence of Chilean Communists or Marxists in the government that would emerge from the 1964 election . Consequently , the U.S , sought the most effective way of opposing FRAP ( Popular Action Front ) , an alliance of Chilean Socialists , Communists , and several miniscule non-Marxist parties of the left which backed the candidacy of Salvador Allende . Specifically , the policy called for support of the Christian Democratic Party , the Democratic Front ( a coalition of rightist parties ) , and a variety of anti-communist propaganda and organizing activities .
domestication: 大体上，目标是防止或减少智利共产党人或马克思主义者在1964年选举后产生的政府中的影响。因此，美国寻求最有效的办法来反对FRAP（人民行动阵线），这是一个由智利社会主义者、共产党人和几个微小的非马克思主义左翼政党组成的联盟，支持萨尔瓦多·阿连德的竞选。具体来说，政策要求支持基督教民主党、民主阵线（右翼政党的联盟）以及各种反共宣传和组织活动。

source: Ideas often being the determining factor in a government 's decision-making process , it was the principled and causal beliefs originating in its ideas that provided the Qing government with a ' road map ' , enabling them clearly to identify and understand the relationship between process and objective . 88 Around the 1860s , a new understanding of current events , a new understanding of China -- West relations , and changing worldviews and value systems , all combined to transform the traditional mode of thought . If the late Qing government were to sustain its regime while facing internal and external difficulties , it needed , from a logical point of view , to change its foreign policies .  Late Qing Faithfulness and Justice Diplomacy and Efforts to Reconcile with the West
domestication: 在政府的决策过程中，思想往往是决定性的因素。正是这些源于思想的原则性和因果性信念，为清朝提供了一张“路线图”，让他们能够清晰地识别和理解过程与目标之间的关系。到了19世纪60年代，对时局的新认识、对中国与西方关系的新理解，以及世界观和价值观的变化，共同促成了传统思维方式的转变。如果晚清政府想要在内忧外患中维持其统治，从逻辑上讲，就必须改变其外交政策。晚清的忠诚正义外交及其与西方和解的努力，便是这一转变的具体体现。
foreignization: 思想往往是政府决策过程中的决定性因素，正是源于这些思想的原则性和因果性信念为清政府提供了一张“路线图”，使他们能够清晰地识别和理解过程与目标之间的关系。88 19世纪60年代左右，对时局的新认识、对中国--西方关系的新认识以及世界观和价值观的变化共同作用，改变了传统的思维方式。如果晚清政府要在面对内外困境的情况下维持其政权，从逻辑上讲，就需要改变其对外政策。 晚清忠诚正义外交及努力与西方和解

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Ideas often being the determining factor in a government 's decision-making process , it was the principled and causal beliefs originating in its ideas that provided the Qing government with a ' road map ' , enabling them clearly to identify and understand the relationship between process and objective . 88 Around the 1860s , a new understanding of current events , a new understanding of China -- West relations , and changing worldviews and value systems , all combined to transform the traditional mode of thought . If the late Qing government were to sustain its regime while facing internal and external difficulties , it needed , from a logical point of view , to change its foreign policies .  Late Qing Faithfulness and Justice Diplomacy and Efforts to Reconcile with the West

source: Write a response in which you discuss the extent to which you agree or disagree with the statement and explain your reasoning for the position you take . In developing and supporting your position , you should consider ways in which the statement might or might not hold true and explain how these considerations shape your position . As technology becomes more and more advance and prevalent , people become more and more reliant on technology . With more powerful computers and softwares , people do become a bit less capable of thinking of some aspects of a problem . However , this does not mean that the thinking ability of humans are detiorating nor will it any time soon .
domestication:
对于这个观点，我有我的看法。技术越来越发达，普及率也越来越高，这是不争的事实。人们确实越来越依赖技术了，比如有了更强大的电脑和软件，大家在某些方面思考问题的能力确实有所下降。但是，这并不意味着人类的思维能力在衰退，至少短时间内不会。

要想清楚这个问题，得从两个方面来看。一方面，技术的发展确实让很多工作变得更简单了，比如计算、数据处理这些，以前可能要花很长时间，现在几秒钟就搞定了。这样一来，人们自然会把这些任务交给机器，自己省心省力。另一方面，解放出来的精力可以用来做更有创意、更有挑战性的事情。比如说，我们可以花更多时间去学习新知识、探索未知领域，这些都不是机器能轻易做到的。

所以，技术进步带来的便利和依赖，其实是双刃剑。它让我们在某些方面变得“懒惰”，但同时也在其他方面激发了我们的潜能。关键在于我们如何平衡这种关系，利用好技术，而不是被技术束缚住手脚。总的来说，我不认为技术会让人类变笨，反而觉得它能帮助我们更好地发挥智慧。
foreignization: 请就你同意或不同意该陈述的程度进行讨论，并解释你所持立场的理由。在发展和支持你的立场时，你应该考虑该陈述可能成立或不成立的方式，并解释这些考虑如何影响你的立场。随着技术越来越先进和普及，人们变得越来越依赖技术。有了更强大的计算机和软件，人们在思考某些问题方面的能力确实有所下降。然而，这并不意味着人类的思维能力正在退化，也不会很快发生。

source: We bought our home 3 years ago and even though it is only 22 years old I was a bit surprised with the pink tiled bathroom . I assumed I would gut it ... but I am a changed woman ! source: They really do teach us that " flyover country " is full of racists and morons . I doubt that it 's true . What is true , however , is that the north east is full of academic elitists who know nothing about how the real world works . I live in Maryland and most of the people here are assholes . I hate it here and , if I had the financial resources , would gladly relocate to some place like Kansas or Montana .
domestication: 他们真的教我们说“飞地”里全是种族主义者和蠢货。我可不信这一套。不过有一说一，东北部确实不乏学术精英，但这些人对现实社会一窍不通。我住在马里兰，这儿的人大多数都不怎么样。我在这儿真是待够了，要是手头宽裕，我巴不得搬到堪萨斯或者蒙大拿去。

source: In Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows : Part 1 , the Ministry of Magic becomes this after Voldemort takes over . The Mooks wear gray versions of the standard Nazi uniform , higher officials like Runcorn wear longcoats similar to those of the SS , and the Ministry starts issuing anti-muggle-born propaganda very similar to the antisemitic tracts issued by the Third Reich . Similarly , Voldemort 's own Death Eaters wear hooded robes very similar to those of the Ku Klux Klan , but in black instead of white . When the regular Ministry of Magic temporarily become bad guys in Order Of The Phoenix , they go for a Stalin-era Soviet look .
domestication: 在《哈利·波特与死亡圣器》第一部中，伏地魔上台后，魔法部变成了这副模样。那些喽啰们穿着灰色的纳粹标准制服，像朗科恩这样的高官则穿上了类似党卫军的长大衣，魔法部还开始散发反麻瓜出身的宣传材料，内容和第三帝国的反犹太宣传册如出一辙。同样地，伏地魔的手下食死徒也穿着类似三K党的兜帽长袍，只是颜色是黑色而非白色。而在《凤凰社》里，当魔法部暂时变成坏蛋时，他们的形象又变成了斯大林时期的苏联风格。
foreignization: 在《哈利·波特与死亡圣器：第一部分》中，伏地魔接管后，魔法部变成了这样。喽啰们穿着灰色版本的标准纳粹制服，像朗科尔这样的高级官员则穿着类似于党卫军的长大衣，而魔法部开始发布与第三帝国发布的反犹太宣传册非常相似的反麻瓜出身的宣传材料。同样，伏地魔自己的食死徒穿着与三K党非常相似的带兜帽的长袍，但颜色是黑色而不是白色。当正常的魔法部在《凤凰社》中暂时变成坏人时，他们采用了斯大林时期的苏联风格。

Similarly , Voldemort 's own Death Eaters wear hooded robes very similar to those of the Ku Klux Klan , but in black instead of white . source: So Michael Peacock 's innocence is not merely a legal triumph , but an invitation to a shift in thinking . The responsibility of sex , pornography , and more broadly , the image is more and more becoming ours . Now is the time to investigate what that means or we 'll still be stuck in the old narrative , and we must be willing to do this as individuals . We must even go so far as to say that it is our right to decide whether we want to be corrupted or depraved .
domestication: 所以迈克尔·佩科克的清白不仅是法律上的胜利，更是呼唤我们转变思维方式。性、色情，更广泛地说，影像的责任越来越落在我们自己身上。现在是时候探讨这意味着什么了，否则我们还会困在旧的叙事里。我们必须有这个勇气，作为个人去面对这个问题。甚至可以说，决定我们是否愿意被腐蚀或堕落，这是我们的权利。
foreignization: 所以，迈克尔·佩科克的清白不仅仅是一场法律上的胜利，而是一种思维方式转变的邀请。性和色情，更广泛地说，图象的责任越来越多地落在我们身上。现在是时候调查这究竟意味着什么了，否则我们仍将被困在旧的叙事中，我们必须愿意以个人身份去做这件事。我们甚至必须走得更远，说我们有权利决定自己是否想要被腐蚀或堕落。

source: Nobody said he was n't Japanese . My point was that one of his secrets was spending 4 hrs on the road every day to get the best ingredients money could buy , which a chef does not have to be Japanese to do . As for Isenberg , Ito forgot more than Isenberg will ever know about preparing sushi . Being wealthy enough to travel the globe eating sushi , being able to write books and having the connections &; $$$$ to get them published does not make someone an expert on anything . Al Gore really does believe he invented the internet ! ! ! If he could find a publisher who was just as arrogant &; ignorant as he is who would publish a book proclaiming Gore created the internet better than 1/4 of the US population would believe it . Does that make it true ? I think not !
domestication: 没人说他不是日本人。我的意思是，他有个秘密，就是每天花4个小时在路上，只为买到最贵的食材，这事儿并不要求厨师非得是日本人。至于Isenberg，Ito对做寿司的了解，Isenberg一辈子也赶不上。有钱环游世界吃寿司，能写书，有关系网和钱让书出版，这些都不足以让人成为专家。阿尔·戈尔还真以为自己发明了互联网！如果能找到一个和他一样傲慢无知的出版商，出版一本书宣称戈尔创造了互联网，那美国四分之一以上的人可能都会相信。但这就能成真吗？我觉得不行！

source: Is there any legal complaint that can be made , either before the decision is made , or after a decision against the state , to charge the DOJ with violating the discovery rules that can reverse the decision in time for the election ? Or is the only alternative to appeal the ruling on this new information , which would no doubt happen after the election , which is exactly what Holder is trying to accomplish ? Once the election is over , he will care less if he gets overturned .
domestication: 在决定做出之前或之后，如果州败诉了，有没有什么法律手段可以起诉司法部违反了证据开示规则，从而及时推翻决定，赶上选举？或者唯一的办法只能是在获得新信息后提出上诉，但这无疑会在选举之后发生，而这正是霍尔德想要达到的目的。一旦选举结束，他就不在乎是否会被推翻了。

Is there any legal complaint that can be made , either before the decision is made , or after a decision against the state , to charge the DOJ with violating the discovery rules that can reverse the decision in time for the election ? Or is the only alternative to appeal the ruling on this new information , which would no doubt happen after the election , which is exactly what Holder is trying to accomplish ? Once the election is over , he will care less if he gets overturned .
在决定做出之前或之后，如果州败诉了，有没有什么法律手段可以起诉司法部违反了证据开示规则，从而及时推翻决定，赶上选举？或者唯一的办法只能是在获得新信息后提出上诉，但这无疑会在选举之后发生，而这正是霍尔德想要达到的目的。一旦选举结束，他就不在乎是否会被推翻了。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Is there any legal complaint that can be made , either before the decision is made , or after a decision against the state , to charge the DOJ with violating the discovery rules that can reverse the decision in time for the election ? Or is the only alternative to appeal the ruling on this new information , which would no doubt happen after the election , which is exactly what Holder is trying to accomplish ? Once the election is over , he will care less if he gets overturned .
在决定作出之前或在对国家不利的决定之后，是否有任何法律投诉可以提出，指控司法部违反了发现规则，从而及时推翻决定以赶上选举？或者唯一的替代方案是基于这些新信息对裁决提出上诉，而这无疑会在选举之后发生，这正是霍尔德试图实现的目标？一旦选举结束，他将不会那么在乎是否被推翻。

source: Gustavo Mohar Betancourt , Undersecretary of Mexico 's population , migration and religious affairs said , " This initiative aims to collaborate and fully support border state authorities by reducing the number of Mexican nationals who are repatriated to the border region . source: Not gon na necro a 7 month old thread , but when I post I try to be as proper with my written english as I can ( imperfect at times , I know ) . In my opinion , good sentence structure and spelling is one of the easiest ways to make people think you 're intelligent , at least at first glance . Occasionally I 'll purposely misspell/make up words to add a bit of personality to my posts .

source: Devin Grayson , writer of Nightwing #93 where the title character is implied to have been raped by a female cohort during a Heroic BSOD , evaded the question when asked to confirm what happened beyond it being " nonconsensual " . This is an irritating example , because the script for the issue does directly say that he was being raped . ( This may have something to do with the female cohort in question being suspected by many of being her Author Avatar / Mary Sue . )
domestication: 德文·格雷森是《夜翼》第93期的作者，在那期故事中，主角似乎被一个女性同伴在“英雄崩溃”期间强奸了。当被问到具体发生了什么时，格雷森只是含糊其辞，说那是“非自愿的”。这事儿挺让人恼火的，因为剧本里明明写着就是强奸。（可能是因为这个女性角色被很多人怀疑是作者的化身或玛丽苏角色吧。）

source: Going forward , the Arab League 's continued renaissance will depend on whether it expands its mandate , as well as capabilities , to address humanitarian , human rights , good governance , and peacekeeping challenges in the MENA region . Such reforms are essential if the League is to fulfill the seldom-invoked collective defense provisions of its Charter . Given the aforementioned divisions among its members , it is possible that we will see the emergence of a multi-speed Arab League -- characterized by emerging coalitions of the willing that want to move faster and further to develop real instruments of regional cooperative security .
domestication: 往后看，阿拉伯联盟的复兴能否持续，关键在于它是否能扩大其使命和能力，应对中东和北非地区的人权、人道主义、良政及维和挑战。这些改革至关重要，才能让联盟履行宪章中很少被提及的集体防御条款。考虑到成员国之间的分歧，未来可能会出现一个多速发展的阿拉伯联盟——形成一些愿意更快更远地推进区域合作安全机制的小集团。
foreignization: 展望未来，阿拉伯联盟的持续复兴将取决于它是否扩大其任务和能力，以应对中东和北非地区的人道主义、人权、善治和维和挑战。此类改革对于联盟履行其宪章中鲜少援引的集体防御条款至关重要。鉴于其成员之间的上述分歧，我们可能会看到一个多速的阿拉伯联盟的出现——其特点是出现了一些愿意更快、更远地发展区域合作安全实际工具的意愿联盟。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Given the aforementioned divisions among its members , it is possible that we will see the emergence of a multi-speed Arab League -- characterized by emerging coalitions of the willing that want to move faster and further to develop real instruments of regional cooperative security .

source: Some would argue the anthropic principle here . The universe exists , we exist , and therefore , the universe must be governed by laws and parameters that allow us to exist . The weakness of this argument is that it can be used to justify any explanation for the universe , if the explanation allows for the possibility of it at all . It is sort of the opposite to Occam 's Razor , a favorite theory that is often abused .
domestication: 有人会搬出人类中心原则来说事。宇宙存在，我们存在，所以宇宙必定遵循着让我们得以存在的法则和参数。但这种说法的弱点在于，它几乎可以为任何宇宙解释开绿灯，只要这种解释能自圆其说。这有点像是奥卡姆剃刀原理的反面，而这个原理常常被滥用。
foreignization: 有些人会在这里引用人择原理。宇宙存在，我们存在，因此，宇宙必定受制于允许我们存在的法则和参数。这种论点的弱点在于，它可以被用来为任何对宇宙的解释辩护，只要该解释允许这种可能性即可。这有点像是奥卡姆剃刀原则的反面，这是一个常被滥用的理论。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Some would argue the anthropic principle here . The universe exists , we exist , and therefore , the universe must be governed by laws and parameters that allow us to exist . The weakness of this argument is that it can be used to justify any explanation for the universe , if the explanation allows for the possibility of it at all . It is sort of the opposite to Occam 's Razor , a favorite theory that is often abused .
有人会搬出人类中心原则来说事。宇宙存在，我们存在，所以宇宙必定遵循着让我们得以存在的法则和参数。但这种说法的弱点在于，它几乎可以为任何宇宙解释开绿灯，只要这种解释能自圆其说。这有点像是奥卡姆剃刀原理的反面，而这个原理常常被滥用。

The weakness of this argument is that it can be used to justify any explanation for the universe , if the explanation allows for the possibility of it at all . It is sort of the opposite to Occam 's Razor , a favorite theory that is often abused .

source: Biology and Marine Biology are large and diverse fields . Questions about these careers often have a broad range of answers . For instance , I 'm often asked whether Marine Biologists SCUBA dive often . Well , that depends on the type of research they are conducting . If a scientist is studying populations of fish around a coral reef , then she/he would probably dive frequently . If the scientist were examining the chemical properties of a certain toxin , then he/she might spend a lot of time in a laboratory .  Q : What classes should you take to become a marine biologist ?
domestication: 生物学和海洋生物学都是庞大且多样的领域，关于这些职业的问题答案也是五花八门。比如，经常有人问我，海洋生物学家是不是经常潜水。这得看他们研究的具体内容了。如果科学家在研究珊瑚礁周围的鱼群，那肯定得频繁潜水。要是研究某种毒素的化学性质，那就得在实验室里泡着了。问：想成为海洋生物学家，应该上哪些课程？
foreignization: 生物学和海洋生物学是庞大且多样的领域。关于这些职业的问题通常有许多不同的答案。例如，我经常被问到海洋生物学家是否经常进行水肺潜水。这取决于他们正在进行的研究类型。如果科学家正在研究珊瑚礁周围的鱼类种群，那么他/她可能会频繁潜水。如果科学家正在检查某种毒素的化学性质，那么他/她可能会花大量时间在实验室里。问题：要成为海洋生物学家，你应该上哪些课程？

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Biology and Marine Biology are large and diverse fields . Questions about these careers often have a broad range of answers . For instance , I 'm often asked whether Marine Biologists SCUBA dive often . Well , that depends on the type of research they are conducting . If a scientist is studying populations of fish around a coral reef , then she/he would probably dive frequently . If the scientist were examining the chemical properties of a certain toxin , then he/she might spend a lot of time in a laboratory .  Q : What classes should you take to become a marine biologist ?
生物学和海洋生物学都是庞大且多样的领域，关于这些职业的问题答案也是五花八门。比如，经常有人问我，海洋生物学家是不是经常潜水。这得看他们研究的具体内容了。如果科学家在研究珊瑚礁周围的鱼群，那肯定得频繁潜水。要是研究某种毒素的化学性质，那就得在实验室里泡着了。问：想成为海洋生物学家，应该上哪些课程？

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Biology and Marine Biology are large and diverse fields . Questions about these careers often have a broad range of answers . For instance , I 'm often asked whether Marine Biologists SCUBA dive often . Well , that depends on the type of research they are conducting . If a scientist is studying populations of fish around a coral reef , then she/he would probably dive frequently . If the scientist were examining the chemical properties of a certain toxin , then he/she might spend a lot of time in a laboratory .  Q : What classes should you take to become a marine biologist ?
生物学和海洋生物学是庞大且多样的领域。关于这些职业的问题通常有许多不同的答案。例如，我经常被问到海洋生物学家是否经常进行水肺潜水。这取决于他们正在进行的研究类型。如果科学家正在研究珊瑚礁周围的鱼类种群，那么他/她可能会频繁潜水。如果科学家正在检查某种毒素的化学性质，那么他/她可能会花大量时间在实验室里。问题：要成为海洋生物学家，你应该上哪些课程？

source: I did n't manage to read past the first 2 chapters which were offered as a the free preview on my Kobo - I did n't want to waste my time and money after that , despite Kobo trying to sell it to me on every page of their website . Opening with her looking in the mirror was enough to put my hackels up . But as my father was a pilot , your mention of the helicopter name makes absolute sense to me . Charlie Tango is the radio call signal so the helicopter would be CT followed by a number . My father 's plane was Charlie Whiskey Foxtrot . Unlike ships and boats , flying beasts do n't often get called romantic names .

source: --Arrested a 26-year-old River Falls man for disorderly conduct in the 100 block of East Elm Street around 2 a.m . Saturday , Nov. 3 . The man allegedly snatched the purse from the mother of his child when he saw her downtown . He said he wanted back $100 that he gave her earlier . He was also upset to see the woman at the bars instead of at home with her two young children . The purse and its contents were recovered . A UW-River Falls police officer first caught the suspect on East Cascade Avenue .
domestication: 11月3日凌晨2点左右，警方在东榆树街100号街区抓获了一名26岁的河流瀑布城男子，罪名是扰乱公共秩序。这名男子据称在市中心看到前女友后，抢走了她手中的包，那女子正是他孩子的母亲。他说自己想要回之前给她的100美元。看到前女友在酒吧而不是和两个年幼的孩子待在家里，他非常生气。包和里面的物品后来都被找到了。最先发现嫌疑人的是一名威斯康星大学河流瀑布分校的警察，当时他在东卡斯凯德大道上巡逻。

source: The method for adding a retweet button to your blog is pretty much the same as adding Like Buttons above . First you 'll need to head over to the Twitter Retweet Button configuration page ( I actually prefer the TweetMeme retweet button because it seems a little more accurate ) . In either case you 'll want to copy the code provided for your configured button and paste it into your posts ( or optionally add it to every post by modifying your theme files ) .  Action #5 : Make a List of Every Blogger in Your Niche ( 30 minutes )
domestication: 给你的博客添加转发按钮的方法和上面加点赞按钮差不多。首先，你需要去Twitter的转发按钮配置页面（我个人更喜欢TweetMeme的转发按钮，感觉它更准一些）。不管是哪个，你都要复制为你配置好的按钮代码，然后粘贴到你的文章里（或者如果你愿意，也可以通过修改主题文件来让每篇文章都带上这个按钮）。第五步：列出你所在领域的所有博主（30分钟）

source: England sic is just a small island . Its roads and houses are small . With few exceptions , it does n't make things that people in the rest of the world want to buy . And if it had n't been separated from the continent by water , it almost certainly would have been lost to Hitler 's ambitions . Yet only two lifetimes ago , Britain ruled the largest and wealthiest empire in the history of humankind . Britain controlled a quarter of the earth 's land and a quarter of the earth 's population .

( sitting in chair , facing wall , not able to move , speak , touch anything , do schoolwork , or nap -- must sit up ) for 1 hour . source: Vice President Joe Biden during the VP debate pushed the red line out much further than Israel . He revealed that attitude of the administration , which is in effect gambling that once Iran has sufficient HEU , they wo n't have a weapon to use with it . Then , Biden ( between smirks and chuckles ) said they are counting on superior intelligence gathering to know when Iran is " starting the process of building the weapon . " Waiting for the weapon would be a shockingly late response in this writer 's view .

source: Tracks I and II did , in fact , move together in the month after September 15 . Ambassador Korry , who was formally excluded from Track II , was authorized to encourage a military coup , provided Frei concurred in that solution . At the 40 Committee meeting on September 14 , he and other " appropriate members of the Embassy mission " were authorized to intensify their contacts with Chilean military officers to assess their willingness to support the " Frei gambit . " The Ambassador was also authorized to make his contacts in the Chilean military aware that if Allende were seated , the military could expect no further military assistance ( MAP ) from the United States . Later , Korry was authorized to inform the Chilean military that all MAP and military sales were being held in abeyance pending the outcome of the congressional election on October 24 .
domestication: 事实上，9月15日之后的一个月里，第一轨道和第二轨道确实同步行动了。科里大使虽然正式被排除在第二轨道之外，但还是得到授权，只要弗雷同意这一方案，他就可以鼓动军事政变。9月14日的40委员会会议上，科里和其他“使馆任务的适当成员”被授权加强与智利军方官员的联系，评估他们对“弗雷计谋”的支持意愿。大使还被授权告知智利军方，如果阿连德上台，他们将不再获得美国的任何军事援助。后来，科里又得到授权，通知智利军方，所有军事援助和军售都暂缓执行，直到10月24日国会选举结果出来再说。
foreignization: 第一轨道和第二轨道事实上在9月15日之后的一个月内确实共同行动了。被正式排除在第二轨道之外的科里大使被授权鼓励军事政变，前提是弗雷同意这一解决方案。在9月14日的40委员会会议上，他和其他“使馆任务的适当成员”被授权加强与智利军队军官的接触，以评估他们支持“弗雷赌博”的意愿。大使还被授权让智利军队知道，如果阿连德就任，军方将不再获得美国的任何进一步军事援助（MAP）。后来，科里被授权通知智利军方，所有MAP和军事销售都因等待10月24日国会选举的结果而被搁置。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Tracks I and II did , in fact , move together in the month after September 15 . Ambassador Korry , who was formally excluded from Track II , was authorized to encourage a military coup , provided Frei concurred in that solution . At the 40 Committee meeting on September 14 , he and other " appropriate members of the Embassy mission " were authorized to intensify their contacts with Chilean military officers to assess their willingness to support the " Frei gambit . " The Ambassador was also authorized to make his contacts in the Chilean military aware that if Allende were seated , the military could expect no further military assistance ( MAP ) from the United States . Later , Korry was authorized to inform the Chilean military that all MAP and military sales were being held in abeyance pending the outcome of the congressional election on October 24 .

source: Roiduboi nails it here . The problem here is the economy sucks . So far , all the people posting are dodging that topic to propose solutions to other stuff--the deficit , mostly , which would be largely eliminated in the medium term if we fixed the economy and let the Bush tax cuts go to their long-delayed grave . ( Yes , there would still be a long-term issue , but that can be tackled , y'know , over the long term . )
domestication: Roiduboi 这话说得真到位。问题就在于经济太烂了。到目前为止，所有发帖的人都在避重就轻，提出解决其他问题的方案——主要是赤字问题。如果咱们能改善经济，让布什时代的减税政策早点成为历史，中期的赤字问题基本上就能解决了。没错，长期来看还有问题，但那可以慢慢来嘛。

我很高兴像洛洛·琼斯这样的基督徒能参加奥运会。但她能给丈夫的比她的童贞或金牌更珍贵。作为神的形象的承载者和神的辅助战士，她将成为丈夫在共同面对堕落世界生活挑战时的蒙福盟友。

source: But what happened in 2012 is that some ( former ) Independents switched to calling themselves Democrats . And some ( former ) Republicans switched to Independent . Republicans switched because the Republican primary campaign rhetoric was so repugnant -- to women , to Hispanics , to LGBT people , to educated people who believe in science , to non-rich people , and to others , that they did n't want to be associated with the Republican brand .
domestication: 2012年发生的事儿是，一些原本的独立派改称自己为民主党人，而一些原本的共和党人则转投了独立派。共和党人之所以倒戈，是因为当时的共和党内初选言论实在让人难以忍受——对女性不友好，对拉丁裔有偏见，对LGBT群体态度恶劣，对相信科学的知识分子嗤之以鼻，对非富人阶层也不友好，这些人因此不想再跟共和党的牌子扯上关系。

source: The presence of women at the elite international level is certainly a departure from the ancient Olympic Games , which were reserved entirely for men . Women first competed at the Olympics at the 1900 Paris Games in lawn tennis and golf . In 1928 , gymnastics and track were added , expanding opportunities for women , but distance running events over 200 meters were eliminated in 1960 , due to unconfirmed reports that women collapsed after running a longer race , according to Olympic historian Bill Mallon .
domestication: 女子出现在国际顶级赛场上，这与古奥运会的情形大相径庭，那时候的比赛完全是男人的天下。女子首次登上奥运舞台是在1900年的巴黎奥运会上，当时她们参加了草地网球和高尔夫比赛。到了1928年，女子体操和田径项目被加入进来，给女性选手提供了更多机会。不过，由于有未经证实的消息说，女子在跑长距离后会体力不支甚至倒下，所以在1960年，200米以上的长跑项目又被取消了。这都是奥运历史学家比尔·马隆告诉我们的。
foreignization: 女性在国际精英层的存在无疑是与古代奥运会的完全男性化截然不同。女性首次参加奥运会是在1900年巴黎奥运会的草地网球和高尔夫项目中。1928年，体操和田径被加入，扩大了女性的机会，但1960年，200米以上的长距离跑步项目被取消，据奥运历史学家比尔·马隆称，原因是有关女性在长距离比赛中跑完后倒下的未经证实的报道。

source: A group of American businessmen in Chile offered to provide one and a half million dollars to be administered and disbursed covertly by the U.S. Government to prevent Allende from winning the 1964 presidential election . This offer went to the 303 Committee ( the name of the Special Group after June 1964 ) which decided not to accept the offer . It decided that offers from American business could not be accepted , that they were neither a secure way nor an honorable way of doing business . This decision was a declaration of policy which set the precedent for refusing to accept such collaboration between CIA and private business . However , CIA money represented as private money , was passed to the Christian Democrats through a private businessman .
domestication: 一群在美国的商人提出，愿意提供一百五十万美元，由美国政府秘密管理和分配，以阻止阿连德赢得1964年的总统选举。这笔钱到了303委员会（1964年6月之后该特别小组的名字）那里，但他们决定不接受。委员会认为，不能接受美国商人的资助，这既不安全也不体面。这一决定宣布了政策，为拒绝中情局与私营企业的这种合作树立了先例。然而，中情局的钱还是通过一位私营业者转给了基督教民主党。
foreignization: 一群在美国智利的商人提出提供一百五十万美元，由美国政府秘密管理和分发，以防止阿连德赢得1964年的总统选举。这一提议提交给了303委员会（1964年6月之后特别小组的名称），该委员会决定不接受这一提议。它认为不能接受美国商人的资助，因为这不是一种安全的也不是体面的做生意方式。这一决定是一项政策声明，为拒绝中情局与私营企业之间的此类合作树立了先例。然而，被伪装成私人资金的中情局资金，还是通过一名私人商人转给了基督教民主党。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

A group of American businessmen in Chile offered to provide one and a half million dollars to be administered and disbursed covertly by the U.S. Government to prevent Allende from winning the 1964 presidential election . This offer went to the 303 Committee ( the name of the Special Group after June 1964 ) which decided not to accept the offer . It decided that offers from American business could not be accepted , that they were neither a secure way nor an honorable way of doing business . This decision was a declaration of policy which set the precedent for refusing to accept such collaboration between CIA and private business . However , CIA money represented as private money , was passed to the Christian Democrats through a private businessman .

source: This is the beginning of an important discussion . We 're fooling ourselves if we think we 've only just had a recession and are in danger of a second one . It 's worse than that , as Posner states . But there are other solutions as well . Cap and Trade could go a long way toward saving us from the brink we 're on of a disaster far worse than an economic depression , and generate much-needed revenue . Eliminating the cap on social security payroll taxes for wealthy people would solve the Social Security deficit . Eliminating ALL the Bush tax cuts would have a profound positive impact on the economy . Though I have to say I disagree with some of Posner 's proposals ; the working poor should not have to pay ... view full comment
domestication: 这是个重要讨论的开始。如果我们以为刚刚经历了一场经济衰退，现在又面临第二场的风险，那我们就是在自欺欺人。实际情况比这还要糟糕，正如波斯纳所说。但还有其他解决办法。实行“总量控制与交易”制度能大大帮助我们远离即将面临的灾难边缘，这个灾难比经济萧条还要严重得多，同时也能带来急需的收入。取消对富人的社会保障工资税上限，可以解决社会保障赤字问题。完全取消布什时代的减税政策，将对经济产生深远的积极影响。不过，我得说，我对波斯纳的一些提议并不赞同；低收入者不应该被要求……查看完整评论

Eliminating the cap on social security payroll taxes for wealthy people would solve the Social Security deficit . source: In Latin America you see contempt from the honest person who is of high status but is being questioned by someone deemed by them of lower status or of lesser education or social ranking . I have also seen contempt from the pathologically narcissistic as they react to questions from those they deem below them , which is just about everybody in their eyes . So I would caution anyone to claim or proclaim they can tell someone is lying just from displays of contempt , that is just absolute unsubstantiated rubbish .

source: Are there foods that you want to stay away from ? Anything that 's hard to eat in the dark ? We do ribs here , and some people complain that those can get messy in a dark theatre , but that 's the only complaint that we really get . Soups , you ca n't really do those . We make things like kimchi , but something we have to think about is that we have such a broad clientele that we ca n't go too pointed with our flavors . A lot of my background is very casual too . The big thing I leared from CentraArchy is making the food fit together back there so it 's easy to get out in large volumes quickly , but also finding food that has a mass appeal and is still delicious .
domestication: 有没有什么食物是你想避开的？比如说，那些在黑暗中不好吃的东西？我们这里有排骨，有些人抱怨说，在漆黑的电影院里吃这些会弄得很乱，但这几乎是唯一一个我们收到的抱怨了。汤类，那是真的不行。我们会做一些泡菜，但得考虑到我们的顾客群很广，不能把口味做得太重。我自己的背景也偏向休闲风格。从CentraArchy学到的一点就是，后厨要能快速大批量出餐，同时还得找到大众喜欢又美味的食物。

source: At the recent dedication of the Martin Luther King , Jr . memorial in Washington , D.C. , President Obama said the slain civil rights leader would recognize many challenges our nation faces today , including neighborhoods with underfunded schools and inadequate health care . But since Dr. King 's time , much has changed . Not only African-Americans , but women , Hispanics , and homosexuals have -- and still are -- waging civil rights campaigns . And while some problems persist , great strides have been made toward equal rights , including passage of the Americans with Disabilites Act and the ability of gays to serve openly in the military . Diane and her guests discuss civil rights in America today .  Related Links  Program Highlights
domestication: 最近，在华盛顿特区马丁·路德·金纪念公园的落成典礼上，奥巴马总统说，这位遇刺的民权领袖如果看到今天国家面临的许多挑战，比如资金不足的学校和医疗保健不足的社区，一定不会感到陌生。但自金博士的时代以来，变化巨大。不仅非裔美国人，还有女性、拉丁裔和同性恋者，都在进行着或继续进行着民权运动。尽管一些问题仍然存在，但在争取平等权利方面已经取得了巨大的进展，比如《残疾人法案》的通过，以及同性恋者可以公开在军队服役。戴安和她的嘉宾们讨论了当今美国的民权状况。相关链接：节目亮点

source: " Until we get the results of your neuropsychology tests we wo n't know for sure if you have a PCS . But if you do , then we 'll need to work out a rehabilitation plan . All going well , I would think you 'd be back to normal within a few months , but recovery from PCS is very variable and it could take longer . I 'm afraid that it 's going to take a lot of patience . " I did n't add that returning to rugby at all might prove to be a very bad idea ; at this point Jason needed to hang onto hope rather than be battered with what would probably seem to him to be the worst possible scenario .
domestication:
在拿到你的神经心理学测试结果之前，我们还不能确定你是不是有PCS。但要是真有的话，我们就得制定一个康复计划了。如果一切顺利的话，我想你几个月后就能恢复正常，不过PCS的恢复情况千差万别，可能需要更长的时间。这可得有足够的耐心才行。

我没说回去打橄榄球可能是个糟糕透顶的主意；现在杰森需要的是抓住希望，而不是被最坏的结果打击得灰心丧气。

source: Organized by decade , with commentary by some of the magazine 's finest writers , this landmark collection showcases the work of the hundreds of talented artists who have contributed cartoons over the course of The New Yorker 's eight-two-year history . From the early cartoons of Peter Arno , George Price and Charles Addams to the cutting-edge work of Alex Gregory , Matthew Diffee and Bruce Eric Kaplan ( with stops along the way for the genius of Charles Barsotti , Roz Chast , Jack Ziegler , George Booth , and many others ) , the art collected here forms , as David Remnick puts it in his Foreword , " the longest-running popular comic genre in American life . "
domestication: 按十年编排，由杂志的一些顶尖作家点评，这套里程碑式的合集展示了《纽约客》八十二年历史中数百位才华横溢的艺术家所贡献的漫画作品。从彼得·阿诺、乔治·普莱斯和查尔斯·亚当斯早期的卡通，到亚历克斯·格雷戈里、马修·迪菲和布鲁斯·埃里克·卡普兰的尖端作品（途中还收录了查尔斯·巴索蒂、罗兹·查斯特、杰克·齐格勒、乔治·布斯等多位天才的佳作），这里收集的艺术作品正如大卫·雷姆尼克在序言中所说，“构成了美国生活中最长久的流行漫画类型。”
foreignization: 按十年编排，由杂志的一些最优秀的作家撰写评论，这部里程碑式的合集展示了在《纽约客》八十二年历史中为该杂志贡献漫画的数百位才华横溢的艺术家的作品。从彼得·阿诺、乔治·普赖斯和查尔斯·亚当斯的早期漫画，到亚历克斯·格雷戈里、马修·迪菲和布鲁斯·埃里克·卡普兰的前沿作品（途中还包括查尔斯·巴索蒂、罗兹·查斯特、杰克·齐格勒、乔治·布思等人的天才之作），这里收集的艺术品构成了，正如大卫·雷姆尼克在其前言中所说的，“美国生活中最长盛不衰的流行漫画类型。”

source: My great uncle joined the Royal Artillery shortly before the war . He was stationed in Guernsey when he deserted the army to be with his sweetheart . To avoid the military police he went first to South Africa , then to India , before ending up working as a farm hand on a mate 's ranch in Australia , which was where he was when the fighting began . Unable to join the British army again due to his deserter status , he volunteered along with his best friend and 1 in 2 Australian men for the Australian and New Zealand Army Corps , and was shipped off to a place on the coast of Turkey known as Gallipoli .
domestication: 我大伯在战前加入了皇家炮兵。他在根西岛驻扎时，为了心上人离队逃跑。为了躲避军警，他先是去了南非，然后又去了印度，最后在澳大利亚一个朋友的农场当起了帮工，战争爆发时，他就在那里。因为逃兵的身份，他无法再加入英国军队，于是和最好的朋友一起，还有几乎一半的澳大利亚男人，志愿加入了澳新军团，被派往土耳其海岸的一个地方，叫加里波利。
foreignization: 我的大舅在战争前夕加入了皇家炮兵。他被派驻到根西岛时，为了和心上人在一起而逃离了军队。为了避免军事警察的追捕，他先去了南非，然后去了印度，最后在澳大利亚的一个朋友的牧场里当农场工人，战争开始时他就在那里。由于逃兵的身份，他无法再次加入英军，于是和他的最好的朋友以及每两个澳大利亚男人中的一个一起志愿加入了澳大利亚和新西兰军团，并被派往土耳其海岸的一个地方，称为加里波利。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

My great uncle joined the Royal Artillery shortly before the war . He was stationed in Guernsey when he deserted the army to be with his sweetheart . To avoid the military police he went first to South Africa , then to India , before ending up working as a farm hand on a mate 's ranch in Australia , which was where he was when the fighting began . Unable to join the British army again due to his deserter status , he volunteered along with his best friend and 1 in 2 Australian men for the Australian and New Zealand Army Corps , and was shipped off to a place on the coast of Turkey known as Gallipoli .
我大伯在战前加入了皇家炮兵。他在根西岛驻扎时，为了心上人离队逃跑。为了躲避军警，他先是去了南非，然后又去了印度，最后在澳大利亚一个朋友的农场当起了帮工，战争爆发时，他就在那里。因为逃兵的身份，他无法再加入英国军队，于是和最好的朋友一起，还有几乎一半的澳大利亚男人，志愿加入了澳新军团，被派往土耳其海岸的一个地方，叫加里波利。

My great uncle joined the Royal Artillery shortly before the war . He was stationed in Guernsey when he deserted the army to be with his sweetheart . To avoid the military police he went first to South Africa , then to India , before ending up working as a farm hand on a mate 's ranch in Australia , which was where he was when the fighting began . Unable to join the British army again due to his deserter status , he volunteered along with his best friend and 1 in 2 Australian men for the Australian and New Zealand Army Corps , and was shipped off to a place on the coast of Turkey known as Gallipoli .
我的大舅在战争前夕加入了皇家炮兵。他被派驻到根西岛时，为了和心上人在一起而逃离了军队。为了避免军事警察的追捕，他先去了南非，然后去了印度，最后在澳大利亚的一个朋友的牧场里当农场工人，战争开始时他就在那里。由于逃兵的身份，他无法再次加入英军，于是和他的最好的朋友以及每两个澳大利亚男人中的一个一起志愿加入了澳大利亚和新西兰军团，并被派往土耳其海岸的一个地方，称为加里波利。

source: HMOs -- Health Maintenance Organization plans . These managed care plans offer the best pricing but the least flexibility . They do so by limiting your care to the doctors , clinics and hospitals within the HMO 's network . HMOs also require you to choose a primary care physician ( PCP ) who coordinates your health care and provides you referrals before you are able to visit other network doctors . Go outside the network and your services are n't covered . For information about HMO plans , which are regulated by the California Department of Managed Care , go to www.dmhc.ca.gov .
domestication: HMO，就是健康维护组织计划。这类管理式医疗计划价格最优惠，但灵活性最低。原因是它们限制你在HMO网络内的医生、诊所和医院接受治疗。HMO还要求你选择一位家庭医生，由他来协调你的医疗服务，并在你需要看其他网络内的医生时提供转诊。如果你跑到网络外就医，费用就不报销了。想了解更多关于HMO计划的信息，可以访问加州管理医疗部的网站：www.dmhc.ca.gov。

source: " My father 's next door buying my books , and mother 's up the street looking at wands , " said the boy . He had a bored , drawling voice . source: Frustrated by the local populations ' reluctance to accept Christianity , some priests tore down native temples and burned their spiritual artifacts . Most notably , in 1562 , Franciscan friar Diego de Landa burned five thousand Mayan religious images and at least twenty-seven hieroglyphic rolls . Landa went on to stage his own inquisition , in which he tortured over four thousand Indians , 158 of them to death .
domestication: 当地居民不愿接受基督教，这让一些传教士十分恼火，他们拆毁了原住民的神庙，烧毁了他们的宗教器物。最著名的是1562年，方济会修士迭戈·德·兰达烧毁了五千个玛雅宗教雕像和至少二十七卷象形文字经卷。兰达还自导自演了一场宗教审判，折磨了四千多名印第安人，其中158人被活活折磨至死。
foreignization: 由于当地居民不愿意接受基督教，一些神父拆毁了本土的庙宇并焚烧了他们的宗教物品。最著名的是，在1562年，方济各会修士迭戈·德·兰达烧毁了五千个玛雅宗教图像和至少二十七卷象形文字卷轴。兰达接着进行了他自己的审判，其中他折磨了四千多名印第安人，其中158人被折磨致死。

source: The pattern of United States covert action in Chile is striking but not unique . It arose in the context not only of American foreign policy , but also of covert U.S. involvement in other countries within and outside Latin America . The scale of CIA involvement in Chile was unusual but by no means unprecedented .
domestication: 美国在智利的秘密行动模式引人注目，但并非独一无二。这不仅与美国的外交政策有关，还与美国在拉丁美洲内外其他国家的秘密干预密不可分。中情局在智利的活动规模非同寻常，但也不是史无前例。
foreignization: 美国在智利的秘密行动模式引人注目，但并非独一无二。它不仅在美国外交政策的背景下出现，也出现在美国在拉丁美洲内外其他国家的秘密介入中。中央情报局在智利的介入规模不同寻常，但绝非史无前例。

messages_domestication.content:

The pattern of United States covert action in Chile is striking but not unique . source: This , of course , does not mean that all these molecular events do nothing -- their very existence is a form of function . But we are generally interested in different types of function -- things that did arise through natural selection , are maintained by purifying selection , and whose disruption will cause a disease or other significant phenotype . Of course these things exist amidst the rubble . The question is how to find them . And here , I think we should once again take our cue from Kimura .
domestication: 当然，这并不意味着这些分子事件啥也不干——它们的存在本身就是一种功能。但我们通常关注的是另一类功能——那些通过自然选择产生的、由净化选择维持的，一旦出现问题就会导致疾病或其他显著表型的东西。这些东西当然藏在一堆乱七八糟的东西里。问题是怎么找出来。这里我觉得我们应该再次借鉴金村的观点。
foreignization: 这当然并不意味着所有这些分子事件都无所作为——它们的存在本身就是一种功能。但我们通常对不同类型的功感兴趣——那些通过自然选择产生的、由净化选择维持的、其破坏会导致疾病或其他显著表型的事物。当然，这些东西存在于废墟之中。问题是如何找到它们。在这方面，我认为我们应该再次以木村资生的研究为启示。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

This , of course , does not mean that all these molecular events do nothing -- their very existence is a form of function . But we are generally interested in different types of function -- things that did arise through natural selection , are maintained by purifying selection , and whose disruption will cause a disease or other significant phenotype . Of course these things exist amidst the rubble . The question is how to find them . And here , I think we should once again take our cue from Kimura .

source: For now , analysts said they expected the broader economic impact of rising food prices to be modest . Americans spend just 13 percent of their household budgets on food . source: The Diverse Environment Theory is the core principle behind school desegregation today . Then Ashley and I began talking to the scholars who 've compiled that very research .

source: The middle seat in any row is generally undesirable . SeatGuru also identifies other potential problems on its seat maps , such as limited recline or reduced seat width .

source: Four groups of researchers , including Columbia 's DiPrete , who looked at several years ' performance at 1,183 companies for a study published in 2011 , found evidence that companies were probably cherry-picking better-paid peers intentionally , with three of them concluding that boards had no legitimate justification for doing so .
domestication: 四个研究小组，其中包括哥伦比亚大学的迪普雷特，他们研究了1183家公司在几年里的表现，2011年发表了一项研究，结果发现这些公司很可能是在故意挑选那些薪酬更高的同行作为比较对象，而且其中有三个小组认为董事会这样做完全没有正当理由。
foreignization: 四个研究小组，包括哥伦比亚大学的迪普雷特，他们在2011年发表的一项研究中考察了1183家公司在几年的表现，发现证据表明公司可能有意挑选薪酬较高的同行，其中三个小组得出结论认为董事会这样做没有正当理由。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Four groups of researchers , including Columbia 's DiPrete , who looked at several years ' performance at 1,183 companies for a study published in 2011 , found evidence that companies were probably cherry-picking better-paid peers intentionally , with three of them concluding that boards had no legitimate justification for doing so .
四个研究小组，其中包括哥伦比亚大学的迪普雷特，他们研究了1183家公司在几年里的表现，2011年发表了一项研究，结果发现这些公司很可能是在故意挑选那些薪酬更高的同行作为比较对象，而且其中有三个小组认为董事会这样做完全没有正当理由。

source: Since 2009 , China 's banks flooded the country with over $5 trillion in loans to pump up the economy in the face of flagging exports . Many empty cities were built . source: Dr. Robert Ballard is one of the world 's most renowned ocean explorers , with such amazing finds as Titanic , the Battleship Bismarck and JFK 's PT1-09 to his name . But this time he 's going on a journey like no other . He 's setting out on an underwater odyssey down the world 's tallest mountain ! No , it 's not Everest at 29,000 ft . It 's Mauna Kea in Hawai'i . Standing 13,800 feet above sea level , this Pacific giant also reaches down another 19,700 ft into the Alien Deep . And there he dares to enter the active crater of a huge underwater volcano . Then he comes face-to-face with the extraordinary inhabitants of the bizarre deep sea world . The following is a production journal from Alien Deep crew-member Katy Andres .
domestication: 罗伯特·巴拉德博士是世界上最有名的海洋探险家之一，他发现过泰坦尼克号、战列舰俾斯麦号和肯尼迪总统的PT109艇。但这次，他要进行一次前所未有的探险。他将踏上一场穿越世界最高峰的海底之旅！不是29000英尺高的珠穆朗玛峰，而是夏威夷的莫纳克亚山。这座太平洋巨人海拔13800英尺，其根部则深埋在海底19700英尺处，直达异界深渊。巴拉德博士勇闯这座巨大活火山的喷发口，与奇异的深海生物面对面。以下是异界深渊团队成员凯蒂·安德烈斯的生产日志。
foreignization: 罗伯特·巴拉德博士是世界上最著名的海洋探险家之一，他发现了许多惊人的遗迹，如泰坦尼克号、战列舰俾斯麦和肯尼迪总统的PT1-09快艇。但这次他将进行一次前所未有的旅程。他将展开一次潜入世界最高峰的水下奥德赛！不，这并不是29,000英尺高的珠穆朗玛峰。而是夏威夷的莫纳克亚山。这座太平洋巨峰海拔13,800英尺，同时向下延伸至外星深渊19,700英尺。他敢于进入一座巨大的海底火山活跃的火山口。然后他将与奇异深海世界的奇特居民面对面。以下是来自“外星深渊”摄制组成员凯蒂·安德烈斯的制作日志。

source: In honor of the last week of the Olympics , I would like to provide some thoughts on things I learned by watching the 2012 games this weekend . First , trampoline is an awesome sport . It 's bouncy and fun , but those athletes likely have rock solid abs from all those flips . Second , I love the Bryan brothers for this embrace after they won the gold medal in men 's doubles . Third , Usain Bolt is a beast . End of story .
domestication: 为了庆祝奥运会最后一周，我想分享一下这个周末看2012年奥运会的一些感想。首先，蹦床比赛真带劲，看着就让人想跳，不过那些运动员的腹肌肯定硬得跟石头一样，毕竟那么多翻腾动作呢。其次，布赖恩兄弟俩在赢得男子双打金牌后的拥抱太温馨了，真是让人感动。最后，博尔特简直是个怪兽，没得说！

source: Like many civilizations around the world , New World people believed in various forms of life after death and were often buried with items they might need in that afterlife . The Incas ' belief that a person could not enter the afterlife unless their body was kept intact led them to mummify their rulers and care for them as if they were still alive .
domestication: 和世界上许多文明一样，新大陆的人民也相信各种死后世界，并常常陪葬一些来世可能用得上的物品。印加人认为，若尸体不完整，亡灵就无法进入来世，因此他们将死去的君主制成木乃伊，继续像生前那样照料他们。

source: For the narcissists among us , this is like heaven . WordPress.com , which hosts our VentureBeat blog , reported that in 2011 , I wrote 1,787 posts consisting of 1,097,692 words . Now I know my goal for this year is to do 1,788 posts with 1,097,692 words . However , it was worth noting that I was the least efficient writer at VentureBeat , with 614 words per post and the least traffic per post compared to my fellow writers , who were less wordy and had higher average traffic per post .
domestication: 对于我们这些自恋的人来说，这简直是天堂。WordPress.com托管了我们的VentureBeat博客，报道说2011年我写了1787篇文章，总共1097692个字。现在我知道今年的目标了，就是要写1788篇文章，1097692个字。不过，值得一提的是，我在VentureBeat里是最不高效的作家，平均每篇文章614个字，每篇文章的浏览量也是最低的。相比起来，我的同事们文章虽然短，但平均流量却高得多。

source: In this film , Goofy plays a street urchin who becomes a musketeer alongside Mickey and Donald . The trio are assigned to protect Princess Minnie . Unknown to them , Pete has appointed them due to their lack of skill , as skilled musketeers would jeopardize his plans to capture the princess . After Minnie is captured , Goofy attempts to ram the door , but ends up running out the tower window and being bounced back into the room . Goofy is able to repeat the move , and he helps to defeat the Beagle Boy guards who are guarding Minnie .

source: Goto 's are bad because they allows you to jump . The jump in itself is the problem because it breaks the instruction flow arbitrarily - without explicitly expressing the boolean condition for it . Early exits are of the same kind : they do n't express explicitly the boolean condition of the jump . We know where we are jumping . Not why . With time , the boolean equation of the code which determines the instruction flow is unmaintainable . And then you end up not understand where your flow is going through , not because you do n't know where a jump is going , but because you have lost why .
domestication: goto 语句不好，因为它让你随意跳转。问题就在于这个“跳”，它会任意打断程序的执行流程，却没有明确表达出跳转的条件。提前退出也是一样的道理：它们也没能清楚地说明跳转的条件。我们知道要跳到哪里去，但不知道为什么要跳。时间一长，决定程序流程的布尔表达式就变得难以维护了。结果你就搞不清楚程序的流程到底怎么走了，不是因为你不知道跳到哪儿去了，而是因为你忘了为什么要这么跳。
foreignization: Goto 是不好的，因为它们允许你跳转。跳转本身是问题，因为它会任意地中断指令流程——而没有明确表达出跳转的布尔条件。提前退出也是同一种情况：它们没有明确表达出跳转的布尔条件。我们知道我们跳到了哪里。但不知道为什么跳转。随着时间的推移，决定指令流程的代码的布尔方程变得难以维护。然后你就无法理解你的流程将经过哪里，不是因为你不知道一个跳转会去哪里，而是因为你已经失去了为什么要跳转的原因。

With time , the boolean equation of the code which determines the instruction flow is unmaintainable . And then you end up not understand where your flow is going through , not because you do n't know where a jump is going , but because you have lost why .

source: In his preface , Jamie notes how his grilling techniques have evolved over time . I suspect that is true for many of us who " fire up " year round . But some prospective buyers of this book may be considering a first foray into grilling or barbecueing . For those folks , my advice is to take the plunge ; start with something simple , like a burger . One bite and self confidence soars .

source: The author uses a familiar and ancient trope in this first short story , which provides the title for the collection . Authors as far back as Homer described soldiers going into battle by naming the things that they carried : goatskins filled with water , spears , locks of hair from their beloved ones . O'Brien updates this literary strategy . His characters carry the modern implements of war . But the feeling evoked is similar : static lists make the characters seem already dead , prematurely mourned . The lists are like wills .
domestication: 作者在这篇短篇小说中，也就是这个集子的同名作里，用了一个既熟悉又古老的套路。自荷马时代起，作家们在描述士兵上战场时，就会列出他们随身携带的东西：装满水的山羊皮袋、长矛、爱人的一缕头发。奥布赖恩把这个文学手法搬到了现代。他的角色带着现代化的战争工具。但唤起的感觉却是相似的：静态的清单让角色仿佛已经死去，提前被哀悼了。这些清单就像遗嘱一样。
foreignization: 作者在第一篇短篇小说中使用了一个熟悉且古老的题材，这篇小说也为整个集子提供了标题。从荷马开始，作者们就通过列举士兵所携带的物品来描述他们参战的情景：装满水的羊皮囊、长矛、心爱之人的头发。奥布莱恩更新了这一文学策略。他的角色携带的是现代战争的装备。但唤起的感觉是相似的：静态的清单让角色显得已经死去，提前被哀悼。这些清单就像遗嘱。

source: situation perfectly . We are a threat to the punditocracy 's status and position . The more we prove that they know less than those who are not given their exalted position by the corporate media the more precarious their position gets . We will never have their respect . However we will have the last laugh , as most of them are dependent on types of media that are increasingly becoming irrelevant .

source: To sharply increased government spending and a much more progressive Federal tax system , add one more element , higher inflation . Do n't soak up all the dollars printed for government spending . Leave more out there to increase inflation to closer to 5% . The inflation will deflate the value of outstanding debt , both government and consumer and facilitate recovery . Consider it a means of recouping some of the Bush high-end tax cuts that we should never have permitted in the first place .
domestication: 大幅增加政府开支，再配上更加累进的联邦税收制度，再加上一个因素：更高的通胀。别把为了政府开支印的钱都收回来，多留一些在外面，让通胀升到接近5%。这样可以削减现有债务的价值，无论是政府的还是消费者的，有助于经济复苏。这也可以看作是收回一些当初不该批准的布什时期的富人减税政策。
foreignization: 将大幅增加的政府支出和更加累进的联邦税制，再加上一个因素，更高的通货膨胀。不要吸收所有为政府支出而印制的美元。让更多的钱留在外面，以使通货膨胀率接近5%。通货膨胀将削减现有债务的价值，无论是政府债务还是消费者债务，并促进复苏。将其视为收回我们本不应允许的布什高端减税的一种方式。

Consider it a means of recouping some of the Bush high-end tax cuts that we should never have permitted in the first place .

source: It is remarkable that the Court , and especially its Chief Justice , did not apparently consider either the Congressional hearings and testimony , nor the President 's own statements that the mandate WAS NOT considered by them to be a tax . Since only the Congress can levy a tax , and the Congress did not consider the Mandate a tax , it seems that Court , through Roberts , has decided for the American people that it is a tax after all , and despite their wishes .
domestication: 法院，特别是首席大法官，居然没有考虑国会的听证会和证词，也没有考虑总统本人的声明，即强制令并不是他们认为的税收。要知道，只有国会有权征税，而国会并不认为强制令是税。现在看来，最高法院通过罗伯茨大法官，倒是替美国人民做主了，硬是把强制令定性为税，这可真是打了不少人的脸。
foreignization: 值得注意的是，法院，尤其是其首席大法官，似乎没有考虑国会的听证会和证词，也没有考虑总统本人的声明，即强制令不被视为税收。由于只有国会可以征税，而国会并未将强制令视为税收，看来法院通过罗伯茨为美国人民决定它终究是税收，尽管这违背了他们的意愿。

source: PBS also ran a lengthy " historical " program about the Russian occupation of Poland in 1939/1940 - in this program , the Soviet Union received all the blame for the suffering of the Polish people during that time - - but the program did this blaming by letting Hitler and the Nazis completely off the hook ! Not only that ( they included a one sentence gloss about the Nazi invasion of Poland ) , but they even suggested that the Nazi expansion eastward was , in effect , necessary because the Nazis felt threatened by Stalin . So this is the kind of pseudo-history that has been propounded by PBS in the past few years .
domestication: PBS 还播出了一档关于 1939 到 1940 年苏联占领波兰的“历史”节目。在这档节目中，苏联被描绘成导致当时波兰人民苦难的罪魁祸首，而希特勒和纳粹却毫发无损！不仅如此，他们还轻描淡写地提了一句纳粹入侵波兰的事，甚至暗示说，纳粹向东扩张实际上是出于对斯大林威胁的自卫反应。所以，这就是 PBS 近几年来兜售的那种伪历史。

Not only that ( they included a one sentence gloss about the Nazi invasion of Poland ) , but they even suggested that the Nazi expansion eastward was , in effect , necessary because the Nazis felt threatened by Stalin . So this is the kind of pseudo-history that has been propounded by PBS in the past few years .

source: A number of other political actions not requiring 303 Committee approval were conducted . The project to increase the effectiveness and appeal of the Christian Democratic Party and to subsidize the party during the 1964 elections continued into late 1965 or 1966 , as did a project to influence key members of the Socialist Party toward orthodox European socialism and away from communism . During this period , the CIA dealt with a Chilean official at the cabinet level , though with scant result .
domestication: 除了那些需要303委员会批准的政治行动外，还有很多其他行动在进行。为了增强基督教民主党在民众中的吸引力和影响力，并在1964年大选中为其提供资金支持，项目一直持续到了1965年底或1966年。同时，还有一项计划试图影响社会党关键成员，让他们更倾向于正统的欧洲社会主义，远离共产主义。在这期间，中情局与智利的一位内阁官员打交道，但成效甚微。

source: 2 ) Taxes . Higher taxes are the only way to pay for what the nation badly needs , and yet the Republicans blindly follow a path of reckless tax-cut advocacy . If Obama loses , we will get no tax increases on the wealthy . In fact , Mitt Romney , as of this writing , would cut rates sharply for upper-income Americans -- even though the George W. Bush tax cuts , a boon for the wealthy , resulted in the slowest rates of GDP and job growth during a recovery and expansion of the post -- World War II period . source: It 's not really about the trophies per se , I find , but more about the completion of a specific challenge . There is something fundamental in human psychology that drives us to achieve these specific tasks , especially when we receive credit for them . XBox Live stumbled onto this early and I challenge you to buy a mainstream XBox game that now does n't include a wide array of achievements ( or ' cheevos ' as the community has dubbed them ) .
domestication: 其实这事儿关键不在于奖杯本身，而在于完成某个特定挑战的过程。人心里头有个劲儿，就是喜欢达成这些具体任务，特别是当这些成就能被认可的时候。XBox Live 很早就摸透了这一点，现在你要是买个主流的 XBox 游戏，十有八九里面都会有一大堆成就（玩家们管这叫“成就”或者“cheevos”）。
foreignization: 这其实并不是真正关于奖杯本身，我发现，而是更多关于完成一个特定的挑战。在人类心理学中有一种基本的东西驱使我们去完成这些特定的任务，尤其是在我们为此获得认可时。XBox Live很早就发现了这一点，我挑战你去买一款现在不包含大量成就（或者社区称之为“cheevos”）的主流XBox游戏。

source: Today , I tell my clients that I 'm a Product Experience Designer. nBut what we do is closely related to many other words. nClients find this confusing . source: Let 's take New York City as an example . In the old , pre-smartphone days , it did n't matter if you were a Brooklyn hipster or a tourist visiting from St. Paul , London or Johannesburg , finding the hottest , trendiest restaurant was no small feat . It took a Herculean effort to find someone in the know , and an even greater determination to actually get a reservation at that rooftop bistro or Cambodian joint you 'd heard so much about . Good restaurants , and dives , have always come with a side dish of tribalism , so good luck finding your way inside ( or to that table on the street ) . However , smart-phones and apps have changed all that .
domestication: 拿纽约市来说吧。在智能手机还没普及的年代，不管你是在布鲁克林的文艺青年，还是从圣保罗、伦敦或约翰内斯堡来的游客，要想找到最热门、最时尚的餐厅可不是件容易的事。找到懂行的人已经够费劲了，更别提还要费九牛二虎之力才能在这家屋顶小酒馆或你听闻已久的柬埔寨餐馆订到位子。好餐厅和小饭馆总是带着一股子圈子文化，想混进去吃上一顿（或者占个街边的位子）可不容易。不过，智能手机和各种应用软件的出现改变了这一切。
foreignization: 让我们以纽约市为例。在智能手机出现之前，无论你是布鲁克林的文艺青年还是来自圣保罗、伦敦或约翰内斯堡的游客，找到最热门、最时尚的餐厅都不是一件小事。要找到一个消息灵通的人已经需要付出巨大的努力，而真正预订到那家你听说过的屋顶小酒馆或柬埔寨餐馆的位置则需要更大的决心。好的餐厅，以及一些小酒馆，一直伴随着部落主义的副作用，所以祝你好运能找到进入（或到达街上的那张桌子）的方式。然而，智能手机和应用程序改变了这一切。
