Let 's take New York City as an example . In the old , pre-smartphone days , it did n't matter if you were a Brooklyn hipster or a tourist visiting from St. Paul , London or Johannesburg , finding the hottest , trendiest restaurant was no small feat . It took a Herculean effort to find someone in the know , and an even greater determination to actually get a reservation at that rooftop bistro or Cambodian joint you 'd heard so much about . Good restaurants , and dives , have always come with a side dish of tribalism , so good luck finding your way inside ( or to that table on the street ) . However , smart-phones and apps have changed all that .

source: " The decision made this evening was a travesty to the Baltimore Public School System , " said Jimmy Gittings , president of the administrators union , which has been fighting the dismissals for more than a year . " It is quite obvious that Dr. Andrs Alonso , the CEO , can buy anything he wants from the board of school commissioners . This decision was a slap in the face of every child , every parent , every teacher and every administrator in this system . "
domestication: 吉米·吉廷斯，管理员工会的会长，对今晚的决定极为不满，他说：“这个决定是对巴尔的摩公立学校系统的严重侮辱。”他们已经为此抗争了一年多。“显然，安德斯·阿隆索博士，作为校长，想从学区董事会那里得到什么就能得到什么。这个决定简直是扇了系统里每个孩子、每个家长、每个老师和每个管理员一记耳光。”
foreignization: “今晚做出的决定是对巴尔的摩公立学校系统的亵渎，”管理员工会主席吉米·吉廷斯说，该工会一年多来一直在反对解雇。“很明显，首席执行官安德斯·阿隆索博士可以向学校委员会购买他想要的任何东西。这个决定是对系统中每一个孩子、每一位家长、每一位教师和每一位管理员的打脸。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" The decision made this evening was a travesty to the Baltimore Public School System , " said Jimmy Gittings , president of the administrators union , which has been fighting the dismissals for more than a year . " It is quite obvious that Dr. Andrs Alonso , the CEO , can buy anything he wants from the board of school commissioners . This decision was a slap in the face of every child , every parent , every teacher and every administrator in this system . "
吉米·吉廷斯，管理员工会的会长，对今晚的决定极为不满，他说：“这个决定是对巴尔的摩公立学校系统的严重侮辱。”他们已经为此抗争了一年多。“显然，安德斯·阿隆索博士，作为校长，想从学区董事会那里得到什么就能得到什么。这个决定简直是扇了系统里每个孩子、每个家长、每个老师和每个管理员一记耳光。”

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" The decision made this evening was a travesty to the Baltimore Public School System , " said Jimmy Gittings , president of the administrators union , which has been fighting the dismissals for more than a year . " It is quite obvious that Dr. Andrs Alonso , the CEO , can buy anything he wants from the board of school commissioners . This decision was a slap in the face of every child , every parent , every teacher and every administrator in this system . "
“今晚做出的决定是对巴尔的摩公立学校系统的亵渎，”管理员工会主席吉米·吉廷斯说，该工会一年多来一直在反对解雇。“很明显，首席执行官安德斯·阿隆索博士可以向学校委员会购买他想要的任何东西。这个决定是对系统中每一个孩子、每一位家长、每一位教师和每一位管理员的打脸。”

source: I had given up attempting to categorize the man on my own , and decided it was time to have the Gothic Council rule on Mr. Cave 's rightful place in the gothic world . Joining me this week is living historian Morrighanne Burns , Hex of the deathrock act Culture Decay , Church of Melkarth ' s Jvstin Whitney , DJs Regen Robinson and Martin Oldgoth , blogger Drusilla Grey , and Carmilla Voiez , author of Starblood .
domestication: 我早就放弃了自己给这个人归类的念头，觉得是时候让哥特议会来决定卡夫先生在哥特世界里的正当地位了。这周和我一起的有：活着的历史学家莫里甘·伯恩斯，死亡摇滚乐队“文化衰败”中的赫克斯，梅尔卡尔特教堂的贾斯汀·惠特尼，DJ雷根·罗宾逊和马丁·老哥特，博主德鲁西拉·格雷，还有《星光血》的作者卡米拉·沃伊兹。

source: I know you are going to say that you have nothing against Muslims , that you were just saying that Obama bends over backwards with terrorists because he ( supposedly ) is a Muslim and sympathizes with Muslim extremists . But please , I beg of you , show me the proof of all these fanatic ramblings of yours . Show me proof of what you are saying is more than what you 've gathered from your own opinions or watching Fox News . Give me concrete evidence so that I can believe you . Prove it to me . Otherwise , all you are is just a pinhead with an inflated sense of ego . And that 's unfortunate .
domestication: 我知道你会说你没有针对穆斯林的意思，只是觉得奥巴马因为（据称）是穆斯林，所以对恐怖分子过于迁就，同情那些穆斯林极端分子。但求求你了，给我看看你的这些疯狂言论的证据吧。证明你说的不仅仅是自己的看法或从福克斯新闻那里听来的。给我点实质性的证据，让我信服。不然的话，你就只是一个自以为是的大脑空空的人。这可真是让人遗憾。

source: After the 1860 signing of the Treaty of Peking , Western countries began to implement their ' cooperation ' policy , so reducing tensions between China and the West . Within this new environment , the Qing government needed to adopt a fresh approach to its relations with Western powers , and the temporary template provided by the unequal treaty system was insufficient to establish a stable , dependable relations . As Qing officials had no reliable norms or guidelines for dealing with foreign affairs , they were often confused and unsure as to how to act , which adversely affected national interests . The Qing government was cognisant of its quandary and of its being the result of ignorance of Western laws and legal systems . It was consequently aware that acquiring knowledge in the uncharted area of diplomacy was an urgent matter .
domestication: 1860年签订《北京条约》后，西方国家开始实施所谓的“合作”政策，中西之间的紧张关系有所缓解。在这样的新环境下，清政府需要采取新的方式来处理与西方列强的关系。但是，不平等条约的临时框架不足以建立稳定可靠的关系。由于清朝官员对外交事务没有可靠的规范和指导，常常感到困惑，不知道该如何行事，这严重影响了国家利益。清政府深知自己处于困境之中，问题的根源在于对西方法律和司法制度的无知。因此，他们认识到，在外交这个未知领域获取知识是当务之急。
foreignization: 在1860年签订《北京条约》之后，西方国家开始实施其“合作”政策，从而减轻了中国与西方之间的紧张关系。在这种新的环境中，清政府需要采取一种新的方式来处理与西方列强的关系，而由不平等条约体系提供的临时模板不足以建立稳定、可靠的关系。由于清朝官员在处理对外事务时没有可靠的规范或指南，他们常常感到困惑和不确定如何行动，这对中国国家利益产生了不利影响。清政府意识到其困境，并认识到这是由于不了解西方法律和法律制度所致。因此，它意识到在外交这一未知领域获取知识是一项紧迫的任务。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

After the 1860 signing of the Treaty of Peking , Western countries began to implement their ' cooperation ' policy , so reducing tensions between China and the West . Within this new environment , the Qing government needed to adopt a fresh approach to its relations with Western powers , and the temporary template provided by the unequal treaty system was insufficient to establish a stable , dependable relations . As Qing officials had no reliable norms or guidelines for dealing with foreign affairs , they were often confused and unsure as to how to act , which adversely affected national interests . The Qing government was cognisant of its quandary and of its being the result of ignorance of Western laws and legal systems . It was consequently aware that acquiring knowledge in the uncharted area of diplomacy was an urgent matter .

1860年签订《北京条约》后，西方国家开始实施所谓的“合作”政策，中西之间的紧张关系有所缓解。在这样的新环境下，清政府需要采取新的方式来处理与西方列强的关系。但是，不平等条约的临时框架不足以建立稳定可靠的关系。由于清朝官员对外交事务没有可靠的规范和指导，常常感到困惑，不知道该如何行事，这严重影响了国家利益。清政府深知自己处于困境之中，问题的根源在于对西方法律和司法制度的无知。因此，他们认识到，在外交这个未知领域获取知识是当务之急。

source: I say it 's a great nation -- we 've got musical groups with names like Throbbing Gristle , and we 've got groups out to censor the libraries for suspected perversion in fairy tales . We 've got young people with purple hair and tattoos and safety pins in their belly buttons , and we 've got barbershop quartets specializing in " Sweet Adeline . " We 've got bikers wearing their leathers roaring up and down the highways and the Amish still in buggies . We 've still got cowboys , and we 've still got Indians , some of whom who are getting very rich from casino gambling .
domestication: 我说这真是个了不起的国家——有乐队起名叫“跳动的磨坊”，还有人跑到图书馆查禁童话里所谓的“猥亵”内容。这边年轻人顶着紫头发，身上刺青，肚脐眼里还穿着安全别针；那边四重唱还在深情演绎《甜蜜的艾达琳》。公路上，穿皮衣的摩托车手呼啸而过，另一边，阿米什人还坐着马车慢悠悠地走。牛仔依旧驰骋，印第安人也还在，有些印第安人还靠赌场发了大财呢。
foreignization: 我说这是一个伟大的国家——我们有像“悸动磨坊”这样的音乐团体，还有团体致力于审查图书馆中涉嫌童话故事中的变态内容。我们有留着紫色头发、纹身和肚脐上戴着安全别针的年轻人，还有专门演唱《甜蜜的阿黛琳》的男声四重唱。我们有穿着皮衣在高速公路上呼啸而过的摩托车手，还有仍然乘着马车的阿米什人。我们依然有牛仔，也有印第安人，其中一些人因为赌场赌博而变得非常富有。

" We 've got bikers wearing their leathers roaring up and down the highways and the Amish still in buggies . source: During the period prior to the September election , ITT representatives met frequently with CIA representatives both in Chile and in the United States and CIA advised ITT as to ways in which it might safely channel funds both to the Alessandri campaign and to the National Party . CIA was kept informed of the extent and the mechanism of the funding . Eventually at least $350,000 was passed by ITT to this campaign . A roughly equal amount was passed by other U.S. companies ; the CIA learned of this funding but did not assist in it .
domestication: 在9月选举前的那段时间里，ITT的代表们经常与中情局的人在智利和美国会面。中情局还给ITT出谋划策，告诉他们如何安全地给亚历山德里竞选团队和国民党提供资金。中情局一直掌握着资助的规模和方式。最终，ITT给这场竞选至少提供了35万美元。其他美国公司也差不多给了这么多；中情局虽然知道这事儿，但没插手帮忙。
foreignization: 在9月选举之前的一段时间里，ITT的代表经常与中情局的代表在智利和美国会面，中情局向ITT提供了如何安全地向亚历山德里竞选活动和国民党提供资金的方法。中情局掌握了资金的数量和流动机制。最终，ITT向该竞选活动提供了至少35万美元。其他美国公司也提供了大致相等的金额；中情局得知了这笔资金，但没有参与其中。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

During the period prior to the September election , ITT representatives met frequently with CIA representatives both in Chile and in the United States and CIA advised ITT as to ways in which it might safely channel funds both to the Alessandri campaign and to the National Party . CIA was kept informed of the extent and the mechanism of the funding . Eventually at least $350,000 was passed by ITT to this campaign . A roughly equal amount was passed by other U.S. companies ; the CIA learned of this funding but did not assist in it .

source: The danger was greater still . Whatever the truth about communication between the CIA and the White House after October 15 , 1970 -an issue which is the subject of conflicting testimony- all participants agreed that Track II constituted a broad mandate to the CIA . The Agency was given to believe it had virtual carte blanche authority ; moreover , it felt under extreme pressure to prevent Allende from coming to power , by military coup if necessary . It was given little guidance about what subsequent clearances it needed to obtain from the White House . Under these conditions , CIA consultation with the White House in advance of specific actions was less than meticulous .
domestication: 危险更大了。关于1970年10月15日后中情局与白宫之间的沟通情况，各方证词不一，但所有参与者都同意，第二轨道计划给了中情局广泛的授权。中情局认为自己几乎有完全的自由裁量权；而且，他们感到极大压力，必须阻止阿连德上台，必要时甚至可以发动军事政变。然而，对于后续需要从白宫获得哪些具体批准，中情局得到的指导很少。在这种情况下，中情局在采取具体行动前与白宫的沟通并不十分严谨。
foreignization: 危险更大。无论1970年10月15日之后中情局与白宫之间的沟通真相如何——这是一个存在矛盾证词的问题——所有参与者都同意，“第二轨道”构成了对中情局的广泛授权。该机构被赋予了几乎空白支票式的权力；此外，它感到极大的压力，必须阻止阿连德上台，必要时甚至可以通过军事政变。它几乎没有得到关于需要从白宫获得哪些后续批准的指导。在这些条件下，中情局在采取具体行动前与白宫的磋商远非严谨。

The danger was greater still . Whatever the truth about communication between the CIA and the White House after October 15 , 1970 -an issue which is the subject of conflicting testimony- all participants agreed that Track II constituted a broad mandate to the CIA . The Agency was given to believe it had virtual carte blanche authority ; moreover , it felt under extreme pressure to prevent Allende from coming to power , by military coup if necessary . It was given little guidance about what subsequent clearances it needed to obtain from the White House . Under these conditions , CIA consultation with the White House in advance of specific actions was less than meticulous .

source: I do n't think the football analogy is so apt . Sumo is probably a better analogy . Decades ago , I 'm sure sumo represented a " pure " , unique tradition , seeped within a deeply embedded Japanese culture that would n't be penetrated by non-Japanese . Fast forward to today where there are top level sumo wrestlers from eastern Europe and Mongolia . This development may have come at the cost of alienating the hardcore traditionalists , but for these athlete 's , they have demonstrated a deep reverence toward the sport of sumo and its cultural roots and have been able to be accepted in the sumo world because of that . The sushi world may not be that far behind .
domestication: 我觉得足球的比喻不太合适，相扑可能更贴切。几十年前，相扑肯定代表着一种“纯粹”的、独特的传统，深深植根于日本文化之中，外人很难涉足。如今，顶级相扑选手却来自东欧和蒙古。这种变化或许让一些铁杆传统主义者感到不满，但这些运动员对相扑这项运动及其文化根源表现出了深深的敬意，因此也能被相扑界所接受。寿司界可能也不远了。
foreignization: 我不认为足球类比那么恰当。相扑可能是一个更好的类比。几十年前，我相信相扑代表着一种“纯粹”的、独特的传统，深植于不会被非日本人渗透的日本文化之中。快进到今天，有来自东欧和蒙古的顶级相扑力士。这一发展可能使核心传统主义者感到疏远，但对于这些运动员来说，他们展示了对相扑运动及其文化根源的深刻敬意，并因此能够在相扑界获得接受。寿司界可能也不会落后太多。

source: If I choose to eat junk food , slob around , drink heavily and smoke , then my physical body will not be as healthy as it could be . I will not be as great a benefit for society as I otherwise could be . There is an opportunity cost to myself and society by doing this , meaning good things that would have otherwise happened will not happen .
domestication: 如果我选择吃垃圾食品，懒散度日，酗酒抽烟，那我的身体肯定不会太健康。这样一来，我也就不能为社会做出更大的贡献了。这种生活方式不仅对自己不利，对社会也有损失，等于错过了很多本可以做好的事情。

source: At a recent dance concert , I happened to sit with the director of one of Chicago 's finest church music programs . Talk turned to choruses in town . " If I hear a performance , " the gentleman said , " either in person or on a radio broadcast , I can always tell if it 's the Grant Park Chorus prepared by Christopher Bell . It 's as if he has some magic dust he sprinkles on his singers that gives them this incredible precision . "
domestication: 最近的一场舞蹈音乐会上，我碰巧和芝加哥一家顶尖教堂音乐项目的负责人坐在一起。聊着聊着就聊到了城里的合唱团。“只要我听了演出，”这位先生说，“不管是现场还是广播里，都能听出来是不是克里斯托弗·贝尔准备的格兰特公园合唱团。他好像有啥魔法粉似的，往歌手身上一撒，就让他们唱得那么精准无比。”
foreignization: 在最近的一次舞蹈音乐会上，我碰巧与芝加哥最优秀的教堂音乐项目之一的导演坐在一起。话题转向了城里的合唱团。“如果我听到一场演出，”那位先生说，“无论是亲自到场还是通过广播，我总能分辨出是否是由克里斯托弗·贝尔准备的格兰特公园合唱团。就好像他有一种神奇的粉末撒在他的歌手身上，让他们达到了这种令人难以置信的精准。”

source: We are new owners of a small mid-century house in Wheaton MD and proudly have a pink half bath in our basement ! The floral wallpaper is absolutely adorable and the tiles are a sandy pink . It has all the old fixtures ( sadly our chrome soap dish is corroded ) and is absolutely pinktastic . When I find my camera I 'll be sure to post pictures .

source: Serious contemplations of truly horrific and nearly unfathomable incidents of youth violence are rare in film . The question that inevitably follows those tragedies is " Why ? " , but the answer is always maddeningly difficult to discern . Gus Van Sant 's Columbine-inspired Elephant , still the best film made on the subject , sidesteps that question in favor of an attempt to find meaning in the mundane details of the event as it plays out for the victims and the perpetrators .
domestication: 关于青少年暴力事件，电影中真正严肃探讨那些恐怖到难以理解的案例其实很少。每当这种悲剧发生后，人们总会问：“为什么？”但答案总是让人抓狂地难以捉摸。格斯·范·桑特的《象》是目前这个主题上最好的电影，灵感来源于科伦拜恩事件。他没有直接回答这个问题，而是试图从事件的日常细节中寻找意义，这些细节发生在受害者和行凶者身上。
foreignization: 对真正恐怖且几乎难以理解的青少年暴力事件进行严肃思考的电影非常罕见。这些悲剧之后不可避免地会提出“为什么？”的问题，但答案总是令人恼怒地难以明了。格斯·范·桑特受科伦拜恩事件启发的《大象》，仍然是该主题下最好的电影，绕开了这个问题，转而试图在事件对受害者和施暴者展开的过程中找到日常细节中的意义。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Serious contemplations of truly horrific and nearly unfathomable incidents of youth violence are rare in film . The question that inevitably follows those tragedies is " Why ? " , but the answer is always maddeningly difficult to discern . Gus Van Sant 's Columbine-inspired Elephant , still the best film made on the subject , sidesteps that question in favor of an attempt to find meaning in the mundane details of the event as it plays out for the victims and the perpetrators .

source: Michelle on education please discuss the way some states such as the way Ohio distributes education funds Ohio Supreme Court ruled the system unconstitutional four times ... yet nothing has changed and certainly will not change with Republican Governor Kasich who slashed education funding by 780 million
domestication: 米歇尔谈教育问题时，请讲讲像俄亥俄州这种地方是怎么分配教育经费的。俄亥俄州最高法院已经四次裁定这个系统违宪了……但啥也没变，尤其在共和党州长卡西奇手下，他砍掉了7亿8千万的教育经费。
